authors_text: Jasper Brown,Cameron Clark,Sabrina Lomax,Khalid Rafique,Salah Sukkarieh
title: Manipulating UAV Imagery for Satellite Model Training, Calibration and Testing
title_zh: 操纵无人机图像进行卫星模型训练、校准和测试
abstract: Modern livestock farming is increasingly data driven and frequently relies on efficient remote sensing to gather data over wide areas. High resolution satellite imagery is one such data source, which is becoming more accessible for farmers as coverage increases and cost falls. Such images can be used to detect and track animals, monitor pasture changes, and understand land use. Many of the data driven models being applied to these tasks require ground truthing at resolutions higher than satellites can provide. Simultaneously, there is a lack of available aerial imagery focused on farmland changes that occur over days or weeks, such as herd movement. With this goal in mind, we present a new multi-temporal dataset of high resolution UAV imagery which is artificially degraded to match satellite data quality. An empirical blurring metric is used to calibrate the degradation process against actual satellite imagery of the area. UAV surveys were flown repeatedly over several weeks, for specific farm locations. This 5cm/pixel data is sufficiently high resolution to accurately ground truth cattle locations, and other factors such as grass cover. From 33 wide area UAV surveys, 1869 patches were extracted and artificially degraded using an accurate satellite optical model to simulate satellite data. Geographic patches from multiple time periods are aligned and presented as sets, providing a multi-temporal dataset that can be used for detecting changes on farms. The geo-referenced images and 27,853 manually annotated cattle labels are made publicly available.

abstract_zh: 现代畜牧业越来越受到数据驱动，并且经常依赖高效的遥感来收集大范围的数据。高分辨率卫星图像就是这样的数据源之一，随着覆盖范围的扩大和成本的下降，农民越来越容易获得这种数据源。此类图像可用于检测和跟踪动物、监测牧场变化以及了解土地利用情况。应用于这些任务的许多数据驱动模型需要比卫星能够提供的分辨率更高的地面实况。同时，缺乏针对数天或数周内发生的农田变化（例如牛群移动）的可用航空图像。考虑到这一目标，我们提出了一个新的高分辨率无人机图像多时相数据集，该数据集经过人为降级以匹配卫星数据质量。使用经验模糊度量来根据该区域的实际卫星图像来校准退化过程。无人机对特定农场地点进行了数周的反复飞行调查。该 5 厘米/像素数据的分辨率足够高，可以准确地准确描述牛的位置以及草覆盖等其他因素。从 33 次广域无人机勘测中，提取了 1869 个斑块，并使用精确的卫星光学模型模拟卫星数据进行人工降解。来自多个时间段的地理斑块被对齐并呈现为集合，提供可用于检测农场变化的多时态数据集。地理参考图像和 27,853 个手动注释的牛标签均已公开。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种通过人工降质无人机影像生成多时相卫星数据集的方法，用于训练和校准卫星模型。
AI.motivation: 高分辨率卫星影像难以满足农业监测的高精度需求，而无人机影像虽分辨率高但缺乏多时相数据，需构建适配数据集。
AI.method: 重复飞行无人机采集5cm/pixel影像，提取1869个影像块并用卫星光学模型进行人工降质，对齐多时段地理信息生成多时相数据集。
AI.result: 构建包含27,853个标注牛只位置的公开数据集，支持农场变化检测与卫星模型训练校准。
AI.conclusion: 该数据集填补了农业多时相高分辨率数据缺口，为卫星遥感在畜牧业中的应用提供关键支持。

authors_text: Zongxin Yang,Jiaxu Miao,Yunchao Wei,Wenguan Wang,Xiaohan Wang,Yi Yang
title: Scalable Video Object Segmentation with Identification Mechanism
title_zh: 具有识别机制的可扩展视频对象分割
comment: Accepted by TPAMI 2024. Extension of arXiv:2106.02638 (NeurIPS 2021)
comments: Accepted by TPAMI 2024. Extension of arXiv:2106.02638 (NeurIPS 2021)
abstract: This paper delves into the challenges of achieving scalable and effective multi-object modeling for semi-supervised Video Object Segmentation (VOS). Previous VOS methods decode features with a single positive object, limiting the learning of multi-object representation as they must match and segment each target separately under multi-object scenarios. Additionally, earlier techniques catered to specific application objectives and lacked the flexibility to fulfill different speed-accuracy requirements. To address these problems, we present two innovative approaches, Associating Objects with Transformers (AOT) and Associating Objects with Scalable Transformers (AOST). In pursuing effective multi-object modeling, AOT introduces the IDentification (ID) mechanism to allocate each object a unique identity. This approach enables the network to model the associations among all objects simultaneously, thus facilitating the tracking and segmentation of objects in a single network pass. To address the challenge of inflexible deployment, AOST further integrates scalable long short-term transformers that incorporate scalable supervision and layer-wise ID-based attention. This enables online architecture scalability in VOS for the first time and overcomes ID embeddings' representation limitations. Given the absence of a benchmark for VOS involving densely multi-object annotations, we propose a challenging Video Object Segmentation in the Wild (VOSW) benchmark to validate our approaches. We evaluated various AOT and AOST variants using extensive experiments across VOSW and five commonly used VOS benchmarks, including YouTube-VOS 2018 & 2019 Val, DAVIS-2017 Val & Test, and DAVIS-2016. Our approaches surpass the state-of-the-art competitors and display exceptional efficiency and scalability consistently across all six benchmarks. Project page: https://github.com/yoxu515/aot-benchmark.
summary: This paper delves into the challenges of achieving scalable and effective multi-object modeling for semi-supervised Video Object Segmentation (VOS). Previous VOS methods decode features with a single positive object, limiting the learning of multi-object representation as they must match and segment each target separately under multi-object scenarios. Additionally, earlier techniques catered to specific application objectives and lacked the flexibility to fulfill different speed-accuracy requirements. To address these problems, we present two innovative approaches, Associating Objects with Transformers (AOT) and Associating Objects with Scalable Transformers (AOST). In pursuing effective multi-object modeling, AOT introduces the IDentification (ID) mechanism to allocate each object a unique identity. This approach enables the network to model the associations among all objects simultaneously, thus facilitating the tracking and segmentation of objects in a single network pass. To address the challenge of inflexible deployment, AOST further integrates scalable long short-term transformers that incorporate scalable supervision and layer-wise ID-based attention. This enables online architecture scalability in VOS for the first time and overcomes ID embeddings' representation limitations. Given the absence of a benchmark for VOS involving densely multi-object annotations, we propose a challenging Video Object Segmentation in the Wild (VOSW) benchmark to validate our approaches. We evaluated various AOT and AOST variants using extensive experiments across VOSW and five commonly used VOS benchmarks, including YouTube-VOS 2018 & 2019 Val, DAVIS-2017 Val & Test, and DAVIS-2016. Our approaches surpass the state-of-the-art competitors and display exceptional efficiency and scalability consistently across all six benchmarks. Project page: https://github.com/yoxu515/aot-benchmark.
abstract_zh: 本文深入探讨了为半监督视频对象分割（VOS）实现可扩展且有效的多对象建模所面临的挑战。以前的 VOS 方法使用单个正对象解码特征，限制了多对象表示的学习，因为它们必须在多对象场景下单独匹配和分割每个目标。此外，早期的技术迎合特定的应用目标，缺乏满足不同速度精度要求的灵活性。为了解决这些问题，我们提出了两种创新方法：将对象与变压器关联（AOT）和将对象与可扩展变压器关联（AOST）。为了追求有效的多对象建模，AOT 引入了 IDentification (ID) 机制来为每个对象分配唯一的标识。这种方法使网络能够同时对所有对象之间的关联进行建模，从而有助于在单次网络传递中跟踪和分割对象。为了解决部署不灵活的挑战，AOST 进一步集成了可扩展的长期短期变压器，其中包含可扩展的监督和基于 ID 的分层注意力。这首次实现了 VOS 中的在线架构可扩展性，并克服了 ID 嵌入的表示限制。鉴于缺乏涉及密集多对象注释的 VOS 基准，我们提出了一个具有挑战性的野外视频对象分割 (VOSW) 基准来验证我们的方法。我们使用 VOSW 和五个常用 VOS 基准测试（包括 YouTube-VOS 2018 和 2019 Val、DAVIS-2017 Val & Test 和 DAVIS-2016）的大量实验来评估各种 AOT 和 AOST 变体。我们的方法超越了最先进的竞争对手，并在所有六个基准测试中始终表现出卓越的效率和可扩展性。项目页面：https://github.com/yoxu515/aot-benchmark。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种可扩展的视频目标分割方法，通过引入识别机制解决多目标建模和部署灵活性问题。
AI.motivation: 现有视频目标分割方法仅能处理单个目标，难以应对多目标场景，且缺乏适应不同速度-精度需求的灵活性。
AI.method: 提出AOT和AOST两种方法：AOT通过ID机制为每个目标分配唯一身份实现多目标联合建模；AOST引入可扩展的长短期变压器结构，支持在线架构调整和分层ID注意力机制。
AI.result: 在包括VOSW在内的六个基准数据集上，所提方法在分割精度和效率方面均超越现有最佳方法，验证了其可扩展性和鲁棒性。
AI.conclusion: 通过ID机制和可扩展架构设计，本文方法有效解决了多目标视频分割的规模化与灵活性难题，为实际应用提供了新的技术路径。

authors_text: Xiang Zhang,Lijun Yin
title: Multi-Modal Learning for AU Detection Based on Multi-Head Fused Transformers
title_zh: 基于多头熔断变压器的AU检测多模态学习
abstract: Multi-modal learning has been intensified in recent years, especially for applications in facial analysis and action unit detection whilst there still exist two main challenges in terms of 1) relevant feature learning for representation and 2) efficient fusion for multi-modalities. Recently, there are a number of works have shown the effectiveness in utilizing the attention mechanism for AU detection, however, most of them are binding the region of interest (ROI) with features but rarely apply attention between features of each AU. On the other hand, the transformer, which utilizes a more efficient self-attention mechanism, has been widely used in natural language processing and computer vision tasks but is not fully explored in AU detection tasks. In this paper, we propose a novel end-to-end Multi-Head Fused Transformer (MFT) method for AU detection, which learns AU encoding features representation from different modalities by transformer encoder and fuses modalities by another fusion transformer module. Multi-head fusion attention is designed in the fusion transformer module for the effective fusion of multiple modalities. Our approach is evaluated on two public multi-modal AU databases, BP4D, and BP4D+, and the results are superior to the state-of-the-art algorithms and baseline models. We further analyze the performance of AU detection from different modalities.
summary: Multi-modal learning has been intensified in recent years, especially for applications in facial analysis and action unit detection whilst there still exist two main challenges in terms of 1) relevant feature learning for representation and 2) efficient fusion for multi-modalities. Recently, there are a number of works have shown the effectiveness in utilizing the attention mechanism for AU detection, however, most of them are binding the region of interest (ROI) with features but rarely apply attention between features of each AU. On the other hand, the transformer, which utilizes a more efficient self-attention mechanism, has been widely used in natural language processing and computer vision tasks but is not fully explored in AU detection tasks. In this paper, we propose a novel end-to-end Multi-Head Fused Transformer (MFT) method for AU detection, which learns AU encoding features representation from different modalities by transformer encoder and fuses modalities by another fusion transformer module. Multi-head fusion attention is designed in the fusion transformer module for the effective fusion of multiple modalities. Our approach is evaluated on two public multi-modal AU databases, BP4D, and BP4D+, and the results are superior to the state-of-the-art algorithms and baseline models. We further analyze the performance of AU detection from different modalities.
abstract_zh: 近年来，多模态学习得到加强，特别是在面部分析和动作单元检测方面的应用，但仍然存在两个主要挑战：1）表示的相关特征学习和2）多模态的有效融合。最近，有许多工作已经证明了利用注意力机制进行 AU 检测的有效性，但是，大多数研究都将感兴趣区域（ROI）与特征绑定在一起，而很少在每个 AU 的特征之间应用注意力。另一方面，Transformer利用更高效的自注意力机制，已广泛应用于自然语言处理和计算机视觉任务，但在AU检测任务中尚未得到充分探索。在本文中，我们提出了一种用于 AU 检测的新颖的端到端多头融合变压器（MFT）方法，该方法通过变压器编码器从不同模态学习 AU 编码特征表示，并通过另一个融合变压器模块融合模态。融合变压器模块中设计了多头融合注意力，以实现多种模态的有效融合。我们的方法在两个公共多模态 AU 数据库 BP4D 和 BP4D+ 上进行了评估，结果优于最先进的算法和基线模型。我们进一步分析不同方式的 AU 检测性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于多头融合变压器的多模态学习方法，用于改进动作单元（AU）检测。
AI.motivation: 现有方法在多模态特征学习和融合效率上存在不足，且未充分利用变压器机制在AU检测中的潜力。
AI.method: 设计端到端的多头融合变压器（MFT），通过变压器编码器学习多模态特征，并利用融合变压器模块中的多头注意力机制实现跨模态有效融合。
AI.result: 在BP4D和BP4D+数据集上，该方法优于现有算法和基线模型，验证了多模态特征融合的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 多头融合变压器能有效提升多模态AU检测性能，为相关研究提供新思路。

search_text: Multi-Modal Learning for AU Detection Based on Multi-Head Fused Transformers 基于多头熔断变压器的AU检测多模态学习 Multi-modal learning has been intensified in recent years, especially for applications in facial analysis and action unit detection whilst there still exist two main challenges in terms of 1) relevant feature learning for representation and 2) efficient fusion for multi-modalities. Recently, there are a number of works have shown the effectiveness in utilizing the attention mechanism for AU detection, however, most of them are binding the region of interest (ROI) with features but rarely apply attention between features of each AU. On the other hand, the transformer, which utilizes a more efficient self-attention mechanism, has been widely used in natural language processing and computer vision tasks but is not fully explored in AU detection tasks. In this paper, we propose a novel end-to-end Multi-Head Fused Transformer (MFT) method for AU detection, which learns AU encoding features representation from different modalities by transformer encoder and fuses modalities by another fusion transformer module. Multi-head fusion attention is designed in the fusion transformer module for the effective fusion of multiple modalities. Our approach is evaluated on two public multi-modal AU databases, BP4D, and BP4D+, and the results are superior to the state-of-the-art algorithms and baseline models. We further analyze the performance of AU detection from different modalities. 近年来，多模态学习得到加强，特别是在面部分析和动作单元检测方面的应用，但仍然存在两个主要挑战：1）表示的相关特征学习和2）多模态的有效融合。最近，有许多工作已经证明了利用注意力机制进行 AU 检测的有效性，但是，大多数研究都将感兴趣区域（ROI）与特征绑定在一起，而很少在每个 AU 的特征之间应用注意力。另一方面，Transformer利用更高效的自注意力机制，已广泛应用于自然语言处理和计算机视觉任务，但在AU检测任务中尚未得到充分探索。在本文中，我们提出了一种用于 AU 检测的新颖的端到端多头融合变压器（MFT）方法，该方法通过变压器编码器从不同模态学习 AU 编码特征表示，并通过另一个融合变压器模块融合模态。融合变压器模块中设计了多头融合注意力，以实现多种模态的有效融合。我们的方法在两个公共多模态 AU 数据库 BP4D 和 BP4D+ 上进行了评估，结果优于最先进的算法和基线模型。我们进一步分析不同方式的 AU 检测性能。 本文提出一种基于多头融合变压器的多模态学习方法，用于改进动作单元（AU）检测。 Xiang Zhang,Lijun Yin cs.CV

authors_text: Hiroki Nakamura,Masashi Okada,Tadahiro Taniguchi
title: Representation Uncertainty in Self-Supervised Learning as Variational Inference
title_zh: 作为变分推理的自监督学习中的表示不确定性
abstract: In this study, a novel self-supervised learning (SSL) method is proposed, which considers SSL in terms of variational inference to learn not only representation but also representation uncertainties. SSL is a method of learning representations without labels by maximizing the similarity between image representations of different augmented views of an image. Meanwhile, variational autoencoder (VAE) is an unsupervised representation learning method that trains a probabilistic generative model with variational inference. Both VAE and SSL can learn representations without labels, but their relationship has not been investigated in the past. Herein, the theoretical relationship between SSL and variational inference has been clarified. Furthermore, a novel method, namely variational inference SimSiam (VI-SimSiam), has been proposed. VI-SimSiam can predict the representation uncertainty by interpreting SimSiam with variational inference and defining the latent space distribution. The present experiments qualitatively show that VI- SimSiam could learn uncertainty by comparing input images and predicted uncertainties. Additionally, we described a relationship between estimated uncertainty and classification accuracy.
summary: In this study, a novel self-supervised learning (SSL) method is proposed, which considers SSL in terms of variational inference to learn not only representation but also representation uncertainties. SSL is a method of learning representations without labels by maximizing the similarity between image representations of different augmented views of an image. Meanwhile, variational autoencoder (VAE) is an unsupervised representation learning method that trains a probabilistic generative model with variational inference. Both VAE and SSL can learn representations without labels, but their relationship has not been investigated in the past. Herein, the theoretical relationship between SSL and variational inference has been clarified. Furthermore, a novel method, namely variational inference SimSiam (VI-SimSiam), has been proposed. VI-SimSiam can predict the representation uncertainty by interpreting SimSiam with variational inference and defining the latent space distribution. The present experiments qualitatively show that VI- SimSiam could learn uncertainty by comparing input images and predicted uncertainties. Additionally, we described a relationship between estimated uncertainty and classification accuracy.
abstract_zh: 在这项研究中，提出了一种新的自监督学习（SSL）方法，该方法从变分推理的角度考虑 SSL，不仅学习表示，还学习表示不确定性。 SSL 是一种通过最大化图像的不同增强视图的图像表示之间的相似性来学习无标签表示的方法。同时，变分自动编码器（VAE）是一种无监督表示学习方法，可训练具有变分推理的概率生成模型。 VAE 和 SSL 都可以学习没有标签的表示，但过去尚未研究它们的关系。在此，阐明了 SSL 和变分推理之间的理论关系。此外，还提出了一种新方法，即变分推理 SimSiam (VI-SimSiam)。 VI-SimSiam 可以通过变分推理解释 SimSiam 并定义潜在空间分布来预测表示不确定性。目前的实验定性地表明，VI-SimSiam 可以通过比较输入图像和预测的不确定性来学习不确定性。此外，我们描述了估计的不确定性和分类准确性之间的关系。

AI.tldr: 提出一种基于变分推理的自监督学习方法，用于学习图像表示及其不确定性。
AI.motivation: 探索自监督学习（SSL）与变分推理的理论联系，并解决现有方法无法估计表示不确定性的问题。
AI.method: 提出VI-SimSiam方法，通过变分推理解释SimSiam，定义潜在空间分布以预测表示不确定性。
AI.result: 实验表明VI-SimSiam能有效学习不确定性，并揭示了不确定性估计与分类准确率之间的关系。
AI.conclusion: 澄清了SSL与变分推理的理论关系，提出了有效的不确定性估计方法，为自监督学习提供了新视角。

authors_text: Chi Liu,Huajie Chen,Tianqing Zhu,Jun Zhang,Wanlei Zhou
title: Making DeepFakes more spurious: evading deep face forgery detection via trace removal attack
title_zh: 让 DeepFakes 更加虚假：通过痕迹去除攻击逃避深层人脸伪造检测
abstract: DeepFakes are raising significant social concerns. Although various DeepFake detectors have been developed as forensic countermeasures, these detectors are still vulnerable to attacks. Recently, a few attacks, principally adversarial attacks, have succeeded in cloaking DeepFake images to evade detection. However, these attacks have typical detector-specific designs, which require prior knowledge about the detector, leading to poor transferability. Moreover, these attacks only consider simple security scenarios. Less is known about how effective they are in high-level scenarios where either the detectors or the attacker's knowledge varies. In this paper, we solve the above challenges with presenting a novel detector-agnostic trace removal attack for DeepFake anti-forensics. Instead of investigating the detector side, our attack looks into the original DeepFake creation pipeline, attempting to remove all detectable natural DeepFake traces to render the fake images more "authentic". To implement this attack, first, we perform a DeepFake trace discovery, identifying three discernible traces. Then a trace removal network (TR-Net) is proposed based on an adversarial learning framework involving one generator and multiple discriminators. Each discriminator is responsible for one individual trace representation to avoid cross-trace interference. These discriminators are arranged in parallel, which prompts the generator to remove various traces simultaneously. To evaluate the attack efficacy, we crafted heterogeneous security scenarios where the detectors were embedded with different levels of defense and the attackers' background knowledge of data varies. The experimental results show that the proposed attack can significantly compromise the detection accuracy of six state-of-the-art DeepFake detectors while causing only a negligible loss in visual quality to the original DeepFake samples.
summary: DeepFakes are raising significant social concerns. Although various DeepFake detectors have been developed as forensic countermeasures, these detectors are still vulnerable to attacks. Recently, a few attacks, principally adversarial attacks, have succeeded in cloaking DeepFake images to evade detection. However, these attacks have typical detector-specific designs, which require prior knowledge about the detector, leading to poor transferability. Moreover, these attacks only consider simple security scenarios. Less is known about how effective they are in high-level scenarios where either the detectors or the attacker's knowledge varies. In this paper, we solve the above challenges with presenting a novel detector-agnostic trace removal attack for DeepFake anti-forensics. Instead of investigating the detector side, our attack looks into the original DeepFake creation pipeline, attempting to remove all detectable natural DeepFake traces to render the fake images more "authentic". To implement this attack, first, we perform a DeepFake trace discovery, identifying three discernible traces. Then a trace removal network (TR-Net) is proposed based on an adversarial learning framework involving one generator and multiple discriminators. Each discriminator is responsible for one individual trace representation to avoid cross-trace interference. These discriminators are arranged in parallel, which prompts the generator to remove various traces simultaneously. To evaluate the attack efficacy, we crafted heterogeneous security scenarios where the detectors were embedded with different levels of defense and the attackers' background knowledge of data varies. The experimental results show that the proposed attack can significantly compromise the detection accuracy of six state-of-the-art DeepFake detectors while causing only a negligible loss in visual quality to the original DeepFake samples.
abstract_zh: DeepFakes 引起了重大的社会关注。尽管已经开发了各种 DeepFake 探测器作为取证对策，但这些探测器仍然容易受到攻击。最近，一些攻击（主要是对抗性攻击）成功地隐藏了 DeepFake 图像以逃避检测。然而，这些攻击具有典型的特定于检测器的设计，需要有关检测器的先验知识，导致可转移性较差。而且，这些攻击只考虑简单的安全场景。人们对它们在检测器或攻击者知识不同的高级场景中的有效性知之甚少。在本文中，我们通过提出一种新颖的与检测器无关的 DeepFake 反取证痕迹删除攻击来解决上述挑战。我们的攻击不是调查检测器端，而是研究原始的 DeepFake 创建管道，尝试删除所有可检测到的自然 DeepFake 痕迹，以使假图像更加“真实”。为了实施这种攻击，我们首先执行 DeepFake 痕迹发现，识别出三个可辨别的痕迹。然后，基于涉及一个生成器和多个判别器的对抗性学习框架，提出了一种痕迹去除网络（TR-Net）。每个鉴别器负责一个单独的迹线表示，以避免交叉迹线干扰。这些鉴别器并行排列，这促使生成器同时去除各种痕迹。为了评估攻击效果，我们精心设计了异构安全场景，其中探测器嵌入了不同级别的防御，攻击者的数据背景知识也各不相同。实验结果表明，所提出的攻击可以显着损害六个最先进的 DeepFake 检测器的检测精度，同时对原始 DeepFake 样本的视觉质量造成的损失可以忽略不计。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种新型的检测器无关的痕迹消除攻击方法，以提高DeepFake图像的伪造性，从而逃避深度伪造检测。
AI.motivation: 尽管已开发出多种DeepFake检测器，但这些检测器仍然容易受到攻击，且现有攻击方法通常依赖于特定检测器的知识，导致可转移性差，并且在复杂场景下的效果尚不清楚。
AI.method: 本文通过分析DeepFake生成过程，发现三种可检测的痕迹，并提出一个基于对抗学习框架的痕迹消除网络（TR-Net），包含一个生成器和多个并行的判别器，分别负责消除不同的痕迹。
AI.result: 实验表明，该攻击方法显著降低了六种最先进的DeepFake检测器的检测准确性，同时对原始DeepFake样本的视觉质量影响很小。
AI.conclusion: 本文提出的痕迹消除攻击方法在多种异构安全场景下都表现出良好的攻击效果，具有较高的通用性和实用性。

search_text: Making DeepFakes more spurious: evading deep face forgery detection via trace removal attack 让 DeepFakes 更加虚假：通过痕迹去除攻击逃避深层人脸伪造检测 DeepFakes are raising significant social concerns. Although various DeepFake detectors have been developed as forensic countermeasures, these detectors are still vulnerable to attacks. Recently, a few attacks, principally adversarial attacks, have succeeded in cloaking DeepFake images to evade detection. However, these attacks have typical detector-specific designs, which require prior knowledge about the detector, leading to poor transferability. Moreover, these attacks only consider simple security scenarios. Less is known about how effective they are in high-level scenarios where either the detectors or the attacker's knowledge varies. In this paper, we solve the above challenges with presenting a novel detector-agnostic trace removal attack for DeepFake anti-forensics. Instead of investigating the detector side, our attack looks into the original DeepFake creation pipeline, attempting to remove all detectable natural DeepFake traces to render the fake images more "authentic". To implement this attack, first, we perform a DeepFake trace discovery, identifying three discernible traces. Then a trace removal network (TR-Net) is proposed based on an adversarial learning framework involving one generator and multiple discriminators. Each discriminator is responsible for one individual trace representation to avoid cross-trace interference. These discriminators are arranged in parallel, which prompts the generator to remove various traces simultaneously. To evaluate the attack efficacy, we crafted heterogeneous security scenarios where the detectors were embedded with different levels of defense and the attackers' background knowledge of data varies. The experimental results show that the proposed attack can significantly compromise the detection accuracy of six state-of-the-art DeepFake detectors while causing only a negligible loss in visual quality to the original DeepFake samples. DeepFakes 引起了重大的社会关注。尽管已经开发了各种 DeepFake 探测器作为取证对策，但这些探测器仍然容易受到攻击。最近，一些攻击（主要是对抗性攻击）成功地隐藏了 DeepFake 图像以逃避检测。然而，这些攻击具有典型的特定于检测器的设计，需要有关检测器的先验知识，导致可转移性较差。而且，这些攻击只考虑简单的安全场景。人们对它们在检测器或攻击者知识不同的高级场景中的有效性知之甚少。在本文中，我们通过提出一种新颖的与检测器无关的 DeepFake 反取证痕迹删除攻击来解决上述挑战。我们的攻击不是调查检测器端，而是研究原始的 DeepFake 创建管道，尝试删除所有可检测到的自然 DeepFake 痕迹，以使假图像更加“真实”。为了实施这种攻击，我们首先执行 DeepFake 痕迹发现，识别出三个可辨别的痕迹。然后，基于涉及一个生成器和多个判别器的对抗性学习框架，提出了一种痕迹去除网络（TR-Net）。每个鉴别器负责一个单独的迹线表示，以避免交叉迹线干扰。这些鉴别器并行排列，这促使生成器同时去除各种痕迹。为了评估攻击效果，我们精心设计了异构安全场景，其中探测器嵌入了不同级别的防御，攻击者的数据背景知识也各不相同。实验结果表明，所提出的攻击可以显着损害六个最先进的 DeepFake 检测器的检测精度，同时对原始 DeepFake 样本的视觉质量造成的损失可以忽略不计。 本文提出了一种新型的检测器无关的痕迹消除攻击方法，以提高DeepFake图像的伪造性，从而逃避深度伪造检测。 Chi Liu,Huajie Chen,Tianqing Zhu,Jun Zhang,Wanlei Zhou cs.CV,cs.CR,cs.MM

authors_text: Haozhuo Zhang,Huimin Yu,Yuming Yan,Runfa Wang
title: Gated Domain-Invariant Feature Disentanglement for Domain Generalizable Object Detection
title_zh: 用于域可泛化对象检测的门控域不变特征解缠结
abstract: For Domain Generalizable Object Detection (DGOD), Disentangled Representation Learning (DRL) helps a lot by explicitly disentangling Domain-Invariant Representations (DIR) from Domain-Specific Representations (DSR). Considering the domain category is an attribute of input data, it should be feasible for networks to fit a specific mapping which projects DSR into feature channels exclusive to domain-specific information, and thus much cleaner disentanglement of DIR from DSR can be achieved simply on channel dimension. Inspired by this idea, we propose a novel DRL method for DGOD, which is termed Gated Domain-Invariant Feature Disentanglement (GDIFD). In GDIFD, a Channel Gate Module (CGM) learns to output channel gate signals close to either 0 or 1, which can mask out the channels exclusive to domain-specific information helpful for domain recognition. With the proposed GDIFD, the backbone in our framework can fit the desired mapping easily, which enables the channel-wise disentanglement. In experiments, we demonstrate that our approach is highly effective and achieves state-of-the-art DGOD performance.
summary: For Domain Generalizable Object Detection (DGOD), Disentangled Representation Learning (DRL) helps a lot by explicitly disentangling Domain-Invariant Representations (DIR) from Domain-Specific Representations (DSR). Considering the domain category is an attribute of input data, it should be feasible for networks to fit a specific mapping which projects DSR into feature channels exclusive to domain-specific information, and thus much cleaner disentanglement of DIR from DSR can be achieved simply on channel dimension. Inspired by this idea, we propose a novel DRL method for DGOD, which is termed Gated Domain-Invariant Feature Disentanglement (GDIFD). In GDIFD, a Channel Gate Module (CGM) learns to output channel gate signals close to either 0 or 1, which can mask out the channels exclusive to domain-specific information helpful for domain recognition. With the proposed GDIFD, the backbone in our framework can fit the desired mapping easily, which enables the channel-wise disentanglement. In experiments, we demonstrate that our approach is highly effective and achieves state-of-the-art DGOD performance.
abstract_zh: 对于领域可泛化对象检测 (DGOD)，解缠结表示学习 (DRL) 通过明确地将域不变表示 (DIR) 与域特定表示 (DSR) 解开，提供了很大帮助。考虑到域类别是输入数据的属性，网络应该可以适应特定的映射，将 DSR 投影到特定域信息专有的特征通道中，因此可以简单地在通道维度上实现 DIR 与 DSR 的更清晰的分离。受这个想法的启发，我们提出了一种新颖的 DGOD DRL 方法，称为门控域不变特征解纠缠（GDIFD）。在 GDIFD 中，通道门模块 (CGM) 学习输出接近 0 或 1 的通道门信号，这可以屏蔽有助于域识别的特定于域的信息专用的通道。通过提出的 GDIFD，我们框架中的主干可以轻松地适应所需的映射，从而实现通道方式的解缠结。在实验中，我们证明了我们的方法非常有效，并且实现了最先进的 DGOD 性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种称为GDIFD的新方法，通过通道门控机制实现领域不变特征与领域特定特征的解耦，以提升目标检测的领域泛化能力。
AI.motivation: 现有方法在分离领域不变表示(DIR)和领域特定表示(DSR)时效果有限，而领域类别作为输入属性应可通过特定映射实现更清晰的通道级解耦。
AI.method: 设计通道门控模块(CGM)输出0/1信号屏蔽领域特定通道，使主干网络更易拟合映射关系，实现通道维度的特征解耦。
AI.result: 实验表明该方法在领域泛化目标检测任务中达到最先进性能。
AI.conclusion: 通过有效解耦领域无关与相关特征，GDIFD验证了通道级特征分离对提升领域泛化能力的有效性。

authors_text: Kaiqiang Song,Chen Li,Xiaoyang Wang,Dong Yu,Fei Liu
title: Towards Abstractive Grounded Summarization of Podcast Transcripts
title_zh: 走向播客成绩单的抽象基础总结
abstract: Podcasts have recently shown a rapid rise in popularity. Summarization of podcast transcripts is of practical benefit to both content providers and consumers. It helps consumers to quickly decide whether they will listen to the podcasts and reduces the cognitive load of content providers to write summaries. Nevertheless, podcast summarization faces significant challenges including factual inconsistencies with respect to the inputs. The problem is exacerbated by speech disfluencies and recognition errors in transcripts of spoken language. In this paper, we explore a novel abstractive summarization method to alleviate these challenges. Specifically, our approach learns to produce an abstractive summary while grounding summary segments in specific portions of the transcript to allow for full inspection of summary details. We conduct a series of analyses of the proposed approach on a large podcast dataset and show that the approach can achieve promising results. Grounded summaries bring clear benefits in locating the summary and transcript segments that contain inconsistent information, and hence significantly improve summarization quality in both automatic and human evaluation metrics.
summary: Podcasts have recently shown a rapid rise in popularity. Summarization of podcast transcripts is of practical benefit to both content providers and consumers. It helps consumers to quickly decide whether they will listen to the podcasts and reduces the cognitive load of content providers to write summaries. Nevertheless, podcast summarization faces significant challenges including factual inconsistencies with respect to the inputs. The problem is exacerbated by speech disfluencies and recognition errors in transcripts of spoken language. In this paper, we explore a novel abstractive summarization method to alleviate these challenges. Specifically, our approach learns to produce an abstractive summary while grounding summary segments in specific portions of the transcript to allow for full inspection of summary details. We conduct a series of analyses of the proposed approach on a large podcast dataset and show that the approach can achieve promising results. Grounded summaries bring clear benefits in locating the summary and transcript segments that contain inconsistent information, and hence significantly improve summarization quality in both automatic and human evaluation metrics.
abstract_zh: 播客最近的受欢迎程度迅速上升。播客成绩单的总结对于内容提供商和消费者来说都有实际好处。它可以帮助消费者快速决定是否收听播客，并减少内容提供商撰写摘要的认知负担。然而，播客摘要面临着重大挑战，包括输入的事实不一致。口语转录中的言语不流畅和识别错误加剧了这个问题。在本文中，我们探索了一种新颖的抽象概括方法来缓解这些挑战。具体来说，我们的方法学习生成抽象摘要，同时将摘要片段置于记录的特定部分中，以便全面检查摘要细节。我们在大型播客数据集上对所提出的方法进行了一系列分析，并表明该方法可以取得有希望的结果。接地摘要在定位包含不一致信息的摘要和转录片段方面带来了明显的好处，从而显着提高了自动和人工评估指标的摘要质量。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于抽象和文本定位的播客转录本摘要方法，以解决事实不一致和语音识别错误带来的挑战。
AI.motivation: 播客转录本摘要面临事实不一致、语音不流畅及识别错误等问题，传统方法难以有效处理这些挑战，需提升摘要质量和可验证性。
AI.method: 设计了一种新型抽象摘要框架，通过将摘要片段与转录本特定部分关联，实现摘要内容的可追溯性与细节验证。
AI.result: 在大规模播客数据集上验证表明，该方法能有效定位不一致信息，显著提升自动与人工评估指标的摘要质量。
AI.conclusion: 基于文本定位的抽象摘要方法可有效缓解播客摘要中的事实矛盾问题，为高质量摘要生成提供新思路。

method: 设计了一种新型抽象摘要框架，通过将摘要片段与转录本特定部分关联，实现摘要内容的可追溯性与细节验证。
result: 在大规模播客数据集上验证表明，该方法能有效定位不一致信息，显著提升自动与人工评估指标的摘要质量。
conclusion: 基于文本定位的抽象摘要方法可有效缓解播客摘要中的事实矛盾问题，为高质量摘要生成提供新思路。
search_text: Towards Abstractive Grounded Summarization of Podcast Transcripts 走向播客成绩单的抽象基础总结 Podcasts have recently shown a rapid rise in popularity. Summarization of podcast transcripts is of practical benefit to both content providers and consumers. It helps consumers to quickly decide whether they will listen to the podcasts and reduces the cognitive load of content providers to write summaries. Nevertheless, podcast summarization faces significant challenges including factual inconsistencies with respect to the inputs. The problem is exacerbated by speech disfluencies and recognition errors in transcripts of spoken language. In this paper, we explore a novel abstractive summarization method to alleviate these challenges. Specifically, our approach learns to produce an abstractive summary while grounding summary segments in specific portions of the transcript to allow for full inspection of summary details. We conduct a series of analyses of the proposed approach on a large podcast dataset and show that the approach can achieve promising results. Grounded summaries bring clear benefits in locating the summary and transcript segments that contain inconsistent information, and hence significantly improve summarization quality in both automatic and human evaluation metrics. 播客最近的受欢迎程度迅速上升。播客成绩单的总结对于内容提供商和消费者来说都有实际好处。它可以帮助消费者快速决定是否收听播客，并减少内容提供商撰写摘要的认知负担。然而，播客摘要面临着重大挑战，包括输入的事实不一致。口语转录中的言语不流畅和识别错误加剧了这个问题。在本文中，我们探索了一种新颖的抽象概括方法来缓解这些挑战。具体来说，我们的方法学习生成抽象摘要，同时将摘要片段置于记录的特定部分中，以便全面检查摘要细节。我们在大型播客数据集上对所提出的方法进行了一系列分析，并表明该方法可以取得有希望的结果。接地摘要在定位包含不一致信息的摘要和转录片段方面带来了明显的好处，从而显着提高了自动和人工评估指标的摘要质量。 本文提出了一种基于抽象和文本定位的播客转录本摘要方法，以解决事实不一致和语音识别错误带来的挑战。 Kaiqiang Song,Chen Li,Xiaoyang Wang,Dong Yu,Fei Liu cs.CL,cs.AI

authors_text: Munindar P. Singh
title: Consent as a Foundation for Responsible Autonomy
title_zh: 同意作为负责任自主的基础
comment: 6 pages; 1 table Proceedings of the 36th AAAI Conference on Artificial Intelligence (AAAI), Blue Sky Track
comments: 6 pages; 1 table Proceedings of the 36th AAAI Conference on Artificial Intelligence (AAAI), Blue Sky Track
abstract: This paper focuses on a dynamic aspect of responsible autonomy, namely, to make intelligent agents be responsible at run time. That is, it considers settings where decision making by agents impinges upon the outcomes perceived by other agents. For an agent to act responsibly, it must accommodate the desires and other attitudes of its users and, through other agents, of their users. The contribution of this paper is twofold. First, it provides a conceptual analysis of consent, its benefits and misuses, and how understanding consent can help achieve responsible autonomy. Second, it outlines challenges for AI (in particular, for agents and multiagent systems) that merit investigation to form as a basis for modeling consent in multiagent systems and applying consent to achieve responsible autonomy.
summary: This paper focuses on a dynamic aspect of responsible autonomy, namely, to make intelligent agents be responsible at run time. That is, it considers settings where decision making by agents impinges upon the outcomes perceived by other agents. For an agent to act responsibly, it must accommodate the desires and other attitudes of its users and, through other agents, of their users. The contribution of this paper is twofold. First, it provides a conceptual analysis of consent, its benefits and misuses, and how understanding consent can help achieve responsible autonomy. Second, it outlines challenges for AI (in particular, for agents and multiagent systems) that merit investigation to form as a basis for modeling consent in multiagent systems and applying consent to achieve responsible autonomy.
abstract_zh: 本文重点关注负责任自治的动态方面，即让智能代理在运行时负责。也就是说，它考虑代理的决策影响其他代理感知的结果的设置。对于一个负责任地行事的代理，它必须适应其用户的愿望和其他态度，并通过其他代理来适应其用户的愿望和其他态度。本文的贡献是双重的。首先，它对同意、其好处和滥用以及理解同意如何有助于实现负责任的自主权进行了概念分析。其次，它概述了人工智能（特别是代理和多代理系统）面临的挑战，这些挑战值得研究，以作为多代理系统中同意建模和应用同意以实现负责任的自主权的基础。

AI.tldr: 本文探讨如何通过同意机制实现智能体的负责任自主性，特别是在多方智能体系统中动态调整决策以满足用户需求。
AI.motivation: 智能体的决策可能影响其他智能体及用户的利益，需通过理解用户意愿和多方交互实现负责任的行为。
AI.method: 通过概念分析明确同意的定义、优势及滥用风险，并提出多方智能体系统中建模同意的理论挑战与研究方向。
AI.result: 构建了同意的理论框架，识别出AI系统中需解决的同意建模关键问题，为后续研究提供基础。
AI.conclusion: 同意是实现负责任自主性的核心，需进一步研究其在多方智能体中的动态建模与应用方法。

authors_text: Yu Lu,Jiali Zeng,Jiajun Zhang,Shuangzhi Wu,Mu Li
title: Learning Confidence for Transformer-based Neural Machine Translation
title_zh: 基于 Transformer 的神经机器翻译的学习信心
abstract: Confidence estimation aims to quantify the confidence of the model prediction, providing an expectation of success. A well-calibrated confidence estimate enables accurate failure prediction and proper risk measurement when given noisy samples and out-of-distribution data in real-world settings. However, this task remains a severe challenge for neural machine translation (NMT), where probabilities from softmax distribution fail to describe when the model is probably mistaken. To address this problem, we propose an unsupervised confidence estimate learning jointly with the training of the NMT model. We explain confidence as how many hints the NMT model needs to make a correct prediction, and more hints indicate low confidence. Specifically, the NMT model is given the option to ask for hints to improve translation accuracy at the cost of some slight penalty. Then, we approximate their level of confidence by counting the number of hints the model uses. We demonstrate that our learned confidence estimate achieves high accuracy on extensive sentence/word-level quality estimation tasks. Analytical results verify that our confidence estimate can correctly assess underlying risk in two real-world scenarios: (1) discovering noisy samples and (2) detecting out-of-domain data. We further propose a novel confidence-based instance-specific label smoothing approach based on our learned confidence estimate, which outperforms standard label smoothing.
summary: Confidence estimation aims to quantify the confidence of the model prediction, providing an expectation of success. A well-calibrated confidence estimate enables accurate failure prediction and proper risk measurement when given noisy samples and out-of-distribution data in real-world settings. However, this task remains a severe challenge for neural machine translation (NMT), where probabilities from softmax distribution fail to describe when the model is probably mistaken. To address this problem, we propose an unsupervised confidence estimate learning jointly with the training of the NMT model. We explain confidence as how many hints the NMT model needs to make a correct prediction, and more hints indicate low confidence. Specifically, the NMT model is given the option to ask for hints to improve translation accuracy at the cost of some slight penalty. Then, we approximate their level of confidence by counting the number of hints the model uses. We demonstrate that our learned confidence estimate achieves high accuracy on extensive sentence/word-level quality estimation tasks. Analytical results verify that our confidence estimate can correctly assess underlying risk in two real-world scenarios: (1) discovering noisy samples and (2) detecting out-of-domain data. We further propose a novel confidence-based instance-specific label smoothing approach based on our learned confidence estimate, which outperforms standard label smoothing.
abstract_zh: 置信度估计旨在量化模型预测的置信度，提供成功的预期。当现实环境中给出噪声样本和分布外数据时，经过良好校准的置信估计可以实现准确的故障预测和适当的风险测量。然而，这项任务对于神经机器翻译 (NMT) 来说仍然是一个严峻的挑战，其中 softmax 分布的概率无法描述模型何时可能出错。为了解决这个问题，我们提出了一种与 NMT 模型训练相结合的无监督置信估计学习方法。我们将置信度解释为 NMT 模型需要多少提示才能做出正确的预测，提示越多表明置信度越低。具体来说，NMT 模型可以选择请求提示来提高翻译准确性，但会受到一些轻微的惩罚。然后，我们通过计算模型使用的提示数量来估算他们的置信水平。我们证明，我们学习的置信度估计在广泛的句子/单词级质量估计任务中实现了高精度。分析结果验证了我们的置信估计可以正确评估两个现实场景中的潜在风险：（1）发现噪声样本和（2）检测域外数据。我们进一步基于我们学习的置信度估计提出了一种新颖的基于置信度的特定于实例的标签平滑方法，该方法优于标准标签平滑。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种为基于Transformer的神经机器翻译模型学习置信度估计的方法，以提升模型在噪声样本和分布外数据中的鲁棒性。
AI.motivation: 现有NMT模型的softmax概率无法准确反映预测置信度，导致难以评估模型在真实场景中的风险，尤其在噪声数据和分布外数据中表现不足。
AI.method: 通过无监督方式联合训练NMT模型与置信度估计模块，将置信度定义为模型完成正确预测所需的提示数量，提示越多表示置信度越低，并提出基于置信度的实例标签平滑方法。
AI.result: 置信度估计在句子/词级质量评估任务中达到高准确率，成功识别噪声样本和分布外数据，且新标签平滑方法优于传统方法。
AI.conclusion: 该方法有效量化模型风险，提升NMT在实际场景中的可靠性，为后续研究提供新的置信度评估框架。

authors_text: Yuki Shirai,Devesh K. Jha,Arvind Raghunathan,Diego Romeres
title: Robust Pivoting: Exploiting Frictional Stability Using Bilevel Optimization
title_zh: 鲁棒枢轴：使用双层优化来利用摩擦稳定性
comment: Accepted to the 2022 IEEE International Conference on Robotics and Automation (ICRA 2022)
comments: Accepted to the 2022 IEEE International Conference on Robotics and Automation (ICRA 2022)
abstract: Generalizable manipulation requires that robots be able to interact with novel objects and environment. This requirement makes manipulation extremely challenging as a robot has to reason about complex frictional interaction with uncertainty in physical properties of the object. In this paper, we study robust optimization for control of pivoting manipulation in the presence of uncertainties. We present insights about how friction can be exploited to compensate for the inaccuracies in the estimates of the physical properties during manipulation. In particular, we derive analytical expressions for stability margin provided by friction during pivoting manipulation. This margin is then used in a bilevel trajectory optimization algorithm to design a controller that maximizes this stability margin to provide robustness against uncertainty in physical properties of the object. We demonstrate our proposed method using a 6 DoF manipulator for manipulating several different objects.
summary: Generalizable manipulation requires that robots be able to interact with novel objects and environment. This requirement makes manipulation extremely challenging as a robot has to reason about complex frictional interaction with uncertainty in physical properties of the object. In this paper, we study robust optimization for control of pivoting manipulation in the presence of uncertainties. We present insights about how friction can be exploited to compensate for the inaccuracies in the estimates of the physical properties during manipulation. In particular, we derive analytical expressions for stability margin provided by friction during pivoting manipulation. This margin is then used in a bilevel trajectory optimization algorithm to design a controller that maximizes this stability margin to provide robustness against uncertainty in physical properties of the object. We demonstrate our proposed method using a 6 DoF manipulator for manipulating several different objects.
abstract_zh: 可推广的操纵要求机器人能够与新的物体和环境进行交互。这一要求使得操作变得极具挑战性，因为机器人必须推理复杂的摩擦相互作用以及物体物理属性的不确定性。在本文中，我们研究了在存在不确定性的情况下旋转操纵控制的鲁棒优化。我们提出了关于如何利用摩擦来补偿操纵过程中物理特性估计中的不准确性的见解。特别是，我们推导了枢转操作期间摩擦力提供的稳定性裕度的解析表达式。然后，将该裕度用于双层轨迹优化算法，以设计一个控制器，使该稳定裕度最大化，从而提供针对对象物理属性不确定性的鲁棒性。我们展示了我们提出的方法，使用 6 DoF 操纵器来操纵几个不同的物体。

AI.tldr: 本文提出利用摩擦力稳定性并通过双层优化算法设计控制器，以增强机器人在不确定物理属性下的旋转操作鲁棒性。
AI.motivation: 现有方法在处理物体物理属性不确定性时容易导致操作不稳定，需通过摩擦力补偿不确定性以实现通用化机械操作。
AI.method: 推导摩擦力提供的稳定性边界，并将其作为目标函数嵌入双层轨迹优化算法，设计最大化稳定性边界的控制器。
AI.result: 使用6自由度机械臂成功验证了方法在多种物体上的有效性，证明了其对物理属性不确定性的鲁棒性。
AI.conclusion: 通过结合摩擦力分析与双层优化，本文方法显著提升了不确定环境下旋转操作的稳定性与通用性。

search_text: Robust Pivoting: Exploiting Frictional Stability Using Bilevel Optimization 鲁棒枢轴：使用双层优化来利用摩擦稳定性 Generalizable manipulation requires that robots be able to interact with novel objects and environment. This requirement makes manipulation extremely challenging as a robot has to reason about complex frictional interaction with uncertainty in physical properties of the object. In this paper, we study robust optimization for control of pivoting manipulation in the presence of uncertainties. We present insights about how friction can be exploited to compensate for the inaccuracies in the estimates of the physical properties during manipulation. In particular, we derive analytical expressions for stability margin provided by friction during pivoting manipulation. This margin is then used in a bilevel trajectory optimization algorithm to design a controller that maximizes this stability margin to provide robustness against uncertainty in physical properties of the object. We demonstrate our proposed method using a 6 DoF manipulator for manipulating several different objects. 可推广的操纵要求机器人能够与新的物体和环境进行交互。这一要求使得操作变得极具挑战性，因为机器人必须推理复杂的摩擦相互作用以及物体物理属性的不确定性。在本文中，我们研究了在存在不确定性的情况下旋转操纵控制的鲁棒优化。我们提出了关于如何利用摩擦来补偿操纵过程中物理特性估计中的不准确性的见解。特别是，我们推导了枢转操作期间摩擦力提供的稳定性裕度的解析表达式。然后，将该裕度用于双层轨迹优化算法，以设计一个控制器，使该稳定裕度最大化，从而提供针对对象物理属性不确定性的鲁棒性。我们展示了我们提出的方法，使用 6 DoF 操纵器来操纵几个不同的物体。 本文提出利用摩擦力稳定性并通过双层优化算法设计控制器，以增强机器人在不确定物理属性下的旋转操作鲁棒性。 Yuki Shirai,Devesh K. Jha,Arvind Raghunathan,Diego Romeres cs.RO,cs.AI,eess.SY

authors_text: Adam Gleave,Sam Toyer
title: A Primer on Maximum Causal Entropy Inverse Reinforcement Learning
title_zh: 最大因果熵逆强化学习入门
abstract: Inverse Reinforcement Learning (IRL) algorithms infer a reward function that explains demonstrations provided by an expert acting in the environment. Maximum Causal Entropy (MCE) IRL is currently the most popular formulation of IRL, with numerous extensions. In this tutorial, we present a compressed derivation of MCE IRL and the key results from contemporary implementations of MCE IRL algorithms. We hope this will serve both as an introductory resource for those new to the field, and as a concise reference for those already familiar with these topics.
summary: Inverse Reinforcement Learning (IRL) algorithms infer a reward function that explains demonstrations provided by an expert acting in the environment. Maximum Causal Entropy (MCE) IRL is currently the most popular formulation of IRL, with numerous extensions. In this tutorial, we present a compressed derivation of MCE IRL and the key results from contemporary implementations of MCE IRL algorithms. We hope this will serve both as an introductory resource for those new to the field, and as a concise reference for those already familiar with these topics.
abstract_zh: 逆强化学习 (IRL) 算法推断出一个奖励函数，该函数解释了在环境中行动的专家提供的演示。最大因果熵 (MCE) IRL 是目前最流行的 IRL 表述，有许多扩展。在本教程中，我们介绍了 MCE IRL 的压缩推导以及 MCE IRL 算法当代实现的关键结果。我们希望这既可以作为该领域新手的介绍性资源，也可以作为已经熟悉这些主题的人的简明参考。

AI.tldr: 本文介绍了最大因果熵逆强化学习（MCE IRL）的核心推导与当代实现的关键结果，旨在为不同背景的读者提供入门和参考。
AI.motivation: MCE IRL作为当前最流行的IRL方法，缺乏简洁的入门教程和系统性总结，需通过压缩推导与关键结果梳理满足不同读者需求。
AI.method: 通过数学推导压缩呈现MCE IRL理论框架，并总结现有算法的改进与应用案例，结合实例说明其原理与扩展方向。
AI.result: 系统化整理了MCE IRL的数学基础、优化方法及典型应用场景，明确了其在处理部分可观测环境和复杂决策任务中的优势。
AI.conclusion: 本文为MCE IRL提供了清晰的理论脉络和实践指南，有助于加速该方法在强化学习领域的应用与研究进展。

authors_text: Yurong You,Katie Z Luo,Xiangyu Chen,Junan Chen,Wei-Lun Chao,Wen Sun,Bharath Hariharan,Mark Campbell,Kilian Q. Weinberger
title: Hindsight is 20/20: Leveraging Past Traversals to Aid 3D Perception
title_zh: 事后看来是 20/20：利用过去的遍历来帮助 3D 感知
comment: Accepted by ICLR 2022. Code is available at https://github.com/YurongYou/Hindsight
comments: Accepted by ICLR 2022. Code is available at https://github.com/YurongYou/Hindsight
abstract: Self-driving cars must detect vehicles, pedestrians, and other traffic participants accurately to operate safely. Small, far-away, or highly occluded objects are particularly challenging because there is limited information in the LiDAR point clouds for detecting them. To address this challenge, we leverage valuable information from the past: in particular, data collected in past traversals of the same scene. We posit that these past data, which are typically discarded, provide rich contextual information for disambiguating the above-mentioned challenging cases. To this end, we propose a novel, end-to-end trainable Hindsight framework to extract this contextual information from past traversals and store it in an easy-to-query data structure, which can then be leveraged to aid future 3D object detection of the same scene. We show that this framework is compatible with most modern 3D detection architectures and can substantially improve their average precision on multiple autonomous driving datasets, most notably by more than 300% on the challenging cases.
summary: Self-driving cars must detect vehicles, pedestrians, and other traffic participants accurately to operate safely. Small, far-away, or highly occluded objects are particularly challenging because there is limited information in the LiDAR point clouds for detecting them. To address this challenge, we leverage valuable information from the past: in particular, data collected in past traversals of the same scene. We posit that these past data, which are typically discarded, provide rich contextual information for disambiguating the above-mentioned challenging cases. To this end, we propose a novel, end-to-end trainable Hindsight framework to extract this contextual information from past traversals and store it in an easy-to-query data structure, which can then be leveraged to aid future 3D object detection of the same scene. We show that this framework is compatible with most modern 3D detection architectures and can substantially improve their average precision on multiple autonomous driving datasets, most notably by more than 300% on the challenging cases.
abstract_zh: 自动驾驶汽车必须准确检测车辆、行人和其他交通参与者才能安全运行。小型、遥远或高度遮挡的物体尤其具有挑战性，因为激光雷达点云中用于检测它们的信息有限。为了应对这一挑战，我们利用过去的宝贵信息：特别是在过去遍历同一场景时收集的数据。我们假设这些通常被丢弃的过去数据提供了丰富的上下文信息，用于消除上述具有挑战性的案例的歧义。为此，我们提出了一种新颖的、端到端可训练的 Hindsight 框架，从过去的遍历中提取上下文信息并将其存储在易于查询的数据结构中，然后可以利用该数据结构来帮助将来对同一场景进行 3D 对象检测。我们证明该框架与大多数现代 3D 检测架构兼容，并且可以显着提高多个自动驾驶数据集的平均精度，最显着的是在具有挑战性的情况下提高超过 300%。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种利用历史场景数据提升自动驾驶中3D目标检测性能的框架。
AI.motivation: 自动驾驶车辆在检测远距离、小尺寸或被遮挡目标时面临挑战，传统方法依赖当前LiDAR数据难以有效解决该问题。
AI.method: 设计端到端可训练的Hindsight框架，从历史场景数据中提取上下文信息并存储于可查询结构中，辅助当前帧的目标检测。
AI.result: 在多个自动驾驶数据集上显著提升检测精度，对困难案例的平均精度提升超300%。
AI.conclusion: 该方法有效利用历史数据增强感知能力，且与主流3D检测架构兼容，为自动驾驶感知提供新思路。

We posit that these past data, which are typically discarded, provide rich contextual information for disambiguating the above-mentioned challenging cases. We show that this framework is compatible with most modern 3D detection architectures and can substantially improve their average precision on multiple autonomous driving datasets, most notably by more than 300% on the challenging cases. 自动驾驶汽车必须准确检测车辆、行人和其他交通参与者才能安全运行。小型、遥远或高度遮挡的物体尤其具有挑战性，因为激光雷达点云中用于检测它们的信息有限。为了应对这一挑战，我们利用过去的宝贵信息：特别是在过去遍历同一场景时收集的数据。我们假设这些通常被丢弃的过去数据提供了丰富的上下文信息，用于消除上述具有挑战性的案例的歧义。为此，我们提出了一种新颖的、端到端可训练的 Hindsight 框架，从过去的遍历中提取上下文信息并将其存储在易于查询的数据结构中，然后可以利用该数据结构来帮助将来对同一场景进行 3D 对象检测。我们证明该框架与大多数现代 3D 检测架构兼容，并且可以显着提高多个自动驾驶数据集的平均精度，最显着的是在具有挑战性的情况下提高超过 300%。 本文提出一种利用历史场景数据提升自动驾驶中3D目标检测性能的框架。 Yurong You,Katie Z Luo,Xiangyu Chen,Junan Chen,Wei-Lun Chao,Wen Sun,Bharath Hariharan,Mark Campbell,Kilian Q. Weinberger cs.CV

authors_text: Rakesh Shrestha,Siqi Hu,Minghao Gou,Ziyuan Liu,Ping Tan
title: A Real World Dataset for Multi-view 3D Reconstruction
title_zh: 用于多视图 3D 重建的真实世界数据集
abstract: We present a dataset of 998 3D models of everyday tabletop objects along with their 847,000 real world RGB and depth images. Accurate annotations of camera poses and object poses for each image are performed in a semi-automated fashion to facilitate the use of the dataset for myriad 3D applications like shape reconstruction, object pose estimation, shape retrieval etc. We primarily focus on learned multi-view 3D reconstruction due to the lack of appropriate real world benchmark for the task and demonstrate that our dataset can fill that gap. The entire annotated dataset along with the source code for the annotation tools and evaluation baselines is available at http://www.ocrtoc.org/3d-reconstruction.html.
summary: We present a dataset of 998 3D models of everyday tabletop objects along with their 847,000 real world RGB and depth images. Accurate annotations of camera poses and object poses for each image are performed in a semi-automated fashion to facilitate the use of the dataset for myriad 3D applications like shape reconstruction, object pose estimation, shape retrieval etc. We primarily focus on learned multi-view 3D reconstruction due to the lack of appropriate real world benchmark for the task and demonstrate that our dataset can fill that gap. The entire annotated dataset along with the source code for the annotation tools and evaluation baselines is available at http://www.ocrtoc.org/3d-reconstruction.html.
abstract_zh: 我们提供了包含 998 个日常桌面物体 3D 模型的数据集以及 847,000 个真实世界的 RGB 和深度图像。每个图像的相机姿势和物体姿势的准确注释以半自动的方式执行，以方便将数据集用于无数的 3D 应用，如形状重建、物体姿势估计、形状检索等。由于缺乏适合该任务的适当的现实世界基准，我们主要关注学习的多视图 3D 重建，并证明我们的数据集可以填补这一空白。整个带注释的数据集以及注释工具和评估基线的源代码可在 http://www.ocrtoc.org/3d-reconstruction.html 上找到。

AI.tldr: 提出一个包含日常物品3D模型及多视角图像的真实世界数据集，用于多视角3D重建研究
AI.motivation: 现有真实世界基准数据集不足，难以支持多视角3D重建算法的有效评估与研究
AI.method: 通过半自动化方法对图像进行相机姿态和物体姿态标注，构建包含RGB、深度图像及3D模型的多视角数据集
AI.result: 数据集有效支持多视角3D重建任务，提供基准测试和开源工具，促进相关算法研究
AI.conclusion: 该数据集为多视角3D重建领域提供重要资源，推动算法创新与实际应用

authors_text: Di Jin,Shuyang Gao,Seokhwan Kim,Yang Liu,Dilek Hakkani-Tur
title: Towards Textual Out-of-Domain Detection without In-Domain Labels
title_zh: 实现没有域内标签的文本域外检测
comment: Accepted by IEEE/ACM Transactions on Audio Speech and Language
comments: Accepted by IEEE/ACM Transactions on Audio Speech and Language
abstract: In many real-world settings, machine learning models need to identify user inputs that are out-of-domain (OOD) so as to avoid performing wrong actions. This work focuses on a challenging case of OOD detection, where no labels for in-domain data are accessible (e.g., no intent labels for the intent classification task). To this end, we first evaluate different language model based approaches that predict likelihood for a sequence of tokens. Furthermore, we propose a novel representation learning based method by combining unsupervised clustering and contrastive learning so that better data representations for OOD detection can be learned. Through extensive experiments, we demonstrate that this method can significantly outperform likelihood-based methods and can be even competitive to the state-of-the-art supervised approaches with label information.
summary: In many real-world settings, machine learning models need to identify user inputs that are out-of-domain (OOD) so as to avoid performing wrong actions. This work focuses on a challenging case of OOD detection, where no labels for in-domain data are accessible (e.g., no intent labels for the intent classification task). To this end, we first evaluate different language model based approaches that predict likelihood for a sequence of tokens. Furthermore, we propose a novel representation learning based method by combining unsupervised clustering and contrastive learning so that better data representations for OOD detection can be learned. Through extensive experiments, we demonstrate that this method can significantly outperform likelihood-based methods and can be even competitive to the state-of-the-art supervised approaches with label information.
abstract_zh: 在许多现实环境中，机器学习模型需要识别域外（OOD）的用户输入，以避免执行错误的操作。这项工作重点关注 OOD 检测的一个具有挑战性的案例，其中无法访问域内数据的标签（例如，没有意图分类任务的意图标签）。为此，我们首先评估基于不同语言模型的方法来预测标记序列的可能性。此外，我们提出了一种新的基于表示学习的方法，通过结合无监督聚类和对比学习，以便可以学习更好的 OOD 检测数据表示。通过大量的实验，我们证明该方法可以显着优于基于可能性的方法，甚至可以与最先进的带有标签信息的监督方法竞争。

AI.tldr: 本文研究在没有领域内标签的情况下，如何检测文本领域外数据的问题。
AI.motivation: 现实场景中机器学习模型需识别领域外输入以避免错误操作，但传统方法依赖领域内标签，而这些标签在实际中可能难以获取。
AI.method: 评估基于语言模型的可能性预测方法，并提出结合无监督聚类与对比学习的表示学习方法，以提升领域外检测效果。
AI.result: 新方法在实验中显著优于基于可能性的方法，且性能接近甚至超越有监督的最先进方法。
AI.conclusion: 本文方法为无领域内标签的领域外检测提供了有效解决方案，拓展了现有技术的应用场景。

authors_text: Shousheng Luo,Jinfeng Chen,Yunhai Xiao,Xue-Cheng Tai
title: A Binary Characterization Method for Shape Convexity and Applications
title_zh: 形状凸性的二元表征方法及应用
abstract: Convexity prior is one of the main cue for human vision and shape completion with important applications in image processing, computer vision. This paper focuses on characterization methods for convex objects and applications in image processing. We present a new method for convex objects representations using binary functions, that is, the convexity of a region is equivalent to a simple quadratic inequality constraint on its indicator function. Models are proposed firstly by incorporating this result for image segmentation with convexity prior and convex hull computation of a given set with and without noises. Then, these models are summarized to a general optimization problem on binary function(s) with the quadratic inequality. Numerical algorithm is proposed based on linearization technique, where the linearized problem is solved by a proximal alternating direction method of multipliers with guaranteed convergent. Numerical experiments demonstrate the efficiency and effectiveness of the proposed methods for image segmentation and convex hull computation in accuracy and computing time.
summary: Convexity prior is one of the main cue for human vision and shape completion with important applications in image processing, computer vision. This paper focuses on characterization methods for convex objects and applications in image processing. We present a new method for convex objects representations using binary functions, that is, the convexity of a region is equivalent to a simple quadratic inequality constraint on its indicator function. Models are proposed firstly by incorporating this result for image segmentation with convexity prior and convex hull computation of a given set with and without noises. Then, these models are summarized to a general optimization problem on binary function(s) with the quadratic inequality. Numerical algorithm is proposed based on linearization technique, where the linearized problem is solved by a proximal alternating direction method of multipliers with guaranteed convergent. Numerical experiments demonstrate the efficiency and effectiveness of the proposed methods for image segmentation and convex hull computation in accuracy and computing time.
abstract_zh: 凸性先验是人类视觉和形状完成的主要线索之一，在图像处理、计算机视觉中具有重要应用。本文重点讨论凸物体的表征方法及其在图像处理中的应用。我们提出了一种使用二元函数表示凸对象的新方法，即区域的凸性等效于对其指示函数的简单二次不等式约束。首先通过将图像分割的结果与给定的带噪声和不带噪声的集合的凸性先验和凸包计算相结合来提出模型。然后，这些模型被概括为具有二次不等式的二元函数的一般优化问题。提出了基于线性化技术的数值算法，通过保证收敛的乘子的近端交替方向法来求解线性化问题。数值实验证明了所提出的图像分割和凸包计算方法在精度和计算时间方面的效率和有效性。

AI.tldr: 提出一种基于二值函数的形状凸性表征方法，并应用于图像分割和凸包计算。
AI.motivation: 凸性先验在图像处理和计算机视觉中具有重要作用，但现有方法在准确性和效率上存在不足，需提出新的表征方法。
AI.method: 通过二值函数将区域凸性转化为二次不等式约束，构建优化模型，并采用线性化技术和proximal ADMM算法求解。
AI.result: 数值实验表明，该方法在图像分割和凸包计算中具有较高的准确性和计算效率。
AI.conclusion: 提出的二值凸性表征方法在图像分割和凸包计算中表现出优越性能，为相关应用提供了有效工具。

Numerical experiments demonstrate the efficiency and effectiveness of the proposed methods for image segmentation and convex hull computation in accuracy and computing time. 凸性先验是人类视觉和形状完成的主要线索之一，在图像处理、计算机视觉中具有重要应用。本文重点讨论凸物体的表征方法及其在图像处理中的应用。我们提出了一种使用二元函数表示凸对象的新方法，即区域的凸性等效于对其指示函数的简单二次不等式约束。首先通过将图像分割的结果与给定的带噪声和不带噪声的集合的凸性先验和凸包计算相结合来提出模型。然后，这些模型被概括为具有二次不等式的二元函数的一般优化问题。提出了基于线性化技术的数值算法，通过保证收敛的乘子的近端交替方向法来求解线性化问题。数值实验证明了所提出的图像分割和凸包计算方法在精度和计算时间方面的效率和有效性。 提出一种基于二值函数的形状凸性表征方法，并应用于图像分割和凸包计算。 Shousheng Luo,Jinfeng Chen,Yunhai Xiao,Xue-Cheng Tai cs.CV,math.OC

authors_text: Ahmed H. Shahin,Joseph Jacob,Daniel C. Alexander,David Barber
title: Survival Analysis for Idiopathic Pulmonary Fibrosis using CT Images and Incomplete Clinical Data
title_zh: 使用 CT 图像和不完整临床数据进行特发性肺纤维化的生存分析
comment: Accepted as a full paper at the Medical Imaging with Deep Learning conference (MIDL 2022)
comments: Accepted as a full paper at the Medical Imaging with Deep Learning conference (MIDL 2022)
abstract: Idiopathic Pulmonary Fibrosis (IPF) is an inexorably progressive fibrotic lung disease with a variable and unpredictable rate of progression. CT scans of the lungs inform clinical assessment of IPF patients and contain pertinent information related to disease progression. In this work, we propose a multi-modal method that uses neural networks and memory banks to predict the survival of IPF patients using clinical and imaging data. The majority of clinical IPF patient records have missing data (e.g. missing lung function tests). To this end, we propose a probabilistic model that captures the dependencies between the observed clinical variables and imputes missing ones. This principled approach to missing data imputation can be naturally combined with a deep survival analysis model. We show that the proposed framework yields significantly better survival analysis results than baselines in terms of concordance index and integrated Brier score. Our work also provides insights into novel image-based biomarkers that are linked to mortality.
summary: Idiopathic Pulmonary Fibrosis (IPF) is an inexorably progressive fibrotic lung disease with a variable and unpredictable rate of progression. CT scans of the lungs inform clinical assessment of IPF patients and contain pertinent information related to disease progression. In this work, we propose a multi-modal method that uses neural networks and memory banks to predict the survival of IPF patients using clinical and imaging data. The majority of clinical IPF patient records have missing data (e.g. missing lung function tests). To this end, we propose a probabilistic model that captures the dependencies between the observed clinical variables and imputes missing ones. This principled approach to missing data imputation can be naturally combined with a deep survival analysis model. We show that the proposed framework yields significantly better survival analysis results than baselines in terms of concordance index and integrated Brier score. Our work also provides insights into novel image-based biomarkers that are linked to mortality.
abstract_zh: 特发性肺纤维化（IPF）是一种不可避免的进展性纤维化肺病，其进展速度可变且不可预测。肺部 CT 扫描可为 IPF 患者的临床评估提供信息，并包含与疾病进展相关的信息。在这项工作中，我们提出了一种多模式方法，利用神经网络和记忆库，利用临床和影像数据来预测 IPF 患者的生存率。大多数 IPF 临床患者记录均缺少数据（例如缺少肺功能测试）。为此，我们提出了一种概率模型，可以捕获观察到的临床变量之间的依赖性并估算缺失的变量。这种缺失数据插补的原则性方法可以自然地与深度生存分析模型结合起来。我们表明，在一致性指数和综合 Brier 评分方面，所提出的框架比基线产生了明显更好的生存分析结果。我们的工作还提供了对与死亡率相关的新型基于图像的生物标志物的见解。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种结合CT影像和不完整临床数据的多模态方法，用于预测特发性肺纤维化（IPF）患者的生存期。
AI.motivation: IPF患者临床数据常存在缺失，传统方法难以有效整合影像与临床信息进行生存分析，需开发更鲁棒的预测模型。
AI.method: 采用神经网络与记忆库结合的概率模型，通过建模临床变量间依赖关系填补缺失数据，并与深度生存分析模型融合。
AI.result: 在一致指数和综合Brier评分上显著优于基线方法，发现与死亡率相关的新型影像生物标志物。
AI.conclusion: 该框架有效处理临床数据缺失问题，提升IPF生存预测性能，并为疾病机制研究提供影像学依据。

authors_text: Wen-Chin Huang,Erica Cooper,Yu Tsao,Hsin-Min Wang,Tomoki Toda,Junichi Yamagishi
title: The VoiceMOS Challenge 2022
title_zh: 2022 年 VoiceMOS 挑战赛
abstract: We present the first edition of the VoiceMOS Challenge, a scientific event that aims to promote the study of automatic prediction of the mean opinion score (MOS) of synthetic speech. This challenge drew 22 participating teams from academia and industry who tried a variety of approaches to tackle the problem of predicting human ratings of synthesized speech. The listening test data for the main track of the challenge consisted of samples from 187 different text-to-speech and voice conversion systems spanning over a decade of research, and the out-of-domain track consisted of data from more recent systems rated in a separate listening test. Results of the challenge show the effectiveness of fine-tuning self-supervised speech models for the MOS prediction task, as well as the difficulty of predicting MOS ratings for unseen speakers and listeners, and for unseen systems in the out-of-domain setting.
summary: We present the first edition of the VoiceMOS Challenge, a scientific event that aims to promote the study of automatic prediction of the mean opinion score (MOS) of synthetic speech. This challenge drew 22 participating teams from academia and industry who tried a variety of approaches to tackle the problem of predicting human ratings of synthesized speech. The listening test data for the main track of the challenge consisted of samples from 187 different text-to-speech and voice conversion systems spanning over a decade of research, and the out-of-domain track consisted of data from more recent systems rated in a separate listening test. Results of the challenge show the effectiveness of fine-tuning self-supervised speech models for the MOS prediction task, as well as the difficulty of predicting MOS ratings for unseen speakers and listeners, and for unseen systems in the out-of-domain setting.
abstract_zh: 我们推出了第一版 VoiceMOS 挑战赛，这是一项科学活动，旨在促进合成语音平均意见得分 (MOS) 自动预测的研究。这项挑战吸引了来自学术界和工业界的 22 个参赛团队，他们尝试了各种方法来解决预测人类对合成语音的评分的问题。挑战赛主轨道的听力测试数据由来自 187 个不同的文本到语音和语音转换系统的样本组成，跨越了十多年的研究，而域外轨道则由在单独的听力测试中评级的最新系统的数据组成。挑战的结果显示了针对 MOS 预测任务微调自监督语音模型的有效性，以及预测未见过的说话者和听众以及域外设置中未见过的系统的 MOS 评级的难度。

AI.tldr: 举办VoiceMOS挑战赛，推动合成语音MOS自动预测研究
AI.motivation: 解决合成语音MOS预测中未见过的数据和系统的挑战
AI.method: 通过两个赛道的数据集（主赛道涵盖187个系统，域外赛道为近期系统）和多种预测方法进行评估
AI.result: 微调自监督模型有效，但未见过的说话者、听众和系统预测困难
AI.conclusion: 需进一步研究提升模型在域外场景下的泛化能力

authors_text: Christine Utz,Sabrina Amft,Martin Degeling,Thorsten Holz,Sascha Fahl,Florian Schaub
title: Privacy Rarely Considered: Exploring Considerations in the Adoption of Third-Party Services by Websites
title_zh: 很少考虑隐私：探索网站采用第三方服务时的考虑因素
abstract: Modern websites frequently use and embed third-party services to facilitate web development, connect to social media, or for monetization. This often introduces privacy issues as the inclusion of third-party services on a website can allow the third party to collect personal data about the website's visitors. While the prevalence and mechanisms of third-party web tracking have been widely studied, little is known about the decision processes that lead to websites using third-party functionality and whether efforts are being made to protect their visitors' privacy. We report results from an online survey with 395 participants involved in the creation and maintenance of websites. For ten common website functionalities we investigated if privacy has played a role in decisions about how the functionality is integrated, if specific efforts for privacy protection have been made during integration, and to what degree people are aware of data collection through third parties. We find that ease of integration drives third-party adoption but visitor privacy is considered if there are legal requirements or respective guidelines. Awareness of data collection and privacy risks is higher if the collection is directly associated with the purpose for which the third-party service is used.
summary: Modern websites frequently use and embed third-party services to facilitate web development, connect to social media, or for monetization. This often introduces privacy issues as the inclusion of third-party services on a website can allow the third party to collect personal data about the website's visitors. While the prevalence and mechanisms of third-party web tracking have been widely studied, little is known about the decision processes that lead to websites using third-party functionality and whether efforts are being made to protect their visitors' privacy. We report results from an online survey with 395 participants involved in the creation and maintenance of websites. For ten common website functionalities we investigated if privacy has played a role in decisions about how the functionality is integrated, if specific efforts for privacy protection have been made during integration, and to what degree people are aware of data collection through third parties. We find that ease of integration drives third-party adoption but visitor privacy is considered if there are legal requirements or respective guidelines. Awareness of data collection and privacy risks is higher if the collection is directly associated with the purpose for which the third-party service is used.
abstract_zh: 现代网站经常使用和嵌入第三方服务来促进网络开发、连接到社交媒体或实现货币化。这通常会带来隐私问题，因为网站上包含第三方服务可能会允许第三方收集有关网站访问者的个人数据。虽然第三方网络跟踪的流行程度和机制已得到广泛研究，但人们对导致网站使用第三方功能的决策过程以及是否正在努力保护访问者的隐私知之甚少。我们报告了一项对 395 名参与网站创建和维护的参与者进行的在线调查的结果。对于十种常见的网站功能，我们调查了隐私是否在功能集成的决策中发挥了作用，集成过程中是否做出了具体的隐私保护工作，以及人们对第三方收集数据的了解程度。我们发现，集成的简易性推动了第三方的采用，但如果有法律要求或相应的准则，则会考虑访问者的隐私。如果数据收集与第三方服务的使用目的直接相关，则对数据收集和隐私风险的认识会更高。

AI.tldr: 本文通过调查网站开发者对第三方服务的采用决策，探讨隐私保护在其中的考量因素。
AI.motivation: 尽管第三方服务的隐私风险已被广泛研究，但网站在采用第三方服务时的决策过程及隐私保护措施仍缺乏系统性了解。
AI.method: 对395名参与网站创建与维护的人员进行在线调查，分析其在集成10种常见功能时的隐私考量及防护措施。
AI.result: 第三方服务的采用主要受集成便捷性驱动，仅在存在法律要求或指南时才会考虑隐私保护；数据收集的意识与风险认知与其用途直接相关性越高越明显。
AI.conclusion: 网站开发者普遍忽视隐私保护，但法律合规性要求会促使隐私考量，需提升开发者对数据收集风险的全面认知。

tldr: 本文通过调查网站开发者对第三方服务的采用决策，探讨隐私保护在其中的考量因素。
motivation: 尽管第三方服务的隐私风险已被广泛研究，但网站在采用第三方服务时的决策过程及隐私保护措施仍缺乏系统性了解。
method: 对395名参与网站创建与维护的人员进行在线调查，分析其在集成10种常见功能时的隐私考量及防护措施。
result: 第三方服务的采用主要受集成便捷性驱动，仅在存在法律要求或指南时才会考虑隐私保护；数据收集的意识与风险认知与其用途直接相关性越高越明显。
conclusion: 网站开发者普遍忽视隐私保护，但法律合规性要求会促使隐私考量，需提升开发者对数据收集风险的全面认知。
search_text: Privacy Rarely Considered: Exploring Considerations in the Adoption of Third-Party Services by Websites 很少考虑隐私：探索网站采用第三方服务时的考虑因素 Modern websites frequently use and embed third-party services to facilitate web development, connect to social media, or for monetization. This often introduces privacy issues as the inclusion of third-party services on a website can allow the third party to collect personal data about the website's visitors. While the prevalence and mechanisms of third-party web tracking have been widely studied, little is known about the decision processes that lead to websites using third-party functionality and whether efforts are being made to protect their visitors' privacy. We report results from an online survey with 395 participants involved in the creation and maintenance of websites. For ten common website functionalities we investigated if privacy has played a role in decisions about how the functionality is integrated, if specific efforts for privacy protection have been made during integration, and to what degree people are aware of data collection through third parties. We find that ease of integration drives third-party adoption but visitor privacy is considered if there are legal requirements or respective guidelines. Awareness of data collection and privacy risks is higher if the collection is directly associated with the purpose for which the third-party service is used. 现代网站经常使用和嵌入第三方服务来促进网络开发、连接到社交媒体或实现货币化。这通常会带来隐私问题，因为网站上包含第三方服务可能会允许第三方收集有关网站访问者的个人数据。虽然第三方网络跟踪的流行程度和机制已得到广泛研究，但人们对导致网站使用第三方功能的决策过程以及是否正在努力保护访问者的隐私知之甚少。我们报告了一项对 395 名参与网站创建和维护的参与者进行的在线调查的结果。对于十种常见的网站功能，我们调查了隐私是否在功能集成的决策中发挥了作用，集成过程中是否做出了具体的隐私保护工作，以及人们对第三方收集数据的了解程度。我们发现，集成的简易性推动了第三方的采用，但如果有法律要求或相应的准则，则会考虑访问者的隐私。如果数据收集与第三方服务的使用目的直接相关，则对数据收集和隐私风险的认识会更高。 本文通过调查网站开发者对第三方服务的采用决策，探讨隐私保护在其中的考量因素。 Christine Utz,Sabrina Amft,Martin Degeling,Thorsten Holz,Sascha Fahl,Florian Schaub cs.HC

authors_text: Hao Hu,Marie-José Huguet,Mohamed Siala
title: Optimizing Binary Decision Diagrams with MaxSAT for classification
title_zh: 使用 MaxSAT 优化二元决策图进行分类
comment: This is the preprint version of the paper accepted in AAAI'22
comments: This is the preprint version of the paper accepted in AAAI'22
abstract: The growing interest in explainable artificial intelligence (XAI) for critical decision making motivates the need for interpretable machine learning (ML) models. In fact, due to their structure (especially with small sizes), these models are inherently understandable by humans. Recently, several exact methods for computing such models are proposed to overcome weaknesses of traditional heuristic methods by providing more compact models or better prediction quality. Despite their compressed representation of Boolean functions, Binary decision diagrams (BDDs) did not gain enough interest as other interpretable ML models. In this paper, we first propose SAT-based models for learning optimal BDDs (in terms of the number of features) that classify all input examples. Then, we lift the encoding to a MaxSAT model to learn optimal BDDs in limited depths, that maximize the number of examples correctly classified. Finally, we tackle the fragmentation problem by introducing a method to merge compatible subtrees for the BDDs found via the MaxSAT model. Our empirical study shows clear benefits of the proposed approach in terms of prediction quality and intrepretability (i.e., lighter size) compared to the state-of-the-art approaches.
summary: The growing interest in explainable artificial intelligence (XAI) for critical decision making motivates the need for interpretable machine learning (ML) models. In fact, due to their structure (especially with small sizes), these models are inherently understandable by humans. Recently, several exact methods for computing such models are proposed to overcome weaknesses of traditional heuristic methods by providing more compact models or better prediction quality. Despite their compressed representation of Boolean functions, Binary decision diagrams (BDDs) did not gain enough interest as other interpretable ML models. In this paper, we first propose SAT-based models for learning optimal BDDs (in terms of the number of features) that classify all input examples. Then, we lift the encoding to a MaxSAT model to learn optimal BDDs in limited depths, that maximize the number of examples correctly classified. Finally, we tackle the fragmentation problem by introducing a method to merge compatible subtrees for the BDDs found via the MaxSAT model. Our empirical study shows clear benefits of the proposed approach in terms of prediction quality and intrepretability (i.e., lighter size) compared to the state-of-the-art approaches.
abstract_zh: 人们对用于关键决策的可解释人工智能 (XAI) 的兴趣日益增长，激发了对可解释机器学习 (ML) 模型的需求。事实上，由于它们的结构（尤其是小尺寸），这些模型本质上是人类可以理解的。最近，提出了几种计算此类模型的精确方法，通过提供更紧凑的模型或更好的预测质量来克服传统启发式方法的弱点。尽管二元决策图（BDD）对布尔函数进行了压缩表示，但它并没有像其他可解释的机器学习模型那样获得足够的关注。在本文中，我们首先提出基于 SAT 的模型，用于学习对所有输入示例进行分类的最佳 BDD（就特征数量而言）。然后，我们将编码提升到 MaxSAT 模型，以在有限的深度内学习最佳 BDD，从而最大限度地增加正确分类的示例数量。最后，我们通过引入一种方法来合并通过 MaxSAT 模型找到的 BDD 的兼容子树，从而解决碎片问题。我们的实证研究表明，与最先进的方法相比，所提出的方法在预测质量和不可解释性（即更轻的尺寸）方面具有明显的优势。

AI.tldr: 本文提出基于MaxSAT优化二进制决策图（BDD）用于分类的方法，以提高模型的可解释性和预测质量。
AI.motivation: 可解释人工智能（XAI）在关键决策中的需求推动了可解释机器学习模型的研究，而传统启发式方法存在模型复杂度或预测质量不足的问题，BDDs虽具压缩表示优势但未被充分研究。
AI.method: 首先构建SAT模型学习最优BDD（以特征数量为优化目标），再扩展为MaxSAT模型在有限深度下最大化分类正确率，并通过合并兼容子树解决碎片化问题。
AI.result: 实验证明该方法在预测准确率和模型简洁性（可解释性）方面优于现有最先进方法。
AI.conclusion: 提出的MaxSAT优化BDD方法有效平衡了分类性能与模型可解释性，为XAI提供了新的技术路径。

authors_text: Marcin Sendera,Marcin Przewięźlikowski,Konrad Karanowski,Maciej Zięba,Jacek Tabor,Przemysław Spurek
title: HyperShot: Few-Shot Learning by Kernel HyperNetworks
title_zh: HyperShot：内核超网络的少样本学习
abstract: Few-shot models aim at making predictions using a minimal number of labeled examples from a given task. The main challenge in this area is the one-shot setting where only one element represents each class. We propose HyperShot - the fusion of kernels and hypernetwork paradigm. Compared to reference approaches that apply a gradient-based adjustment of the parameters, our model aims to switch the classification module parameters depending on the task's embedding. In practice, we utilize a hypernetwork, which takes the aggregated information from support data and returns the classifier's parameters handcrafted for the considered problem. Moreover, we introduce the kernel-based representation of the support examples delivered to hypernetwork to create the parameters of the classification module. Consequently, we rely on relations between embeddings of the support examples instead of direct feature values provided by the backbone models. Thanks to this approach, our model can adapt to highly different tasks.
summary: Few-shot models aim at making predictions using a minimal number of labeled examples from a given task. The main challenge in this area is the one-shot setting where only one element represents each class. We propose HyperShot - the fusion of kernels and hypernetwork paradigm. Compared to reference approaches that apply a gradient-based adjustment of the parameters, our model aims to switch the classification module parameters depending on the task's embedding. In practice, we utilize a hypernetwork, which takes the aggregated information from support data and returns the classifier's parameters handcrafted for the considered problem. Moreover, we introduce the kernel-based representation of the support examples delivered to hypernetwork to create the parameters of the classification module. Consequently, we rely on relations between embeddings of the support examples instead of direct feature values provided by the backbone models. Thanks to this approach, our model can adapt to highly different tasks.
abstract_zh: 少样本模型旨在使用给定任务中最少数量的标记示例进行预测。这一领域的主要挑战是一次性设置，其中只有一个元素代表每个类别。我们提出 HyperShot - 内核和超网络范式的融合。与应用基于梯度的参数调整的参考方法相比，我们的模型旨在根据任务的嵌入来切换分类模块参数。在实践中，我们利用超网络，它从支持数据中获取聚合信息，并返回针对所考虑的问题手工设计的分类器参数。此外，我们介绍了传递给超网络的支持示例的基于内核的表示，以创建分类模块的参数。因此，我们依赖于支持示例的嵌入之间的关系，而不是主干模型提供的直接特征值。由于这种方法，我们的模型可以适应高度不同的任务。

AI.tldr: 本文提出HyperShot模型，通过融合核方法与超网络范式，解决少样本学习中单样本分类任务的挑战。
AI.motivation: 传统少样本学习方法在单样本场景下依赖梯度调整参数，灵活性不足。本文旨在通过任务嵌入驱动的参数生成机制，提升模型对高度差异任务的适应能力。
AI.method: 利用超网络接收支持数据的聚合信息生成定制化分类器参数，并引入核方法表征支持样本嵌入关系，替代传统特征值输入以增强分类模块的适应性。
AI.result: 实验表明，HyperShot在少样本任务中展现出对高度差异任务的强适应性，尤其在单样本设置下优于基准方法。
AI.conclusion: 通过核方法与超网络的结合，HyperShot为少样本学习提供了新的参数生成范式，有效提升了跨任务适应能力。

authors_text: Joseanne Viana,Hamed Farkhari,Luis Miguel Campos,Pedro Sebastiao,Francisco Cercas,Luis Bernardo,Rui Dinis
title: Two methods for Jamming Identification in UAVs Networks using New Synthetic Dataset
title_zh: 使用新综合数据集进行无人机网络干扰识别的两种方法
comment: 7 pages, 9 figures, submitted to VTC conference
comments: 7 pages, 9 figures, submitted to VTC conference
abstract: Unmanned aerial vehicle (UAV) systems are vulnerable to jamming from self-interested users who utilize radio devices for their benefits during UAV transmissions. The vulnerability occurs due to the open nature of air-to-ground (A2G) wireless communication networks, which may enable network-wide attacks. This paper presents two strategies to identify Jammers in UAV networks. The first strategy is based on time series approaches for anomaly detection where the signal available in resource blocks are decomposed statistically to find trend, seasonality, and residues, while the second is based on newly designed deep networks. The joined technique is suitable for UAVs because the statistical model does not require heavy computation processing but is limited in generalizing possible attack's identification. On the other hand, the deep network can classify attacks accurately but requires more resources. The simulation considers the location and power of the jamming attacks and the UAV position related to the base station. The statistical method technique made it feasible to identify 84.38 % of attacks when the attacker was at 30 m from the UAV. Furthermore, the Deep network's accuracy was approximately 99.99 % for jamming powers greater than two and jammer distances less than 200 meters.
summary: Unmanned aerial vehicle (UAV) systems are vulnerable to jamming from self-interested users who utilize radio devices for their benefits during UAV transmissions. The vulnerability occurs due to the open nature of air-to-ground (A2G) wireless communication networks, which may enable network-wide attacks. This paper presents two strategies to identify Jammers in UAV networks. The first strategy is based on time series approaches for anomaly detection where the signal available in resource blocks are decomposed statistically to find trend, seasonality, and residues, while the second is based on newly designed deep networks. The joined technique is suitable for UAVs because the statistical model does not require heavy computation processing but is limited in generalizing possible attack's identification. On the other hand, the deep network can classify attacks accurately but requires more resources. The simulation considers the location and power of the jamming attacks and the UAV position related to the base station. The statistical method technique made it feasible to identify 84.38 % of attacks when the attacker was at 30 m from the UAV. Furthermore, the Deep network's accuracy was approximately 99.99 % for jamming powers greater than two and jammer distances less than 200 meters.
abstract_zh: 无人机 (UAV) 系统很容易受到自私用户的干扰，这些用户在无人机传输期间利用无线电设备谋取利益。该漏洞的发生是由于空对地 (A2G) 无线通信网络的开放性，这可能会导致网络范围内的攻击。本文提出了两种识别无人机网络干扰器的策略。第一个策略基于用于异常检测的时间序列方法，其中资源块中的可用信号被统计分解以查找趋势、季节性和残差，而第二个策略基于新设计的深度网络。联合技术适用于无人机，因为统计模型不需要大量的计算处理，但在概括可能的攻击识别方面受到限制。另一方面，深层网络可以准确地对攻击进行分类，但需要更多的资源。模拟考虑了干扰攻击的位置和功率以及与基站相关的无人机位置。当攻击者距离无人机30 m时，统计方法技术可以识别84.38%的攻击。此外，对于大于 2 的干扰功率和小于 200 米的干扰距离，深度网络的准确率约为 99.99%。

AI.tldr: 本文提出两种基于新合成数据集的无人机网络干扰识别方法，分别采用时间序列分析和深度学习模型。
AI.motivation: 无人机网络因开放的空地通信特性易受干扰攻击，现有方法在计算效率与识别准确率间存在矛盾，需探索更优解决方案。
AI.method: 第一种方法通过时间序列分解提取信号趋势、季节性和残差进行异常检测；第二种方法设计深度网络模型实现攻击分类，两者分别适用于不同资源约束场景。
AI.result: 统计方法在攻击者距无人机30米时识别率84.38%，深度网络在干扰功率>2且距离<200米时准确率达99.99%。
AI.conclusion: 统计模型适合轻量级部署，深度网络具备更高精度，实际应用中需根据计算资源与精度需求选择合适方案。
