search_text: DiffPoseNet: Direct Differentiable Camera Pose Estimation DiffPoseNet：直接可微相机姿态估计 Current deep neural network approaches for camera pose estimation rely on scene structure for 3D motion estimation, but this decreases the robustness and thereby makes cross-dataset generalization difficult. In contrast, classical approaches to structure from motion estimate 3D motion utilizing optical flow and then compute depth. Their accuracy, however, depends strongly on the quality of the optical flow. To avoid this issue, direct methods have been proposed, which separate 3D motion from depth estimation but compute 3D motion using only image gradients in the form of normal flow. In this paper, we introduce a network NFlowNet, for normal flow estimation which is used to enforce robust and direct constraints. In particular, normal flow is used to estimate relative camera pose based on the cheirality (depth positivity) constraint. We achieve this by formulating the optimization problem as a differentiable cheirality layer, which allows for end-to-end learning of camera pose. We perform extensive qualitative and quantitative evaluation of the proposed DiffPoseNet's sensitivity to noise and its generalization across datasets. We compare our approach to existing state-of-the-art methods on KITTI, TartanAir, and TUM-RGBD datasets. 当前用于相机姿态估计的深度神经网络方法依赖于场景结构来进行 3D 运动估计，但这降低了鲁棒性，从而使得跨数据集泛化变得困难。相比之下，经典的运动结构方法利用光流估计 3D 运动，然后计算深度。然而，它们的准确性在很大程度上取决于光流的质量。为了避免这个问题，人们提出了直接方法，将 3D 运动与深度估计分开，但仅使用法线流形式的图像梯度来计算 3D 运动。在本文中，我们引入了一个网络 NFlowNet，用于正常流量估计，用于强制执行鲁棒且直接的约束。特别是，法线流用于基于手性（深度正性）约束来估计相对相机姿态。我们通过将优化问题表述为可微分手性层来实现这一目标，该层允许对相机姿势进行端到端学习。我们对所提出的 DiffPoseNet 对噪声的敏感性及其跨数据集的泛化进行了广泛的定性和定量评估。我们将我们的方法与 KITTI、TartanAir 和 TUM-RGBD 数据集上现有的最先进方法进行比较。 本文提出了一种名为DiffPoseNet的网络，用于直接进行相机姿态估计，该方法通过使用法线流和可微分的cheirality层来提升鲁棒性和跨数据集的泛化能力。 Chethan M. Parameshwara,Gokul Hari,Cornelia Fermüller,Nitin J. Sanket,Yiannis Aloimonos cs.CV,cs.RO

authors_text: Yingqing He,Zhiyi Zhang,Jiapeng Zhu,Yujun Shen,Qifeng Chen
title: Interpreting Class Conditional GANs with Channel Awareness
title_zh: 用通道感知解释类条件 GAN
abstract: Understanding the mechanism of generative adversarial networks (GANs) helps us better use GANs for downstream applications. Existing efforts mainly target interpreting unconditional models, leaving it less explored how a conditional GAN learns to render images regarding various categories. This work fills in this gap by investigating how a class conditional generator unifies the synthesis of multiple classes. For this purpose, we dive into the widely used class-conditional batch normalization (CCBN), and observe that each feature channel is activated at varying degrees given different categorical embeddings. To describe such a phenomenon, we propose channel awareness, which quantitatively characterizes how a single channel contributes to the final synthesis. Extensive evaluations and analyses on the BigGAN model pre-trained on ImageNet reveal that only a subset of channels is primarily responsible for the generation of a particular category, similar categories (e.g., cat and dog) usually get related to some same channels, and some channels turn out to share information across all classes. For good measure, our algorithm enables several novel applications with conditional GANs. Concretely, we achieve (1) versatile image editing via simply altering a single channel and manage to (2) harmoniously hybridize two different classes. We further verify that the proposed channel awareness shows promising potential in (3) segmenting the synthesized image and (4) evaluating the category-wise synthesis performance.
summary: Understanding the mechanism of generative adversarial networks (GANs) helps us better use GANs for downstream applications. Existing efforts mainly target interpreting unconditional models, leaving it less explored how a conditional GAN learns to render images regarding various categories. This work fills in this gap by investigating how a class conditional generator unifies the synthesis of multiple classes. For this purpose, we dive into the widely used class-conditional batch normalization (CCBN), and observe that each feature channel is activated at varying degrees given different categorical embeddings. To describe such a phenomenon, we propose channel awareness, which quantitatively characterizes how a single channel contributes to the final synthesis. Extensive evaluations and analyses on the BigGAN model pre-trained on ImageNet reveal that only a subset of channels is primarily responsible for the generation of a particular category, similar categories (e.g., cat and dog) usually get related to some same channels, and some channels turn out to share information across all classes. For good measure, our algorithm enables several novel applications with conditional GANs. Concretely, we achieve (1) versatile image editing via simply altering a single channel and manage to (2) harmoniously hybridize two different classes. We further verify that the proposed channel awareness shows promising potential in (3) segmenting the synthesized image and (4) evaluating the category-wise synthesis performance.
abstract_zh: 了解生成对抗网络（GAN）的机制有助于我们更好地将GAN用于下游应用。现有的工作主要针对解释无条件模型，而很少探讨条件 GAN 如何学习渲染各种类别的图像。这项工作通过研究类条件生成器如何统一多个类的综合来填补这一空白。为此，我们深入研究了广泛使用的类条件批量归一化（CCBN），并观察到每个特征通道在给定不同的分类嵌入的情况下以不同程度被激活。为了描述这种现象，我们提出了通道感知，它定量地描述了单个通道如何对最终合成做出贡献。对 ImageNet 上预训练的 BigGAN 模型的广泛评估和分析表明，只有通道的子集主要负责特定类别的生成，相似的类别（例如猫和狗）通常与某些相同的通道相关，并且某些通道在所有类别之间共享信息。为了更好地衡量，我们的算法通过条件 GAN 实现了多种新颖的应用。具体来说，我们通过简单地改变单个通道来实现（1）多功能图像编辑，并设法（2）和谐地混合两个不同的类。我们进一步验证了所提出的通道感知在（3）分割合成图像和（4）评估按类别合成性能方面显示出良好的潜力。

AI.tldr: 本论文研究类条件生成对抗网络（GAN）中通道对图像合成的贡献机制，提出通道感知概念以量化各通道在生成过程中的作用。
AI.motivation: 现有研究主要关注无条件GAN的解释性，而类条件GAN如何根据不同类别生成图像的机制尚未被充分探索。
AI.method: 通过分析类条件批量归一化（CCBN）模块，提出通道感知指标，量化描述每个特征通道对最终图像合成的贡献度，并在BigGAN模型上进行验证。
AI.result: 发现特定类别仅依赖部分通道，相似类别共享部分通道，部分通道跨类别通用；实现通道级图像编辑、类别混合生成、图像分割及生成质量评估等新应用。
AI.conclusion: 通道感知方法有效揭示了类条件GAN的内部工作机制，为模型解释性和应用拓展提供了新视角。

authors_text: Xuezhi Wang,Jason Wei,Dale Schuurmans,Quoc Le,Ed Chi,Sharan Narang,Aakanksha Chowdhery,Denny Zhou
title: Self-Consistency Improves Chain of Thought Reasoning in Language Models
title_zh: 自洽改善了语言模型中的思维推理链
comment: Published at ICLR 2023. V2: added PaLM results; V3: added UL2 results; V4: camera ready version at ICLR 2023
comments: Published at ICLR 2023. V2: added PaLM results; V3: added UL2 results; V4: camera ready version at ICLR 2023
abstract: Chain-of-thought prompting combined with pre-trained large language models has achieved encouraging results on complex reasoning tasks. In this paper, we propose a new decoding strategy, self-consistency, to replace the naive greedy decoding used in chain-of-thought prompting. It first samples a diverse set of reasoning paths instead of only taking the greedy one, and then selects the most consistent answer by marginalizing out the sampled reasoning paths. Self-consistency leverages the intuition that a complex reasoning problem typically admits multiple different ways of thinking leading to its unique correct answer. Our extensive empirical evaluation shows that self-consistency boosts the performance of chain-of-thought prompting with a striking margin on a range of popular arithmetic and commonsense reasoning benchmarks, including GSM8K (+17.9%), SVAMP (+11.0%), AQuA (+12.2%), StrategyQA (+6.4%) and ARC-challenge (+3.9%).
summary: Chain-of-thought prompting combined with pre-trained large language models has achieved encouraging results on complex reasoning tasks. In this paper, we propose a new decoding strategy, self-consistency, to replace the naive greedy decoding used in chain-of-thought prompting. It first samples a diverse set of reasoning paths instead of only taking the greedy one, and then selects the most consistent answer by marginalizing out the sampled reasoning paths. Self-consistency leverages the intuition that a complex reasoning problem typically admits multiple different ways of thinking leading to its unique correct answer. Our extensive empirical evaluation shows that self-consistency boosts the performance of chain-of-thought prompting with a striking margin on a range of popular arithmetic and commonsense reasoning benchmarks, including GSM8K (+17.9%), SVAMP (+11.0%), AQuA (+12.2%), StrategyQA (+6.4%) and ARC-challenge (+3.9%).
abstract_zh: 思维链提示与预训练的大型语言模型相结合，在复杂的推理任务上取得了令人鼓舞的结果。在本文中，我们提出了一种新的解码策略——自一致性，以取代思想链提示中使用的朴素贪婪解码。它首先对一组不同的推理路径进行采样，而不是只采用贪婪的推理路径，然后通过边缘化采样的推理路径来选择最一致的答案。自我一致性利用了一种直觉，即复杂的推理问题通常会采用多种不同的思维方式来得出其独特的正确答案。我们广泛的实证评估表明，自我一致性提高了思想链提示的性能，在一系列流行的算术和常识推理基准上具有显着的优势，包括 GSM8K (+17.9%)、SVAMP (+11.0%)、AQuA (+12.2%)、StrategyQA (+6.4%) 和 ARC-challenge (+3.9%)。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种自洽性解码策略，通过采样多种推理路径并选择最一致答案，提升语言模型的链式推理能力。
AI.motivation: 传统贪婪解码在复杂推理任务中可能忽略多种正确路径，而自洽性方法通过利用多路径一致性提升推理鲁棒性。
AI.method: 首先生成多样化的推理路径集合，再通过边缘化处理选择与所有路径最一致的答案。
AI.result: 在GSM8K、SVAMP等基准测试中分别提升17.9%、11.0%、12.2%、6.4%和3.9%。
AI.conclusion: 自洽性方法通过多路径一致性选择有效提升了链式推理性能，验证了多样化推理路径的价值。

ai_content.tldr: 本文提出一种自洽性解码策略，通过采样多种推理路径并选择最一致答案，提升语言模型的链式推理能力。

authors_text: Antonin Vobecky,David Hurych,Oriane Siméoni,Spyros Gidaris,Andrei Bursuc,Patrick Pérez,Josef Sivic
title: Drive&Segment: Unsupervised Semantic Segmentation of Urban Scenes via Cross-modal Distillation
title_zh: Drive&Segment：通过跨模态蒸馏对城市场景进行无监督语义分割
comment: v2: improved quality of images. See the project webpage https://vobecant.github.io/DriveAndSegment/ for the code and more
comments: v2: improved quality of images. See the project webpage https://vobecant.github.io/DriveAndSegment/ for the code and more
abstract: This work investigates learning pixel-wise semantic image segmentation in urban scenes without any manual annotation, just from the raw non-curated data collected by cars which, equipped with cameras and LiDAR sensors, drive around a city. Our contributions are threefold. First, we propose a novel method for cross-modal unsupervised learning of semantic image segmentation by leveraging synchronized LiDAR and image data. The key ingredient of our method is the use of an object proposal module that analyzes the LiDAR point cloud to obtain proposals for spatially consistent objects. Second, we show that these 3D object proposals can be aligned with the input images and reliably clustered into semantically meaningful pseudo-classes. Finally, we develop a cross-modal distillation approach that leverages image data partially annotated with the resulting pseudo-classes to train a transformer-based model for image semantic segmentation. We show the generalization capabilities of our method by testing on four different testing datasets (Cityscapes, Dark Zurich, Nighttime Driving and ACDC) without any finetuning, and demonstrate significant improvements compared to the current state of the art on this problem. See project webpage https://vobecant.github.io/DriveAndSegment/ for the code and more.
summary: This work investigates learning pixel-wise semantic image segmentation in urban scenes without any manual annotation, just from the raw non-curated data collected by cars which, equipped with cameras and LiDAR sensors, drive around a city. Our contributions are threefold. First, we propose a novel method for cross-modal unsupervised learning of semantic image segmentation by leveraging synchronized LiDAR and image data. The key ingredient of our method is the use of an object proposal module that analyzes the LiDAR point cloud to obtain proposals for spatially consistent objects. Second, we show that these 3D object proposals can be aligned with the input images and reliably clustered into semantically meaningful pseudo-classes. Finally, we develop a cross-modal distillation approach that leverages image data partially annotated with the resulting pseudo-classes to train a transformer-based model for image semantic segmentation. We show the generalization capabilities of our method by testing on four different testing datasets (Cityscapes, Dark Zurich, Nighttime Driving and ACDC) without any finetuning, and demonstrate significant improvements compared to the current state of the art on this problem. See project webpage https://vobecant.github.io/DriveAndSegment/ for the code and more.
abstract_zh: 这项工作研究了在城市场景中学习像素级语义图像分割，无需任何手动注释，只需从配备摄像头和激光雷达传感器的汽车收集的原始非策划数据中，在城市中行驶。我们的贡献是三重的。首先，我们提出了一种利用同步激光雷达和图像数据进行语义图像分割的跨模式无监督学习的新方法。我们方法的关键要素是使用对象提议模块来分析 LiDAR 点云以获得空间一致的对象的提议。其次，我们证明这些 3D 对象提案可以与输入图像对齐，并可靠地聚类成语义上有意义的伪类。最后，我们开发了一种跨模式蒸馏方法，该方法利用用所得伪类部分注释的图像数据来训练基于变压器的图像语义分割模型。我们通过在四个不同的测试数据集（城市景观、黑暗苏黎世、夜间驾驶和 ACDC）上进行测试来展示我们方法的泛化能力，无需任何微调，并且与该问题的当前最新技术相比，我们展示了显着的改进。有关代码等，请参阅项目网页 https://vobecant.github.io/DriveAndSegment/。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种无需人工标注的跨模态知识蒸馏方法，利用车载摄像头与LiDAR同步数据实现城市场景语义分割。
AI.motivation: 传统语义分割依赖大量人工标注数据，而实际场景中获取标注成本高昂，需探索无监督学习方案以解决数据标注难题。
AI.method: 通过LiDAR点云生成3D物体建议并聚类为伪类别，结合图像数据进行跨模态对齐，利用部分标注数据训练Transformer分割模型。
AI.result: 在Cityscapes等四个数据集上无需微调即可超越现有最优方法，验证了方法的泛化能力与有效性。
AI.conclusion: 跨模态蒸馏框架成功实现了无监督语义分割，为自动驾驶等场景提供了无需标注的数据利用新范式。

search_text: Drive&Segment: Unsupervised Semantic Segmentation of Urban Scenes via Cross-modal Distillation Drive&Segment：通过跨模态蒸馏对城市场景进行无监督语义分割 This work investigates learning pixel-wise semantic image segmentation in urban scenes without any manual annotation, just from the raw non-curated data collected by cars which, equipped with cameras and LiDAR sensors, drive around a city. Our contributions are threefold. First, we propose a novel method for cross-modal unsupervised learning of semantic image segmentation by leveraging synchronized LiDAR and image data. The key ingredient of our method is the use of an object proposal module that analyzes the LiDAR point cloud to obtain proposals for spatially consistent objects. Second, we show that these 3D object proposals can be aligned with the input images and reliably clustered into semantically meaningful pseudo-classes. Finally, we develop a cross-modal distillation approach that leverages image data partially annotated with the resulting pseudo-classes to train a transformer-based model for image semantic segmentation. We show the generalization capabilities of our method by testing on four different testing datasets (Cityscapes, Dark Zurich, Nighttime Driving and ACDC) without any finetuning, and demonstrate significant improvements compared to the current state of the art on this problem. authors_text: Faeze Gholamrezaie,Melika Bahman-Abadi,M. B. Ghaznavi-Ghoushchi
title: AI Annotated Recommendations in an Efficient Visual Learning Environment with Emphasis on YouTube (AI-EVL)
title_zh: 以 YouTube 为重点的高效视觉学习环境中的人工智能注释推荐 (AI-EVL)
abstract: In this article, we create a system called AI-EVL. This is an annotated-based learning system. We extend AI to learning experience. If a user from the main YouTube page browses YouTube videos and a user from the AI-EVL system does the same, the amount of traffic used will be much less. It is due to ignoring unwanted contents which indicates a reduction in bandwidth usage too. This system is designed to be embedded with online learning tools and platforms to enrich their curriculum. In evaluating the system using Google 2020 trend data, we were able to extract rich ontological information for each data. Of the data collected, 34.86% belong to wolfram, 30.41% to DBpedia, and 34.73% to Wikipedia. The video subtitle information is displayed interactively and functionally to the user over time as the video is played. This effective visual learning system, due to the unique features, prevents the user's distraction and makes learning more focused. The information about the subtitle text is displayed in multiple layers including AI-annotated topics, Wikipedia/DBpedia, and Wolfram enriched texts via interactive and visual widgets.
summary: In this article, we create a system called AI-EVL. This is an annotated-based learning system. We extend AI to learning experience. If a user from the main YouTube page browses YouTube videos and a user from the AI-EVL system does the same, the amount of traffic used will be much less. It is due to ignoring unwanted contents which indicates a reduction in bandwidth usage too. This system is designed to be embedded with online learning tools and platforms to enrich their curriculum. In evaluating the system using Google 2020 trend data, we were able to extract rich ontological information for each data. Of the data collected, 34.86% belong to wolfram, 30.41% to DBpedia, and 34.73% to Wikipedia. The video subtitle information is displayed interactively and functionally to the user over time as the video is played. This effective visual learning system, due to the unique features, prevents the user's distraction and makes learning more focused. The information about the subtitle text is displayed in multiple layers including AI-annotated topics, Wikipedia/DBpedia, and Wolfram enriched texts via interactive and visual widgets.
abstract_zh: 在本文中，我们创建了一个名为 AI-EVL 的系统。这是一个基于注释的学习系统。我们将人工智能扩展到学习体验。如果来自 YouTube 主页面的用户浏览 YouTube 视频，而来自 AI-EVL 系统的用户也这样做，则使用的流量会少得多。这是由于忽略了不需要的内容，这也表明带宽使用量的减少。该系统旨在嵌入在线学习工具和平台，以丰富他们的课程。在使用 Google 2020 趋势数据评估系统时，我们能够为每个数据提取丰富的本体信息。在收集的数据中，34.86%属于wolfram，30.41%属于DBpedia，34.73%属于Wikipedia。随着视频的播放，视频字幕信息会随着时间的推移以交互方式和功能性地向用户显示。这种有效的视觉学习系统，由于其独特的功能，可以防止用户分心，使学习更加集中。有关字幕文本的信息以多层方式显示，包括 AI 注释的主题、Wikipedia/DBpedia 以及通过交互式和可视化小部件的 Wolfram 丰富文本。

AI.tldr: 本文提出AI-EVL系统，通过注释和过滤无关内容，实现高效的视觉学习环境，特别针对YouTube平台优化带宽使用。
AI.motivation: 传统在线学习工具存在内容冗余、带宽消耗大及用户注意力分散的问题，需通过智能注释和内容筛选提升学习效率。
AI.method: 构建AI-EVL系统，集成YouTube视频播放与AI注释功能，利用Wikipedia/DBpedia/Wolfram等数据源生成多层交互式注释，并动态展示于视频播放过程中。
AI.result: 系统验证显示，34.86%数据来自Wolfram，30.41%来自DBpedia，34.73%来自Wikipedia，有效减少带宽消耗并提升学习专注度。
AI.conclusion: AI-EVL通过智能注释和内容过滤技术，成功实现高效视觉学习，为在线教育平台提供了可嵌入的优化方案。

authors_text: Junqi Tang,Subhadip Mukherjee,Carola-Bibiane Schönlieb
title: Operator Sketching for Deep Unrolling Networks
title_zh: 深度展开网络的算子草图
abstract: In this work we propose a new paradigm for designing efficient deep unrolling networks using operator sketching. The deep unrolling networks are currently the state-of-the-art solutions for imaging inverse problems. However, for high-dimensional imaging tasks, especially the 3D cone-beam X-ray CT and 4D MRI imaging, the deep unrolling schemes typically become inefficient both in terms of memory and computation, due to the need of computing multiple times the high-dimensional forward and adjoint operators. Recently researchers have found that such limitations can be partially addressed by stochastic unrolling with subsets of operators, inspired by the success of stochastic first-order optimization. In this work, we propose a further acceleration upon stochastic unrolling, using sketching techniques to approximate products in the high-dimensional image space. The operator sketching can be jointly applied with stochastic unrolling for the best acceleration and compression performance. Our numerical experiments on X-ray CT image reconstruction demonstrate the remarkable effectiveness of our sketched unrolling schemes.
summary: In this work we propose a new paradigm for designing efficient deep unrolling networks using operator sketching. The deep unrolling networks are currently the state-of-the-art solutions for imaging inverse problems. However, for high-dimensional imaging tasks, especially the 3D cone-beam X-ray CT and 4D MRI imaging, the deep unrolling schemes typically become inefficient both in terms of memory and computation, due to the need of computing multiple times the high-dimensional forward and adjoint operators. Recently researchers have found that such limitations can be partially addressed by stochastic unrolling with subsets of operators, inspired by the success of stochastic first-order optimization. In this work, we propose a further acceleration upon stochastic unrolling, using sketching techniques to approximate products in the high-dimensional image space. The operator sketching can be jointly applied with stochastic unrolling for the best acceleration and compression performance. Our numerical experiments on X-ray CT image reconstruction demonstrate the remarkable effectiveness of our sketched unrolling schemes.
abstract_zh: 在这项工作中，我们提出了一种使用算子草图设计高效深度展开网络的新范例。深度展开网络是目前最先进的成像逆问题解决方案。然而，对于高维成像任务，特别是 3D 锥束 X 射线 CT 和 4D MRI 成像，由于需要多次计算高维前向算子和伴随算子，深度展开方案在内存和计算方面通常变得低效。最近，受随机一阶优化成功的启发，研究人员发现，通过使用算子子集进行随机展开可以部分解决此类限制。在这项工作中，我们提出了随机展开的进一步加速，使用草图技术来近似高维图像空间中的产品。操作员草图可以与随机展开联合应用，以获得最佳的加速和压缩性能。我们对 X 射线 CT 图像重建的数值实验证明了我们草拟的展开方案的显着有效性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于算子草图的深度展开网络设计范式，以解决高维成像任务中的计算和内存效率问题。
AI.motivation: 现有深度展开网络在处理3D锥束CT和4D MRI等高维成像任务时，因需多次计算高维算子导致效率低下。
AI.method: 结合随机展开与算子草图技术，通过低维草图近似高维空间中的算子乘积，实现加速与压缩。
AI.result: 在X射线CT重建实验中，草图展开方案显著提升了计算效率且保持了重建质量。
AI.conclusion: 该方法为高维成像逆问题提供了高效且压缩的深度展开网络解决方案。

ai_content.tldr: 本文提出一种基于算子草图的深度展开网络设计范式，以解决高维成像任务中的计算和内存效率问题。

search_text: Operator Sketching for Deep Unrolling Networks 深度展开网络的算子草图 In this work we propose a new paradigm for designing efficient deep unrolling networks using operator sketching. The deep unrolling networks are currently the state-of-the-art solutions for imaging inverse problems. However, for high-dimensional imaging tasks, especially the 3D cone-beam X-ray CT and 4D MRI imaging, the deep unrolling schemes typically become inefficient both in terms of memory and computation, due to the need of computing multiple times the high-dimensional forward and adjoint operators. Recently researchers have found that such limitations can be partially addressed by stochastic unrolling with subsets of operators, inspired by the success of stochastic first-order optimization. In this work, we propose a further acceleration upon stochastic unrolling, using sketching techniques to approximate products in the high-dimensional image space. The operator sketching can be jointly applied with stochastic unrolling for the best acceleration and compression performance. Our numerical experiments on X-ray CT image reconstruction demonstrate the remarkable effectiveness of our sketched unrolling schemes. 在这项工作中，我们提出了一种使用算子草图设计高效深度展开网络的新范例。深度展开网络是目前最先进的成像逆问题解决方案。然而，对于高维成像任务，特别是 3D 锥束 X 射线 CT 和 4D MRI 成像，由于需要多次计算高维前向算子和伴随算子，深度展开方案在内存和计算方面通常变得低效。最近，受随机一阶优化成功的启发，研究人员发现，通过使用算子子集进行随机展开可以部分解决此类限制。在这项工作中，我们提出了随机展开的进一步加速，使用草图技术来近似高维图像空间中的产品。操作员草图可以与随机展开联合应用，以获得最佳的加速和压缩性能。我们对 X 射线 CT 图像重建的数值实验证明了我们草拟的展开方案的显着有效性。 本文提出一种基于算子草图的深度展开网络设计范式，以解决高维成像任务中的计算和内存效率问题。 Junqi Tang,Subhadip Mukherjee,Carola-Bibiane Schönlieb cs.CV,cs.LG,eess.IV,math.OC

authors_text: Purbarag Pathak Choudhury,Ujjal Kr Dutta,Dhruba Kr Bhattacharyya
title: Multispectral Satellite Data Classification using Soft Computing Approach
title_zh: 使用软计算方法的多光谱卫星数据分类
comment: Proc. of International Conference on Advances in Communication, Network, and Computing (CNC), 2014
comments: Proc. of International Conference on Advances in Communication, Network, and Computing (CNC), 2014
abstract: A satellite image is a remotely sensed image data, where each pixel represents a specific location on earth. The pixel value recorded is the reflection radiation from the earth's surface at that location. Multispectral images are those that capture image data at specific frequencies across the electromagnetic spectrum as compared to Panchromatic images which are sensitive to all wavelength of visible light. Because of the high resolution and high dimensions of these images, they create difficulties for clustering techniques to efficiently detect clusters of different sizes, shapes and densities as a trade off for fast processing time. In this paper we propose a grid-density based clustering technique for identification of objects. We also introduce an approach to classify a satellite image data using a rule induction based machine learning algorithm. The object identification and classification methods have been validated using several synthetic and benchmark datasets.
summary: A satellite image is a remotely sensed image data, where each pixel represents a specific location on earth. The pixel value recorded is the reflection radiation from the earth's surface at that location. Multispectral images are those that capture image data at specific frequencies across the electromagnetic spectrum as compared to Panchromatic images which are sensitive to all wavelength of visible light. Because of the high resolution and high dimensions of these images, they create difficulties for clustering techniques to efficiently detect clusters of different sizes, shapes and densities as a trade off for fast processing time. In this paper we propose a grid-density based clustering technique for identification of objects. We also introduce an approach to classify a satellite image data using a rule induction based machine learning algorithm. The object identification and classification methods have been validated using several synthetic and benchmark datasets.
abstract_zh: 卫星图像是遥感图像数据，其中每个像素代表地球上的特定位置。记录的像素值是该位置处地球表面的反射辐射。与对所有可见光波长敏感的全色图像相比，多光谱图像是在整个电磁频谱的特定频率下捕获图像数据的图像。由于这些图像的高分辨率和高维度，它们为聚类技术有效检测不同大小、形状和密度的聚类带来了困难，以牺牲快速处理时间。在本文中，我们提出了一种基于网格密度的聚类技术来识别对象。我们还介绍了一种使用基于规则归纳的机器学习算法对卫星图像数据进行分类的方法。对象识别和分类方法已使用多个合成和基准数据集进行了验证。

AI.tldr: 提出基于软计算方法的多光谱卫星数据分类技术
AI.motivation: 解决多光谱卫星图像高分辨率和高维度带来的聚类效率问题，提升分类准确性
AI.method: 采用网格密度聚类技术识别对象，并应用基于规则归纳的机器学习算法进行分类
AI.result: 通过合成和基准数据集验证了方法的有效性，提升了分类性能
AI.conclusion: 所提出的软计算方法能有效处理多光谱卫星数据分类问题，具有较高的分类准确率和鲁棒性

authors_text: Ryan Lagerquist,Imme Ebert-Uphoff
title: Can we integrate spatial verification methods into neural-network loss functions for atmospheric science?
title_zh: 我们能否将空间验证方法集成到大气科学的神经网络损失函数中？
comment: 51 pages + 21 pages of supplemental material, 15 figures, 3 tables, 7 supplemental figures, accepted to Artificial Intelligence for Earth Systems
comments: 51 pages + 21 pages of supplemental material, 15 figures, 3 tables, 7 supplemental figures, accepted to Artificial Intelligence for Earth Systems
abstract: In the last decade, much work in atmospheric science has focused on spatial verification (SV) methods for gridded prediction, which overcome serious disadvantages of pixelwise verification. However, neural networks (NN) in atmospheric science are almost always trained to optimize pixelwise loss functions, even when ultimately assessed with SV methods. This establishes a disconnect between model verification during vs. after training. To address this issue, we develop spatially enhanced loss functions (SELF) and demonstrate their use for a real-world problem: predicting the occurrence of thunderstorms (henceforth, "convection") with NNs. In each SELF we use either a neighbourhood filter, which highlights convection at scales larger than a threshold, or a spectral filter (employing Fourier or wavelet decomposition), which is more flexible and highlights convection at scales between two thresholds. We use these filters to spatially enhance common verification scores, such as the Brier score. We train each NN with a different SELF and compare their performance at many scales of convection, from discrete storm cells to tropical cyclones. Among our many findings are that (a) for a low (high) risk threshold, the ideal SELF focuses on small (large) scales; (b) models trained with a pixelwise loss function perform surprisingly well; (c) however, models trained with a spectral filter produce much better-calibrated probabilities than a pixelwise model. We provide a general guide to using SELFs, including technical challenges and the final Python code, as well as demonstrating their use for the convection problem. To our knowledge this is the most in-depth guide to SELFs in the geosciences.

However, neural networks (NN) in atmospheric science are almost always trained to optimize pixelwise loss functions, even when ultimately assessed with SV methods. This establishes a disconnect between model verification during vs. after training. To address this issue, we develop spatially enhanced loss functions (SELF) and demonstrate their use for a real-world problem: predicting the occurrence of thunderstorms (henceforth, "convection") with NNs. In each SELF we use either a neighbourhood filter, which highlights convection at scales larger than a threshold, or a spectral filter (employing Fourier or wavelet decomposition), which is more flexible and highlights convection at scales between two thresholds. We use these filters to spatially enhance common verification scores, such as the Brier score. We train each NN with a different SELF and compare their performance at many scales of convection, from discrete storm cells to tropical cyclones. Among our many findings are that (a) for a low (high) risk threshold, the ideal SELF focuses on small (large) scales; (b) models trained with a pixelwise loss function perform surprisingly well; (c) however, models trained with a spectral filter produce much better-calibrated probabilities than a pixelwise model. We provide a general guide to using SELFs, including technical challenges and the final Python code, as well as demonstrating their use for the convection problem. To our knowledge this is the most in-depth guide to SELFs in the geosciences.
abstract_zh: 在过去的十年中，大气科学领域的许多工作都集中在网格预测的空间验证（SV）方法上，该方法克服了像素验证的严重缺点。然而，大气科学中的神经网络 (NN) 几乎总是经过训练来优化像素损失函数，即使最终使用 SV 方法进行评估也是如此。这在训练期间和之后的模型验证之间建立了脱节。为了解决这个问题，我们开发了空间增强损失函数（SELF）并展示了它们在现实世界问题中的用途：用神经网络预测雷暴（以下称为“对流”）的发生。在每个 SELF 中，我们使用邻域滤波器（突出显示大于阈值的尺度上的对流）或谱滤波器（采用傅里叶或小波分解），后者更灵活，突出显示两个阈值之间尺度上的对流。我们使用这些过滤器在空间上增强常见的验证分数，例如 Brier 分数。我们使用不同的 SELF 训练每个神经网络，并比较它们在多种对流尺度（从离散风暴单元到热带气旋）的性能。我们的众多发现包括：(a) 对于低（高）风险阈值，理想的 SELF 侧重于小（大）规模； (b) 使用像素级损失函数训练的模型表现出奇的好； (c) 然而，使用光谱滤波器训练的模型比像素模型产生更好的校准概率。我们提供了使用 SELF 的一般指南，包括技术挑战和最终的 Python 代码，以及演示它们在对流问题中的用途。据我们所知，这是地球科学领域最深入的自我指南。

AI.tldr: 本文提出将空间验证方法整合到神经网络损失函数中，以改进大气科学中的预测模型训练。
AI.motivation: 传统神经网络在大气科学中使用像素级损失函数进行训练，而最终评估依赖空间验证方法，导致训练与验证目标不一致，影响模型性能。
AI.method: 开发空间增强损失函数（SELF），通过邻域滤波或频谱滤波（傅里叶/小波分解）增强验证指标（如Brier分数），并针对不同尺度对流现象训练和评估模型。
AI.result: 低（高）风险阈值下，小（大）尺度空间增强效果最佳；像素级模型表现尚可，但频谱滤波模型的概率校准更优。
AI.conclusion: 空间增强损失函数能有效提升模型预测校准性，尤其频谱滤波方法表现突出，为大气科学提供可复用的技术框架。

Among our many findings are that (a) for a low (high) risk threshold, the ideal SELF focuses on small (large) scales; (b) models trained with a pixelwise loss function perform surprisingly well; (c) however, models trained with a spectral filter produce much better-calibrated probabilities than a pixelwise model. We provide a general guide to using SELFs, including technical challenges and the final Python code, as well as demonstrating their use for the convection problem. To our knowledge this is the most in-depth guide to SELFs in the geosciences. 在过去的十年中，大气科学领域的许多工作都集中在网格预测的空间验证（SV）方法上，该方法克服了像素验证的严重缺点。然而，大气科学中的神经网络 (NN) 几乎总是经过训练来优化像素损失函数，即使最终使用 SV 方法进行评估也是如此。这在训练期间和之后的模型验证之间建立了脱节。为了解决这个问题，我们开发了空间增强损失函数（SELF）并展示了它们在现实世界问题中的用途：用神经网络预测雷暴（以下称为“对流”）的发生。在每个 SELF 中，我们使用邻域滤波器（突出显示大于阈值的尺度上的对流）或谱滤波器（采用傅里叶或小波分解），后者更灵活，突出显示两个阈值之间尺度上的对流。我们使用这些过滤器在空间上增强常见的验证分数，例如 Brier 分数。我们使用不同的 SELF 训练每个神经网络，并比较它们在多种对流尺度（从离散风暴单元到热带气旋）的性能。我们的众多发现包括：(a) 对于低（高）风险阈值，理想的 SELF 侧重于小（大）规模； (b) 使用像素级损失函数训练的模型表现出奇的好； (c) 然而，使用光谱滤波器训练的模型比像素模型产生更好的校准概率。我们提供了使用 SELF 的一般指南，包括技术挑战和最终的 Python 代码，以及演示它们在对流问题中的用途。据我们所知，这是地球科学领域最深入的自我指南。 本文提出将空间验证方法整合到神经网络损失函数中，以改进大气科学中的预测模型训练。 Ryan Lagerquist,Imme Ebert-Uphoff cs.LG,cs.AI,physics.ao-ph,stat.AP,stat.ME

authors_text: Yifan Zhang,Qingyong Hu,Guoquan Xu,Yanxin Ma,Jianwei Wan,Yulan Guo
title: Not All Points Are Equal: Learning Highly Efficient Point-based Detectors for 3D LiDAR Point Clouds
title_zh: 并非所有点都相等：学习 3D LiDAR 点云的高效基于点的探测器
abstract: We study the problem of efficient object detection of 3D LiDAR point clouds. To reduce the memory and computational cost, existing point-based pipelines usually adopt task-agnostic random sampling or farthest point sampling to progressively downsample input point clouds, despite the fact that not all points are equally important to the task of object detection. In particular, the foreground points are inherently more important than background points for object detectors. Motivated by this, we propose a highly-efficient single-stage point-based 3D detector in this paper, termed IA-SSD. The key of our approach is to exploit two learnable, task-oriented, instance-aware downsampling strategies to hierarchically select the foreground points belonging to objects of interest. Additionally, we also introduce a contextual centroid perception module to further estimate precise instance centers. Finally, we build our IA-SSD following the encoder-only architecture for efficiency. Extensive experiments conducted on several large-scale detection benchmarks demonstrate the competitive performance of our IA-SSD. Thanks to the low memory footprint and a high degree of parallelism, it achieves a superior speed of 80+ frames-per-second on the KITTI dataset with a single RTX2080Ti GPU. The code is available at \url{https://github.com/yifanzhang713/IA-SSD}.
summary: We study the problem of efficient object detection of 3D LiDAR point clouds. To reduce the memory and computational cost, existing point-based pipelines usually adopt task-agnostic random sampling or farthest point sampling to progressively downsample input point clouds, despite the fact that not all points are equally important to the task of object detection. In particular, the foreground points are inherently more important than background points for object detectors. Motivated by this, we propose a highly-efficient single-stage point-based 3D detector in this paper, termed IA-SSD. The key of our approach is to exploit two learnable, task-oriented, instance-aware downsampling strategies to hierarchically select the foreground points belonging to objects of interest. Additionally, we also introduce a contextual centroid perception module to further estimate precise instance centers. Finally, we build our IA-SSD following the encoder-only architecture for efficiency. Extensive experiments conducted on several large-scale detection benchmarks demonstrate the competitive performance of our IA-SSD. Thanks to the low memory footprint and a high degree of parallelism, it achieves a superior speed of 80+ frames-per-second on the KITTI dataset with a single RTX2080Ti GPU. The code is available at \url{https://github.com/yifanzhang713/IA-SSD}.
abstract_zh: 我们研究 3D LiDAR 点云的高效目标检测问题。为了减少内存和计算成本，现有的基于点的管道通常采用与任务无关的随机采样或最远点采样来逐步对输入点云进行下采样，尽管并非所有点对于对象检测任务都同样重要。特别是，对于对象检测器来说，前景点本质上比背景点更重要。受此启发，我们在本文中提出了一种高效的单级基于点的 3D 检测器，称为 IA-SSD。我们方法的关键是利用两种可学习的、面向任务的、实例感知的下采样策略来分层选择属于感兴趣对象的前景点。此外，我们还引入了上下文质心感知模块来进一步估计精确的实例中心。最后，我们按照仅编码器架构构建 IA-SSD，以提高效率。在多个大规模检测基准上进行的大量实验证明了我们的 IA-SSD 的竞争性能。得益于低内存占用和高度并行性，它使用单个 RTX2080Ti GPU 在 KITTI 数据集上实现了每秒 80 帧以上的卓越速度。代码可在 \url{https://github.com/yifanzhang713/IA-SSD} 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文研究如何高效检测3D激光雷达点云中的物体，提出了一种名为IA-SSD的单阶段点云检测器。
AI.motivation: 现有方法通过随机采样或最远点采样降低点云密度，但未考虑前景点对目标检测的重要性，导致效率与精度的平衡不足。
AI.method: 提出两种可学习的、面向任务的实例感知下采样策略，分层选择目标前景点，并引入上下文质心感知模块估计精确实例中心，采用仅编码器的架构提升效率。
AI.result: 在KITTI数据集上，使用单块RTX2080Ti GPU实现80+帧/秒的检测速度，且在多个大规模基准测试中表现优异。
AI.conclusion: IA-SSD通过关注关键前景点和高效架构设计，在保持检测性能的同时显著提升了3D点云检测的计算效率。

authors_text: Navid H. Zandi,Awny M. El-Mohandes,Rong Zheng
title: Individualizing Head-Related Transfer Functions for Binaural Acoustic Applications
title_zh: 个性化双耳声学应用的头部相关传递函数
abstract: A Head Related Transfer Function (HRTF) characterizes how a human ear receives sounds from a point in space, and depends on the shapes of one's head, pinna, and torso. Accurate estimations of HRTFs for human subjects are crucial in enabling binaural acoustic applications such as sound localization and 3D sound spatialization. Unfortunately, conventional approaches for HRTF estimation rely on specialized devices or lengthy measurement processes. This work proposes a novel lightweight method for HRTF individualization that can be implemented using commercial-off-the-shelf components and performed by average users in home settings. The proposed method has two key components: a generative neural network model that can be individualized to predict HRTFs of new subjects from sparse measurements, and a lightweight measurement procedure that collects HRTF data from spatial locations. Extensive experiments using a public dataset and in house measurement data from 10 subjects of different ages and genders, show that the individualized models significantly outperform a baseline model in the accuracy of predicted HRTFs. To further demonstrate the advantages of individualized HRTFs, we implement two prototype applications for binaural localization and acoustic spatialization. We find that the performance of a localization model is improved by 15 degree after trained with individualized HRTFs. Furthermore, in hearing tests, the success rate of correctly identifying the azimuth direction of incoming sounds increases by 183% after individualization.
summary: A Head Related Transfer Function (HRTF) characterizes how a human ear receives sounds from a point in space, and depends on the shapes of one's head, pinna, and torso. Accurate estimations of HRTFs for human subjects are crucial in enabling binaural acoustic applications such as sound localization and 3D sound spatialization. Unfortunately, conventional approaches for HRTF estimation rely on specialized devices or lengthy measurement processes. This work proposes a novel lightweight method for HRTF individualization that can be implemented using commercial-off-the-shelf components and performed by average users in home settings. The proposed method has two key components: a generative neural network model that can be individualized to predict HRTFs of new subjects from sparse measurements, and a lightweight measurement procedure that collects HRTF data from spatial locations. Extensive experiments using a public dataset and in house measurement data from 10 subjects of different ages and genders, show that the individualized models significantly outperform a baseline model in the accuracy of predicted HRTFs. To further demonstrate the advantages of individualized HRTFs, we implement two prototype applications for binaural localization and acoustic spatialization. We find that the performance of a localization model is improved by 15 degree after trained with individualized HRTFs. Furthermore, in hearing tests, the success rate of correctly identifying the azimuth direction of incoming sounds increases by 183% after individualization.
abstract_zh: 头部相关传递函数 (HRTF) 描述了人耳如何从空间中的一点接收声音，并且取决于人的头部、耳廓和躯干的形状。准确估计人类受试者的 HRTF 对于实现声音定位和 3D 声音空间化等双耳声学应用至关重要。不幸的是，传统的 HRTF 估计方法依赖于专用设备或冗长的测量过程。这项工作提出了一种新的 HRTF 个性化轻量级方法，可以使用商用现成组件来实现，并由普通用户在家庭环境中执行。所提出的方法有两个关键组成部分：一个生成神经网络模型，可以个性化地从稀疏测量中预测新受试者的 HRTF；以及一个从空间位置收集 HRTF 数据的轻量级测量程序。使用公共数据集和来自 10 名不同年龄和性别的受试者的内部测量数据进行的广泛实验表明，个性化模型在预测 HRTF 的准确性方面显着优于基线模型。为了进一步展示个性化 HRTF 的优势，我们实现了两个用于双耳定位和声学空间化的原型应用。我们发现，使用个性化 HRTF 进行训练后，定位模型的性能提高了 15 度。此外，在听力测试中，个体化后正确识别传入声音方位方向的成功率提高了183%。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种轻量级方法，用于在家庭环境中使用现成设备对个体进行头相关传递函数（HRTF）的个性化估计。
AI.motivation: 传统的HRTF估计方法依赖于专用设备或复杂的测量过程，难以普及使用，因此需要一种简便的方法实现HRTF个性化。
AI.method: 该方法包含两个关键部分：一个可个性化的生成神经网络模型，用于从稀疏测量数据预测新主体的HRTF；以及一种轻量级测量程序，用于从空间位置收集HRTF数据。
AI.result: 实验表明，个性化模型在HRTF预测准确性上显著优于基线模型。使用个性化HRTF的定位模型性能提升了15度，听觉测试中正确识别声源方位的成功率提高了183%。
AI.conclusion: 该方法在家庭环境中实现HRTF个性化具有可行性，显著提升了双耳定位和声学空间化的性能。

Furthermore, in hearing tests, the success rate of correctly identifying the azimuth direction of incoming sounds increases by 183% after individualization. 头部相关传递函数 (HRTF) 描述了人耳如何从空间中的一点接收声音，并且取决于人的头部、耳廓和躯干的形状。准确估计人类受试者的 HRTF 对于实现声音定位和 3D 声音空间化等双耳声学应用至关重要。不幸的是，传统的 HRTF 估计方法依赖于专用设备或冗长的测量过程。这项工作提出了一种新的 HRTF 个性化轻量级方法，可以使用商用现成组件来实现，并由普通用户在家庭环境中执行。所提出的方法有两个关键组成部分：一个生成神经网络模型，可以个性化地从稀疏测量中预测新受试者的 HRTF；以及一个从空间位置收集 HRTF 数据的轻量级测量程序。使用公共数据集和来自 10 名不同年龄和性别的受试者的内部测量数据进行的广泛实验表明，个性化模型在预测 HRTF 的准确性方面显着优于基线模型。为了进一步展示个性化 HRTF 的优势，我们实现了两个用于双耳定位和声学空间化的原型应用。我们发现，使用个性化 HRTF 进行训练后，定位模型的性能提高了 15 度。此外，在听力测试中，个体化后正确识别传入声音方位方向的成功率提高了183%。 本文提出了一种轻量级方法，用于在家庭环境中使用现成设备对个体进行头相关传递函数（HRTF）的个性化估计。 Navid H. Zandi,Awny M. El-Mohandes,Rong Zheng cs.SD,eess.AS

authors_text: Christina Stoiber,Markus Wagner,Florian Grassinger,Margit Pohl,Holger Stitz,Marc Streit,Benjamin Potzmann,Wolfgang Aigner
title: Visualization Onboarding Grounded in Educational Theories
title_zh: 基于教育理论的可视化入门
abstract: The aim of visualization is to support people in dealing with large and complex information structures, to make these structures more comprehensible, facilitate exploration, and enable knowledge discovery. However, users often have problems reading and interpreting data from visualizations, in particular when they experience them for the first time. A lack of visualization literacy, i.e., knowledge in terms of domain, data, visual encoding, interaction, and also analytical methods can be observed. To support users in learning how to use new digital technologies, the concept of onboarding has been successfully applied in other domains. However, it has not received much attention from the visualization community so far. This chapter aims to fill this gap by defining the concept and systematically laying out the design space of onboarding in the context of visualization as a descriptive design space. On this basis, we present a survey of approaches from the academic community as well as from commercial products, especially surveying educational theories that inform the onboarding strategies. Additionally, we derived design considerations based on previous publications and present some guidelines for the design of visualization onboarding concepts.
summary: The aim of visualization is to support people in dealing with large and complex information structures, to make these structures more comprehensible, facilitate exploration, and enable knowledge discovery. However, users often have problems reading and interpreting data from visualizations, in particular when they experience them for the first time. A lack of visualization literacy, i.e., knowledge in terms of domain, data, visual encoding, interaction, and also analytical methods can be observed. To support users in learning how to use new digital technologies, the concept of onboarding has been successfully applied in other domains. However, it has not received much attention from the visualization community so far. This chapter aims to fill this gap by defining the concept and systematically laying out the design space of onboarding in the context of visualization as a descriptive design space. On this basis, we present a survey of approaches from the academic community as well as from commercial products, especially surveying educational theories that inform the onboarding strategies. Additionally, we derived design considerations based on previous publications and present some guidelines for the design of visualization onboarding concepts.
abstract_zh: 可视化的目的是支持人们处理庞大而复杂的信息结构，使这些结构更容易理解，促进探索并实现知识发现。然而，用户在阅读和解释可视化数据时经常会遇到问题，特别是当他们第一次体验这些数据时。可以观察到缺乏可视化素养，即领域、数据、视觉编码、交互以及分析方法方面的知识。为了支持用户学习如何使用新的数字技术，入职概念已成功应用于其他领域。然而，迄今为止它还没有受到可视化社区的太多关注。本章旨在通过定义概念并系统地将可视化背景下的引导设计空间作为描述性设计空间来填补这一空白。在此基础上，我们对学术界和商业产品的方法进行了调查，特别是对为入职策略提供信息的教育理论进行了调查。此外，我们根据以前的出版物得出了设计注意事项，并提出了一些可视化入门概念设计的指南。

AI.tldr: 本文旨在通过教育理论指导，系统定义可视化入门（onboarding）的概念与设计空间，解决用户首次使用可视化工具时面临的理解困难问题。
AI.motivation: 用户因缺乏可视化素养（如领域知识、数据理解等）常难以有效解读可视化内容，而现有研究对可视化入门设计的关注不足，需借鉴教育理论构建系统性解决方案。
AI.method: 通过文献综述与商业产品分析，结合教育理论（如认知负荷理论、建构主义学习理论）梳理可视化入门的设计空间，并提炼设计原则与指南。
AI.result: 提出了可视化入门的设计框架，总结了学术界与工业界现有方法，并基于教育理论衍生出针对可视化入门的设计考量与实施建议。
AI.conclusion: 本文填补了可视化领域入门设计的理论空白，为开发者提供基于教育理论的系统化设计指导，以提升用户对复杂信息的解读能力。

authors_text: Jana Fragemann,Lynton Ardizzone,Jan Egger,Jens Kleesiek
title: Review of Disentanglement Approaches for Medical Applications -- Towards Solving the Gordian Knot of Generative Models in Healthcare
title_zh: 医疗应用解开方法回顾——解决医疗保健中生成模型的棘手难题
abstract: Deep neural networks are commonly used for medical purposes such as image generation, segmentation, or classification. Besides this, they are often criticized as black boxes as their decision process is often not human interpretable. Encouraging the latent representation of a generative model to be disentangled offers new perspectives of control and interpretability. Understanding the data generation process could help to create artificial medical data sets without violating patient privacy, synthesizing different data modalities, or discovering data generating characteristics. These characteristics might unravel novel relationships that can be related to genetic traits or patient outcomes. In this paper, we give a comprehensive overview of popular generative models, like Generative Adversarial Networks (GANs), Variational Autoencoders (VAEs), and Flow-based Models. Furthermore, we summarize the different notions of disentanglement, review approaches to disentangle latent space representations and metrics to evaluate the degree of disentanglement. After introducing the theoretical frameworks, we give an overview of recent medical applications and discuss the impact and importance of disentanglement approaches for medical applications.
summary: Deep neural networks are commonly used for medical purposes such as image generation, segmentation, or classification. Besides this, they are often criticized as black boxes as their decision process is often not human interpretable. Encouraging the latent representation of a generative model to be disentangled offers new perspectives of control and interpretability. Understanding the data generation process could help to create artificial medical data sets without violating patient privacy, synthesizing different data modalities, or discovering data generating characteristics. These characteristics might unravel novel relationships that can be related to genetic traits or patient outcomes. In this paper, we give a comprehensive overview of popular generative models, like Generative Adversarial Networks (GANs), Variational Autoencoders (VAEs), and Flow-based Models. Furthermore, we summarize the different notions of disentanglement, review approaches to disentangle latent space representations and metrics to evaluate the degree of disentanglement. After introducing the theoretical frameworks, we give an overview of recent medical applications and discuss the impact and importance of disentanglement approaches for medical applications.
abstract_zh: 深度神经网络通常用于医学目的，例如图像生成、分割或分类。除此之外，它们经常被批评为黑匣子，因为它们的决策过程通常无法被人类解释。鼓励分离生成模型的潜在表示提供了控制和可解释性的新视角。了解数据生成过程有助于创建人工医疗数据集，而不会侵犯患者隐私、综合不同的数据模式或发现数据生成特征。这些特征可能会揭示与遗传特征或患者结果相关的新关系。在本文中，我们全面概述了流行的生成模型，例如生成对抗网络（GAN）、变分自动编码器（VAE）和基于流的模型。此外，我们总结了解缠结的不同概念，回顾了解缠结潜在空间表示的方法以及评估解缠结程度的指标。在介绍理论框架之后，我们概述了最近的医学应用，并讨论了解开方法对医学应用的影响和重要性。

AI.tldr: 综述生成模型在医疗应用中的解耦方法，探讨其提升可解释性和控制性的潜力。
AI.motivation: 解决医疗AI黑箱问题，通过解耦潜在空间实现可控数据生成与生物特征发现。
AI.method: 系统综述GAN、VAE等生成模型，总结解耦理论框架、技术路径及评估指标。
AI.result: 总结医疗应用案例，强调解耦方法在提升模型可解释性和数据合成中的重要性。
AI.conclusion: 解耦方法为医疗AI提供新视角，但需解决实际应用中的挑战以实现更广泛影响。

authors_text: Samuel Yu,Peter Wu,Paul Pu Liang,Ruslan Salakhutdinov,Louis-Philippe Morency
title: PACS: A Dataset for Physical Audiovisual CommonSense Reasoning
title_zh: PACS：物理视听常识推理数据集
abstract: In order for AI to be safely deployed in real-world scenarios such as hospitals, schools, and the workplace, it must be able to robustly reason about the physical world. Fundamental to this reasoning is physical common sense: understanding the physical properties and affordances of available objects, how they can be manipulated, and how they interact with other objects. Physical commonsense reasoning is fundamentally a multi-sensory task, since physical properties are manifested through multiple modalities - two of them being vision and acoustics. Our paper takes a step towards real-world physical commonsense reasoning by contributing PACS: the first audiovisual benchmark annotated for physical commonsense attributes. PACS contains 13,400 question-answer pairs, involving 1,377 unique physical commonsense questions and 1,526 videos. Our dataset provides new opportunities to advance the research field of physical reasoning by bringing audio as a core component of this multimodal problem. Using PACS, we evaluate multiple state-of-the-art models on our new challenging task. While some models show promising results (70% accuracy), they all fall short of human performance (95% accuracy). We conclude the paper by demonstrating the importance of multimodal reasoning and providing possible avenues for future research.
summary: In order for AI to be safely deployed in real-world scenarios such as hospitals, schools, and the workplace, it must be able to robustly reason about the physical world. Fundamental to this reasoning is physical common sense: understanding the physical properties and affordances of available objects, how they can be manipulated, and how they interact with other objects. Physical commonsense reasoning is fundamentally a multi-sensory task, since physical properties are manifested through multiple modalities - two of them being vision and acoustics. Our paper takes a step towards real-world physical commonsense reasoning by contributing PACS: the first audiovisual benchmark annotated for physical commonsense attributes. PACS contains 13,400 question-answer pairs, involving 1,377 unique physical commonsense questions and 1,526 videos. Our dataset provides new opportunities to advance the research field of physical reasoning by bringing audio as a core component of this multimodal problem. Using PACS, we evaluate multiple state-of-the-art models on our new challenging task. While some models show promising results (70% accuracy), they all fall short of human performance (95% accuracy). We conclude the paper by demonstrating the importance of multimodal reasoning and providing possible avenues for future research.
abstract_zh: 为了让人工智能安全地部署在医院、学校和工作场所等现实场景中，它必须能够对物理世界进行稳健的推理。这种推理的基础是物理常识：了解可用对象的物理属性和可供性、如何操纵它们以及它们如何与其他对象交互。物理常识推理从根本上来说是一项多感官任务，因为物理特性是通过多种方式表现出来的——其中两种是视觉和听觉。我们的论文通过贡献 PACS 向现实世界的物理常识推理迈出了一步：第一个针对物理常识属性注释的视听基准。 PACS 包含 13,400 个问答对，涉及 1,377 个独特的物理常识问题和 1,526 个视频。我们的数据集通过将音频作为多模态问题的核心组成部分，为推进物理推理研究领域提供了新的机会。使用 PACS，我们针对新的挑战性任务评估了多个最先进的模型。虽然一些模型显示出有希望的结果（70% 的准确率），但它们都低于人类的表现（95% 的准确率）。我们通过证明多模态推理的重要性并为未来研究提供可能的途径来结束本文。

AI.tldr: 提出PACS数据集，用于物理常识推理，包含音频和视频信息，评估模型性能
AI.motivation: AI需具备物理常识推理能力以安全部署于现实场景，现有数据集缺乏多模态支持，需构建包含视听信息的基准
AI.method: 构建包含13,400个问答对、1,377个问题和1,526个视频的PACS数据集，评估多模态模型在物理常识任务的表现
AI.result: 部分模型达70%准确率，但均远低于人类95%的水平，凸显多模态推理挑战
AI.conclusion: 强调多模态融合对物理推理的重要性，指出需探索更有效的跨模态表征与推理方法

search_text: PACS: A Dataset for Physical Audiovisual CommonSense Reasoning PACS：物理视听常识推理数据集 In order for AI to be safely deployed in real-world scenarios such as hospitals, schools, and the workplace, it must be able to robustly reason about the physical world. Fundamental to this reasoning is physical common sense: understanding the physical properties and affordances of available objects, how they can be manipulated, and how they interact with other objects. Physical commonsense reasoning is fundamentally a multi-sensory task, since physical properties are manifested through multiple modalities - two of them being vision and acoustics. Our paper takes a step towards real-world physical commonsense reasoning by contributing PACS: the first audiovisual benchmark annotated for physical commonsense attributes. PACS contains 13,400 question-answer pairs, involving 1,377 unique physical commonsense questions and 1,526 videos. Our dataset provides new opportunities to advance the research field of physical reasoning by bringing audio as a core component of this multimodal problem. Using PACS, we evaluate multiple state-of-the-art models on our new challenging task. While some models show promising results (70% accuracy), they all fall short of human performance (95% accuracy). We conclude the paper by demonstrating the importance of multimodal reasoning and providing possible avenues for future research. 为了让人工智能安全地部署在医院、学校和工作场所等现实场景中，它必须能够对物理世界进行稳健的推理。这种推理的基础是物理常识：了解可用对象的物理属性和可供性、如何操纵它们以及它们如何与其他对象交互。物理常识推理从根本上来说是一项多感官任务，因为物理特性是通过多种方式表现出来的——其中两种是视觉和听觉。我们的论文通过贡献 PACS 向现实世界的物理常识推理迈出了一步：第一个针对物理常识属性注释的视听基准。 PACS 包含 13,400 个问答对，涉及 1,377 个独特的物理常识问题和 1,526 个视频。我们的数据集通过将音频作为多模态问题的核心组成部分，为推进物理推理研究领域提供了新的机会。使用 PACS，我们针对新的挑战性任务评估了多个最先进的模型。虽然一些模型显示出有希望的结果（70% 的准确率），但它们都低于人类的表现（95% 的准确率）。我们通过证明多模态推理的重要性并为未来研究提供可能的途径来结束本文。 提出PACS数据集，用于物理常识推理，包含音频和视频信息，评估模型性能 Samuel Yu,Peter Wu,Paul Pu Liang,Ruslan Salakhutdinov,Louis-Philippe Morency cs.LG,cs.AI,cs.CL,cs.CV,cs.MM

authors_text: Jia-Xing Zhong,Kaichen Zhou,Qingyong Hu,Bing Wang,Niki Trigoni,Andrew Markham
title: No Pain, Big Gain: Classify Dynamic Point Cloud Sequences with Static Models by Fitting Feature-level Space-time Surfaces
title_zh: 没有痛苦，收获很大：通过拟合特征级时空表面，用静态模型对动态点云序列进行分类
abstract: Scene flow is a powerful tool for capturing the motion field of 3D point clouds. However, it is difficult to directly apply flow-based models to dynamic point cloud classification since the unstructured points make it hard or even impossible to efficiently and effectively trace point-wise correspondences. To capture 3D motions without explicitly tracking correspondences, we propose a kinematics-inspired neural network (Kinet) by generalizing the kinematic concept of ST-surfaces to the feature space. By unrolling the normal solver of ST-surfaces in the feature space, Kinet implicitly encodes feature-level dynamics and gains advantages from the use of mature backbones for static point cloud processing. With only minor changes in network structures and low computing overhead, it is painless to jointly train and deploy our framework with a given static model. Experiments on NvGesture, SHREC'17, MSRAction-3D, and NTU-RGBD demonstrate its efficacy in performance, efficiency in both the number of parameters and computational complexity, as well as its versatility to various static backbones. Noticeably, Kinet achieves the accuracy of 93.27% on MSRAction-3D with only 3.20M parameters and 10.35G FLOPS.
summary: Scene flow is a powerful tool for capturing the motion field of 3D point clouds. However, it is difficult to directly apply flow-based models to dynamic point cloud classification since the unstructured points make it hard or even impossible to efficiently and effectively trace point-wise correspondences. To capture 3D motions without explicitly tracking correspondences, we propose a kinematics-inspired neural network (Kinet) by generalizing the kinematic concept of ST-surfaces to the feature space. By unrolling the normal solver of ST-surfaces in the feature space, Kinet implicitly encodes feature-level dynamics and gains advantages from the use of mature backbones for static point cloud processing. With only minor changes in network structures and low computing overhead, it is painless to jointly train and deploy our framework with a given static model. Experiments on NvGesture, SHREC'17, MSRAction-3D, and NTU-RGBD demonstrate its efficacy in performance, efficiency in both the number of parameters and computational complexity, as well as its versatility to various static backbones. Noticeably, Kinet achieves the accuracy of 93.27% on MSRAction-3D with only 3.20M parameters and 10.35G FLOPS.
abstract_zh: 场景流是捕捉 3D 点云运动场的强大工具。然而，直接将基于流的模型应用于动态点云分类是很困难的，因为非结构化点使得很难甚至不可能高效地跟踪逐点对应关系。为了在不显式跟踪对应关系的情况下捕获 3D 运动，我们通过将 ST 表面的运动学概念推广到特征空间，提出了一种受运动学启发的神经网络 (Kinet)。通过在特征空间中展开 ST 表面的法线求解器，Kinet 隐式编码特征级动态，并从使用成熟的主干进行静态点云处理中获得优势。由于网络结构仅发生微小变化且计算开销较低，因此使用给定的静态模型联合训练和部署我们的框架是轻松的。 NvGesture、SHREC'17、MSRAction-3D 和 NTU-RGBD 上的实验证明了其性能功效、参数数量和计算复杂性的效率，以及对各种静态主干网的多功能性。值得注意的是，Kinet 在 MSRAction-3D 上仅用 3.20M 参数和 10.35G FLOPS 就实现了 93.27% 的准确率。

AI.tldr: 该论文提出一种基于静态模型的动态点云序列分类方法，通过拟合特征级时空曲面（ST-surfaces）实现运动捕捉。
AI.motivation: 传统流模型难以直接处理动态点云分类任务，因其无序点结构导致难以追踪点对应关系，且动态建模成本高。
AI.method: 提出Kinet网络，将运动学中的ST-surfaces概念扩展到特征空间，通过解耦特征级动态信息，利用静态点云处理的成熟主干网络实现高效训练与部署。
AI.result: 在NvGesture、SHREC'17等数据集上验证有效性，MSRAction-3D数据集达到93.27%分类精度，参数量仅3.20M，计算复杂度10.35G FLOPS。
AI.conclusion: Kinet通过特征空间ST-surfaces建模，实现了动态点云分类的高效解决方案，兼容多种静态模型架构且计算开销低。

authors_text: Wheidima Carneiro de Melo,Eric Granger,Miguel Bordallo Lopez
title: Facial Expression Analysis Using Decomposed Multiscale Spatiotemporal Networks
title_zh: 使用分解的多尺度时空网络进行面部表情分析
abstract: Video-based analysis of facial expressions has been increasingly applied to infer health states of individuals, such as depression and pain. Among the existing approaches, deep learning models composed of structures for multiscale spatiotemporal processing have shown strong potential for encoding facial dynamics. However, such models have high computational complexity, making for a difficult deployment of these solutions. To address this issue, we introduce a new technique to decompose the extraction of multiscale spatiotemporal features. Particularly, a building block structure called Decomposed Multiscale Spatiotemporal Network (DMSN) is presented along with three variants: DMSN-A, DMSN-B, and DMSN-C blocks. The DMSN-A block generates multiscale representations by analyzing spatiotemporal features at multiple temporal ranges, while the DMSN-B block analyzes spatiotemporal features at multiple ranges, and the DMSN-C block analyzes spatiotemporal features at multiple spatial sizes. Using these variants, we design our DMSN architecture which has the ability to explore a variety of multiscale spatiotemporal features, favoring the adaptation to different facial behaviors. Our extensive experiments on challenging datasets show that the DMSN-C block is effective for depression detection, whereas the DMSN-A block is efficient for pain estimation. Results also indicate that our DMSN architecture provides a cost-effective solution for expressions that range from fewer facial variations over time, as in depression detection, to greater variations, as in pain estimation.
summary: Video-based analysis of facial expressions has been increasingly applied to infer health states of individuals, such as depression and pain. Among the existing approaches, deep learning models composed of structures for multiscale spatiotemporal processing have shown strong potential for encoding facial dynamics. However, such models have high computational complexity, making for a difficult deployment of these solutions. To address this issue, we introduce a new technique to decompose the extraction of multiscale spatiotemporal features. Particularly, a building block structure called Decomposed Multiscale Spatiotemporal Network (DMSN) is presented along with three variants: DMSN-A, DMSN-B, and DMSN-C blocks. The DMSN-A block generates multiscale representations by analyzing spatiotemporal features at multiple temporal ranges, while the DMSN-B block analyzes spatiotemporal features at multiple ranges, and the DMSN-C block analyzes spatiotemporal features at multiple spatial sizes. Using these variants, we design our DMSN architecture which has the ability to explore a variety of multiscale spatiotemporal features, favoring the adaptation to different facial behaviors. Our extensive experiments on challenging datasets show that the DMSN-C block is effective for depression detection, whereas the DMSN-A block is efficient for pain estimation. Results also indicate that our DMSN architecture provides a cost-effective solution for expressions that range from fewer facial variations over time, as in depression detection, to greater variations, as in pain estimation.
abstract_zh: 基于视频的面部表情分析已越来越多地应用于推断个人的健康状态，例如抑郁和疼痛。在现有的方法中，由多尺度时空处理结构组成的深度学习模型在编码面部动态方面表现出了强大的潜力。然而，此类模型的计算复杂度很高，导致这些解决方案的部署困难。为了解决这个问题，我们引入了一种新技术来分解多尺度时空特征的提取。特别是，提出了一种称为分解多尺度时空网络 (DMSN) 的构建块结构以及三个变体：DMSN-A、DMSN-B 和 DMSN-C 块。 DMSN-A 块通过分析多个时间范围的时空特征来生成多尺度表示，而 DMSN-B 块分析多个范围的时空特征，DMSN-C 块分析多个空间尺寸的时空特征。使用这些变体，我们设计了 DMSN 架构，该架构能够探索各种多尺度时空特征，有利于适应不同的面部行为。我们对具有挑战性的数据集进行的广泛实验表明，DMSN-C 模块对于抑郁症检测有效，而 DMSN-A 模块对于疼痛估计有效。结果还表明，我们的 DMSN 架构为表情提供了一种经济有效的解决方案，范围从随着时间的推移较少的面部变化（如抑郁症检测）到较大的变化（如疼痛估计）。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种分解的多尺度时空网络（DMSN），用于视频面部表情分析，以检测抑郁和疼痛等健康状态。
AI.motivation: 现有深度学习模型虽能处理多尺度时空特征，但计算复杂度高，难以部署。需更高效的解决方案以适应不同面部行为特征。
AI.method: 设计DMSN架构及其三个变体（DMSN-A/B/C），分别处理多时间范围、多时空范围及多空间尺寸的特征，适应不同面部动态需求。
AI.result: 实验表明，DMSN-C在抑郁检测中表现优异，DMSN-A在疼痛估计中效率更高，整体架构在成本效益上优于现有方法。
AI.conclusion: DMSN通过分解多尺度时空特征，有效平衡了不同面部表情任务的需求，为健康状态检测提供高效解决方案。

ai_content.tldr: 本文提出一种分解的多尺度时空网络（DMSN），用于视频面部表情分析，以检测抑郁和疼痛等健康状态。

search_text: Facial Expression Analysis Using Decomposed Multiscale Spatiotemporal Networks 使用分解的多尺度时空网络进行面部表情分析 Video-based analysis of facial expressions has been increasingly applied to infer health states of individuals, such as depression and pain. Among the existing approaches, deep learning models composed of structures for multiscale spatiotemporal processing have shown strong potential for encoding facial dynamics. However, such models have high computational complexity, making for a difficult deployment of these solutions. To address this issue, we introduce a new technique to decompose the extraction of multiscale spatiotemporal features. Particularly, a building block structure called Decomposed Multiscale Spatiotemporal Network (DMSN) is presented along with three variants: DMSN-A, DMSN-B, and DMSN-C blocks. The DMSN-A block generates multiscale representations by analyzing spatiotemporal features at multiple temporal ranges, while the DMSN-B block analyzes spatiotemporal features at multiple ranges, and the DMSN-C block analyzes spatiotemporal features at multiple spatial sizes. Using these variants, we design our DMSN architecture which has the ability to explore a variety of multiscale spatiotemporal features, favoring the adaptation to different facial behaviors. Our extensive experiments on challenging datasets show that the DMSN-C block is effective for depression detection, whereas the DMSN-A block is efficient for pain estimation. Results also indicate that our DMSN architecture provides a cost-effective solution for expressions that range from fewer facial variations over time, as in depression detection, to greater variations, as in pain estimation. 基于视频的面部表情分析已越来越多地应用于推断个人的健康状态，例如抑郁和疼痛。在现有的方法中，由多尺度时空处理结构组成的深度学习模型在编码面部动态方面表现出了强大的潜力。然而，此类模型的计算复杂度很高，导致这些解决方案的部署困难。为了解决这个问题，我们引入了一种新技术来分解多尺度时空特征的提取。特别是，提出了一种称为分解多尺度时空网络 (DMSN) 的构建块结构以及三个变体：DMSN-A、DMSN-B 和 DMSN-C 块。 DMSN-A 块通过分析多个时间范围的时空特征来生成多尺度表示，而 DMSN-B 块分析多个范围的时空特征，DMSN-C 块分析多个空间尺寸的时空特征。使用这些变体，我们设计了 DMSN 架构，该架构能够探索各种多尺度时空特征，有利于适应不同的面部行为。我们对具有挑战性的数据集进行的广泛实验表明，DMSN-C 模块对于抑郁症检测有效，而 DMSN-A 模块对于疼痛估计有效。结果还表明，我们的 DMSN 架构为表情提供了一种经济有效的解决方案，范围从随着时间的推移较少的面部变化（如抑郁症检测）到较大的变化（如疼痛估计）。 本文提出一种分解的多尺度时空网络（DMSN），用于视频面部表情分析，以检测抑郁和疼痛等健康状态。 Wheidima Carneiro de Melo,Eric Granger,Miguel Bordallo Lopez cs.CV

authors_text: Wolfgang Hoenig,Joaquim Ortiz-Haro,Marc Toussaint
title: db-A*: Discontinuity-bounded Search for Kinodynamic Mobile Robot Motion Planning
title_zh: db-A*：运动动力学移动机器人运动规划的不连续性有界搜索
abstract: We consider time-optimal motion planning for dynamical systems that are translation-invariant, a property that holds for many mobile robots, such as differential-drives, cars, airplanes, and multirotors. Our key insight is that we can extend graph-search algorithms to the continuous case when used symbiotically with optimization. For the graph search, we introduce discontinuity-bounded A* (db-A*), a generalization of the A* algorithm that uses concepts and data structures from sampling-based planners. Db-A* reuses short trajectories, so-called motion primitives, as edges and allows a maximum user-specified discontinuity at the vertices. These trajectories are locally repaired with trajectory optimization, which also provides new improved motion primitives. Our novel kinodynamic motion planner, kMP-db-A*, has almost surely asymptotic optimal behavior and computes near-optimal solutions quickly. For our empirical validation, we provide the first benchmark that compares search-, sampling-, and optimization-based time-optimal motion planning on multiple dynamical systems in different settings. Compared to the baselines, kMP-db-A* consistently solves more problem instances, finds lower-cost initial solutions, and converges more quickly.
summary: We consider time-optimal motion planning for dynamical systems that are translation-invariant, a property that holds for many mobile robots, such as differential-drives, cars, airplanes, and multirotors. Our key insight is that we can extend graph-search algorithms to the continuous case when used symbiotically with optimization. For the graph search, we introduce discontinuity-bounded A* (db-A*), a generalization of the A* algorithm that uses concepts and data structures from sampling-based planners. Db-A* reuses short trajectories, so-called motion primitives, as edges and allows a maximum user-specified discontinuity at the vertices. These trajectories are locally repaired with trajectory optimization, which also provides new improved motion primitives. Our novel kinodynamic motion planner, kMP-db-A*, has almost surely asymptotic optimal behavior and computes near-optimal solutions quickly. For our empirical validation, we provide the first benchmark that compares search-, sampling-, and optimization-based time-optimal motion planning on multiple dynamical systems in different settings. Compared to the baselines, kMP-db-A* consistently solves more problem instances, finds lower-cost initial solutions, and converges more quickly.
abstract_zh: 我们考虑平移不变动力系统的时间最优运动规划，这种特性适用于许多移动机器人，例如差速驱动器、汽车、飞机和多旋翼飞行器。我们的主要见解是，当与优化共生时，我们可以将图搜索算法扩展到连续情况。对于图搜索，我们引入了不连续性有界 A* (db-A*)，这是 A* 算法的推广，它使用来自基于采样的规划器的概念和数据结构。 Db-A* 重用短轨迹（所谓的运动基元）作为边缘，并允许用户在顶点处指定最大的不连续性。这些轨迹通过轨迹优化进行局部修复，这也提供了新的改进的运动基元。我们新颖的运动动力学运动规划器 kMP-db-A* 几乎肯定具有渐近最优行为，并且可以快速计算接近最优的解决方案。为了进行实证验证，我们提供了第一个基准，该基准比较了不同设置下多个动力系统上基于搜索、采样和优化的时间最优运动规划。与基线相比，kMP-db-A* 始终如一地解决了更多的问题实例，找到了成本更低的初始解决方案，并且收敛得更快。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为db-A*的运动规划算法，结合图搜索与优化技术，解决具有动力学约束的移动机器人时间最优路径规划问题。
AI.motivation: 传统运动规划方法在处理连续状态空间和动力学约束时效率不足，需开发兼顾最优性与计算效率的新算法。
AI.method: 提出db-A*算法，通过采样基规划器的数据结构与图搜索结合，利用运动原语作为边并允许顶点处的最大不连续性，结合轨迹优化进行局部修复。
AI.result: 实验表明kMP-db-A*在多个动力学系统中解决更多问题实例，初始解成本更低且收敛更快，首次建立对比搜索、采样与优化方法的基准测试。
AI.conclusion: db-A*通过融合图搜索与优化技术，实现了近似最优的运动规划，为动力学移动机器人提供了高效可靠的解决方案。

authors_text: Qingyan Bai,Yinghao Xu,Jiapeng Zhu,Weihao Xia,Yujiu Yang,Yujun Shen
title: High-fidelity GAN Inversion with Padding Space
title_zh: 带填充空间的高保真 GAN 反演
comment: ECCV 2022 camera-ready; Project page: https://ezioby.github.io/padinv/; Code: https://github.com/EzioBy/padinv
comments: ECCV 2022 camera-ready; Project page: https://ezioby.github.io/padinv/; Code: https://github.com/EzioBy/padinv
abstract: Inverting a Generative Adversarial Network (GAN) facilitates a wide range of image editing tasks using pre-trained generators. Existing methods typically employ the latent space of GANs as the inversion space yet observe the insufficient recovery of spatial details. In this work, we propose to involve the padding space of the generator to complement the latent space with spatial information. Concretely, we replace the constant padding (e.g., usually zeros) used in convolution layers with some instance-aware coefficients. In this way, the inductive bias assumed in the pre-trained model can be appropriately adapted to fit each individual image. Through learning a carefully designed encoder, we manage to improve the inversion quality both qualitatively and quantitatively, outperforming existing alternatives. We then demonstrate that such a space extension barely affects the native GAN manifold, hence we can still reuse the prior knowledge learned by GANs for various downstream applications. Beyond the editing tasks explored in prior arts, our approach allows a more flexible image manipulation, such as the separate control of face contour and facial details, and enables a novel editing manner where users can customize their own manipulations highly efficiently.
summary: Inverting a Generative Adversarial Network (GAN) facilitates a wide range of image editing tasks using pre-trained generators. Existing methods typically employ the latent space of GANs as the inversion space yet observe the insufficient recovery of spatial details. In this work, we propose to involve the padding space of the generator to complement the latent space with spatial information. Concretely, we replace the constant padding (e.g., usually zeros) used in convolution layers with some instance-aware coefficients. In this way, the inductive bias assumed in the pre-trained model can be appropriately adapted to fit each individual image. Through learning a carefully designed encoder, we manage to improve the inversion quality both qualitatively and quantitatively, outperforming existing alternatives. We then demonstrate that such a space extension barely affects the native GAN manifold, hence we can still reuse the prior knowledge learned by GANs for various downstream applications. Beyond the editing tasks explored in prior arts, our approach allows a more flexible image manipulation, such as the separate control of face contour and facial details, and enables a novel editing manner where users can customize their own manipulations highly efficiently.
abstract_zh: 反转生成对抗网络 (GAN) 使用预先训练的生成器可以促进各种图像编辑任务。现有方法通常采用 GAN 的潜在空间作为反转空间，但观察到空间细节恢复不充分。在这项工作中，我们建议涉及生成器的填充空间，以用空间信息补充潜在空间。具体来说，我们用一些实例感知系数替换卷积层中使用的常量填充（例如，通常为零）。通过这种方式，可以适当地调整预训练模型中假设的归纳偏差以适合每个单独的图像。通过学习精心设计的编码器，我们成功地在定性和定量上提高了反演质量，优于现有的替代方案。然后，我们证明这种空间扩展几乎不会影响原生 GAN 流形，因此我们仍然可以将 GAN 学到的先验知识重新用于各种下游应用。除了现有技术中探索的编辑任务之外，我们的方法允许更灵活的图像处理，例如面部轮廓和面部细节的单独控制，并实现一种新颖的编辑方式，用户可以高效地定制自己的操作。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种通过引入生成器的padding空间来提升GAN反演质量的方法，以增强图像编辑任务中的空间细节恢复能力。
AI.motivation: 现有GAN反演方法在利用latent space时存在空间细节恢复不足的问题，需通过补充空间信息来改进反演效果。
AI.method: 将卷积层中的常量填充替换为实例感知系数，结合设计的编码器学习扩展padding空间，从而适应个体图像特征。
AI.result: 在定性和定量指标上均优于现有方法，且保持原GAN流形特性，支持更灵活的图像编辑如独立控制面部轮廓与细节。
AI.conclusion: 通过扩展padding空间有效提升了GAN反演质量，保留原有模型知识并拓展了下游应用的可能性。

method: 将卷积层中的常量填充替换为实例感知系数，结合设计的编码器学习扩展padding空间，从而适应个体图像特征。
result: 在定性和定量指标上均优于现有方法，且保持原GAN流形特性，支持更灵活的图像编辑如独立控制面部轮廓与细节。
conclusion: 通过扩展padding空间有效提升了GAN反演质量，保留原有模型知识并拓展了下游应用的可能性。
search_text: High-fidelity GAN Inversion with Padding Space 带填充空间的高保真 GAN 反演 Inverting a Generative Adversarial Network (GAN) facilitates a wide range of image editing tasks using pre-trained generators. Existing methods typically employ the latent space of GANs as the inversion space yet observe the insufficient recovery of spatial details. In this work, we propose to involve the padding space of the generator to complement the latent space with spatial information. Concretely, we replace the constant padding (e.g., usually zeros) used in convolution layers with some instance-aware coefficients. In this way, the inductive bias assumed in the pre-trained model can be appropriately adapted to fit each individual image. Through learning a carefully designed encoder, we manage to improve the inversion quality both qualitatively and quantitatively, outperforming existing alternatives. We then demonstrate that such a space extension barely affects the native GAN manifold, hence we can still reuse the prior knowledge learned by GANs for various downstream applications. Beyond the editing tasks explored in prior arts, our approach allows a more flexible image manipulation, such as the separate control of face contour and facial details, and enables a novel editing manner where users can customize their own manipulations highly efficiently. 反转生成对抗网络 (GAN) 使用预先训练的生成器可以促进各种图像编辑任务。现有方法通常采用 GAN 的潜在空间作为反转空间，但观察到空间细节恢复不充分。在这项工作中，我们建议涉及生成器的填充空间，以用空间信息补充潜在空间。具体来说，我们用一些实例感知系数替换卷积层中使用的常量填充（例如，通常为零）。通过这种方式，可以适当地调整预训练模型中假设的归纳偏差以适合每个单独的图像。通过学习精心设计的编码器，我们成功地在定性和定量上提高了反演质量，优于现有的替代方案。然后，我们证明这种空间扩展几乎不会影响原生 GAN 流形，因此我们仍然可以将 GAN 学到的先验知识重新用于各种下游应用。除了现有技术中探索的编辑任务之外，我们的方法允许更灵活的图像处理，例如面部轮廓和面部细节的单独控制，并实现一种新颖的编辑方式，用户可以高效地定制自己的操作。 本文提出一种通过引入生成器的padding空间来提升GAN反演质量的方法，以增强图像编辑任务中的空间细节恢复能力。 Qingyan Bai,Yinghao Xu,Jiapeng Zhu,Weihao Xia,Yujiu Yang,Yujun Shen cs.CV

authors_text: Eric Müller,Elias Arnold,Oliver Breitwieser,Milena Czierlinski,Arne Emmel,Jakob Kaiser,Christian Mauch,Sebastian Schmitt,Philipp Spilger,Raphael Stock,Yannik Stradmann,Johannes Weis,Andreas Baumbach,Sebastian Billaudelle,Benjamin Cramer,Falk Ebert,Julian Göltz,Joscha Ilmberger,Vitali Karasenko,Mitja Kleider,Aron Leibfried,Christian Pehle,Johannes Schemmel
title: A Scalable Approach to Modeling on Accelerated Neuromorphic Hardware
title_zh: 加速神经形态硬件建模的可扩展方法
abstract: Neuromorphic systems open up opportunities to enlarge the explorative space for computational research. However, it is often challenging to unite efficiency and usability. This work presents the software aspects of this endeavor for the BrainScaleS-2 system, a hybrid accelerated neuromorphic hardware architecture based on physical modeling. We introduce key aspects of the BrainScaleS-2 Operating System: experiment workflow, API layering, software design, and platform operation. We present use cases to discuss and derive requirements for the software and showcase the implementation. The focus lies on novel system and software features such as multi-compartmental neurons, fast re-configuration for hardware-in-the-loop training, applications for the embedded processors, the non-spiking operation mode, interactive platform access, and sustainable hardware/software co-development. Finally, we discuss further developments in terms of hardware scale-up, system usability and efficiency.
summary: Neuromorphic systems open up opportunities to enlarge the explorative space for computational research. However, it is often challenging to unite efficiency and usability. This work presents the software aspects of this endeavor for the BrainScaleS-2 system, a hybrid accelerated neuromorphic hardware architecture based on physical modeling. We introduce key aspects of the BrainScaleS-2 Operating System: experiment workflow, API layering, software design, and platform operation. We present use cases to discuss and derive requirements for the software and showcase the implementation. The focus lies on novel system and software features such as multi-compartmental neurons, fast re-configuration for hardware-in-the-loop training, applications for the embedded processors, the non-spiking operation mode, interactive platform access, and sustainable hardware/software co-development. Finally, we discuss further developments in terms of hardware scale-up, system usability and efficiency.
abstract_zh: 神经形态系统为扩大计算研究的探索空间提供了机会。然而，将效率和可用性结合起来通常具有挑战性。这项工作介绍了 BrainScaleS-2 系统这一努力的软件方面，这是一种基于物理建模的混合加速神经形态硬件架构。我们介绍 BrainScaleS-2 操作系统的关键方面：实验工作流程、API 分层、软件设计和平台操作。我们提出用例来讨论和得出软件的需求并展示实施情况。重点在于新颖的系统和软件功能，例如多室神经元、硬件在环训练的快速重新配置、嵌入式处理器的应用、非尖峰操作模式、交互式平台访问和可持续的硬件/软件共同开发。最后，我们讨论了硬件扩展、系统可用性和效率方面的进一步发展。

AI.tldr: 本文介绍了一种针对加速神经形态硬件的可扩展建模方法，重点探讨了BrainScaleS-2系统的软件架构与实现。
AI.motivation: 神经形态系统虽能拓展计算研究空间，但实现效率与可用性的平衡存在挑战，需通过软件优化解决这一矛盾。
AI.method: 通过设计BrainScaleS-2操作系统的核心模块（如实验流程、API分层、软件架构），结合应用场景推导需求并验证实现，涵盖多隔室神经元、硬件在环训练等关键技术。
AI.result: 实现了支持多隔室神经元、快速重配置、嵌入式处理器应用及非脉冲模式等新型功能，展示了系统的可扩展性与实用性。
AI.conclusion: 未来将聚焦硬件扩展、系统效率提升及可持续软硬件协同开发，以进一步优化神经形态计算平台的性能与易用性。

authors_text: Mohammad Reza Taesiri,Finlay Macklon,Cor-Paul Bezemer
title: CLIP meets GamePhysics: Towards bug identification in gameplay videos using zero-shot transfer learning
title_zh: CLIP 与 GamePhysics 的结合：使用零样本迁移学习来识别游戏视频中的错误
abstract: Gameplay videos contain rich information about how players interact with the game and how the game responds. Sharing gameplay videos on social media platforms, such as Reddit, has become a common practice for many players. Often, players will share gameplay videos that showcase video game bugs. Such gameplay videos are software artifacts that can be utilized for game testing, as they provide insight for bug analysis. Although large repositories of gameplay videos exist, parsing and mining them in an effective and structured fashion has still remained a big challenge. In this paper, we propose a search method that accepts any English text query as input to retrieve relevant videos from large repositories of gameplay videos. Our approach does not rely on any external information (such as video metadata); it works solely based on the content of the video. By leveraging the zero-shot transfer capabilities of the Contrastive Language-Image Pre-Training (CLIP) model, our approach does not require any data labeling or training. To evaluate our approach, we present the $\texttt{GamePhysics}$ dataset consisting of 26,954 videos from 1,873 games, that were collected from the GamePhysics section on the Reddit website. Our approach shows promising results in our extensive analysis of simple queries, compound queries, and bug queries, indicating that our approach is useful for object and event detection in gameplay videos. An example application of our approach is as a gameplay video search engine to aid in reproducing video game bugs. Please visit the following link for the code and the data: https://asgaardlab.github.io/CLIPxGamePhysics/
summary: Gameplay videos contain rich information about how players interact with the game and how the game responds. Sharing gameplay videos on social media platforms, such as Reddit, has become a common practice for many players. Often, players will share gameplay videos that showcase video game bugs. Such gameplay videos are software artifacts that can be utilized for game testing, as they provide insight for bug analysis. Although large repositories of gameplay videos exist, parsing and mining them in an effective and structured fashion has still remained a big challenge. In this paper, we propose a search method that accepts any English text query as input to retrieve relevant videos from large repositories of gameplay videos. Our approach does not rely on any external information (such as video metadata); it works solely based on the content of the video. By leveraging the zero-shot transfer capabilities of the Contrastive Language-Image Pre-Training (CLIP) model, our approach does not require any data labeling or training. To evaluate our approach, we present the $\texttt{GamePhysics}$ dataset consisting of 26,954 videos from 1,873 games, that were collected from the GamePhysics section on the Reddit website. Our approach shows promising results in our extensive analysis of simple queries, compound queries, and bug queries, indicating that our approach is useful for object and event detection in gameplay videos. An example application of our approach is as a gameplay video search engine to aid in reproducing video game bugs. Please visit the following link for the code and the data: https://asgaardlab.github.io/CLIPxGamePhysics/
abstract_zh: 游戏视频包含有关玩家如何与游戏互动以及游戏如何响应的丰富信息。在 Reddit 等社交媒体平台上分享游戏视频已成为许多玩家的常见做法。通常，玩家会分享展示视频游戏错误的游戏视频。此类游戏视频是可用于游戏测试的软件工件，因为它们为错误分析提供了见解。尽管存在大量游戏视频存储库，但以有效且结构化的方式解析和挖掘它们仍然是一个巨大的挑战。在本文中，我们提出了一种搜索方法，该方法接受任何英文文本查询作为输入，以从大型游戏视频存储库中检索相关视频。我们的方法不依赖任何外部信息（例如视频元数据）；它仅根据视频内容起作用。通过利用对比语言图像预训练（CLIP）模型的零样本传输功能，我们的方法不需要任何数据标记或训练。为了评估我们的方法，我们提供了 $\texttt{GamePhysics}$ 数据集，其中包含来自 1,873 个游戏的 26,954 个视频，这些视频是从 Reddit 网站上的 GamePhysics 部分收集的。我们的方法在对简单查询、复合查询和错误查询的广泛分析中显示出有希望的结果，这表明我们的方法对于游戏视频中的对象和事件检测很有用。我们的方法的一个示例应用是作为游戏视频搜索引擎来帮助重现视频游戏错误。请访问以下链接获取代码和数据：https://asgaardlab.github.io/CLIPxGamePhysics/

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于CLIP模型的零样本迁移学习方法，通过文本查询从游戏实况视频中检索相关视频，用于识别游戏中的错误。
AI.motivation: 游戏实况视频包含丰富的玩家交互信息和游戏响应数据，但现有方法难以有效解析和挖掘这些视频中的错误信息，且依赖标注数据。
AI.method: 利用CLIP模型的零样本迁移能力，无需标注数据或元数据，仅基于视频内容实现文本查询与视频的匹配，构建GamePhysics数据集进行评估。
AI.result: 方法在简单查询、复合查询和错误相关查询中均表现出色，能够有效检测游戏视频中的对象和事件，适用于错误复现的视频搜索引擎。
AI.conclusion: 该方法为游戏测试提供了无需标注数据的高效视频检索方案，可作为游戏错误识别和分析的实用工具。

Our approach shows promising results in our extensive analysis of simple queries, compound queries, and bug queries, indicating that our approach is useful for object and event detection in gameplay videos.
