Please visit the following link for the code and the data: https://asgaardlab.github.io/CLIPxGamePhysics/ 游戏视频包含有关玩家如何与游戏互动以及游戏如何响应的丰富信息。在 Reddit 等社交媒体平台上分享游戏视频已成为许多玩家的常见做法。通常，玩家会分享展示视频游戏错误的游戏视频。此类游戏视频是可用于游戏测试的软件工件，因为它们为错误分析提供了见解。尽管存在大量游戏视频存储库，但以有效且结构化的方式解析和挖掘它们仍然是一个巨大的挑战。在本文中，我们提出了一种搜索方法，该方法接受任何英文文本查询作为输入，以从大型游戏视频存储库中检索相关视频。我们的方法不依赖任何外部信息（例如视频元数据）；它仅根据视频内容起作用。通过利用对比语言图像预训练（CLIP）模型的零样本传输功能，我们的方法不需要任何数据标记或训练。为了评估我们的方法，我们提供了 $\texttt{GamePhysics}$ 数据集，其中包含来自 1,873 个游戏的 26,954 个视频，这些视频是从 Reddit 网站上的 GamePhysics 部分收集的。我们的方法在对简单查询、复合查询和错误查询的广泛分析中显示出有希望的结果，这表明我们的方法对于游戏视频中的对象和事件检测很有用。我们的方法的一个示例应用是作为游戏视频搜索引擎来帮助重现视频游戏错误。请访问以下链接获取代码和数据：https://asgaardlab.github.io/CLIPxGamePhysics/ 本文提出一种基于CLIP模型的零样本迁移学习方法，通过文本查询从游戏实况视频中检索相关视频，用于识别游戏中的错误。 Mohammad Reza Taesiri,Finlay Macklon,Cor-Paul Bezemer cs.CV,cs.SE

authors_text: Hang Dong,Matúš Falis,William Whiteley,Beatrice Alex,Joshua Matterson,Shaoxiong Ji,Jiaoyan Chen,Honghan Wu
title: Automated Clinical Coding: What, Why, and Where We Are?
title_zh: 自动化临床编码：什么、为什么以及我们在哪里？
abstract: Clinical coding is the task of transforming medical information in a patient's health records into structured codes so that they can be used for statistical analysis. This is a cognitive and time-consuming task that follows a standard process in order to achieve a high level of consistency. Clinical coding could potentially be supported by an automated system to improve the efficiency and accuracy of the process. We introduce the idea of automated clinical coding and summarise its challenges from the perspective of Artificial Intelligence (AI) and Natural Language Processing (NLP), based on the literature, our project experience over the past two and half years (late 2019 - early 2022), and discussions with clinical coding experts in Scotland and the UK. Our research reveals the gaps between the current deep learning-based approach applied to clinical coding and the need for explainability and consistency in real-world practice. Knowledge-based methods that represent and reason the standard, explainable process of a task may need to be incorporated into deep learning-based methods for clinical coding. Automated clinical coding is a promising task for AI, despite the technical and organisational challenges. Coders are needed to be involved in the development process. There is much to achieve to develop and deploy an AI-based automated system to support coding in the next five years and beyond.

There is much to achieve to develop and deploy an AI-based automated system to support coding in the next five years and beyond.
abstract_zh: 临床编码是将患者健康记录中的医疗信息转换为结构化代码的任务，以便将其用于统计分析。这是一项认知且耗时的任务，需要遵循标准流程以实现高度的一致性。自动化系统可能会支持临床编码，以提高流程的效率和准确性。我们根据文献、我们过去两年半（2019年底-2022年初）的项目经验以及与苏格兰和英国临床编码专家的讨论，介绍了自动化临床编码的想法，并从人工智能（AI）和自然语言处理（NLP）的角度总结了其面临的挑战。我们的研究揭示了当前应用于临床编码的基于深度学习的方法与现实世界实践中可解释性和一致性的需求之间的差距。表示和推理任务的标准、可解释过程的基于知识的方法可能需要合并到基于深度学习的临床编码方法中。尽管存在技术和组织挑战，但自动化临床编码对于人工智能来说是一项有前途的任务。需要编码员参与开发过程。在未来五年及更长时间内，开发和部署基于人工智能的自动化系统来支持编码，还有很多工作要做。

AI.tldr: 本文介绍自动化临床编码的概念，探讨其面临的挑战，并总结当前研究进展与实践需求。
AI.motivation: 提高编码效率与准确性，应对人工编码的高认知负荷与时间成本。
AI.method: 结合文献综述、项目实践与专家访谈，分析自动化临床编码的技术与实践挑战。
AI.result: 发现深度学习方法在实际应用中存在可解释性不足的问题，需融合知识库方法以提升一致性与可解释性。
AI.conclusion: 自动化临床编码具有潜力，但需解决技术与组织挑战，未来需编码人员深度参与系统开发与优化。

authors_text: Alireza Jafari,Saman Haratizadeh
title: GCNET: graph-based prediction of stock price movement using graph convolutional network
title_zh: GCNET：使用图卷积网络基于图的股价走势预测
abstract: The importance of considering related stocks data for the prediction of stock price movement has been shown in many studies, however, advanced graphical techniques for modeling, embedding and analyzing the behavior of interrelated stocks have not been widely exploited for the prediction of stocks price movements yet. The main challenges in this domain are to find a way for modeling the existing relations among an arbitrary set of stocks and to exploit such a model for improving the prediction performance for those stocks. The most of existing methods in this domain rely on basic graph-analysis techniques, with limited prediction power, and suffer from a lack of generality and flexibility. In this paper, we introduce a novel framework, called GCNET that models the relations among an arbitrary set of stocks as a graph structure called influence network and uses a set of history-based prediction models to infer plausible initial labels for a subset of the stock nodes in the graph. Finally, GCNET uses the Graph Convolutional Network algorithm to analyze this partially labeled graph and predicts the next price direction of movement for each stock in the graph. GCNET is a general prediction framework that can be applied for the prediction of the price fluctuations of interacting stocks based on their historical data. Our experiments and evaluations on a set of stocks from the NASDAQ index demonstrate that GCNET significantly improves the performance of SOTA in terms of accuracy and MCC measures.
summary: The importance of considering related stocks data for the prediction of stock price movement has been shown in many studies, however, advanced graphical techniques for modeling, embedding and analyzing the behavior of interrelated stocks have not been widely exploited for the prediction of stocks price movements yet. The main challenges in this domain are to find a way for modeling the existing relations among an arbitrary set of stocks and to exploit such a model for improving the prediction performance for those stocks. The most of existing methods in this domain rely on basic graph-analysis techniques, with limited prediction power, and suffer from a lack of generality and flexibility. In this paper, we introduce a novel framework, called GCNET that models the relations among an arbitrary set of stocks as a graph structure called influence network and uses a set of history-based prediction models to infer plausible initial labels for a subset of the stock nodes in the graph. Finally, GCNET uses the Graph Convolutional Network algorithm to analyze this partially labeled graph and predicts the next price direction of movement for each stock in the graph. GCNET is a general prediction framework that can be applied for the prediction of the price fluctuations of interacting stocks based on their historical data. Our experiments and evaluations on a set of stocks from the NASDAQ index demonstrate that GCNET significantly improves the performance of SOTA in terms of accuracy and MCC measures.
abstract_zh: 许多研究都表明了考虑相关股票数据来预测股票价格走势的重要性，然而，用于建模、嵌入和分析相关股票行为的先进图形技术尚未广泛用于预测股票价格走势。该领域的主要挑战是找到一种方法来对任意一组股票之间的现有关系进行建模，并利用这种模型来提高这些股票的预测性能。该领域现有的大多数方法依赖于基本的图分析技术，预测能力有限，并且缺乏通用性和灵活性。在本文中，我们介绍了一种称为 GCNET 的新颖框架，它将任意一组股票之间的关系建模为称为影响网络的图结构，并使用一组基于历史的预测模型来推断图中股票节点子集的合理初始标签。最后，GCNET 使用图卷积网络算法来分析这个部分标记的图，并预测图中每只股票的下一个价格走势方向。 GCNET是一个通用的预测框架，可用于根据历史数据预测交互股票的价格波动。我们对纳斯达克指数中的一组股票进行的实验和评估表明，GCNET 在准确性和 MCC 指标方面显着提高了 SOTA 的性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出GCNET框架，利用图卷积网络（GCN）建模股票间关系并预测股价走势。
AI.motivation: 现有股票预测方法依赖基础图分析技术，缺乏对复杂关联的建模能力，预测性能有限。
AI.method: 构建股票影响网络作为图结构，结合历史数据生成初始标签，通过图卷积网络分析部分标记图进行预测。
AI.result: 在NASDAQ股票实验中，GCNET在准确率和MCC指标上显著优于现有SOTA方法。
AI.conclusion: GCNET通过图结构建模股票关联，为交互股票的价格波动预测提供了通用有效的新框架。

authors_text: Li Chen,Chonghao Sima,Yang Li,Zehan Zheng,Jiajie Xu,Xiangwei Geng,Hongyang Li,Conghui He,Jianping Shi,Yu Qiao,Junchi Yan
title: PersFormer: 3D Lane Detection via Perspective Transformer and the OpenLane Benchmark
title_zh: PersFormer：通过 Perspective Transformer 和 OpenLane 基准进行 3D 车道检测
comment: Accepted by ECCV 2022 (Oral). Project page: https://github.com/OpenPerceptionX/PersFormer_3DLane | OpenLane dataset: https://github.com/OpenPerceptionX/OpenLane
comments: Accepted by ECCV 2022 (Oral). Project page: https://github.com/OpenPerceptionX/PersFormer_3DLane | OpenLane dataset: https://github.com/OpenPerceptionX/OpenLane
abstract: Methods for 3D lane detection have been recently proposed to address the issue of inaccurate lane layouts in many autonomous driving scenarios (uphill/downhill, bump, etc.). Previous work struggled in complex cases due to their simple designs of the spatial transformation between front view and bird's eye view (BEV) and the lack of a realistic dataset. Towards these issues, we present PersFormer: an end-to-end monocular 3D lane detector with a novel Transformer-based spatial feature transformation module. Our model generates BEV features by attending to related front-view local regions with camera parameters as a reference. PersFormer adopts a unified 2D/3D anchor design and an auxiliary task to detect 2D/3D lanes simultaneously, enhancing the feature consistency and sharing the benefits of multi-task learning. Moreover, we release one of the first large-scale real-world 3D lane datasets: OpenLane, with high-quality annotation and scenario diversity. OpenLane contains 200,000 frames, over 880,000 instance-level lanes, 14 lane categories, along with scene tags and the closed-in-path object annotations to encourage the development of lane detection and more industrial-related autonomous driving methods. We show that PersFormer significantly outperforms competitive baselines in the 3D lane detection task on our new OpenLane dataset as well as Apollo 3D Lane Synthetic dataset, and is also on par with state-of-the-art algorithms in the 2D task on OpenLane. The project page is available at https://github.com/OpenPerceptionX/PersFormer_3DLane and OpenLane dataset is provided at https://github.com/OpenPerceptionX/OpenLane.

Towards these issues, we present PersFormer: an end-to-end monocular 3D lane detector with a novel Transformer-based spatial feature transformation module. Our model generates BEV features by attending to related front-view local regions with camera parameters as a reference. PersFormer adopts a unified 2D/3D anchor design and an auxiliary task to detect 2D/3D lanes simultaneously, enhancing the feature consistency and sharing the benefits of multi-task learning. Moreover, we release one of the first large-scale real-world 3D lane datasets: OpenLane, with high-quality annotation and scenario diversity. OpenLane contains 200,000 frames, over 880,000 instance-level lanes, 14 lane categories, along with scene tags and the closed-in-path object annotations to encourage the development of lane detection and more industrial-related autonomous driving methods. We show that PersFormer significantly outperforms competitive baselines in the 3D lane detection task on our new OpenLane dataset as well as Apollo 3D Lane Synthetic dataset, and is also on par with state-of-the-art algorithms in the 2D task on OpenLane. The project page is available at https://github.com/OpenPerceptionX/PersFormer_3DLane and OpenLane dataset is provided at https://github.com/OpenPerceptionX/OpenLane.
abstract_zh: 最近提出了 3D 车道检测方法来解决许多自动驾驶场景（上坡/下坡、颠簸等）中车道布局不准确的问题。由于前视图和鸟瞰图（BEV）之间的空间转换设计简单且缺乏真实的数据集，以前的工作在复杂情况下陷入困境。针对这些问题，我们提出了 PersFormer：一种端到端单目 3D 车道检测器，具有基于 Transformer 的新型空间特征转换模块。我们的模型通过以相机参数作为参考来关注相关的前视局部区域来生成 BEV 特征。 PersFormer采用统一的2D/3D锚设计和辅助任务同时检测2D/3D车道，增强特征一致性并共享多任务学习的好处。此外，我们发布了第一个大规模现实世界 3D 车道数据集：OpenLane，具有高质量的注释和场景多样性。 OpenLane 包含 200,000 个帧、超过 880,000 个实例级车道、14 个车道类别，以及场景标签和封闭路径对象注释，以鼓励车道检测和更多与工业相关的自动驾驶方法的开发。我们表明，PersFormer 在我们的新 OpenLane 数据集以及 Apollo 3D Lane Synthetic 数据集上的 3D 车道检测任务中显着优于竞争基线，并且在 OpenLane 上的 2D 任务中也与最先进的算法相当。项目页面位于 https://github.com/OpenPerceptionX/PersFormer_3DLane，OpenLane 数据集位于 https://github.com/OpenPerceptionX/OpenLane。

AI.tldr: 本文提出PersFormer，一种基于透视变换Transformer的端到端单目3D车道检测方法，并发布OpenLane基准数据集以推动自动驾驶领域车道检测技术的发展。
AI.motivation: 现有3D车道检测方法因空间变换设计简单且缺乏真实场景数据集，在复杂路况（如坡道、颠簸路面）中表现不佳，亟需更鲁棒的模型和高质量数据集。
AI.method: 设计基于Transformer的透视变换模块，利用相机参数生成BEV特征；采用统一的2D/3D锚点机制与辅助任务，实现2D/3D车道联合检测，并发布包含20万帧、88万实例级车道标注的OpenLane数据集。
AI.result: PersFormer在OpenLane和Apollo合成数据集上均显著优于现有基线方法，在3D任务中达到SOTA性能，同时在OpenLane的2D任务中表现与先进算法相当。
AI.conclusion: PersFormer通过创新的空间特征变换和多任务学习机制提升了3D车道检测性能，OpenLane数据集为工业级自动驾驶研究提供了重要支撑。

search_text: PersFormer: 3D Lane Detection via Perspective Transformer and the OpenLane Benchmark PersFormer：通过 Perspective Transformer 和 OpenLane 基准进行 3D 车道检测 Methods for 3D lane detection have been recently proposed to address the issue of inaccurate lane layouts in many autonomous driving scenarios (uphill/downhill, bump, etc.). Previous work struggled in complex cases due to their simple designs of the spatial transformation between front view and bird's eye view (BEV) and the lack of a realistic dataset. Towards these issues, we present PersFormer: an end-to-end monocular 3D lane detector with a novel Transformer-based spatial feature transformation module. Our model generates BEV features by attending to related front-view local regions with camera parameters as a reference. PersFormer adopts a unified 2D/3D anchor design and an auxiliary task to detect 2D/3D lanes simultaneously, enhancing the feature consistency and sharing the benefits of multi-task learning. Moreover, we release one of the first large-scale real-world 3D lane datasets: OpenLane, with high-quality annotation and scenario diversity. OpenLane contains 200,000 frames, over 880,000 instance-level lanes, 14 lane categories, along with scene tags and the closed-in-path object annotations to encourage the development of lane detection and more industrial-related autonomous driving methods. We show that PersFormer significantly outperforms competitive baselines in the 3D lane detection task on our new OpenLane dataset as well as Apollo 3D Lane Synthetic dataset, and is also on par with state-of-the-art algorithms in the 2D task on OpenLane. The project page is available at https://github.com/OpenPerceptionX/PersFormer_3DLane and OpenLane dataset is provided at https://github.com/OpenPerceptionX/OpenLane. 最近提出了 3D 车道检测方法来解决许多自动驾驶场景（上坡/下坡、颠簸等）中车道布局不准确的问题。由于前视图和鸟瞰图（BEV）之间的空间转换设计简单且缺乏真实的数据集，以前的工作在复杂情况下陷入困境。针对这些问题，我们提出了 PersFormer：一种端到端单目 3D 车道检测器，具有基于 Transformer 的新型空间特征转换模块。我们的模型通过以相机参数作为参考来关注相关的前视局部区域来生成 BEV 特征。 PersFormer采用统一的2D/3D锚设计和辅助任务同时检测2D/3D车道，增强特征一致性并共享多任务学习的好处。此外，我们发布了第一个大规模现实世界 3D 车道数据集：OpenLane，具有高质量的注释和场景多样性。 OpenLane 包含 200,000 个帧、超过 880,000 个实例级车道、14 个车道类别，以及场景标签和封闭路径对象注释，以鼓励车道检测和更多与工业相关的自动驾驶方法的开发。我们表明，PersFormer 在我们的新 OpenLane 数据集以及 Apollo 3D Lane Synthetic 数据集上的 3D 车道检测任务中显着优于竞争基线，并且在 OpenLane 上的 2D 任务中也与最先进的算法相当。项目页面位于 https://github.com/OpenPerceptionX/PersFormer_3DLane，OpenLane 数据集位于 https://github.com/OpenPerceptionX/OpenLane。 本文提出PersFormer，一种基于透视变换Transformer的端到端单目3D车道检测方法，并发布OpenLane基准数据集以推动自动驾驶领域车道检测技术的发展。 Li Chen,Chonghao Sima,Yang Li,Zehan Zheng,Jiajie Xu,Xiangwei Geng,Hongyang Li,Conghui He,Jianping Shi,Yu Qiao,Junchi Yan cs.CV

authors_text: Chengbo Zheng,Dakuo Wang,April Yi Wang,Xiaojuan Ma
title: Telling Stories from Computational Notebooks: AI-Assisted Presentation Slides Creation for Presenting Data Science Work
title_zh: 用计算笔记本讲故事：人工智能辅助演示幻灯片创建以演示数据科学工作
abstract: Creating presentation slides is a critical but time-consuming task for data scientists. While researchers have proposed many AI techniques to lift data scientists' burden on data preparation and model selection, few have targeted the presentation creation task. Based on the needs identified from a formative study, this paper presents NB2Slides, an AI system that facilitates users to compose presentations of their data science work. NB2Slides uses deep learning methods as well as example-based prompts to generate slides from computational notebooks, and take users' input (e.g., audience background) to structure the slides. NB2Slides also provides an interactive visualization that links the slides with the notebook to help users further edit the slides. A follow-up user evaluation with 12 data scientists shows that participants believed NB2Slides can improve efficiency and reduces the complexity of creating slides. Yet, participants questioned the future of full automation and suggested a human-AI collaboration paradigm.
summary: Creating presentation slides is a critical but time-consuming task for data scientists. While researchers have proposed many AI techniques to lift data scientists' burden on data preparation and model selection, few have targeted the presentation creation task. Based on the needs identified from a formative study, this paper presents NB2Slides, an AI system that facilitates users to compose presentations of their data science work. NB2Slides uses deep learning methods as well as example-based prompts to generate slides from computational notebooks, and take users' input (e.g., audience background) to structure the slides. NB2Slides also provides an interactive visualization that links the slides with the notebook to help users further edit the slides. A follow-up user evaluation with 12 data scientists shows that participants believed NB2Slides can improve efficiency and reduces the complexity of creating slides. Yet, participants questioned the future of full automation and suggested a human-AI collaboration paradigm.
abstract_zh: 对于数据科学家来说，创建演示幻灯片是一项关键但耗时的任务。尽管研究人员提出了许多人工智能技术来减轻数据科学家在数据准备和模型选择方面的负担，但很少有人针对演示文稿创建任务。根据形成性研究确定的需求，本文提出了 NB2Slides，这是一种人工智能系统，可帮助用户撰写数据科学工作的演示文稿。 NB2Slides 使用深度学习方法以及基于示例的提示从计算笔记本生成幻灯片，并利用用户的输入（例如观众背景）来构建幻灯片。 NB2Slides 还提供了交互式可视化，将幻灯片与笔记本链接起来，以帮助用户进一步编辑幻灯片。由 12 名数据科学家进行的后续用户评估显示，参与者认为 NB2Slides 可以提高效率并降低创建幻灯片的复杂性。然而，与会者质疑全自动化的未来，并提出了人机协作范例。

AI.tldr: 本文提出NB2Slides系统，利用AI技术帮助数据科学家从计算笔记本自动生成演示文稿幻灯片。
AI.motivation: 数据科学家在制作演示文稿时面临效率低下和复杂度高的问题，现有AI工具未针对此任务进行优化。
AI.method: 结合深度学习方法与基于示例的提示，从计算笔记本生成幻灯片，并通过交互式可视化工具链接幻灯片与笔记本内容。
AI.result: 12名数据科学家参与评估，认为该系统提升了效率但对完全自动化存在疑虑，更倾向于人机协作模式。
AI.conclusion: AI辅助生成演示文稿可提升效率，但需保留人类控制权以实现最佳人机协作效果。

authors_text: Yutao Cui,Cheng Jiang,Limin Wang,Gangshan Wu
title: MixFormer: End-to-End Tracking with Iterative Mixed Attention
title_zh: MixFormer：具有迭代混合注意力的端到端跟踪
abstract: Tracking often uses a multi-stage pipeline of feature extraction, target information integration, and bounding box estimation. To simplify this pipeline and unify the process of feature extraction and target information integration, we present a compact tracking framework, termed as MixFormer, built upon transformers. Our core design is to utilize the flexibility of attention operations, and propose a Mixed Attention Module (MAM) for simultaneous feature extraction and target information integration. This synchronous modeling scheme allows to extract target-specific discriminative features and perform extensive communication between target and search area. Based on MAM, we build our MixFormer tracking framework simply by stacking multiple MAMs with progressive patch embedding and placing a localization head on top. In addition, to handle multiple target templates during online tracking, we devise an asymmetric attention scheme in MAM to reduce computational cost, and propose an effective score prediction module to select high-quality templates. Our MixFormer sets a new state-of-the-art performance on five tracking benchmarks, including LaSOT, TrackingNet, VOT2020, GOT-10k, and UAV123. In particular, our MixFormer-L achieves NP score of 79.9% on LaSOT, 88.9% on TrackingNet and EAO of 0.555 on VOT2020. We also perform in-depth ablation studies to demonstrate the effectiveness of simultaneous feature extraction and information integration. Code and trained models are publicly available at https://github.com/MCG-NJU/MixFormer.

To simplify this pipeline and unify the process of feature extraction and target information integration, we present a compact tracking framework, termed as MixFormer, built upon transformers. Our core design is to utilize the flexibility of attention operations, and propose a Mixed Attention Module (MAM) for simultaneous feature extraction and target information integration. Based on MAM, we build our MixFormer tracking framework simply by stacking multiple MAMs with progressive patch embedding and placing a localization head on top. In addition, to handle multiple target templates during online tracking, we devise an asymmetric attention scheme in MAM to reduce computational cost, and propose an effective score prediction module to select high-quality templates. Our MixFormer sets a new state-of-the-art performance on five tracking benchmarks, including LaSOT, TrackingNet, VOT2020, GOT-10k, and UAV123. In particular, our MixFormer-L achieves NP score of 79.9% on LaSOT, 88.9% on TrackingNet and EAO of 0.555 on VOT2020. We also perform in-depth ablation studies to demonstrate the effectiveness of simultaneous feature extraction and information integration. Code and trained models are publicly available at https://github.com/MCG-NJU/MixFormer.
abstract_zh: 跟踪通常使用特征提取、目标信息集成和边界框估计的多级管道。为了简化这个流程并统一特征提取和目标信息集成的过程，我们提出了一个基于 Transformer 的紧凑跟踪框架，称为 MixFormer。我们的核心设计是利用注意力操作的灵活性，提出一种混合注意力模块（MAM），用于同时进行特征提取和目标信息集成。这种同步建模方案允许提取特定于目标的判别特征，并在目标和搜索区域之间进行广泛的通信。基于 MAM，我们只需堆叠多个带有渐进式补丁嵌入的 MAM 并将本地化头放置在顶部即可构建 MixFormer 跟踪框架。此外，为了在在线跟踪过程中处理多个目标模板，我们在 MAM 中设计了一种非对称注意力方案来降低计算成本，并提出了一种有效的分数预测模块来选择高质量模板。我们的 MixFormer 在 LaSOT、TrackingNet、VOT2020、GOT-10k 和 UAV123 等五个跟踪基准上设置了新的最先进性能。特别是，我们的 MixFormer-L 在 LaSOT 上获得了 79.9% 的 NP 分数，在 TrackingNet 上获得了 88.9% 的 NP 分数，在 VOT2020 上获得了 0.555 的 EAO 分数。我们还进行了深入的消融研究，以证明同时进行特征提取和信息集成的有效性。代码和训练模型可在 https://github.com/MCG-NJU/MixFormer 上公开获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于Transformer的紧凑跟踪框架MixFormer，通过混合注意力模块（MAM）实现特征提取与目标信息集成的同步建模，提升跟踪性能。
AI.motivation: 传统跟踪方法采用多阶段流水线，流程复杂且效率低。本文旨在简化流程，通过统一特征提取与目标信息集成，利用Transformer的注意力机制提升跟踪效果。
AI.method: 设计混合注意力模块（MAM）实现特征提取与目标信息同步建模，通过堆叠多层MAM并结合渐进式嵌入和定位头构建MixFormer框架；引入非对称注意力机制降低计算成本，并设计模板质量评分模块。
AI.result: 在LaSOT、TrackingNet等5个基准测试中取得SOTA性能，其中MixFormer-L在LaSOT上NP得分为79.9%，TrackingNet为88.9%，VOT2020 EAO为0.555。
AI.conclusion: 同步特征提取与信息集成设计有效提升了跟踪性能，实验验证了MixFormer在多目标跟踪任务中的优越性。

search_text: MixFormer: End-to-End Tracking with Iterative Mixed Attention MixFormer：具有迭代混合注意力的端到端跟踪 Tracking often uses a multi-stage pipeline of feature extraction, target information integration, and bounding box estimation. To simplify this pipeline and unify the process of feature extraction and target information integration, we present a compact tracking framework, termed as MixFormer, built upon transformers. Our core design is to utilize the flexibility of attention operations, and propose a Mixed Attention Module (MAM) for simultaneous feature extraction and target information integration. This synchronous modeling scheme allows to extract target-specific discriminative features and perform extensive communication between target and search area. Based on MAM, we build our MixFormer tracking framework simply by stacking multiple MAMs with progressive patch embedding and placing a localization head on top. In addition, to handle multiple target templates during online tracking, we devise an asymmetric attention scheme in MAM to reduce computational cost, and propose an effective score prediction module to select high-quality templates. Our MixFormer sets a new state-of-the-art performance on five tracking benchmarks, including LaSOT, TrackingNet, VOT2020, GOT-10k, and UAV123. In particular, our MixFormer-L achieves NP score of 79.9% on LaSOT, 88.9% on TrackingNet and EAO of 0.555 on VOT2020. We also perform in-depth ablation studies to demonstrate the effectiveness of simultaneous feature extraction and information integration. Code and trained models are publicly available at https://github.com/MCG-NJU/MixFormer. 跟踪通常使用特征提取、目标信息集成和边界框估计的多级管道。为了简化这个流程并统一特征提取和目标信息集成的过程，我们提出了一个基于 Transformer 的紧凑跟踪框架，称为 MixFormer。我们的核心设计是利用注意力操作的灵活性，提出一种混合注意力模块（MAM），用于同时进行特征提取和目标信息集成。这种同步建模方案允许提取特定于目标的判别特征，并在目标和搜索区域之间进行广泛的通信。基于 MAM，我们只需堆叠多个带有渐进式补丁嵌入的 MAM 并将本地化头放置在顶部即可构建 MixFormer 跟踪框架。此外，为了在在线跟踪过程中处理多个目标模板，我们在 MAM 中设计了一种非对称注意力方案来降低计算成本，并提出了一种有效的分数预测模块来选择高质量模板。我们的 MixFormer 在 LaSOT、TrackingNet、VOT2020、GOT-10k 和 UAV123 等五个跟踪基准上设置了新的最先进性能。特别是，我们的 MixFormer-L 在 LaSOT 上获得了 79.9% 的 NP 分数，在 TrackingNet 上获得了 88.9% 的 NP 分数，在 VOT2020 上获得了 0.555 的 EAO 分数。我们还进行了深入的消融研究，以证明同时进行特征提取和信息集成的有效性。代码和训练模型可在 https://github.com/MCG-NJU/MixFormer 上公开获取。 本文提出了一种基于Transformer的紧凑跟踪框架MixFormer，通过混合注意力模块（MAM）实现特征提取与目标信息集成的同步建模，提升跟踪性能。 Yutao Cui,Cheng Jiang,Limin Wang,Gangshan Wu cs.CV

authors_text: Ilkay Sikdokur,Inci Baytas,Arda Yurdakul
title: Image Classification on Accelerated Neural Networks
title_zh: 加速神经网络的图像分类
abstract: For image classification problems, various neural network models are commonly used due to their success in yielding high accuracies. Convolutional Neural Network (CNN) is one of the most frequently used deep learning methods for image classification applications. It may produce extraordinarily accurate results with regard to its complexity. However, the more complex the model is the longer it takes to train. In this paper, an acceleration design that uses the power of FPGA is given for a basic CNN model which consists of one convolutional layer and one fully connected layer for the training phase of the fully connected layer. Nonetheless, inference phase is also accelerated automatically due to the fact that training phase includes inference. In this design, the convolutional layer is calculated by the host computer and the fully connected layer is calculated by an FPGA board. It should be noted that the training of convolutional layer is not taken into account in this design and is left for future research. The results are quite encouraging as this FPGA design tops the performance of some of the state-of-the-art deep learning platforms such as Tensorflow on the host computer approximately 2 times in both training and inference.
summary: For image classification problems, various neural network models are commonly used due to their success in yielding high accuracies. Convolutional Neural Network (CNN) is one of the most frequently used deep learning methods for image classification applications. It may produce extraordinarily accurate results with regard to its complexity. However, the more complex the model is the longer it takes to train. In this paper, an acceleration design that uses the power of FPGA is given for a basic CNN model which consists of one convolutional layer and one fully connected layer for the training phase of the fully connected layer. Nonetheless, inference phase is also accelerated automatically due to the fact that training phase includes inference. In this design, the convolutional layer is calculated by the host computer and the fully connected layer is calculated by an FPGA board. It should be noted that the training of convolutional layer is not taken into account in this design and is left for future research. The results are quite encouraging as this FPGA design tops the performance of some of the state-of-the-art deep learning platforms such as Tensorflow on the host computer approximately 2 times in both training and inference.
abstract_zh: 对于图像分类问题，各种神经网络模型因其成功地产生高精度而被广泛使用。卷积神经网络（CNN）是图像分类应用中最常用的深度学习方法之一。就其复杂性而言，它可能会产生非常准确的结果。然而，模型越复杂，训练所需的时间就越长。本文针对由一个卷积层和一个全连接层组成的基本 CNN 模型，给出了一种利用 FPGA 功能的加速设计，用于全连接层的训练阶段。尽管如此，由于训练阶段包括推理，推理阶段也会自动加速。本设计中，卷积层由上位机计算，全连接层由FPGA板计算。需要注意的是，本设计中没有考虑卷积层的训练，留待以后研究。结果非常令人鼓舞，因为该 FPGA 设计在训练和推理方面的性能均优于一些最先进的深度学习平台（例如主机上的 Tensorflow）约 2 倍。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于FPGA加速的卷积神经网络（CNN）设计，用于图像分类任务，重点优化全连接层的训练和推理速度。
AI.motivation: 尽管CNN在图像分类中表现优异，但其复杂性导致训练时间过长，需通过硬件加速提升效率。
AI.method: 利用FPGA板加速全连接层计算，卷积层由主机计算；训练阶段自动加速推理，但未涉及卷积层训练。
AI.result: 该设计在训练和推理阶段性能均超过TensorFlow等平台约2倍。
AI.conclusion: FPGA加速可有效提升CNN效率，未来可进一步研究卷积层的加速方案。

authors_text: Johannes H. Uhl,Stefan Leyk
title: MTBF-33: A multi-temporal building footprint dataset for 33 counties in the United States (1900-2015)
title_zh: MTBF-33：美国 33 个县的多时相建筑足迹数据集（1900-2015 年）
abstract: Despite abundant data on the spatial distribution of contemporary human settlements, historical data on the long-term evolution of human settlements at fine spatial and temporal granularity is scarce, limiting our quantitative understanding of long-term changes of built-up areas. This is because commonly used mapping methods (e.g., image classification) and suitable data sources (i.e., aerial imagery, multi-spectral remote sensing data, LiDAR) have only been available in recent decades. However, there are alternative data sources such as cadastral records that are digitally available, containing relevant information such as building age information, allowing for an approximate, digital reconstruction of past building distributions. We conducted a non-exhaustive search of open and publicly available data resources from administrative institutions in the United States and gathered, integrated, and harmonized cadastral parcel data, tax assessment data, and building footprint data for 33 counties, wherever building footprint geometries and building construction year information was available. The result of this effort is a unique dataset which we call the Multi-Temporal Building Footprint Dataset for 33 U.S. Counties (MTBF-33). MTBF-33 contains over 6.2 million building footprints including their construction year, and can be used to derive retrospective depictions of built-up areas from 1900 to 2015, at fine spatial and temporal grain and can be used for data validation purposes, or to train statistical learning approaches aiming to extract historical information on human settlements from remote sensing data, historical maps, or similar data sources. MTBF-33 is available at http://doi.org/10.17632/w33vbvjtdy.
summary: Despite abundant data on the spatial distribution of contemporary human settlements, historical data on the long-term evolution of human settlements at fine spatial and temporal granularity is scarce, limiting our quantitative understanding of long-term changes of built-up areas. This is because commonly used mapping methods (e.g., image classification) and suitable data sources (i.e., aerial imagery, multi-spectral remote sensing data, LiDAR) have only been available in recent decades. However, there are alternative data sources such as cadastral records that are digitally available, containing relevant information such as building age information, allowing for an approximate, digital reconstruction of past building distributions. We conducted a non-exhaustive search of open and publicly available data resources from administrative institutions in the United States and gathered, integrated, and harmonized cadastral parcel data, tax assessment data, and building footprint data for 33 counties, wherever building footprint geometries and building construction year information was available. The result of this effort is a unique dataset which we call the Multi-Temporal Building Footprint Dataset for 33 U.S. Counties (MTBF-33). MTBF-33 contains over 6.2 million building footprints including their construction year, and can be used to derive retrospective depictions of built-up areas from 1900 to 2015, at fine spatial and temporal grain and can be used for data validation purposes, or to train statistical learning approaches aiming to extract historical information on human settlements from remote sensing data, historical maps, or similar data sources. MTBF-33 is available at http://doi.org/10.17632/w33vbvjtdy.
abstract_zh: 尽管当代人居空间分布的数据丰富，但细时空粒度的人居长期演化的历史数据却很少，这限制了我们对建成区长期变化的定量理解。这是因为常用的绘图方法（例如图像分类）和合适的数据源（例如航空图像、多光谱遥感数据、激光雷达）直到最近几十年才出现。然而，还有其他数据源，例如可数字化的地籍记录，其中包含建筑物年龄信息等相关信息，允许对过去的建筑物分布进行近似的数字重建。我们对美国行政机构的开放和公开数据资源进行了非详尽搜索，并收集、整合和统一了 33 个县的地籍地块数据、税务评估数据和建筑足迹数据，只要有建筑物足迹几何形状和建筑施工年份信息即可。这项工作的成果是一个独特的数据集，我们将其称为美国 33 个县的多时态建筑足迹数据集 (MTBF-33)。 MTBF-33 包含超过 620 万个建筑足迹（包括其建造年份），可用于以精细的空间和时间粒度导出 1900 年至 2015 年建成区的回顾性描述，并可用于数据验证目的，或训练旨在从遥感数据、历史地图或类似数据源中提取人类住区历史信息的统计学习方法。 MTBF-33 可从 http://doi.org/10.17632/w33vbvjtdy 获取。

AI.tldr: 构建涵盖美国33个县1900-2015年多时期建筑足迹的数据集MTBF-33，用于研究人类居住地长期演变。
AI.motivation: 现有遥感技术难以获取历史建成区精细时空粒度数据，而地籍记录等替代数据源可弥补这一空白，推动长期变化研究。
AI.method: 整合美国公开行政数据资源，收集地籍宗地、税收评估及建筑足迹数据，通过数据清洗与标准化构建统一数据集。
AI.result: 生成包含620万建筑足迹及其建造年份的MTBF-33数据集，支持1900-2015年建成区演变分析及模型训练。
AI.conclusion: MTBF-33填补了历史建成区数据缺口，为定量研究人类居住地长期演变及历史信息提取提供关键数据支持。

search_text: MTBF-33: A multi-temporal building footprint dataset for 33 counties in the United States (1900-2015) MTBF-33：美国 33 个县的多时相建筑足迹数据集（1900-2015 年） Despite abundant data on the spatial distribution of contemporary human settlements, historical data on the long-term evolution of human settlements at fine spatial and temporal granularity is scarce, limiting our quantitative understanding of long-term changes of built-up areas. This is because commonly used mapping methods (e.g., image classification) and suitable data sources (i.e., aerial imagery, multi-spectral remote sensing data, LiDAR) have only been available in recent decades. However, there are alternative data sources such as cadastral records that are digitally available, containing relevant information such as building age information, allowing for an approximate, digital reconstruction of past building distributions. We conducted a non-exhaustive search of open and publicly available data resources from administrative institutions in the United States and gathered, integrated, and harmonized cadastral parcel data, tax assessment data, and building footprint data for 33 counties, wherever building footprint geometries and building construction year information was available. The result of this effort is a unique dataset which we call the Multi-Temporal Building Footprint Dataset for 33 U.S. Counties (MTBF-33). MTBF-33 contains over 6.2 million building footprints including their construction year, and can be used to derive retrospective depictions of built-up areas from 1900 to 2015, at fine spatial and temporal grain and can be used for data validation purposes, or to train statistical learning approaches aiming to extract historical information on human settlements from remote sensing data, historical maps, or similar data sources. MTBF-33 is available at http://doi.org/10.17632/w33vbvjtdy. 尽管当代人居空间分布的数据丰富，但细时空粒度的人居长期演化的历史数据却很少，这限制了我们对建成区长期变化的定量理解。这是因为常用的绘图方法（例如图像分类）和合适的数据源（例如航空图像、多光谱遥感数据、激光雷达）直到最近几十年才出现。然而，还有其他数据源，例如可数字化的地籍记录，其中包含建筑物年龄信息等相关信息，允许对过去的建筑物分布进行近似的数字重建。我们对美国行政机构的开放和公开数据资源进行了非详尽搜索，并收集、整合和统一了 33 个县的地籍地块数据、税务评估数据和建筑足迹数据，只要有建筑物足迹几何形状和建筑施工年份信息即可。这项工作的成果是一个独特的数据集，我们将其称为美国 33 个县的多时态建筑足迹数据集 (MTBF-33)。 MTBF-33 包含超过 620 万个建筑足迹（包括其建造年份），可用于以精细的空间和时间粒度导出 1900 年至 2015 年建成区的回顾性描述，并可用于数据验证目的，或训练旨在从遥感数据、历史地图或类似数据源中提取人类住区历史信息的统计学习方法。 MTBF-33 可从 http://doi.org/10.17632/w33vbvjtdy 获取。 构建涵盖美国33个县1900-2015年多时期建筑足迹的数据集MTBF-33，用于研究人类居住地长期演变。 Johannes H. Uhl,Stefan Leyk physics.soc-ph,cs.CV

authors_text: Wenwei Zhang,Jiangmiao Pang,Kai Chen,Chen Change Loy
title: Dense Siamese Network for Dense Unsupervised Learning
title_zh: 用于密集无监督学习的密集暹罗网络
abstract: This paper presents Dense Siamese Network (DenseSiam), a simple unsupervised learning framework for dense prediction tasks. It learns visual representations by maximizing the similarity between two views of one image with two types of consistency, i.e., pixel consistency and region consistency. Concretely, DenseSiam first maximizes the pixel level spatial consistency according to the exact location correspondence in the overlapped area. It also extracts a batch of region embeddings that correspond to some sub-regions in the overlapped area to be contrasted for region consistency. In contrast to previous methods that require negative pixel pairs, momentum encoders or heuristic masks, DenseSiam benefits from the simple Siamese network and optimizes the consistency of different granularities. It also proves that the simple location correspondence and interacted region embeddings are effective enough to learn the similarity. We apply DenseSiam on ImageNet and obtain competitive improvements on various downstream tasks. We also show that only with some extra task-specific losses, the simple framework can directly conduct dense prediction tasks. On an existing unsupervised semantic segmentation benchmark, it surpasses state-of-the-art segmentation methods by 2.1 mIoU with 28% training costs. Code and models are released at https://github.com/ZwwWayne/DenseSiam.
summary: This paper presents Dense Siamese Network (DenseSiam), a simple unsupervised learning framework for dense prediction tasks. It learns visual representations by maximizing the similarity between two views of one image with two types of consistency, i.e., pixel consistency and region consistency. Concretely, DenseSiam first maximizes the pixel level spatial consistency according to the exact location correspondence in the overlapped area. It also extracts a batch of region embeddings that correspond to some sub-regions in the overlapped area to be contrasted for region consistency. In contrast to previous methods that require negative pixel pairs, momentum encoders or heuristic masks, DenseSiam benefits from the simple Siamese network and optimizes the consistency of different granularities. It also proves that the simple location correspondence and interacted region embeddings are effective enough to learn the similarity. We apply DenseSiam on ImageNet and obtain competitive improvements on various downstream tasks. We also show that only with some extra task-specific losses, the simple framework can directly conduct dense prediction tasks. On an existing unsupervised semantic segmentation benchmark, it surpasses state-of-the-art segmentation methods by 2.1 mIoU with 28% training costs. Code and models are released at https://github.com/ZwwWayne/DenseSiam.
abstract_zh: 本文提出了密集暹罗网络（DenseSiam），这是一种用于密集预测任务的简单无监督学习框架。它通过最大化一幅图像的两个视图之间的相似性来学习视觉表示，并具有两种类型的一致性，即像素一致性和区域一致性。具体来说，DenseSiam 首先根据重叠区域中的精确位置对应关系最大化像素级空间一致性。它还提取与重叠区域中的一些子区域相对应的一批区域嵌入，以进行区域一致性对比。与之前需要负像素对、动量编码器或启发式掩模的方法相比，DenseSiam 受益于简单的 Siamese 网络，并优化了不同粒度的一致性。它还证明了简单的位置对应和交互区域嵌入足以有效地学习相似性。我们在 ImageNet 上应用 DenseSiam，并在各种下游任务上获得了有竞争力的改进。我们还表明，只需一些额外的特定于任务的损失，简单的框架就可以直接执行密集的预测任务。在现有的无监督语义分割基准上，它以 28% 的训练成本超越了最先进的分割方法 2.1 mIoU。代码和模型发布于 https://github.com/ZwwWayne/DenseSiam。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为Dense Siamese Network（DenseSiam）的密集无监督学习框架，用于密集预测任务。
AI.motivation: 现有方法在无监督学习中需要负像素对、动量编码器或启发式掩码，这些方法复杂且效果有限，因此本文旨在提出一种更简单且有效的无监督学习框架。
AI.method: DenseSiam通过最大化同一图像的两个视图之间的像素级空间一致性和区域一致性来学习视觉表示。该方法利用重叠区域的精确位置对应和区域嵌入进行对比。
AI.result: DenseSiam在ImageNet上实现了各种下游任务的竞争性改进，并在无监督语义分割基准上以28%的训练成本超越了最先进的分割方法2.1 mIoU。
AI.conclusion: DenseSiam通过简单的定位对应和交互区域嵌入，证明了其在无监督学习任务中的有效性，并展示了其在密集预测任务中的直接应用潜力。

authors_text: Firas Bayram,Bestoun S. Ahmed,Andreas Kassler
title: From Concept Drift to Model Degradation: An Overview on Performance-Aware Drift Detectors
title_zh: 从概念漂移到模型退化：性能感知漂移检测器概述
abstract: The dynamicity of real-world systems poses a significant challenge to deployed predictive machine learning (ML) models. Changes in the system on which the ML model has been trained may lead to performance degradation during the system's life cycle. Recent advances that study non-stationary environments have mainly focused on identifying and addressing such changes caused by a phenomenon called concept drift. Different terms have been used in the literature to refer to the same type of concept drift and the same term for various types. This lack of unified terminology is set out to create confusion on distinguishing between different concept drift variants. In this paper, we start by grouping concept drift types by their mathematical definitions and survey the different terms used in the literature to build a consolidated taxonomy of the field. We also review and classify performance-based concept drift detection methods proposed in the last decade. These methods utilize the predictive model's performance degradation to signal substantial changes in the systems. The classification is outlined in a hierarchical diagram to provide an orderly navigation between the methods. We present a comprehensive analysis of the main attributes and strategies for tracking and evaluating the model's performance in the predictive system. The paper concludes by discussing open research challenges and possible research directions.
summary: The dynamicity of real-world systems poses a significant challenge to deployed predictive machine learning (ML) models. Changes in the system on which the ML model has been trained may lead to performance degradation during the system's life cycle. Recent advances that study non-stationary environments have mainly focused on identifying and addressing such changes caused by a phenomenon called concept drift. Different terms have been used in the literature to refer to the same type of concept drift and the same term for various types. This lack of unified terminology is set out to create confusion on distinguishing between different concept drift variants. In this paper, we start by grouping concept drift types by their mathematical definitions and survey the different terms used in the literature to build a consolidated taxonomy of the field. We also review and classify performance-based concept drift detection methods proposed in the last decade. These methods utilize the predictive model's performance degradation to signal substantial changes in the systems. The classification is outlined in a hierarchical diagram to provide an orderly navigation between the methods. We present a comprehensive analysis of the main attributes and strategies for tracking and evaluating the model's performance in the predictive system. The paper concludes by discussing open research challenges and possible research directions.
abstract_zh: 现实世界系统的动态性对部署的预测机器学习 (ML) 模型提出了重大挑战。训练机器学习模型的系统发生变化可能会导致系统生命周期内的性能下降。研究非平稳环境的最新进展主要集中在识别和解决由概念漂移现象引起的此类变化。文献中使用不同的术语来指代同一类型的概念漂移，并使用相同的术语来指代不同类型的概念漂移。缺乏统一的术语会造成区分不同概念漂移变体的混乱。在本文中，我们首先根据概念漂移类型的数学定义对其进行分组，并调查文献中使用的不同术语，以构建该领域的综合分类法。我们还回顾和分类了过去十年提出的基于性能的概念漂移检测方法。这些方法利用预测模型的性能下降来发出系统中重大变化的信号。分类在层次图中概述，以提供方法之间的有序导航。我们对预测系统中跟踪和评估模型性能的主要属性和策略进行了全面分析。本文最后讨论了开放研究挑战和可能的研究方向。

AI.tldr: 本文旨在通过数学定义分类概念漂移类型，建立统一术语体系，并综述基于模型性能退化的漂移检测方法。
AI.motivation: 现实系统动态性导致机器学习模型性能退化，而概念漂移的术语混乱阻碍了研究进展，需建立统一框架和方法分类。
AI.method: 通过数学定义聚类概念漂移类型，构建术语对照的统一分类体系；梳理近十年基于性能退化的检测方法，以分层图示展示分类结果，并分析性能跟踪策略。
AI.result: 提出概念漂移的数学分类框架与术语对照表，建立分层检测方法分类体系，系统分析模型性能评估属性及策略。
AI.conclusion: 指出现有研究在动态环境适应性、多源漂移处理及实时检测效率方面的不足，建议未来研究方向包括鲁棒性增强与跨领域方法迁移。

search_text: From Concept Drift to Model Degradation: An Overview on Performance-Aware Drift Detectors 从概念漂移到模型退化：性能感知漂移检测器概述 The dynamicity of real-world systems poses a significant challenge to deployed predictive machine learning (ML) models. Changes in the system on which the ML model has been trained may lead to performance degradation during the system's life cycle. Recent advances that study non-stationary environments have mainly focused on identifying and addressing such changes caused by a phenomenon called concept drift. Different terms have been used in the literature to refer to the same type of concept drift and the same term for various types. This lack of unified terminology is set out to create confusion on distinguishing between different concept drift variants. In this paper, we start by grouping concept drift types by their mathematical definitions and survey the different terms used in the literature to build a consolidated taxonomy of the field. We also review and classify performance-based concept drift detection methods proposed in the last decade. These methods utilize the predictive model's performance degradation to signal substantial changes in the systems. The classification is outlined in a hierarchical diagram to provide an orderly navigation between the methods. We present a comprehensive analysis of the main attributes and strategies for tracking and evaluating the model's performance in the predictive system. The paper concludes by discussing open research challenges and possible research directions. 现实世界系统的动态性对部署的预测机器学习 (ML) 模型提出了重大挑战。训练机器学习模型的系统发生变化可能会导致系统生命周期内的性能下降。研究非平稳环境的最新进展主要集中在识别和解决由概念漂移现象引起的此类变化。文献中使用不同的术语来指代同一类型的概念漂移，并使用相同的术语来指代不同类型的概念漂移。缺乏统一的术语会造成区分不同概念漂移变体的混乱。在本文中，我们首先根据概念漂移类型的数学定义对其进行分组，并调查文献中使用的不同术语，以构建该领域的综合分类法。我们还回顾和分类了过去十年提出的基于性能的概念漂移检测方法。这些方法利用预测模型的性能下降来发出系统中重大变化的信号。分类在层次图中概述，以提供方法之间的有序导航。我们对预测系统中跟踪和评估模型性能的主要属性和策略进行了全面分析。本文最后讨论了开放研究挑战和可能的研究方向。 本文旨在通过数学定义分类概念漂移类型，建立统一术语体系，并综述基于模型性能退化的漂移检测方法。 Firas Bayram,Bestoun S. Ahmed,Andreas Kassler cs.LG,cs.AI

authors_text: Xiaodong Cun,Zhendong Wang,Chi-Man Pun,Jianzhuang Liu,Wengang Zhou,Xu Jia,Houqiang Li
title: Learning Enriched Illuminants for Cross and Single Sensor Color Constancy
title_zh: 学习丰富的光源以实现交叉和单传感器颜色恒定性
abstract: Color constancy aims to restore the constant colors of a scene under different illuminants. However, due to the existence of camera spectral sensitivity, the network trained on a certain sensor, cannot work well on others. Also, since the training datasets are collected in certain environments, the diversity of illuminants is limited for complex real world prediction. In this paper, we tackle these problems via two aspects. First, we propose cross-sensor self-supervised training to train the network. In detail, we consider both the general sRGB images and the white-balanced RAW images from current available datasets as the white-balanced agents. Then, we train the network by randomly sampling the artificial illuminants in a sensor-independent manner for scene relighting and supervision. Second, we analyze a previous cascaded framework and present a more compact and accurate model by sharing the backbone parameters with learning attention specifically. Experiments show that our cross-sensor model and single-sensor model outperform other state-of-the-art methods by a large margin on cross and single sensor evaluations, respectively, with only 16% parameters of the previous best model.
summary: Color constancy aims to restore the constant colors of a scene under different illuminants. However, due to the existence of camera spectral sensitivity, the network trained on a certain sensor, cannot work well on others. Also, since the training datasets are collected in certain environments, the diversity of illuminants is limited for complex real world prediction. In this paper, we tackle these problems via two aspects. First, we propose cross-sensor self-supervised training to train the network. In detail, we consider both the general sRGB images and the white-balanced RAW images from current available datasets as the white-balanced agents. Then, we train the network by randomly sampling the artificial illuminants in a sensor-independent manner for scene relighting and supervision. Second, we analyze a previous cascaded framework and present a more compact and accurate model by sharing the backbone parameters with learning attention specifically. Experiments show that our cross-sensor model and single-sensor model outperform other state-of-the-art methods by a large margin on cross and single sensor evaluations, respectively, with only 16% parameters of the previous best model.
abstract_zh: 颜色恒定性旨在恢复场景在不同光源下的恒定颜色。然而，由于相机光谱敏感性的存在，在某个传感器上训练的网络无法在其他传感器上很好地工作。此外，由于训练数据集是在某些环境中收集的，因此光源的多样性对于复杂的现实世界预测来说是有限的。在本文中，我们从两个方面来解决这些问题。首先，我们提出跨传感器自监督训练来训练网络。具体来说，我们将一般 sRGB 图像和当前可用数据集中的白平衡 RAW 图像视为白平衡代理。然后，我们通过以独立于传感器的方式随机采样人造光源来训练网络，以进行场景重新照明和监督。其次，我们分析了之前的级联框架，并通过共享骨干参数和专门的学习注意力来提出更紧凑和准确的模型。实验表明，我们的跨传感器模型和单传感器模型在交叉和单传感器评估上分别大幅优于其他最先进的方法，参数仅为之前最佳模型的 16%。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种跨传感器和单传感器色彩恒定性方法，通过学习丰富的光照信息来解决不同传感器间的色彩恢复问题。
AI.motivation: 现有模型在不同传感器间迁移效果差，且训练数据光照多样性不足，导致复杂真实场景预测性能受限。
AI.method: 提出跨传感器自监督训练框架，结合sRGB与RAW图像作为白平衡代理；设计共享主干参数的紧凑模型，通过注意力机制提升光照学习效率。
AI.result: 跨传感器模型和单传感器模型在相应测试中分别大幅超越现有最优方法，参数量仅为前最佳模型的16%。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过跨传感器训练和模型结构优化，在保持高精度的同时显著降低计算复杂度，推动了色彩恒定性技术的实际应用。

authors_text: Nithish Kannen,Udit Sharma,Sumit Neelam,Dinesh Khandelwal,Shajith Ikbal,Hima Karanam,L Venkata Subramaniam
title: Targeted Extraction of Temporal Facts from Textual Resources for Improved Temporal Question Answering over Knowledge Bases
title_zh: 从文本资源中有针对性地提取时态事实，以改进知识库上的时态问答
abstract: Knowledge Base Question Answering (KBQA) systems have the goal of answering complex natural language questions by reasoning over relevant facts retrieved from Knowledge Bases (KB). One of the major challenges faced by these systems is their inability to retrieve all relevant facts due to factors such as incomplete KB and entity/relation linking errors. In this paper, we address this particular challenge for systems handling a specific category of questions called temporal questions, where answer derivation involve reasoning over facts asserting point/intervals of time for various events. We propose a novel approach where a targeted temporal fact extraction technique is used to assist KBQA whenever it fails to retrieve temporal facts from the KB. We use $λ$-expressions of the questions to logically represent the component facts and the reasoning steps needed to derive the answer. This allows us to spot those facts that failed to get retrieved from the KB and generate textual queries to extract them from the textual resources in an open-domain question answering fashion. We evaluated our approach on a benchmark temporal question answering dataset considering Wikidata and Wikipedia respectively as the KB and textual resource. Experimental results show a significant $\sim$30\% relative improvement in answer accuracy, demonstrating the effectiveness of our approach.
summary: Knowledge Base Question Answering (KBQA) systems have the goal of answering complex natural language questions by reasoning over relevant facts retrieved from Knowledge Bases (KB). One of the major challenges faced by these systems is their inability to retrieve all relevant facts due to factors such as incomplete KB and entity/relation linking errors. In this paper, we address this particular challenge for systems handling a specific category of questions called temporal questions, where answer derivation involve reasoning over facts asserting point/intervals of time for various events. We propose a novel approach where a targeted temporal fact extraction technique is used to assist KBQA whenever it fails to retrieve temporal facts from the KB. We use $λ$-expressions of the questions to logically represent the component facts and the reasoning steps needed to derive the answer. This allows us to spot those facts that failed to get retrieved from the KB and generate textual queries to extract them from the textual resources in an open-domain question answering fashion. We evaluated our approach on a benchmark temporal question answering dataset considering Wikidata and Wikipedia respectively as the KB and textual resource. Experimental results show a significant $\sim$30\% relative improvement in answer accuracy, demonstrating the effectiveness of our approach.
abstract_zh: 知识库问答 (KBQA) 系统的目标是通过推理从知识库 (KB) 检索到的相关事实来回答复杂的自然语言问题。这些系统面临的主要挑战之一是，由于知识库不完整和实体/关系链接错误等因素，它们无法检索所有相关事实。在本文中，我们解决了处理称为时间问题的特定类别问题的系统的这一特殊挑战，其中答案推导涉及对断言各种事件的时间点/时间间隔的事实进行推理。我们提出了一种新颖的方法，当 KBQA 无法从 KB 检索时间事实时，使用有针对性的时间事实提取技术来协助 KBQA。我们使用问题的 $λ$ 表达式来逻辑地表示组成事实以及导出答案所需的推理步骤。这使我们能够发现那些未能从知识库中检索到的事实，并生成文本查询，以开放域问答方式从文本资源中提取它们。我们在基准时间问答数据集上评估了我们的方法，分别考虑维基数据和维基百科作为知识库和文本资源。实验结果表明，答案准确率相对提高了 $\sim$30\%，证明了我们方法的有效性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种针对知识库问答系统中时间问题的解决方案，通过从文本资源中提取缺失的时间事实来提升回答准确性。
AI.motivation: 现有知识库问答系统因知识库不完整和实体/关系链接错误，难以有效检索时间问题所需的时间事实，导致回答准确率不足。
AI.method: 利用λ表达式对问题进行逻辑表示，识别知识库中未检索到的时间事实，并生成文本查询从开放域资源（如维基百科）中提取补充事实。
AI.result: 在基于Wikidata和维基百科的基准数据集上，该方法使时间问题回答准确率相对提升约30%。
AI.conclusion: 通过结合知识库与文本资源的互补性，该方法有效解决了时间问题中因知识库缺失导致的问答缺陷。

search_text: Targeted Extraction of Temporal Facts from Textual Resources for Improved Temporal Question Answering over Knowledge Bases 从文本资源中有针对性地提取时态事实，以改进知识库上的时态问答 Knowledge Base Question Answering (KBQA) systems have the goal of answering complex natural language questions by reasoning over relevant facts retrieved from Knowledge Bases (KB). One of the major challenges faced by these systems is their inability to retrieve all relevant facts due to factors such as incomplete KB and entity/relation linking errors. This allows us to spot those facts that failed to get retrieved from the KB and generate textual queries to extract them from the textual resources in an open-domain question answering fashion. We evaluated our approach on a benchmark temporal question answering dataset considering Wikidata and Wikipedia respectively as the KB and textual resource. Experimental results show a significant $\sim$30\% relative improvement in answer accuracy, demonstrating the effectiveness of our approach. 知识库问答 (KBQA) 系统的目标是通过推理从知识库 (KB) 检索到的相关事实来回答复杂的自然语言问题。这些系统面临的主要挑战之一是，由于知识库不完整和实体/关系链接错误等因素，它们无法检索所有相关事实。在本文中，我们解决了处理称为时间问题的特定类别问题的系统的这一特殊挑战，其中答案推导涉及对断言各种事件的时间点/时间间隔的事实进行推理。我们提出了一种新颖的方法，当 KBQA 无法从 KB 检索时间事实时，使用有针对性的时间事实提取技术来协助 KBQA。我们使用问题的 $λ$ 表达式来逻辑地表示组成事实以及导出答案所需的推理步骤。这使我们能够发现那些未能从知识库中检索到的事实，并生成文本查询，以开放域问答方式从文本资源中提取它们。我们在基准时间问答数据集上评估了我们的方法，分别考虑维基数据和维基百科作为知识库和文本资源。实验结果表明，答案准确率相对提高了 $\sim$30\%，证明了我们方法的有效性。 本文提出一种针对知识库问答系统中时间问题的解决方案，通过从文本资源中提取缺失的时间事实来提升回答准确性。 Nithish Kannen,Udit Sharma,Sumit Neelam,Dinesh Khandelwal,Shajith Ikbal,Hima Karanam,L Venkata Subramaniam cs.CL,cs.AI

authors_text: Bac Nguyen,Fabien Cardinaux,Stefan Uhlich
title: AutoTTS: End-to-End Text-to-Speech Synthesis through Differentiable Duration Modeling
title_zh: AutoTTS：通过可微时长建模进行端到端文本到语音合成
abstract: Parallel text-to-speech (TTS) models have recently enabled fast and highly-natural speech synthesis. However, they typically require external alignment models, which are not necessarily optimized for the decoder as they are not jointly trained. In this paper, we propose a differentiable duration method for learning monotonic alignments between input and output sequences. Our method is based on a soft-duration mechanism that optimizes a stochastic process in expectation. Using this differentiable duration method, we introduce AutoTTS, a direct text-to-waveform speech synthesis model. AutoTTS enables high-fidelity speech synthesis through a combination of adversarial training and matching the total ground-truth duration. Experimental results show that our model obtains competitive results while enjoying a much simpler training pipeline. Audio samples are available online.
summary: Parallel text-to-speech (TTS) models have recently enabled fast and highly-natural speech synthesis. However, they typically require external alignment models, which are not necessarily optimized for the decoder as they are not jointly trained. In this paper, we propose a differentiable duration method for learning monotonic alignments between input and output sequences. Our method is based on a soft-duration mechanism that optimizes a stochastic process in expectation. Using this differentiable duration method, we introduce AutoTTS, a direct text-to-waveform speech synthesis model. AutoTTS enables high-fidelity speech synthesis through a combination of adversarial training and matching the total ground-truth duration. Experimental results show that our model obtains competitive results while enjoying a much simpler training pipeline. Audio samples are available online.
abstract_zh: 并行文本转语音 (TTS) 模型最近实现了快速且高度自然的语音合成。然而，它们通常需要外部对齐模型，这些模型不一定针对解码器进行优化，因为它们没有经过联合训练。在本文中，我们提出了一种可微的持续时间方法来学习输入和输出序列之间的单调对齐。我们的方法基于软持续时间机制，可优化预期的随机过程。使用这种可微的持续时间方法，我们引入了 AutoTTS，一种直接文本到波形的语音合成模型。 AutoTTS 通过结合对抗性训练和匹配总的真实持续时间来实现高保真语音合成。实验结果表明，我们的模型在获得更简单的训练管道的同时获得了有竞争力的结果。音频样本可在线获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出AutoTTS，一种通过可微分持续时间建模实现端到端文本到语音合成的模型。
AI.motivation: 现有并行TTS模型依赖外部对齐模型，但这些模型未与解码器联合训练，导致对齐效果次优。
AI.method: 设计软持续时间机制，通过期望优化的随机过程学习输入输出序列的单调对齐，并结合对抗训练与真实总持续时间匹配实现端到端合成。
AI.result: 实验表明模型在保持简单训练流程的同时达到竞争力性能，音频样本已在线发布。
AI.conclusion: 可微分持续时间建模有效简化了TTS训练流程，验证了端到端语音合成的可行性。

authors_text: Simran Arora,Patrick Lewis,Angela Fan,Jacob Kahn,Christopher Ré
title: Reasoning over Public and Private Data in Retrieval-Based Systems
title_zh: 基于检索的系统中公共和私有数据的推理
abstract: Users and organizations are generating ever-increasing amounts of private data from a wide range of sources. Incorporating private data is important to personalize open-domain applications such as question-answering, fact-checking, and personal assistants. State-of-the-art systems for these tasks explicitly retrieve relevant information to a user question from a background corpus before producing an answer. While today's retrieval systems assume the corpus is fully accessible, users are often unable or unwilling to expose their private data to entities hosting public data. We first define the PUBLIC-PRIVATE AUTOREGRESSIVE INFORMATION RETRIEVAL (PAIR) privacy framework for the novel retrieval setting over multiple privacy scopes. We then argue that an adequate benchmark is missing to study PAIR since existing textual benchmarks require retrieving from a single data distribution. However, public and private data intuitively reflect different distributions, motivating us to create ConcurrentQA, the first textual QA benchmark to require concurrent retrieval over multiple data-distributions. Finally, we show that existing systems face large privacy vs. performance tradeoffs when applied to our proposed retrieval setting and investigate how to mitigate these tradeoffs.
summary: Users and organizations are generating ever-increasing amounts of private data from a wide range of sources. Incorporating private data is important to personalize open-domain applications such as question-answering, fact-checking, and personal assistants. State-of-the-art systems for these tasks explicitly retrieve relevant information to a user question from a background corpus before producing an answer. While today's retrieval systems assume the corpus is fully accessible, users are often unable or unwilling to expose their private data to entities hosting public data. We first define the PUBLIC-PRIVATE AUTOREGRESSIVE INFORMATION RETRIEVAL (PAIR) privacy framework for the novel retrieval setting over multiple privacy scopes. We then argue that an adequate benchmark is missing to study PAIR since existing textual benchmarks require retrieving from a single data distribution. However, public and private data intuitively reflect different distributions, motivating us to create ConcurrentQA, the first textual QA benchmark to require concurrent retrieval over multiple data-distributions. Finally, we show that existing systems face large privacy vs. performance tradeoffs when applied to our proposed retrieval setting and investigate how to mitigate these tradeoffs.
abstract_zh: 用户和组织从各种来源生成越来越多的私人数据。合并私人数据对于个性化开放域应用程序（例如问答、事实核查和个人助理）非常重要。用于这些任务的最先进的系统在产生答案之前从背景语料库中显式检索用户问题的相关信息。虽然当今的检索系统假设语料库是完全可访问的，但用户通常无法或不愿意将其私有数据暴露给托管公共数据的实体。我们首先为多个隐私范围内的新颖检索设置定义了公私自回归信息检索（PAIR）隐私框架。然后，我们认为研究 PAIR 缺少足够的基准，因为现有的文本基准需要从单个数据分布中检索。然而，公共和私有数据直观地反映了不同的分布，这促使我们创建 ConcurrentQA，这是第一个需要对多个数据分布进行并发检索的文本 QA 基准。最后，我们表明，当应用于我们提出的检索设置时，现有系统面临着巨大的隐私与性能权衡，并研究如何减轻这些权衡。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种新型检索框架PAIR，用于处理包含公共与私有数据的多隐私场景，并构建首个多分布数据检索基准ConcurrentQA。
AI.motivation: 现有检索系统无法有效处理用户私有数据隐私问题，且缺乏能反映公共与私有数据分布差异的基准测试。
AI.method: 定义PAIR隐私框架规范多隐私场景检索流程，构建需要同时检索多数据分布的ConcurrentQA问答基准。
AI.result: 现有系统在PAIR设置下存在显著隐私与性能权衡，通过实验分析了不同缓解策略的效果。
AI.conclusion: 多隐私场景检索需要新型系统设计，现有技术在隐私保护与检索效果间存在显著矛盾需进一步突破。

authors_text: Akira Kinose,Masashi Okada,Ryo Okumura,Tadahiro Taniguchi
title: Multi-View Dreaming: Multi-View World Model with Contrastive Learning
title_zh: 多视角梦想：对比学习的多视角世界模型
abstract: In this paper, we propose Multi-View Dreaming, a novel reinforcement learning agent for integrated recognition and control from multi-view observations by extending Dreaming. Most current reinforcement learning method assumes a single-view observation space, and this imposes limitations on the observed data, such as lack of spatial information and occlusions. This makes obtaining ideal observational information from the environment difficult and is a bottleneck for real-world robotics applications. In this paper, we use contrastive learning to train a shared latent space between different viewpoints, and show how the Products of Experts approach can be used to integrate and control the probability distributions of latent states for multiple viewpoints. We also propose Multi-View DreamingV2, a variant of Multi-View Dreaming that uses a categorical distribution to model the latent state instead of the Gaussian distribution. Experiments show that the proposed method outperforms simple extensions of existing methods in a realistic robot control task.
summary: In this paper, we propose Multi-View Dreaming, a novel reinforcement learning agent for integrated recognition and control from multi-view observations by extending Dreaming. Most current reinforcement learning method assumes a single-view observation space, and this imposes limitations on the observed data, such as lack of spatial information and occlusions. This makes obtaining ideal observational information from the environment difficult and is a bottleneck for real-world robotics applications. In this paper, we use contrastive learning to train a shared latent space between different viewpoints, and show how the Products of Experts approach can be used to integrate and control the probability distributions of latent states for multiple viewpoints. We also propose Multi-View DreamingV2, a variant of Multi-View Dreaming that uses a categorical distribution to model the latent state instead of the Gaussian distribution. Experiments show that the proposed method outperforms simple extensions of existing methods in a realistic robot control task.
abstract_zh: 在本文中，我们提出了多视图梦想（Multi-View Dreaming），这是一种新型强化学习代理，通过扩展梦想来集成多视图观察的识别和控制。目前大多数强化学习方法都假设单视图观察空间，这对观察数据施加了限制，例如缺乏空间信息和遮挡。这使得从环境中获取理想的观测信息变得困难，并且是现实世界机器人应用的瓶颈。在本文中，我们使用对比学习来训练不同观点之间的共享潜在空间，并展示如何使用专家产品方法来集成和控制多个观点的潜在状态的概率分布。我们还提出了 Multi-View DreamingV2，这是 Multi-View Dreaming 的一种变体，它使用分类分布而不是高斯分布来建模潜在状态。实验表明，在实际的机器人控制任务中，所提出的方法优于现有方法的简单扩展。

AI.tldr: 本文提出多视角梦境方法，通过对比学习解决多视角观测下的强化学习集成识别与控制问题。
AI.motivation: 现有强化学习方法依赖单一视角观测，导致空间信息缺失和遮挡问题，限制了现实机器人应用效果。
AI.method: 利用对比学习构建多视角共享潜在空间，结合专家乘积方法整合多视角概率分布，并提出使用分类分布的改进版本Multi-View DreamingV2。
AI.result: 在真实机器人控制任务中，该方法优于现有方法的简单扩展，验证了有效性。
AI.conclusion: 多视角梦境方法通过对比学习和分布整合，有效解决了多视角观测下的强化学习挑战，提升了现实应用性能。

search_text: Multi-View Dreaming: Multi-View World Model with Contrastive Learning 多视角梦想：对比学习的多视角世界模型 In this paper, we propose Multi-View Dreaming, a novel reinforcement learning agent for integrated recognition and control from multi-view observations by extending Dreaming. Most current reinforcement learning method assumes a single-view observation space, and this imposes limitations on the observed data, such as lack of spatial information and occlusions. This makes obtaining ideal observational information from the environment difficult and is a bottleneck for real-world robotics applications. In this paper, we use contrastive learning to train a shared latent space between different viewpoints, and show how the Products of Experts approach can be used to integrate and control the probability distributions of latent states for multiple viewpoints. We also propose Multi-View DreamingV2, a variant of Multi-View Dreaming that uses a categorical distribution to model the latent state instead of the Gaussian distribution. Experiments show that the proposed method outperforms simple extensions of existing methods in a realistic robot control task. 在本文中，我们提出了多视图梦想（Multi-View Dreaming），这是一种新型强化学习代理，通过扩展梦想来集成多视图观察的识别和控制。目前大多数强化学习方法都假设单视图观察空间，这对观察数据施加了限制，例如缺乏空间信息和遮挡。这使得从环境中获取理想的观测信息变得困难，并且是现实世界机器人应用的瓶颈。在本文中，我们使用对比学习来训练不同观点之间的共享潜在空间，并展示如何使用专家产品方法来集成和控制多个观点的潜在状态的概率分布。我们还提出了 Multi-View DreamingV2，这是 Multi-View Dreaming 的一种变体，它使用分类分布而不是高斯分布来建模潜在状态。实验表明，在实际的机器人控制任务中，所提出的方法优于现有方法的简单扩展。 本文提出多视角梦境方法，通过对比学习解决多视角观测下的强化学习集成识别与控制问题。 Akira Kinose,Masashi Okada,Ryo Okumura,Tadahiro Taniguchi cs.AI,cs.RO,eess.SY

authors_text: Nikhil Garg,Ismael Balafrej,Terrence C. Stewart,Jean Michel Portal,Marc Bocquet,Damien Querlioz,Dominique Drouin,Jean Rouat,Yann Beilliard,Fabien Alibart
title: Voltage-Dependent Synaptic Plasticity (VDSP): Unsupervised probabilistic Hebbian plasticity rule based on neurons membrane potential
title_zh: 电压依赖性突触可塑性 (VDSP)：基于神经元膜电位的无监督概率赫布可塑性规则
comment: Front. Neurosci., 21 October 2022 Sec. Neuromorphic Engineering
comments: Front. Neurosci., 21 October 2022 Sec. Neuromorphic Engineering
abstract: This study proposes voltage-dependent-synaptic plasticity (VDSP), a novel brain-inspired unsupervised local learning rule for the online implementation of Hebb's plasticity mechanism on neuromorphic hardware. The proposed VDSP learning rule updates the synaptic conductance on the spike of the postsynaptic neuron only, which reduces by a factor of two the number of updates with respect to standard spike-timing-dependent plasticity (STDP). This update is dependent on the membrane potential of the presynaptic neuron, which is readily available as part of neuron implementation and hence does not require additional memory for storage. Moreover, the update is also regularized on synaptic weight and prevents explosion or vanishing of weights on repeated stimulation. Rigorous mathematical analysis is performed to draw an equivalence between VDSP and STDP. To validate the system-level performance of VDSP, we train a single-layer spiking neural network (SNN) for the recognition of handwritten digits. We report 85.01 $ \pm $ 0.76% (Mean $ \pm $ S.D.) accuracy for a network of 100 output neurons on the MNIST dataset. The performance improves when scaling the network size (89.93 $ \pm $ 0.41% for 400 output neurons, 90.56 $ \pm $ 0.27 for 500 neurons), which validates the applicability of the proposed learning rule for spatial pattern recognition tasks. Future work will consider more complicated tasks. Interestingly, the learning rule better adapts than STDP to the frequency of input signal and does not require hand-tuning of hyperparameters
summary: This study proposes voltage-dependent-synaptic plasticity (VDSP), a novel brain-inspired unsupervised local learning rule for the online implementation of Hebb's plasticity mechanism on neuromorphic hardware. The proposed VDSP learning rule updates the synaptic conductance on the spike of the postsynaptic neuron only, which reduces by a factor of two the number of updates with respect to standard spike-timing-dependent plasticity (STDP). This update is dependent on the membrane potential of the presynaptic neuron, which is readily available as part of neuron implementation and hence does not require additional memory for storage. Moreover, the update is also regularized on synaptic weight and prevents explosion or vanishing of weights on repeated stimulation. Rigorous mathematical analysis is performed to draw an equivalence between VDSP and STDP. To validate the system-level performance of VDSP, we train a single-layer spiking neural network (SNN) for the recognition of handwritten digits. We report 85.01 $ \pm $ 0.76% (Mean $ \pm $ S.D.) accuracy for a network of 100 output neurons on the MNIST dataset. The performance improves when scaling the network size (89.93 $ \pm $ 0.41% for 400 output neurons, 90.56 $ \pm $ 0.27 for 500 neurons), which validates the applicability of the proposed learning rule for spatial pattern recognition tasks. Future work will consider more complicated tasks. Interestingly, the learning rule better adapts than STDP to the frequency of input signal and does not require hand-tuning of hyperparameters
abstract_zh: 这项研究提出了电压依赖突触可塑性（VDSP），这是一种新颖的受大脑启发的无监督局部学习规则，用于在神经形态硬件上在线实现赫布的可塑性机制。所提出的 VDSP 学习规则仅更新突触后神经元尖峰上的突触电导，这将标准尖峰时序依赖性可塑性 (STDP) 的更新数量减少了两倍。此更新取决于突触前神经元的膜电位，该膜电位可作为神经元实现的一部分轻松获得，因此不需要额外的内存进行存储。此外，更新还对突触权重进行了正则化，并防止重复刺激时权重的爆炸或消失。通过严格的数学分析得出 VDSP 和 STDP 之间的等价关系。为了验证 VDSP 的系统级性能，我们训练了一个单层尖峰神经网络（SNN）来识别手写数字。我们报告 MNIST 数据集上由 100 个输出神经元组成的网络的准确度为 85.01 $ \pm $ 0.76%（平均 $ \pm $ S.D.）。扩展网络大小时性能会有所提高（400 个输出神经元为 89.93 $ \pm $ 0.41%，500 个神经元为 90.56 $ \pm $ 0.27），这验证了所提出的学习规则对于空间模式识别任务的适用性。未来的工作将考虑更复杂的任务。有趣的是，学习规则比 STDP 更好地适应输入信号的频率，并且不需要手动调整超参数

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于神经元膜电位的无监督概率赫布可塑性规则（VDSP），用于在神经形态硬件上在线实现赫布可塑性机制。
AI.motivation: 传统STDP规则需要频繁更新且依赖额外存储，而VDSP通过利用膜电位信息减少更新次数并避免权重异常，同时保持与STDP的数学等价性。
AI.method: VDSP仅在突触后神经元脉冲时更新突触电导，结合突触前神经元膜电位进行正则化，并通过数学分析验证其与STDP的等价性。在MNIST数据集上训练单层SNN验证性能。
AI.result: 在MNIST数据集上，100输出神经元网络达到85.01±0.76%准确率，500输出神经元网络提升至90.56±0.27%，且无需手动调整超参数。
AI.conclusion: VDSP相比STDP更适应输入频率变化，适用于空间模式识别任务，未来将拓展至更复杂任务。

authors_text: Shichao Li,Zechun Liu,Zhiqiang Shen,Kwang-Ting Cheng
title: Stereo Neural Vernier Caliper
title_zh: 立体神经游标卡尺
abstract: We propose a new object-centric framework for learning-based stereo 3D object detection. Previous studies build scene-centric representations that do not consider the significant variation among outdoor instances and thus lack the flexibility and functionalities that an instance-level model can offer. We build such an instance-level model by formulating and tackling a local update problem, i.e., how to predict a refined update given an initial 3D cuboid guess. We demonstrate how solving this problem can complement scene-centric approaches in (i) building a coarse-to-fine multi-resolution system, (ii) performing model-agnostic object location refinement, and (iii) conducting stereo 3D tracking-by-detection. Extensive experiments demonstrate the effectiveness of our approach, which achieves state-of-the-art performance on the KITTI benchmark. Code and pre-trained models are available at https://github.com/Nicholasli1995/SNVC.
summary: We propose a new object-centric framework for learning-based stereo 3D object detection. Previous studies build scene-centric representations that do not consider the significant variation among outdoor instances and thus lack the flexibility and functionalities that an instance-level model can offer. We build such an instance-level model by formulating and tackling a local update problem, i.e., how to predict a refined update given an initial 3D cuboid guess. We demonstrate how solving this problem can complement scene-centric approaches in (i) building a coarse-to-fine multi-resolution system, (ii) performing model-agnostic object location refinement, and (iii) conducting stereo 3D tracking-by-detection. Extensive experiments demonstrate the effectiveness of our approach, which achieves state-of-the-art performance on the KITTI benchmark. Code and pre-trained models are available at https://github.com/Nicholasli1995/SNVC.
abstract_zh: 我们提出了一种新的以对象为中心的框架，用于基于学习的立体 3D 对象检测。先前的研究构建了以场景为中心的表示，没有考虑室外实例之间的显着变化，因此缺乏实例级模型可以提供的灵活性和功能。我们通过制定和解决局部更新问题来构建这样的实例级模型，即如何在给定初始 3D 长方体猜测的情况下预测精细更新。我们演示了如何解决这个问题可以补充以场景为中心的方法：(i) 构建从粗到细的多分辨率系统，(ii) 执行与模型无关的对象位置细化，以及 (iii) 进行立体 3D 检测跟踪。大量实验证明了我们方法的有效性，该方法在 KITTI 基准测试中实现了最先进的性能。代码和预训练模型可在 https://github.com/Nicholasli1995/SNVC 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于学习的立体3D物体检测框架，通过解决局部更新问题提升检测精度。
AI.motivation: 传统场景中心表示方法无法适应户外实例的显著变化，缺乏实例级模型的灵活性与功能。
AI.method: 构建实例级模型，通过解决局部更新问题（基于初始3D立方体猜测进行优化），并用于多分辨率系统、位置优化及立体3D跟踪。
AI.result: 在KITTI基准上达到最先进性能，提供代码与预训练模型。
AI.conclusion: 实例级模型有效补充场景中心方法，在立体3D检测中展现优越性。

We demonstrate how solving this problem can complement scene-centric approaches in (i) building a coarse-to-fine multi-resolution system, (ii) performing model-agnostic object location refinement, and (iii) conducting stereo 3D tracking-by-detection. Extensive experiments demonstrate the effectiveness of our approach, which achieves state-of-the-art performance on the KITTI benchmark. Code and pre-trained models are available at https://github.com/Nicholasli1995/SNVC. 我们提出了一种新的以对象为中心的框架，用于基于学习的立体 3D 对象检测。先前的研究构建了以场景为中心的表示，没有考虑室外实例之间的显着变化，因此缺乏实例级模型可以提供的灵活性和功能。我们通过制定和解决局部更新问题来构建这样的实例级模型，即如何在给定初始 3D 长方体猜测的情况下预测精细更新。我们演示了如何解决这个问题可以补充以场景为中心的方法：(i) 构建从粗到细的多分辨率系统，(ii) 执行与模型无关的对象位置细化，以及 (iii) 进行立体 3D 检测跟踪。大量实验证明了我们方法的有效性，该方法在 KITTI 基准测试中实现了最先进的性能。代码和预训练模型可在 https://github.com/Nicholasli1995/SNVC 获取。 本文提出一种基于学习的立体3D物体检测框架，通过解决局部更新问题提升检测精度。 Shichao Li,Zechun Liu,Zhiqiang Shen,Kwang-Ting Cheng cs.CV,cs.RO

authors_text: Morteza Ansarinia,Paul Schrater,Pedro Cardoso-Leite
title: Linking Theories and Methods in Cognitive Sciences via Joint Embedding of the Scientific Literature: The Example of Cognitive Control
title_zh: 通过科学文献的联合嵌入连接认知科学的理论和方法：认知控制的例子
abstract: Traditionally, theory and practice of Cognitive Control are linked via literature reviews by human domain experts. This approach, however, is inadequate to track the ever-growing literature. It may also be biased, and yield redundancies and confusion. Here we present an alternative approach. We performed automated text analyses on a large body of scientific texts to create a joint representation of tasks and constructs. More specifically, 385,705 scientific abstracts were first mapped into an embedding space using a transformers-based language model. Document embeddings were then used to identify a task-construct graph embedding that grounds constructs on tasks and supports nuanced meaning of the constructs by taking advantage of constrained random walks in the graph. This joint task-construct graph embedding, can be queried to generate task batteries targeting specific constructs, may reveal knowledge gaps in the literature, and inspire new tasks and novel hypotheses.
summary: Traditionally, theory and practice of Cognitive Control are linked via literature reviews by human domain experts. This approach, however, is inadequate to track the ever-growing literature. It may also be biased, and yield redundancies and confusion. Here we present an alternative approach. We performed automated text analyses on a large body of scientific texts to create a joint representation of tasks and constructs. More specifically, 385,705 scientific abstracts were first mapped into an embedding space using a transformers-based language model. Document embeddings were then used to identify a task-construct graph embedding that grounds constructs on tasks and supports nuanced meaning of the constructs by taking advantage of constrained random walks in the graph. This joint task-construct graph embedding, can be queried to generate task batteries targeting specific constructs, may reveal knowledge gaps in the literature, and inspire new tasks and novel hypotheses.
abstract_zh: 传统上，认知控制的理论和实践是通过人类领域专家的文献综述联系起来的。然而，这种方法不足以追踪不断增长的文献。它也可能有偏见，并产生冗余和混乱。在这里，我们提出了一种替代方法。我们对大量科学文本进行了自动文本分析，以创建任务和结构的联合表示。更具体地说，首先使用基于 Transformer 的语言模型将 385,705 个科学摘要映射到嵌入空间中。然后，使用文档嵌入来识别任务构造图嵌入，该嵌入将构造基于任务，并通过利用图中的约束随机游走来支持构造的细微含义。这种联合任务构造图嵌入可以查询以生成针对特定构造的任务组，可以揭示文献中的知识差距，并激发新任务和新假设。

AI.tldr: 通过联合嵌入科学文献，将认知控制领域的理论与方法进行关联，构建任务-构念图谱以支持精准的理论实践链接。
AI.motivation: 传统依赖人工专家的文献综述方法难以应对文献激增，且存在主观偏差、冗余和混淆问题，需自动化方法提升效率与客观性。
AI.method: 基于Transformer语言模型对38万+科学摘要进行嵌入，构建任务-构念图谱，并通过约束随机游走优化构念的语义表达。
AI.result: 生成针对特定构念的任务组合，揭示文献知识空白，启发新任务设计与假设生成。
AI.conclusion: 该方法为认知科学提供了高效、可扩展的理论-实践关联框架，推动领域知识的系统化整合与创新。

ai_content.tldr: 通过联合嵌入科学文献，将认知控制领域的理论与方法进行关联，构建任务-构念图谱以支持精准的理论实践链接。

authors_text: Buyun Zhang,Liang Luo,Xi Liu,Jay Li,Zeliang Chen,Weilin Zhang,Xiaohan Wei,Yuchen Hao,Michael Tsang,Wenjun Wang,Yang Liu,Huayu Li,Yasmine Badr,Jongsoo Park,Jiyan Yang,Dheevatsa Mudigere,Ellie Wen
title: DHEN: A Deep and Hierarchical Ensemble Network for Large-Scale Click-Through Rate Prediction
title_zh: DHEN：用于大规模点击率预测的深度分层集成网络
abstract: Learning feature interactions is important to the model performance of online advertising services. As a result, extensive efforts have been devoted to designing effective architectures to learn feature interactions. However, we observe that the practical performance of those designs can vary from dataset to dataset, even when the order of interactions claimed to be captured is the same. That indicates different designs may have different advantages and the interactions captured by them have non-overlapping information. Motivated by this observation, we propose DHEN - a deep and hierarchical ensemble architecture that can leverage strengths of heterogeneous interaction modules and learn a hierarchy of the interactions under different orders. To overcome the challenge brought by DHEN's deeper and multi-layer structure in training, we propose a novel co-designed training system that can further improve the training efficiency of DHEN. Experiments of DHEN on large-scale dataset from CTR prediction tasks attained 0.27\% improvement on the Normalized Entropy (NE) of prediction and 1.2x better training throughput than state-of-the-art baseline, demonstrating their effectiveness in practice.
summary: Learning feature interactions is important to the model performance of online advertising services. As a result, extensive efforts have been devoted to designing effective architectures to learn feature interactions. However, we observe that the practical performance of those designs can vary from dataset to dataset, even when the order of interactions claimed to be captured is the same. That indicates different designs may have different advantages and the interactions captured by them have non-overlapping information. Motivated by this observation, we propose DHEN - a deep and hierarchical ensemble architecture that can leverage strengths of heterogeneous interaction modules and learn a hierarchy of the interactions under different orders. To overcome the challenge brought by DHEN's deeper and multi-layer structure in training, we propose a novel co-designed training system that can further improve the training efficiency of DHEN. Experiments of DHEN on large-scale dataset from CTR prediction tasks attained 0.27\% improvement on the Normalized Entropy (NE) of prediction and 1.2x better training throughput than state-of-the-art baseline, demonstrating their effectiveness in practice.
abstract_zh: 学习特征交互对于在线广告服务的模型性能很重要。因此，人们投入了大量的精力来设计有效的架构来学习特征交互。然而，我们观察到，即使声称捕获的交互顺序相同，这些设计的实际性能也可能因数据集而异。这表明不同的设计可能具有不同的优势，并且它们捕获的交互具有不重叠的信息。受这一观察的启发，我们提出了 DHEN - 一种深层的分层集成架构，可以利用异构交互模块的优势并学习不同顺序下交互的层次结构。为了克服DHEN更深层次、多层结构在训练中带来的挑战，我们提出了一种新颖的联合设计训练系统，可以进一步提高DHEN的训练效率。 DHEN 在 CTR 预测任务的大规模数据集上进行的实验与最先进的基线相比，预测的归一化熵 (NE) 提高了 0.27%，训练吞吐量提高了 1.2 倍，证明了其在实践中的有效性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出DHEN（深度分层集成网络），用于大规模点击率预测任务，旨在通过集成不同特征交互模块提升模型性能和训练效率。
AI.motivation: 现有特征交互模型在不同数据集上的表现差异显著，且捕捉的交互信息可能存在重叠，需通过集成异构模块挖掘互补信息。
AI.method: 设计深度分层集成架构DHEN，结合多层级异构交互模块，并提出协同训练系统以优化深层结构的训练效率。
AI.result: 在大规模数据集上，DHEN使预测归一化熵提升0.27%，训练吞吐量达到最新方法的1.2倍。
AI.conclusion: DHEN通过分层集成与协同训练有效提升了点击率预测的准确性和效率，验证了其在实际场景中的可行性。
