authors_text: Lukas Hedegaard,Negar Heidari,Alexandros Iosifidis
title: Continual Spatio-Temporal Graph Convolutional Networks
title_zh: 连续时空图卷积网络
abstract: Graph-based reasoning over skeleton data has emerged as a promising approach for human action recognition. However, the application of prior graph-based methods, which predominantly employ whole temporal sequences as their input, to the setting of online inference entails considerable computational redundancy. In this paper, we tackle this issue by reformulating the Spatio-Temporal Graph Convolutional Neural Network as a Continual Inference Network, which can perform step-by-step predictions in time without repeat frame processing. To evaluate our method, we create a continual version of ST-GCN, CoST-GCN, alongside two derived methods with different self-attention mechanisms, CoAGCN and CoS-TR. We investigate weight transfer strategies and architectural modifications for inference acceleration, and perform experiments on the NTU RGB+D 60, NTU RGB+D 120, and Kinetics Skeleton 400 datasets. Retaining similar predictive accuracy, we observe up to 109x reduction in time complexity, on-hardware accelerations of 26x, and reductions in maximum allocated memory of 52% during online inference.
summary: Graph-based reasoning over skeleton data has emerged as a promising approach for human action recognition. However, the application of prior graph-based methods, which predominantly employ whole temporal sequences as their input, to the setting of online inference entails considerable computational redundancy. In this paper, we tackle this issue by reformulating the Spatio-Temporal Graph Convolutional Neural Network as a Continual Inference Network, which can perform step-by-step predictions in time without repeat frame processing. To evaluate our method, we create a continual version of ST-GCN, CoST-GCN, alongside two derived methods with different self-attention mechanisms, CoAGCN and CoS-TR. We investigate weight transfer strategies and architectural modifications for inference acceleration, and perform experiments on the NTU RGB+D 60, NTU RGB+D 120, and Kinetics Skeleton 400 datasets. Retaining similar predictive accuracy, we observe up to 109x reduction in time complexity, on-hardware accelerations of 26x, and reductions in maximum allocated memory of 52% during online inference.
abstract_zh: 基于骨架数据的图推理已成为人类动作识别的一种有前途的方法。然而，现有的基于图的方法（主要采用整个时间序列作为输入）应用于在线推理的设置需要相当大的计算冗余。在本文中，我们通过将时空图卷积神经网络重新表述为连续推理网络来解决这个问题，它可以及时执行逐步预测，而无需重复帧处理。为了评估我们的方法，我们创建了 ST-GCN、CoST-GCN 的连续版本，以及具有不同自注意力机制的两种派生方法 CoAGCN 和 CoS-TR。我们研究了推理加速的权重转移策略和架构修改，并在 NTU RGB+D 60、NTU RGB+D 120 和 Kinetics Skeleton 400 数据集上进行实验。在保持类似的预测准确性的情况下，我们观察到在线推理期间时间复杂度降低了 109 倍，硬件加速提高了 26 倍，最大分配内存减少了 52%。

AI.tldr: 本文提出连续时空图卷积网络（CoST-GCN），通过逐步预测机制优化在线动作识别的计算效率。
AI.motivation: 传统图卷积网络处理完整时间序列导致在线推理时计算冗余，需降低时间复杂度和内存占用。
AI.method: 将ST-GCN重构为连续推理网络，设计CoST-GCN及两种自注意力变体（CoAGCN、CoS-TR），结合权重迁移与架构优化加速推理。
AI.result: 在三个数据集上实现109倍时间复杂度降低、26倍硬件加速及52%内存占用减少，精度保持稳定。
AI.conclusion: 连续推理框架有效平衡了动作识别精度与实时性需求，为在线应用场景提供高效解决方案。

search_text: Continual Spatio-Temporal Graph Convolutional Networks 连续时空图卷积网络 Graph-based reasoning over skeleton data has emerged as a promising approach for human action recognition. However, the application of prior graph-based methods, which predominantly employ whole temporal sequences as their input, to the setting of online inference entails considerable computational redundancy. In this paper, we tackle this issue by reformulating the Spatio-Temporal Graph Convolutional Neural Network as a Continual Inference Network, which can perform step-by-step predictions in time without repeat frame processing. To evaluate our method, we create a continual version of ST-GCN, CoST-GCN, alongside two derived methods with different self-attention mechanisms, CoAGCN and CoS-TR. We investigate weight transfer strategies and architectural modifications for inference acceleration, and perform experiments on the NTU RGB+D 60, NTU RGB+D 120, and Kinetics Skeleton 400 datasets. Retaining similar predictive accuracy, we observe up to 109x reduction in time complexity, on-hardware accelerations of 26x, and reductions in maximum allocated memory of 52% during online inference. 基于骨架数据的图推理已成为人类动作识别的一种有前途的方法。然而，现有的基于图的方法（主要采用整个时间序列作为输入）应用于在线推理的设置需要相当大的计算冗余。在本文中，我们通过将时空图卷积神经网络重新表述为连续推理网络来解决这个问题，它可以及时执行逐步预测，而无需重复帧处理。为了评估我们的方法，我们创建了 ST-GCN、CoST-GCN 的连续版本，以及具有不同自注意力机制的两种派生方法 CoAGCN 和 CoS-TR。我们研究了推理加速的权重转移策略和架构修改，并在 NTU RGB+D 60、NTU RGB+D 120 和 Kinetics Skeleton 400 数据集上进行实验。在保持类似的预测准确性的情况下，我们观察到在线推理期间时间复杂度降低了 109 倍，硬件加速提高了 26 倍，最大分配内存减少了 52%。 本文提出连续时空图卷积网络（CoST-GCN），通过逐步预测机制优化在线动作识别的计算效率。 Lukas Hedegaard,Negar Heidari,Alexandros Iosifidis cs.CV,cs.LG

authors_text: Phillip Benjamin Ströbel,Simon Clematide,Martin Volk,Tobias Hodel
title: Transformer-based HTR for Historical Documents
title_zh: 基于 Transformer 的历史文献 HTR
comment: This is an abstract submitted and accepted at ComHum 2022 in Lausanne. We will be elaborating on these initial findings in the paper that we will submit after the conference
comments: This is an abstract submitted and accepted at ComHum 2022 in Lausanne. We will be elaborating on these initial findings in the paper that we will submit after the conference
abstract: We apply the TrOCR framework to real-world, historical manuscripts and show that TrOCR per se is a strong model, ideal for transfer learning. TrOCR has been trained on English only, but it can adapt to other languages that use the Latin alphabet fairly easily and with little training material. We compare TrOCR against a SOTA HTR framework (Transkribus) and show that it can beat such systems. This finding is essential since Transkribus performs best when it has access to baseline information, which is not needed at all to fine-tune TrOCR.
summary: We apply the TrOCR framework to real-world, historical manuscripts and show that TrOCR per se is a strong model, ideal for transfer learning. TrOCR has been trained on English only, but it can adapt to other languages that use the Latin alphabet fairly easily and with little training material. We compare TrOCR against a SOTA HTR framework (Transkribus) and show that it can beat such systems. This finding is essential since Transkribus performs best when it has access to baseline information, which is not needed at all to fine-tune TrOCR.
abstract_zh: 我们将 TrOCR 框架应用于现实世界的历史手稿，并表明 TrOCR 本身是一个强大的模型，非常适合迁移学习。 TrOCR 仅接受过英语训练，但它可以相当轻松地适应使用拉丁字母的其他语言，并且几乎不需要培训材料。我们将 TrOCR 与 SOTA HTR 框架 (Transkribus) 进行比较，并表明它可以击败此类系统。这一发现至关重要，因为 Transkribus 在能够访问基线信息时表现最佳，而微调 TrOCR 根本不需要这些信息。

AI.tldr: 本文将TrOCR框架应用于历史手稿的手写文本识别（HTR），证明其作为迁移学习模型的有效性。
AI.motivation: 传统HTR系统如Transkribus依赖基准信息且需要大量标注数据，而TrOCR无需基准信息且适应性强，因此研究其在历史文档中的应用具有重要意义。
AI.method: 采用TrOCR框架进行迁移学习，并与Transkribus框架对比实验，验证其在多种语言和少量训练数据下的适应能力。
AI.result: 实验结果表明，TrOCR在准确率上优于Transkribus，且无需依赖基准信息，训练数据需求更少。
AI.conclusion: TrOCR为历史文档的手写文本识别提供了一种高效、低资源依赖的解决方案，具有重要的应用价值。

authors_text: Brenda Elizabeth Olivas-Padilla,Dimitris Papanagiotou,Gavriela Senteri,Sotiris Manitsaris,Alina Glushkova
title: Computational ergonomics for task delegation in Human-Robot Collaboration: spatiotemporal adaptation of the robot to the human through contactless gesture recognition
title_zh: 人机协作中任务委派的计算人体工程学：通过非接触式手势识别使机器人适应人类的时空
comment: Under review in IEEE Robotics and Automation Letters
comments: Under review in IEEE Robotics and Automation Letters
abstract: The high prevalence of work-related musculoskeletal disorders (WMSDs) could be addressed by optimizing Human-Robot Collaboration (HRC) frameworks for manufacturing applications. In this context, this paper proposes two hypotheses for ergonomically effective task delegation and HRC. The first hypothesis states that it is possible to quantify ergonomically professional tasks using motion data from a reduced set of sensors. Then, the most dangerous tasks can be delegated to a collaborative robot. The second hypothesis is that by including gesture recognition and spatial adaptation, the ergonomics of an HRC scenario can be improved by avoiding needless motions that could expose operators to ergonomic risks and by lowering the physical effort required of operators. An HRC scenario for a television manufacturing process is optimized to test both hypotheses. For the ergonomic evaluation, motion primitives with known ergonomic risks were modeled for their detection in professional tasks and to estimate a risk score based on the European Assembly Worksheet (EAWS). A Deep Learning gesture recognition module trained with egocentric television assembly data was used to complement the collaboration between the human operator and the robot. Additionally, a skeleton-tracking algorithm provided the robot with information about the operator's pose, allowing it to spatially adapt its motion to the operator's anthropometrics. Three experiments were conducted to determine the effect of gesture recognition and spatial adaptation on the operator's range of motion. The rate of spatial adaptation was used as a key performance indicator (KPI), and a new KPI for measuring the reduction in the operator's motion is presented in this paper.
summary: The high prevalence of work-related musculoskeletal disorders (WMSDs) could be addressed by optimizing Human-Robot Collaboration (HRC) frameworks for manufacturing applications. In this context, this paper proposes two hypotheses for ergonomically effective task delegation and HRC. The first hypothesis states that it is possible to quantify ergonomically professional tasks using motion data from a reduced set of sensors. Then, the most dangerous tasks can be delegated to a collaborative robot. The second hypothesis is that by including gesture recognition and spatial adaptation, the ergonomics of an HRC scenario can be improved by avoiding needless motions that could expose operators to ergonomic risks and by lowering the physical effort required of operators. An HRC scenario for a television manufacturing process is optimized to test both hypotheses. For the ergonomic evaluation, motion primitives with known ergonomic risks were modeled for their detection in professional tasks and to estimate a risk score based on the European Assembly Worksheet (EAWS). A Deep Learning gesture recognition module trained with egocentric television assembly data was used to complement the collaboration between the human operator and the robot. Additionally, a skeleton-tracking algorithm provided the robot with information about the operator's pose, allowing it to spatially adapt its motion to the operator's anthropometrics. Three experiments were conducted to determine the effect of gesture recognition and spatial adaptation on the operator's range of motion. The rate of spatial adaptation was used as a key performance indicator (KPI), and a new KPI for measuring the reduction in the operator's motion is presented in this paper.
abstract_zh: 与工作相关的肌肉骨骼疾病 (WMSD) 的高患病率可以通过优化制造应用的人机协作 (HRC) 框架来解决。在此背景下，本文针对符合人体工程学的有效任务委派和 HRC 提出了两个假设。第一个假设指出，可以使用来自一组减少的传感器的运动数据来量化符合人体工程学的专业任务。然后，最危险的任务可以委托给协作机器人。第二个假设是，通过包括手势识别和空间适应，可以通过避免可能使操作员面临人体工程学风险的不必要的运动并降低操作员所需的体力来改善 HRC 场景的人体工程学。电视制造过程的 HRC 场景经过优化以测试这两个假设。对于人体工程学评估，对具有已知人体工程学风险的运动原语进行了建模，以便在专业任务中进行检测，并根据欧洲装配工作表 (EAWS) 估计风险评分。使用以自我为中心的电视装配数据训练的深度学习手势识别模块来补充人类操作员和机器人之间的协作。此外，骨骼跟踪算法为机器人提供了有关操作员姿势的信息，使其能够在空间上适应操作员的人体测量数据。进行了三个实验来确定手势识别和空间适应对操作员运动范围的影响。空间适应率被用作关键绩效指标（KPI），本文提出了一种用于衡量操作员运动减少程度的新 KPI。

AI.tldr: 本文提出通过无接触手势识别和空间自适应技术优化人机协作中的任务分配，以降低工人肌肉骨骼疾病风险。
AI.motivation: 工作相关肌肉骨骼疾病高发，需通过优化人机协作框架减少人体体力负荷和危险动作。
AI.method: 基于运动数据建模职业风险任务，结合深度学习手势识别模块与骨骼追踪算法实现机器人空间自适应，通过实验验证空间自适应率和操作者运动范围缩减指标。
AI.result: 实验表明手势识别与空间自适应能有效降低操作者运动幅度，减少高风险动作暴露，验证了两种假设的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过计算人体工程学优化人机协作流程，为制造业提供了降低工伤风险的可行技术路径。

The rate of spatial adaptation was used as a key performance indicator (KPI), and a new KPI for measuring the reduction in the operator's motion is presented in this paper. 与工作相关的肌肉骨骼疾病 (WMSD) 的高患病率可以通过优化制造应用的人机协作 (HRC) 框架来解决。在此背景下，本文针对符合人体工程学的有效任务委派和 HRC 提出了两个假设。第一个假设指出，可以使用来自一组减少的传感器的运动数据来量化符合人体工程学的专业任务。然后，最危险的任务可以委托给协作机器人。第二个假设是，通过包括手势识别和空间适应，可以通过避免可能使操作员面临人体工程学风险的不必要的运动并降低操作员所需的体力来改善 HRC 场景的人体工程学。电视制造过程的 HRC 场景经过优化以测试这两个假设。对于人体工程学评估，对具有已知人体工程学风险的运动原语进行了建模，以便在专业任务中进行检测，并根据欧洲装配工作表 (EAWS) 估计风险评分。使用以自我为中心的电视装配数据训练的深度学习手势识别模块来补充人类操作员和机器人之间的协作。此外，骨骼跟踪算法为机器人提供了有关操作员姿势的信息，使其能够在空间上适应操作员的人体测量数据。进行了三个实验来确定手势识别和空间适应对操作员运动范围的影响。空间适应率被用作关键绩效指标（KPI），本文提出了一种用于衡量操作员运动减少程度的新 KPI。 本文提出通过无接触手势识别和空间自适应技术优化人机协作中的任务分配，以降低工人肌肉骨骼疾病风险。 Brenda Elizabeth Olivas-Padilla,Dimitris Papanagiotou,Gavriela Senteri,Sotiris Manitsaris,Alina Glushkova cs.RO,cs.AI,cs.CV,cs.HC

authors_text: Tian Ye,Sixiang Chen,Yun Liu,Yi Ye,Erkang Chen,Yuche Li
title: Underwater Light Field Retention : Neural Rendering for Underwater Imaging
title_zh: 水下光场保留：水下成像的神经渲染
abstract: Underwater Image Rendering aims to generate a true-tolife underwater image from a given clean one, which could be applied to various practical applications such as underwater image enhancement, camera filter, and virtual gaming. We explore two less-touched but challenging problems in underwater image rendering, namely, i) how to render diverse underwater scenes by a single neural network? ii) how to adaptively learn the underwater light fields from natural exemplars, i,e., realistic underwater images? To this end, we propose a neural rendering method for underwater imaging, dubbed UWNR (Underwater Neural Rendering). Specifically, UWNR is a data-driven neural network that implicitly learns the natural degenerated model from authentic underwater images, avoiding introducing erroneous biases by hand-craft imaging models. Compared with existing underwater image generation methods, UWNR utilizes the natural light field to simulate the main characteristics ofthe underwater scene. Thus, it is able to synthesize a wide variety ofunderwater images from one clean image with various realistic underwater images. Extensive experiments demonstrate that our approach achieves better visual effects and quantitative metrics over previous methods. Moreover, we adopt UWNR to build an open Large Neural Rendering Underwater Dataset containing various types of water quality, dubbed LNRUD. The source code and LNRUD are available at https: //github.com/Ephemeral182/UWNR.
summary: Underwater Image Rendering aims to generate a true-tolife underwater image from a given clean one, which could be applied to various practical applications such as underwater image enhancement, camera filter, and virtual gaming. We explore two less-touched but challenging problems in underwater image rendering, namely, i) how to render diverse underwater scenes by a single neural network? ii) how to adaptively learn the underwater light fields from natural exemplars, i,e., realistic underwater images? To this end, we propose a neural rendering method for underwater imaging, dubbed UWNR (Underwater Neural Rendering). Specifically, UWNR is a data-driven neural network that implicitly learns the natural degenerated model from authentic underwater images, avoiding introducing erroneous biases by hand-craft imaging models. Compared with existing underwater image generation methods, UWNR utilizes the natural light field to simulate the main characteristics ofthe underwater scene. Thus, it is able to synthesize a wide variety ofunderwater images from one clean image with various realistic underwater images. Extensive experiments demonstrate that our approach achieves better visual effects and quantitative metrics over previous methods. Moreover, we adopt UWNR to build an open Large Neural Rendering Underwater Dataset containing various types of water quality, dubbed LNRUD. The source code and LNRUD are available at https: //github.com/Ephemeral182/UWNR.
abstract_zh: 水下图像渲染旨在从给定的干净水下图像生成逼真的水下图像，该图像可应用于各种实际应用，例如水下图像增强、相机滤镜和虚拟游戏。我们探索了水下图像渲染中两个较少接触但具有挑战性的问题，即，i）如何通过单个神经网络渲染不同的水下场景？ ii）如何从自然样本（即真实的水下图像）中自适应地学习水下光场？为此，我们提出了一种用于水下成像的神经渲染方法，称为UWNR（水下神经渲染）。具体来说，UWNR 是一种数据驱动的神经网络，它隐式地从真实的水下图像中学习自然退化模型，避免手工成像模型引入错误的偏差。与现有的水下图像生成方法相比，UWNR利用自然光场来模拟水下场景的主要特征。因此，它能够从一张干净的图像与各种逼真的水下图像合成各种水下图像。大量的实验表明，我们的方法比以前的方法实现了更好的视觉效果和定量指标。此外，我们采用UWNR构建了一个开放的大型神经渲染水下数据集，包含各种类型的水质，称为LNRUD。源代码和 LNRUD 可在 https://github.com/Ephemeral182/UWNR 获取。

AI.tldr: 提出一种神经渲染方法UWNR，解决水下图像渲染中的场景多样性生成和光场学习问题，生成逼真水下图像。
AI.motivation: 现有方法依赖手工模型易引入偏差，且难以处理场景多样性和光场学习，需数据驱动方法提升真实感。
AI.method: 提出数据驱动的UWNR，隐式学习真实退化模型，利用自然光场模拟水下场景，生成多样图像。
AI.result: 实验显示UWNR在视觉和定量指标上优于现有方法，并构建了包含多种水质的LNRUD数据集。
AI.conclusion: UWNR有效解决水下渲染挑战，验证方法有效性，并提供公开数据集促进研究。

authors_text: Andrew Fishberg,Jonathan P. How
title: Multi-Agent Relative Pose Estimation with UWB and Constrained Communications
title_zh: 使用 UWB 和受限通信的多智能体相对位姿估计
abstract: Inter-agent relative localization is critical for any multi-robot system operating in the absence of external positioning infrastructure or prior environmental knowledge. We propose a novel inter-agent relative 2D pose estimation system where each participating agent is equipped with several ultra-wideband (UWB) ranging tags. Prior work typically supplements noisy UWB range measurements with additional continuously transmitted data, such as odometry, making these approaches scale poorly with increased swarm size or decreased communication throughput. This approach addresses these concerns by using only locally collected UWB measurements with no additionally transmitted data. By modeling observed ranging biases and systematic antenna obstructions in our proposed optimization solution, our experimental results demonstrate an improved mean position error (while remaining competitive in other metrics) over a similar state-of-the-art approach that additionally relies on continuously transmitted odometry.
summary: Inter-agent relative localization is critical for any multi-robot system operating in the absence of external positioning infrastructure or prior environmental knowledge. We propose a novel inter-agent relative 2D pose estimation system where each participating agent is equipped with several ultra-wideband (UWB) ranging tags. Prior work typically supplements noisy UWB range measurements with additional continuously transmitted data, such as odometry, making these approaches scale poorly with increased swarm size or decreased communication throughput. This approach addresses these concerns by using only locally collected UWB measurements with no additionally transmitted data. By modeling observed ranging biases and systematic antenna obstructions in our proposed optimization solution, our experimental results demonstrate an improved mean position error (while remaining competitive in other metrics) over a similar state-of-the-art approach that additionally relies on continuously transmitted odometry.
abstract_zh: 对于在缺乏外部定位基础设施或先验环境知识的情况下运行的任何多机器人系统来说，代理间相对定位至关重要。我们提出了一种新颖的智能体间相对二维姿态估计系统，其中每个参与智能体都配备了多个超宽带（UWB）测距标签。先前的工作通常用额外的连续传输数据（例如里程计）来补充嘈杂的 UWB 范围测量，使得这些方法随着群体规模的增加或通信吞吐量的降低而扩展性较差。该方法通过仅使用本地收集的 UWB 测量值而不额外传输数据来解决这些问题。通过在我们提出的优化解决方案中对观察到的测距偏差和系统天线障碍物进行建模，我们的实验结果表明，与另外依赖于连续传输里程计的类似最先进方法相比，平均位置误差有所改善（同时在其他指标上保持竞争力）。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于UWB和受限通信的多智能体相对位姿估计方法，无需额外传输数据。
AI.motivation: 现有方法依赖连续传输的里程计数据，在通信受限或大规模群集场景下扩展性差。
AI.method: 仅利用本地UWB测距数据，通过建模测距偏差和天线遮挡进行优化求解。
AI.result: 实验显示平均位置误差优于现有方法，其他指标保持竞争力。
AI.conclusion: 该方法适用于通信受限的大规模多机器人系统，具有更好的扩展性。

authors_text: Chenyang Lu,Gijs Dubbelman
title: Self-Supervised Road Layout Parsing with Graph Auto-Encoding
title_zh: 带图自动编码的自监督道路布局解析
abstract: Aiming for higher-level scene understanding, this work presents a neural network approach that takes a road-layout map in bird's-eye-view as input, and predicts a human-interpretable graph that represents the road's topological layout. Our approach elevates the understanding of road layouts from pixel level to the level of graphs. To achieve this goal, an image-graph-image auto-encoder is utilized. The network is designed to learn to regress the graph representation at its auto-encoder bottleneck. This learning is self-supervised by an image reconstruction loss, without needing any external manual annotations. We create a synthetic dataset containing common road layout patterns and use it for training of the auto-encoder in addition to the real-world Argoverse dataset. By using this additional synthetic dataset, which conceptually captures human knowledge of road layouts and makes this available to the network for training, we are able to stabilize and further improve the performance of topological road layout understanding on the real-world Argoverse dataset. The evaluation shows that our approach exhibits comparable performance to a strong fully-supervised baseline.
summary: Aiming for higher-level scene understanding, this work presents a neural network approach that takes a road-layout map in bird's-eye-view as input, and predicts a human-interpretable graph that represents the road's topological layout. Our approach elevates the understanding of road layouts from pixel level to the level of graphs. To achieve this goal, an image-graph-image auto-encoder is utilized. The network is designed to learn to regress the graph representation at its auto-encoder bottleneck. This learning is self-supervised by an image reconstruction loss, without needing any external manual annotations. We create a synthetic dataset containing common road layout patterns and use it for training of the auto-encoder in addition to the real-world Argoverse dataset. By using this additional synthetic dataset, which conceptually captures human knowledge of road layouts and makes this available to the network for training, we are able to stabilize and further improve the performance of topological road layout understanding on the real-world Argoverse dataset. The evaluation shows that our approach exhibits comparable performance to a strong fully-supervised baseline.
abstract_zh: 为了实现更高层次的场景理解，这项工作提出了一种神经网络方法，该方法以鸟瞰图的道路布局图作为输入，并预测代表道路拓扑布局的人类可解释的图。我们的方法将道路布局的理解从像素级别提升到图表级别。为了实现这一目标，使用了图像-图-图像自动编码器。该网络旨在学习在其自动编码器瓶颈处回归图表示。这种学习是通过图像重建损失进行自我监督的，不需要任何外部手动注释。我们创建一个包含常见道路布局模式的合成数据集，除了现实世界的 Argoverse 数据集之外，还用它来训练自动编码器。通过使用这个附加的合成数据集（从概念上捕获人类对道路布局的知识并将其提供给网络进行训练），我们能够稳定并进一步提高对现实世界 Argoverse 数据集的拓扑道路布局理解的性能。评估表明，我们的方法表现出与强大的完全监督基线相当的性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种自监督神经网络方法，将鸟瞰图道路布局解析为可解释的图结构，实现从像素级到拓扑级的道路理解。
AI.motivation: 传统道路布局理解依赖像素级标注，缺乏对拓扑结构的高层抽象。通过自监督学习减少对人工标注的依赖，利用合成数据增强模型泛化能力。
AI.method: 设计图像-图-图像自编码器，通过中间层回归图表示，结合合成道路数据集与真实Argoverse数据集训练，利用图像重建损失实现自监督学习。
AI.result: 在Argoverse数据集上达到与全监督基线相当的性能，合成数据有效提升模型稳定性与拓扑理解能力。
AI.conclusion: 自监督图自编码框架可有效解析道路拓扑结构，合成数据作为先验知识补充能显著提升模型性能，为少标注场景提供新思路。

ai_content.tldr: 本文提出一种自监督神经网络方法，将鸟瞰图道路布局解析为可解释的图结构，实现从像素级到拓扑级的道路理解。
ai_content.motivation: 传统道路布局理解依赖像素级标注，缺乏对拓扑结构的高层抽象。通过自监督学习减少对人工标注的依赖，利用合成数据增强模型泛化能力。
ai_content.method: 设计图像-图-图像自编码器，通过中间层回归图表示，结合合成道路数据集与真实Argoverse数据集训练，利用图像重建损失实现自监督学习。
ai_content.result: 在Argoverse数据集上达到与全监督基线相当的性能，合成数据有效提升模型稳定性与拓扑理解能力。
ai_content.conclusion: 自监督图自编码框架可有效解析道路拓扑结构，合成数据作为先验知识补充能显著提升模型性能，为少标注场景提供新思路。

search_text: Self-Supervised Road Layout Parsing with Graph Auto-Encoding 带图自动编码的自监督道路布局解析 Aiming for higher-level scene understanding, this work presents a neural network approach that takes a road-layout map in bird's-eye-view as input, and predicts a human-interpretable graph that represents the road's topological layout. Our approach elevates the understanding of road layouts from pixel level to the level of graphs. To achieve this goal, an image-graph-image auto-encoder is utilized. The network is designed to learn to regress the graph representation at its auto-encoder bottleneck. This learning is self-supervised by an image reconstruction loss, without needing any external manual annotations. We create a synthetic dataset containing common road layout patterns and use it for training of the auto-encoder in addition to the real-world Argoverse dataset. By using this additional synthetic dataset, which conceptually captures human knowledge of road layouts and makes this available to the network for training, we are able to stabilize and further improve the performance of topological road layout understanding on the real-world Argoverse dataset. The evaluation shows that our approach exhibits comparable performance to a strong fully-supervised baseline. 为了实现更高层次的场景理解，这项工作提出了一种神经网络方法，该方法以鸟瞰图的道路布局图作为输入，并预测代表道路拓扑布局的人类可解释的图。我们的方法将道路布局的理解从像素级别提升到图表级别。为了实现这一目标，使用了图像-图-图像自动编码器。该网络旨在学习在其自动编码器瓶颈处回归图表示。这种学习是通过图像重建损失进行自我监督的，不需要任何外部手动注释。我们创建一个包含常见道路布局模式的合成数据集，除了现实世界的 Argoverse 数据集之外，还用它来训练自动编码器。通过使用这个附加的合成数据集（从概念上捕获人类对道路布局的知识并将其提供给网络进行训练），我们能够稳定并进一步提高对现实世界 Argoverse 数据集的拓扑道路布局理解的性能。评估表明，我们的方法表现出与强大的完全监督基线相当的性能。 本文提出一种自监督神经网络方法，将鸟瞰图道路布局解析为可解释的图结构，实现从像素级到拓扑级的道路理解。 Chenyang Lu,Gijs Dubbelman cs.CV,cs.RO

authors_text: Jinseok Seol,Seongjae Kim,Sungchan Park,Holim Lim,Hyunsoo Na,Eunyoung Park,Dohee Jung,Soyoung Park,Kangwoo Lee,Sang-goo Lee
title: Technologies for AI-Driven Fashion Social Networking Service with E-Commerce
title_zh: 人工智能驱动的时尚社交网络服务与电子商务技术
comment: 16 pages, accepted in International Semantic Intelligence Conference (ISIC) 2022, The Applications and Deployment Track
comments: 16 pages, accepted in International Semantic Intelligence Conference (ISIC) 2022, The Applications and Deployment Track
abstract: The rapid growth of the online fashion market brought demands for innovative fashion services and commerce platforms. With the recent success of deep learning, many applications employ AI technologies such as visual search and recommender systems to provide novel and beneficial services. In this paper, we describe applied technologies for AI-driven fashion social networking service that incorporate fashion e-commerce. In the application, people can share and browse their outfit-of-the-day (OOTD) photos, while AI analyzes them and suggests similar style OOTDs and related products. To this end, we trained deep learning based AI models for fashion and integrated them to build a fashion visual search system and a recommender system for OOTD. With aforementioned technologies, the AI-driven fashion SNS platform, iTOO, has been successfully launched.
summary: The rapid growth of the online fashion market brought demands for innovative fashion services and commerce platforms. With the recent success of deep learning, many applications employ AI technologies such as visual search and recommender systems to provide novel and beneficial services. In this paper, we describe applied technologies for AI-driven fashion social networking service that incorporate fashion e-commerce. In the application, people can share and browse their outfit-of-the-day (OOTD) photos, while AI analyzes them and suggests similar style OOTDs and related products. To this end, we trained deep learning based AI models for fashion and integrated them to build a fashion visual search system and a recommender system for OOTD. With aforementioned technologies, the AI-driven fashion SNS platform, iTOO, has been successfully launched.
abstract_zh: 在线时尚市场的快速增长带来了对创新时尚服务和商业平台的需求。随着深度学习最近的成功，许多应用程序采用视觉搜索和推荐系统等人工智能技术来提供新颖且有益的服务。在本文中，我们描述了结合时尚电子商务的人工智能驱动的时尚社交网络服务的应用技术。在该应用程序中，人们可以分享和浏览他们的当日服装 (OOTD) 照片，而人工智能会对其进行分析并推荐类似风格的 OOTD 和相关产品。为此，我们训练了基于深度学习的时尚人工智能模型，并将它们集成起来构建了时尚视觉搜索系统和 OOTD 推荐系统。凭借上述技术，人工智能驱动的时尚SNS平台iTOO已成功上线。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种结合人工智能技术的时尚社交网络服务平台，并整合电子商务功能，通过视觉搜索和推荐系统提升用户体验。
AI.motivation: 在线时尚市场快速增长，传统平台在个性化推荐和视觉搜索能力上存在不足，需借助AI技术满足用户需求。
AI.method: 基于深度学习训练时尚领域AI模型，构建视觉搜索系统与OOTD推荐系统，整合至社交平台iTOO中。
AI.result: 成功开发并上线AI驱动的时尚社交电商服务iTOO，实现用户OOTD分享与智能推荐功能。
AI.conclusion: AI技术有效提升了时尚社交平台的个性化服务能力，验证了深度学习在电商场景中的商业价值。

authors_text: Xuechen Liu,Md Sahidullah,Tomi Kinnunen
title: Spoofing-Aware Speaker Verification with Unsupervised Domain Adaptation
title_zh: 具有无监督域适应的欺骗感知说话人验证
abstract: In this paper, we initiate the concern of enhancing the spoofing robustness of the automatic speaker verification (ASV) system, without the primary presence of a separate countermeasure module. We start from the standard ASV framework of the ASVspoof 2019 baseline and approach the problem from the back-end classifier based on probabilistic linear discriminant analysis. We employ three unsupervised domain adaptation techniques to optimize the back-end using the audio data in the training partition of the ASVspoof 2019 dataset. We demonstrate notable improvements on both logical and physical access scenarios, especially on the latter where the system is attacked by replayed audios, with a maximum of 36.1% and 5.3% relative improvement on bonafide and spoofed cases, respectively. We perform additional studies such as per-attack breakdown analysis, data composition, and integration with a countermeasure system at score-level with Gaussian back-end.
summary: In this paper, we initiate the concern of enhancing the spoofing robustness of the automatic speaker verification (ASV) system, without the primary presence of a separate countermeasure module. We start from the standard ASV framework of the ASVspoof 2019 baseline and approach the problem from the back-end classifier based on probabilistic linear discriminant analysis. We employ three unsupervised domain adaptation techniques to optimize the back-end using the audio data in the training partition of the ASVspoof 2019 dataset. We demonstrate notable improvements on both logical and physical access scenarios, especially on the latter where the system is attacked by replayed audios, with a maximum of 36.1% and 5.3% relative improvement on bonafide and spoofed cases, respectively. We perform additional studies such as per-attack breakdown analysis, data composition, and integration with a countermeasure system at score-level with Gaussian back-end.
abstract_zh: 在本文中，我们提出了增强自动说话人验证（ASV）系统的欺骗鲁棒性的关注，而无需主要存在单独的对策模块。我们从 ASVspoof 2019 基线的标准 ASV 框架开始，基于概率线性判别分析从后端分类器处理问题。我们采用三种无监督域适应技术，使用 ASVspoof 2019 数据集训练分区中的音频数据来优化后端。我们在逻辑和物理访问场景上都展示了显着的改进，特别是在后者系统受到重放音频攻击的情况下，善意和欺骗情况下的相对改进最大分别为 36.1% 和 5.3%。我们进行了其他研究，例如每次攻击故障分析、数据组合以及与高斯后端得分级别的对策系统的集成。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种无需独立反制模块的防欺骗说话人验证方法，通过无监督领域自适应技术提升系统鲁棒性。
AI.motivation: 现有说话人验证系统在面对重放等物理攻击时易受欺骗，传统方法依赖独立反制模块存在效率瓶颈，需探索更高效的集成方案。
AI.method: 基于ASVspoof 2019基线框架，采用概率线性判别分析后端分类器，结合三种无监督领域自适应技术优化模型，利用训练集音频数据提升系统对欺骗攻击的识别能力。
AI.result: 在逻辑和物理攻击场景下分别实现36.1%和5.3%的相对性能提升，尤其在重放攻击中效果显著，并通过攻击类型细分分析和与反制系统的融合验证了方法有效性。
AI.conclusion: 无监督领域自适应技术能有效增强说话人验证系统的防欺骗能力，无需独立反制模块即可实现性能提升，为实际部署提供了更简洁的解决方案。

We perform additional studies such as per-attack breakdown analysis, data composition, and integration with a countermeasure system at score-level with Gaussian back-end. 在本文中，我们提出了增强自动说话人验证（ASV）系统的欺骗鲁棒性的关注，而无需主要存在单独的对策模块。我们从 ASVspoof 2019 基线的标准 ASV 框架开始，基于概率线性判别分析从后端分类器处理问题。我们采用三种无监督域适应技术，使用 ASVspoof 2019 数据集训练分区中的音频数据来优化后端。我们在逻辑和物理访问场景上都展示了显着的改进，特别是在后者系统受到重放音频攻击的情况下，善意和欺骗情况下的相对改进最大分别为 36.1% 和 5.3%。我们进行了其他研究，例如每次攻击故障分析、数据组合以及与高斯后端得分级别的对策系统的集成。 本文提出一种无需独立反制模块的防欺骗说话人验证方法，通过无监督领域自适应技术提升系统鲁棒性。 Xuechen Liu,Md Sahidullah,Tomi Kinnunen cs.SD,cs.AI,eess.AS

authors_text: Brian Chmiel,Itay Hubara,Ron Banner,Daniel Soudry
title: Minimum Variance Unbiased N:M Sparsity for the Neural Gradients
title_zh: 神经梯度的最小方差无偏 N:M 稀疏性
abstract: In deep learning, fine-grained N:M sparsity reduces the data footprint and bandwidth of a General Matrix multiply (GEMM) up to x2, and doubles throughput by skipping computation of zero values. So far, it was mainly only used to prune weights to accelerate the forward and backward phases. We examine how this method can be used also for the neural gradients (i.e., loss gradients with respect to the intermediate neural layer outputs). To this end, we first establish a tensor-level optimality criteria. Previous works aimed to minimize the mean-square-error (MSE) of each pruned block. We show that while minimization of the MSE works fine for pruning the weights and activations, it catastrophically fails for the neural gradients. Instead, we show that accurate pruning of the neural gradients requires an unbiased minimum-variance pruning mask. We design such specialized masks, and find that in most cases, 1:2 sparsity is sufficient for training, and 2:4 sparsity is usually enough when this is not the case. Further, we suggest combining several such methods together in order to potentially speed up training even more.
summary: In deep learning, fine-grained N:M sparsity reduces the data footprint and bandwidth of a General Matrix multiply (GEMM) up to x2, and doubles throughput by skipping computation of zero values. So far, it was mainly only used to prune weights to accelerate the forward and backward phases. We examine how this method can be used also for the neural gradients (i.e., loss gradients with respect to the intermediate neural layer outputs). To this end, we first establish a tensor-level optimality criteria. Previous works aimed to minimize the mean-square-error (MSE) of each pruned block. We show that while minimization of the MSE works fine for pruning the weights and activations, it catastrophically fails for the neural gradients. Instead, we show that accurate pruning of the neural gradients requires an unbiased minimum-variance pruning mask. We design such specialized masks, and find that in most cases, 1:2 sparsity is sufficient for training, and 2:4 sparsity is usually enough when this is not the case. Further, we suggest combining several such methods together in order to potentially speed up training even more.
abstract_zh: 在深度学习中，细粒度的 N:M 稀疏性将通用矩阵乘法 (GEMM) 的数据占用空间和带宽减少至 2 倍，并通过跳过零值计算使吞吐量加倍。到目前为止，它主要仅用于修剪权重以加速前向和后向阶段。我们研究了如何将该方法也用于神经梯度（即相对于中间神经层输出的损失梯度）。为此，我们首先建立张量级最优性标准。之前的工作旨在最小化每个修剪块的均方误差（MSE）。我们表明，虽然 MSE 的最小化对于修剪权重和激活效果很好，但它对于神经梯度却灾难性地失败了。相反，我们表明神经梯度的准确修剪需要无偏的最小方差修剪掩模。我们设计了这种专门的掩模，发现在大多数情况下，1:2 的稀疏度足以进行训练，而当情况并非如此时，2:4 的稀疏度通常就足够了。此外，我们建议将几种此类方法结合在一起，以便有可能进一步加快训练速度。

AI.tldr: 本文研究如何将N:M稀疏化技术应用于神经网络梯度计算，以提高训练效率。
AI.motivation: 现有N:M稀疏化方法在剪枝权重和激活值时有效，但直接用于梯度计算会导致精度灾难，需设计新的无偏剪枝策略。
AI.method: 提出基于张量级最优性的无偏最小方差剪枝掩码，通过1:2/2:4稀疏度实现梯度剪枝，并建议组合多种方法加速训练。
AI.result: 实验表明1:2稀疏度通常足够训练，2:4稀疏度可作为补充，组合方法能进一步提升训练速度。
AI.conclusion: 无偏最小方差剪枝可有效稀疏化神经梯度，在保持精度的同时显著提升训练吞吐量。

authors_text: Sepehr Assadi,Pankaj Kumar,Parth Mittal
title: Brooks' Theorem in Graph Streams: A Single-Pass Semi-Streaming Algorithm for $Δ$-Coloring
title_zh: 图流中的布鲁克斯定理：$Δ$ 着色的单通道半流算法
comment: Journal version in TheoretiCS. An extended abstract appeared in STOC 2022. 66 pages, 10 figures
comments: Journal version in TheoretiCS. An extended abstract appeared in STOC 2022. 66 pages, 10 figures
abstract: Every graph with maximum degree $Δ$ can be colored with $(Δ+1)$ colors using a simple greedy algorithm. Remarkably, recent work has shown that one can find such a coloring even in the semi-streaming model. But, in reality, one almost never needs $(Δ+1)$ colors to properly color a graph. Indeed, the celebrated \Brooks' theorem states that every (connected) graph beside cliques and odd cycles can be colored with $Δ$ colors. Can we find a $Δ$-coloring in the semi-streaming model as well? We settle this key question in the affirmative by designing a randomized semi-streaming algorithm that given any graph, with high probability, either correctly declares that the graph is not $Δ$-colorable or outputs a $Δ$-coloring of the graph. The proof of this result starts with a detour. We first (provably) identify the extent to which the previous approaches for streaming coloring fail for $Δ$-coloring: for instance, all these approaches can handle streams with repeated edges and they can run in $o(n^2)$ time -- we prove that neither of these tasks is possible for $Δ$-coloring. These impossibility results however pinpoint exactly what is missing from prior approaches when it comes to $Δ$-coloring. We then build on these insights to design a semi-streaming algorithm that uses $(i)$ a novel sparse-recovery approach based on sparse-dense decompositions to (partially) recover the "problematic" subgraphs of the input -- the ones that form the basis of our impossibility results -- and $(ii)$ a new coloring approach for these subgraphs that allows for recoloring of other vertices in a controlled way without relying on local explorations or finding "augmenting paths" that are generally impossible for semi-streaming algorithms. We believe both these techniques can be of independent interest.
summary: Every graph with maximum degree $Δ$ can be colored with $(Δ+1)$ colors using a simple greedy algorithm. Remarkably, recent work has shown that one can find such a coloring even in the semi-streaming model. But, in reality, one almost never needs $(Δ+1)$ colors to properly color a graph. Indeed, the celebrated \Brooks' theorem states that every (connected) graph beside cliques and odd cycles can be colored with $Δ$ colors. Can we find a $Δ$-coloring in the semi-streaming model as well? We settle this key question in the affirmative by designing a randomized semi-streaming algorithm that given any graph, with high probability, either correctly declares that the graph is not $Δ$-colorable or outputs a $Δ$-coloring of the graph. The proof of this result starts with a detour. We first (provably) identify the extent to which the previous approaches for streaming coloring fail for $Δ$-coloring: for instance, all these approaches can handle streams with repeated edges and they can run in $o(n^2)$ time -- we prove that neither of these tasks is possible for $Δ$-coloring. These impossibility results however pinpoint exactly what is missing from prior approaches when it comes to $Δ$-coloring. We then build on these insights to design a semi-streaming algorithm that uses $(i)$ a novel sparse-recovery approach based on sparse-dense decompositions to (partially) recover the "problematic" subgraphs of the input -- the ones that form the basis of our impossibility results -- and $(ii)$ a new coloring approach for these subgraphs that allows for recoloring of other vertices in a controlled way without relying on local explorations or finding "augmenting paths" that are generally impossible for semi-streaming algorithms. We believe both these techniques can be of independent interest.
abstract_zh: 每个具有最大度 $Δ$ 的图都可以使用简单的贪婪算法用 $(Δ+1)$ 颜色进行着色。值得注意的是，最近的工作表明，即使在半流模型中也可以找到这种着色。但实际上，人们几乎从不需要 $(Δ+1)$ 颜色来为图表正确着色。事实上，著名的布鲁克斯定理指出，除派系和奇数循环之外的每个（连接的）图都可以用 $Δ$ 颜色着色。我们能否在半流模型中找到 $Δ$ 着色？我们通过设计一种随机半流算法肯定地解决了这个关键问题，该算法给定任何图，以高概率正确声明该图不可 $Δ$ 着色，或者输出该图的 $Δ$ 着色。这个结果的证明是从迂回开始的。我们首先（可证明）确定以前的流式着色方法对于 $Δ$ 着色失败的程度：例如，所有这些方法都可以处理具有重复边缘的流，并且它们可以在 $o(n^2)$ 时间内运行 - 我们证明这些任务对于 $Δ$ 着色都是不可能的。然而，这些不可能的结果准确地指出了先前方法在 $Δ$ 着色方面所缺少的内容。然后，我们在这些见解的基础上设计了一种半流算法，该算法使用 $(i)$ 一种基于稀疏-密集分解的新颖稀疏恢复方法来（部分）恢复输入的“有问题”子图（构成我们不可能结果的基础）和 $(ii)$ 一种针对这些子图的新着色方法，该方法允许以受控方式对其他顶点重新着色，而无需依赖局部探索或寻找“增强”路径”，这对于半流算法来说通常是不可能的。我们相信这两种技术都具有独立的意义。

AI.tldr: 本文设计了一种单次通过的半流式算法，在流式图模型中实现Δ-着色，突破了传统Δ+1颜色限制。
AI.motivation: Brooks定理表明除完全图和奇环外的图均可Δ-着色，但现有流式算法无法有效处理Δ-着色问题，需探索新方法。
AI.method: 提出基于稀疏-密集分解的稀疏恢复技术，识别关键子图并结合新型着色策略，避免局部探索与增广路径依赖。
AI.result: 开发出半流式随机算法，可高效判定图是否Δ-着色或输出Δ-着色方案，突破流式模型中重复边处理与时间复杂度限制。
AI.conclusion: 该算法首次在半流式模型中实现Δ-着色，其稀疏恢复与着色技术对流式图处理具有独立研究价值。

authors_text: Cheng Wan,Youjie Li,Ang Li,Nam Sung Kim,Yingyan Lin
title: BNS-GCN: Efficient Full-Graph Training of Graph Convolutional Networks with Partition-Parallelism and Random Boundary Node Sampling
title_zh: BNS-GCN：具有分区并行性和随机边界节点采样的图卷积网络的高效全图训练
abstract: Graph Convolutional Networks (GCNs) have emerged as the state-of-the-art method for graph-based learning tasks. However, training GCNs at scale is still challenging, hindering both the exploration of more sophisticated GCN architectures and their applications to real-world large graphs. While it might be natural to consider graph partition and distributed training for tackling this challenge, this direction has only been slightly scratched the surface in the previous works due to the limitations of existing designs. In this work, we first analyze why distributed GCN training is ineffective and identify the underlying cause to be the excessive number of boundary nodes of each partitioned subgraph, which easily explodes the memory and communication costs for GCN training. Furthermore, we propose a simple yet effective method dubbed BNS-GCN that adopts random Boundary-Node-Sampling to enable efficient and scalable distributed GCN training. Experiments and ablation studies consistently validate the effectiveness of BNS-GCN, e.g., boosting the throughput by up to 16.2x and reducing the memory usage by up to 58%, while maintaining a full-graph accuracy. Furthermore, both theoretical and empirical analysis show that BNS-GCN enjoys a better convergence than existing sampling-based methods. We believe that our BNS-GCN has opened up a new paradigm for enabling GCN training at scale. The code is available at https://github.com/RICE-EIC/BNS-GCN.
summary: Graph Convolutional Networks (GCNs) have emerged as the state-of-the-art method for graph-based learning tasks. However, training GCNs at scale is still challenging, hindering both the exploration of more sophisticated GCN architectures and their applications to real-world large graphs. In this work, we first analyze why distributed GCN training is ineffective and identify the underlying cause to be the excessive number of boundary nodes of each partitioned subgraph, which easily explodes the memory and communication costs for GCN training. Furthermore, we propose a simple yet effective method dubbed BNS-GCN that adopts random Boundary-Node-Sampling to enable efficient and scalable distributed GCN training. Experiments and ablation studies consistently validate the effectiveness of BNS-GCN, e.g., boosting the throughput by up to 16.2x and reducing the memory usage by up to 58%, while maintaining a full-graph accuracy. Furthermore, both theoretical and empirical analysis show that BNS-GCN enjoys a better convergence than existing sampling-based methods. We believe that our BNS-GCN has opened up a new paradigm for enabling GCN training at scale. The code is available at https://github.com/RICE-EIC/BNS-GCN.
abstract_zh: 图卷积网络（GCN）已成为基于图的学​​习任务的最先进方法。然而，大规模训练 GCN 仍然具有挑战性，阻碍了对更复杂的 GCN 架构的探索及其在现实世界大图中的应用。虽然考虑图分区和分布式训练来应对这一挑战可能是很自然的，但由于现有设计的限制，这个方向在之前的工作中只触及了表面。在这项工作中，我们首先分析了为什么分布式 GCN 训练无效，并确定其根本原因是每个分区子图的边界节点数量过多，这很容易导致 GCN 训练的内存和通信成本爆炸。此外，我们提出了一种简单而有效的方法，称为 BNS-GCN，它采用随机边界节点采样来实现高效且可扩展的分布式 GCN 训练。实验和消融研究一致验证了 BNS-GCN 的有效性，例如，将吞吐量提高高达 16.2 倍，将内存使用量降低高达 58%，同时保持全图精度。此外，理论和实证分析都表明，BNS-GCN 比现有的基于采样的方法具有更好的收敛性。我们相信，我们的 BNS-GCN 为大规模 GCN 训练开辟了新的范式。代码可在 https://github.com/RICE-EIC/BNS-GCN 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出BNS-GCN方法，通过分区并行和随机边界节点采样，实现图卷积网络的高效全图训练。
AI.motivation: 现有分布式GCN训练因子图边界节点过多导致内存和通信成本过高，难以扩展至大规模真实图应用。
AI.method: 分析边界节点过多的根源，设计随机边界节点采样策略，结合分区并行机制降低训练开销。
AI.result: 吞吐量提升16.2倍，内存消耗减少58%，保持全图精度，理论与实验均验证收敛性优于现有采样方法。
AI.conclusion: BNS-GCN为大规模GCN训练开辟了新范式，代码已开源。

authors_text: Kuan-Chih Huang,Tsung-Han Wu,Hung-Ting Su,Winston H. Hsu
title: MonoDTR: Monocular 3D Object Detection with Depth-Aware Transformer
title_zh: MonoDTR：使用深度感知变压器的单目 3D 物体检测
abstract: Monocular 3D object detection is an important yet challenging task in autonomous driving. Some existing methods leverage depth information from an off-the-shelf depth estimator to assist 3D detection, but suffer from the additional computational burden and achieve limited performance caused by inaccurate depth priors. To alleviate this, we propose MonoDTR, a novel end-to-end depth-aware transformer network for monocular 3D object detection. It mainly consists of two components: (1) the Depth-Aware Feature Enhancement (DFE) module that implicitly learns depth-aware features with auxiliary supervision without requiring extra computation, and (2) the Depth-Aware Transformer (DTR) module that globally integrates context- and depth-aware features. Moreover, different from conventional pixel-wise positional encodings, we introduce a novel depth positional encoding (DPE) to inject depth positional hints into transformers. Our proposed depth-aware modules can be easily plugged into existing image-only monocular 3D object detectors to improve the performance. Extensive experiments on the KITTI dataset demonstrate that our approach outperforms previous state-of-the-art monocular-based methods and achieves real-time detection. Code is available at https://github.com/kuanchihhuang/MonoDTR
summary: Monocular 3D object detection is an important yet challenging task in autonomous driving. Some existing methods leverage depth information from an off-the-shelf depth estimator to assist 3D detection, but suffer from the additional computational burden and achieve limited performance caused by inaccurate depth priors. To alleviate this, we propose MonoDTR, a novel end-to-end depth-aware transformer network for monocular 3D object detection. It mainly consists of two components: (1) the Depth-Aware Feature Enhancement (DFE) module that implicitly learns depth-aware features with auxiliary supervision without requiring extra computation, and (2) the Depth-Aware Transformer (DTR) module that globally integrates context- and depth-aware features. Moreover, different from conventional pixel-wise positional encodings, we introduce a novel depth positional encoding (DPE) to inject depth positional hints into transformers. Our proposed depth-aware modules can be easily plugged into existing image-only monocular 3D object detectors to improve the performance. Extensive experiments on the KITTI dataset demonstrate that our approach outperforms previous state-of-the-art monocular-based methods and achieves real-time detection. Code is available at https://github.com/kuanchihhuang/MonoDTR
abstract_zh: 单目 3D 物体检测是自动驾驶中一项重要但具有挑战性的任务。一些现有方法利用来自现成深度估计器的深度信息来辅助 3D 检测，但会遭受额外的计算负担，并且由于深度先验不准确而导致性能有限。为了缓解这个问题，我们提出了 MonoDTR，这是一种用于单目 3D 对象检测的新型端到端深度感知变换器网络。它主要由两个组件组成：（1）深度感知特征增强（DFE）模块，通过辅助监督隐式学习深度感知特征，无需额外计算；（2）深度感知变换器（DTR）模块，全局集成上下文和深度感知特征。此外，与传统的逐像素位置编码不同，我们引入了一种新颖的深度位置编码（DPE），将深度位置提示注入变压器中。我们提出的深度感知模块可以轻松插入现有的仅图像单目 3D 物体检测器，以提高性能。对 KITTI 数据集的大量实验表明，我们的方法优于以前最先进的基于单目的方法，并实现了实时检测。代码可在 https://github.com/kuanchihhuang/MonoDTR 获取

AI.tldr: 本文提出MonoDTR，一种基于深度感知Transformer的单目3D目标检测方法，通过隐式学习深度感知特征和全局整合上下文信息提升检测性能。
AI.motivation: 现有单目3D检测方法依赖外部深度估计器，导致计算负担重且因深度先验不准确而性能受限，需更高效且准确的解决方案。
AI.method: 设计深度感知特征增强模块（DFE）隐式学习深度特征，结合深度感知Transformer（DTR）模块全局整合上下文与深度信息，并引入深度位置编码（DPE）替代传统像素级编码。
AI.result: 在KITTI数据集上优于现有单目方法，实现实时检测，代码已开源。
AI.conclusion: MonoDTR通过深度感知模块有效提升单目3D检测性能，且可无缝集成至现有检测框架中。

authors_text: Nicolás Gaggion,Lucas Mansilla,Candelaria Mosquera,Diego H. Milone,Enzo Ferrante
title: Improving anatomical plausibility in medical image segmentation via hybrid graph neural networks: applications to chest x-ray analysis
title_zh: 通过混合图神经网络提高医学图像分割的解剖合理性：在胸部 X 射线分析中的应用
comment: Source code at https://github.com/ngaggion/HybridGNet Accepted for publication at IEEE TMI
comments: Source code at https://github.com/ngaggion/HybridGNet Accepted for publication at IEEE TMI
abstract: Anatomical segmentation is a fundamental task in medical image computing, generally tackled with fully convolutional neural networks which produce dense segmentation masks. These models are often trained with loss functions such as cross-entropy or Dice, which assume pixels to be independent of each other, thus ignoring topological errors and anatomical inconsistencies. We address this limitation by moving from pixel-level to graph representations, which allow to naturally incorporate anatomical constraints by construction. To this end, we introduce HybridGNet, an encoder-decoder neural architecture that leverages standard convolutions for image feature encoding and graph convolutional neural networks (GCNNs) to decode plausible representations of anatomical structures. We also propose a novel image-to-graph skip connection layer which allows localized features to flow from standard convolutional blocks to GCNN blocks, and show that it improves segmentation accuracy. The proposed architecture is extensively evaluated in a variety of domain shift and image occlusion scenarios, and audited considering different types of demographic domain shift. Our comprehensive experimental setup compares HybridGNet with other landmark and pixel-based models for anatomical segmentation in chest x-ray images, and shows that it produces anatomically plausible results in challenging scenarios where other models tend to fail.
summary: Anatomical segmentation is a fundamental task in medical image computing, generally tackled with fully convolutional neural networks which produce dense segmentation masks. These models are often trained with loss functions such as cross-entropy or Dice, which assume pixels to be independent of each other, thus ignoring topological errors and anatomical inconsistencies. We address this limitation by moving from pixel-level to graph representations, which allow to naturally incorporate anatomical constraints by construction. To this end, we introduce HybridGNet, an encoder-decoder neural architecture that leverages standard convolutions for image feature encoding and graph convolutional neural networks (GCNNs) to decode plausible representations of anatomical structures. We also propose a novel image-to-graph skip connection layer which allows localized features to flow from standard convolutional blocks to GCNN blocks, and show that it improves segmentation accuracy. The proposed architecture is extensively evaluated in a variety of domain shift and image occlusion scenarios, and audited considering different types of demographic domain shift. Our comprehensive experimental setup compares HybridGNet with other landmark and pixel-based models for anatomical segmentation in chest x-ray images, and shows that it produces anatomically plausible results in challenging scenarios where other models tend to fail.
abstract_zh: 解剖分割是医学图像计算中的一项基本任务，通常通过产生密集分割掩模的全卷积神经网络来解决。这些模型通常使用交叉熵或 Dice 等损失函数进行训练，这些函数假设像素彼此独立，从而忽略拓扑错误和解剖学不一致。我们通过从像素级转向图形表示来解决这一限制，这允许通过构造自然地合并解剖学约束。为此，我们引入了 HybridGNet，这是一种编码器-解码器神经架构，它利用标准卷积进行图像特征编码和图卷积神经网络（GCNN）来解码解剖结构的合理表示。我们还提出了一种新颖的图像到图跳跃连接层，它允许局部特征从标准卷积块流到 GCNN 块，并表明它提高了分割精度。所提出的架构在各种域转移和图像遮挡场景中进行了广泛评估，并考虑不同类型的人口统计域转移进行审核。我们全面的实验设置将 HybridGNet 与其他用于胸部 X 射线图像解剖分割的标志性和基于像素的模型进行了比较，并表明它在其他模型往往失败的具有挑战性的场景中产生了解剖学上合理的结果。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种混合图神经网络HybridGNet，通过结合卷积神经网络与图卷积网络，提升医学图像分割中的解剖学合理性，应用于胸部X光分析。
AI.motivation: 传统全卷积网络在医学图像分割中忽略像素间的拓扑关系和解剖学约束，导致分割结果存在结构不合理问题，需引入图表示以自然整合解剖学先验知识。
AI.method: 设计HybridGNet编码-解码架构，利用标准卷积提取图像特征，图卷积网络解码结构化表示，并提出图像到图的跳跃连接层以传递局部特征。
AI.result: 在领域偏移和图像遮挡场景下，HybridGNet相较其他模型显著提升分割准确性，尤其在复杂情况下保持解剖学合理性。
AI.conclusion: 混合图神经网络通过整合解剖学约束有效提升医学图像分割质量，为处理领域偏移等挑战性场景提供新方法。

search_text: Improving anatomical plausibility in medical image segmentation via hybrid graph neural networks: applications to chest x-ray analysis 通过混合图神经网络提高医学图像分割的解剖合理性：在胸部 X 射线分析中的应用 Anatomical segmentation is a fundamental task in medical image computing, generally tackled with fully convolutional neural networks which produce dense segmentation masks. These models are often trained with loss functions such as cross-entropy or Dice, which assume pixels to be independent of each other, thus ignoring topological errors and anatomical inconsistencies. We address this limitation by moving from pixel-level to graph representations, which allow to naturally incorporate anatomical constraints by construction. To this end, we introduce HybridGNet, an encoder-decoder neural architecture that leverages standard convolutions for image feature encoding and graph convolutional neural networks (GCNNs) to decode plausible representations of anatomical structures. We also propose a novel image-to-graph skip connection layer which allows localized features to flow from standard convolutional blocks to GCNN blocks, and show that it improves segmentation accuracy. The proposed architecture is extensively evaluated in a variety of domain shift and image occlusion scenarios, and audited considering different types of demographic domain shift. Our comprehensive experimental setup compares HybridGNet with other landmark and pixel-based models for anatomical segmentation in chest x-ray images, and shows that it produces anatomically plausible results in challenging scenarios where other models tend to fail. 解剖分割是医学图像计算中的一项基本任务，通常通过产生密集分割掩模的全卷积神经网络来解决。这些模型通常使用交叉熵或 Dice 等损失函数进行训练，这些函数假设像素彼此独立，从而忽略拓扑错误和解剖学不一致。我们通过从像素级转向图形表示来解决这一限制，这允许通过构造自然地合并解剖学约束。为此，我们引入了 HybridGNet，这是一种编码器-解码器神经架构，它利用标准卷积进行图像特征编码和图卷积神经网络（GCNN）来解码解剖结构的合理表示。我们还提出了一种新颖的图像到图跳跃连接层，它允许局部特征从标准卷积块流到 GCNN 块，并表明它提高了分割精度。所提出的架构在各种域转移和图像遮挡场景中进行了广泛评估，并考虑不同类型的人口统计域转移进行审核。我们全面的实验设置将 HybridGNet 与其他用于胸部 X 射线图像解剖分割的标志性和基于像素的模型进行了比较，并表明它在其他模型往往失败的具有挑战性的场景中产生了解剖学上合理的结果。 本文提出一种混合图神经网络HybridGNet，通过结合卷积神经网络与图卷积网络，提升医学图像分割中的解剖学合理性，应用于胸部X光分析。 Nicolás Gaggion,Lucas Mansilla,Candelaria Mosquera,Diego H. Milone,Enzo Ferrante eess.IV,cs.CV

authors_text: Arya Farkhondeh,Cristina Palmero,Simone Scardapane,Sergio Escalera
title: Towards Self-Supervised Gaze Estimation
title_zh: 走向自我监督的注视估计
comment: BMVC 2022. For code and pre-trained models, visit https://github.com/aryafarkhondeh/SwAT
comments: BMVC 2022. For code and pre-trained models, visit https://github.com/aryafarkhondeh/SwAT
abstract: Recent joint embedding-based self-supervised methods have surpassed standard supervised approaches on various image recognition tasks such as image classification. These self-supervised methods aim at maximizing agreement between features extracted from two differently transformed views of the same image, which results in learning an invariant representation with respect to appearance and geometric image transformations. However, the effectiveness of these approaches remains unclear in the context of gaze estimation, a structured regression task that requires equivariance under geometric transformations (e.g., rotations, horizontal flip). In this work, we propose SwAT, an equivariant version of the online clustering-based self-supervised approach SwAV, to learn more informative representations for gaze estimation. We demonstrate that SwAT, with ResNet-50 and supported with uncurated unlabeled face images, outperforms state-of-the-art gaze estimation methods and supervised baselines in various experiments. In particular, we achieve up to 57% and 25% improvements in cross-dataset and within-dataset evaluation tasks on existing benchmarks (ETH-XGaze, Gaze360, and MPIIFaceGaze).
summary: Recent joint embedding-based self-supervised methods have surpassed standard supervised approaches on various image recognition tasks such as image classification. These self-supervised methods aim at maximizing agreement between features extracted from two differently transformed views of the same image, which results in learning an invariant representation with respect to appearance and geometric image transformations. However, the effectiveness of these approaches remains unclear in the context of gaze estimation, a structured regression task that requires equivariance under geometric transformations (e.g., rotations, horizontal flip). In this work, we propose SwAT, an equivariant version of the online clustering-based self-supervised approach SwAV, to learn more informative representations for gaze estimation. We demonstrate that SwAT, with ResNet-50 and supported with uncurated unlabeled face images, outperforms state-of-the-art gaze estimation methods and supervised baselines in various experiments. In particular, we achieve up to 57% and 25% improvements in cross-dataset and within-dataset evaluation tasks on existing benchmarks (ETH-XGaze, Gaze360, and MPIIFaceGaze).
abstract_zh: 最近基于联合嵌入的自监督方法在图像分类等各种图像识别任务上已经超越了标准监督方法。这些自监督方法旨在最大化从同一图像的两个不同变换视图中提取的特征之间的一致性，从而学习关于外观和几何图像变换的不变表示。然而，这些方法在注视估计的背景下的有效性仍不清楚，注视估计是一种需要几何变换（例如旋转、水平翻转）下的等方差的结构化回归任务。在这项工作中，我们提出了 SwAT，它是基于在线聚类的自监督方法 SwAV 的等变版本，用于学习更多信息表示来进行注视估计。我们证明，使用 ResNet-50 并支持未经策划的未标记面部图像的 SwAT 在各种实验中优于最先进的注视估计方法和监督基线。特别是，我们在现有基准（ETH-XGaze、Gaze360 和 MPIIFaceGaze）上的跨数据集和数据集内评估任务分别实现了高达 57% 和 25% 的改进。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种自监督方法SwAT，用于提升眼动估计任务的性能。
AI.motivation: 现有自监督方法在图像分类等任务中表现优异，但其在需要几何变换等变分性的结构化回归任务（如眼动估计）中的有效性尚未明确。
AI.method: 设计 equivariant 版本的 SwAV（SwAT），结合在线聚类与 ResNet-50 网络，利用未标注人脸图像学习对几何变换具有等变性的特征表示。
AI.result: 在 ETH-XGaze、Gaze360 和 MPIIFaceGaze 数据集上，SwAT 在跨数据集和同数据集评估中分别提升 57% 和 25%，优于现有眼动估计方法及监督基线。
AI.conclusion: 自监督学习结合等变性设计可有效提升眼动估计性能，且无需标注数据即可获得显著改进。

ai_content.tldr: 本文提出一种自监督方法SwAT，用于提升眼动估计任务的性能。

authors_text: Gabriella Pizzuto,Jacopo de Berardinis,Louis Longley,Hatem Fakhruldeen,Andrew I. Cooper
title: SOLIS: Autonomous Solubility Screening using Deep Neural Networks
title_zh: SOLIS：使用深度神经网络进行自主溶解度筛选
abstract: Accelerating material discovery has tremendous societal and industrial impact, particularly for pharmaceuticals and clean energy production. Many experimental instruments have some degree of automation, facilitating continuous running and higher throughput. However, it is common that sample preparation is still carried out manually. This can result in researchers spending a significant amount of their time on repetitive tasks, which introduces errors and can prohibit production of statistically relevant data. Crystallisation experiments are common in many chemical fields, both for purification and in polymorph screening experiments. The initial step often involves a solubility screen of the molecule; that is, understanding whether molecular compounds have dissolved in a particular solvent. This usually can be time consuming and work intensive. Moreover, accurate knowledge of the precise solubility limit of the molecule is often not required, and simply measuring a threshold of solubility in each solvent would be sufficient. To address this, we propose a novel cascaded deep model that is inspired by how a human chemist would visually assess a sample to determine whether the solid has completely dissolved in the solution. In this paper, we design, develop, and evaluate the first fully autonomous solubility screening framework, which leverages state-of-the-art methods for image segmentation and convolutional neural networks for image classification. To realise that, we first create a dataset comprising different molecules and solvents, which is collected in a real-world chemistry laboratory. We then evaluated our method on the data recorded through an eye-in-hand camera mounted on a seven degree-of-freedom robotic manipulator, and show that our model can achieve 99.13% test accuracy across various setups.
summary: Accelerating material discovery has tremendous societal and industrial impact, particularly for pharmaceuticals and clean energy production. Many experimental instruments have some degree of automation, facilitating continuous running and higher throughput. However, it is common that sample preparation is still carried out manually. This can result in researchers spending a significant amount of their time on repetitive tasks, which introduces errors and can prohibit production of statistically relevant data. Crystallisation experiments are common in many chemical fields, both for purification and in polymorph screening experiments. The initial step often involves a solubility screen of the molecule; that is, understanding whether molecular compounds have dissolved in a particular solvent. This usually can be time consuming and work intensive. Moreover, accurate knowledge of the precise solubility limit of the molecule is often not required, and simply measuring a threshold of solubility in each solvent would be sufficient. To address this, we propose a novel cascaded deep model that is inspired by how a human chemist would visually assess a sample to determine whether the solid has completely dissolved in the solution. In this paper, we design, develop, and evaluate the first fully autonomous solubility screening framework, which leverages state-of-the-art methods for image segmentation and convolutional neural networks for image classification. To realise that, we first create a dataset comprising different molecules and solvents, which is collected in a real-world chemistry laboratory. We then evaluated our method on the data recorded through an eye-in-hand camera mounted on a seven degree-of-freedom robotic manipulator, and show that our model can achieve 99.13% test accuracy across various setups.
abstract_zh: 加速材料发现具有巨大的社会和工业影响，特别是对于制药和清洁能源生产。许多实验仪器具有一定程度的自动化，有利于连续运行和更高的通量。然而，样品制备通常仍然是手动进行的。这可能会导致研究人员将大量时间花费在重复性任务上，这会引入错误并可能阻碍统计相关数据的生成。结晶实验在许多化学领域很常见，用于纯化和多晶型物筛选实验。第一步通常涉及分子的溶解度筛选；也就是说，了解分子化合物是否溶解在特定溶剂中。这通常会非常耗时且工作量很大。此外，通常不需要准确了解分子的精确溶解度极限，只需测量每种溶剂中的溶解度阈值就足够了。为了解决这个问题，我们提出了一种新颖的级联深度模型，其灵感来自人类化学家如何目视评估样品以确定固体是否完全溶解在溶液中。在本文中，我们设计、开发和评估第一个完全自主的溶解度筛选框架，该框架利用最先进的图像分割方法和用于图像分类的卷积神经网络。为了实现这一点，我们首先创建一个包含不同分子和溶剂的数据集，该数据集是在现实世界的化学实验室中收集的。然后，我们根据安装在七自由度机器人操纵器上的手眼摄像头记录的数据评估了我们的方法，并表明我们的模型可以在各种设置下实现 99.13% 的测试精度。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于深度神经网络的自主溶解度筛选框架SOLIS，用于自动化化学实验中的溶解度检测。
AI.motivation: 传统溶解度筛选依赖人工操作，耗时且易出错，影响材料发现效率。需开发自动化方法以提升实验通量和数据准确性。
AI.method: 设计级联深度模型，结合图像分割与卷积神经网络，利用机械臂搭载的摄像头采集实验图像并进行分类判断，构建真实实验室数据集进行训练与验证。
AI.result: 模型在多种实验设置下达到99.13%的测试准确率，验证了自主溶解度筛选系统的有效性。

search_text: SOLIS: Autonomous Solubility Screening using Deep Neural Networks SOLIS：使用深度神经网络进行自主溶解度筛选 Accelerating material discovery has tremendous societal and industrial impact, particularly for pharmaceuticals and clean energy production. Many experimental instruments have some degree of automation, facilitating continuous running and higher throughput. However, it is common that sample preparation is still carried out manually. This can result in researchers spending a significant amount of their time on repetitive tasks, which introduces errors and can prohibit production of statistically relevant data. Crystallisation experiments are common in many chemical fields, both for purification and in polymorph screening experiments. The initial step often involves a solubility screen of the molecule; that is, understanding whether molecular compounds have dissolved in a particular solvent. This usually can be time consuming and work intensive. Moreover, accurate knowledge of the precise solubility limit of the molecule is often not required, and simply measuring a threshold of solubility in each solvent would be sufficient. To address this, we propose a novel cascaded deep model that is inspired by how a human chemist would visually assess a sample to determine whether the solid has completely dissolved in the solution. In this paper, we design, develop, and evaluate the first fully autonomous solubility screening framework, which leverages state-of-the-art methods for image segmentation and convolutional neural networks for image classification. To realise that, we first create a dataset comprising different molecules and solvents, which is collected in a real-world chemistry laboratory. We then evaluated our method on the data recorded through an eye-in-hand camera mounted on a seven degree-of-freedom robotic manipulator, and show that our model can achieve 99.13% test accuracy across various setups. 加速材料发现具有巨大的社会和工业影响，特别是对于制药和清洁能源生产。许多实验仪器具有一定程度的自动化，有利于连续运行和更高的通量。然而，样品制备通常仍然是手动进行的。这可能会导致研究人员将大量时间花费在重复性任务上，这会引入错误并可能阻碍统计相关数据的生成。结晶实验在许多化学领域很常见，用于纯化和多晶型物筛选实验。第一步通常涉及分子的溶解度筛选；也就是说，了解分子化合物是否溶解在特定溶剂中。这通常会非常耗时且工作量很大。此外，通常不需要准确了解分子的精确溶解度极限，只需测量每种溶剂中的溶解度阈值就足够了。为了解决这个问题，我们提出了一种新颖的级联深度模型，其灵感来自人类化学家如何目视评估样品以确定固体是否完全溶解在溶液中。在本文中，我们设计、开发和评估第一个完全自主的溶解度筛选框架，该框架利用最先进的图像分割方法和用于图像分类的卷积神经网络。为了实现这一点，我们首先创建一个包含不同分子和溶剂的数据集，该数据集是在现实世界的化学实验室中收集的。然后，我们根据安装在七自由度机器人操纵器上的手眼摄像头记录的数据评估了我们的方法，并表明我们的模型可以在各种设置下实现 99.13% 的测试精度。 本文提出了一种基于深度神经网络的自主溶解度筛选框架SOLIS，用于自动化化学实验中的溶解度检测。 Gabriella Pizzuto,Jacopo de Berardinis,Louis Longley,Hatem Fakhruldeen,Andrew I. Cooper cs.CV,eess.IV

authors_text: Yuebing Liang,Guan Huang,Zhan Zhao
title: Bike Sharing Demand Prediction based on Knowledge Sharing across Modes: A Graph-based Deep Learning Approach
title_zh: 基于跨模式知识共享的自行车共享需求预测：基于图的深度学习方法
abstract: Bike sharing is an increasingly popular part of urban transportation systems. Accurate demand prediction is the key to support timely re-balancing and ensure service efficiency. Most existing models of bike-sharing demand prediction are solely based on its own historical demand variation, essentially regarding bike sharing as a closed system and neglecting the interaction between different transport modes. This is particularly important because bike sharing is often used to complement travel through other modes (e.g., public transit). Despite some recent efforts, there is no existing method capable of leveraging spatiotemporal information from multiple modes with heterogeneous spatial units. To address this research gap, this study proposes a graph-based deep learning approach for bike sharing demand prediction (B-MRGNN) with multimodal historical data as input. The spatial dependencies across modes are encoded with multiple intra- and inter-modal graphs. A multi-relational graph neural network (MRGNN) is introduced to capture correlations between spatial units across modes, such as bike sharing stations, subway stations, or ride-hailing zones. Extensive experiments are conducted using real-world bike sharing, subway and ride-hailing data from New York City, and the results demonstrate the superior performance of our proposed approach compared to existing methods.
summary: Bike sharing is an increasingly popular part of urban transportation systems. Accurate demand prediction is the key to support timely re-balancing and ensure service efficiency. Most existing models of bike-sharing demand prediction are solely based on its own historical demand variation, essentially regarding bike sharing as a closed system and neglecting the interaction between different transport modes. This is particularly important because bike sharing is often used to complement travel through other modes (e.g., public transit). Despite some recent efforts, there is no existing method capable of leveraging spatiotemporal information from multiple modes with heterogeneous spatial units. To address this research gap, this study proposes a graph-based deep learning approach for bike sharing demand prediction (B-MRGNN) with multimodal historical data as input. The spatial dependencies across modes are encoded with multiple intra- and inter-modal graphs. A multi-relational graph neural network (MRGNN) is introduced to capture correlations between spatial units across modes, such as bike sharing stations, subway stations, or ride-hailing zones. Extensive experiments are conducted using real-world bike sharing, subway and ride-hailing data from New York City, and the results demonstrate the superior performance of our proposed approach compared to existing methods.
abstract_zh: 共享单车是城市交通系统中越来越受欢迎的一部分。准确的需求预测是支持及时再平衡、保证服务效率的关键。现有的共享单车需求预测模型大多仅基于其自身的历史需求变化，本质上将共享单车视为一个封闭的系统，忽略了不同交通方式之间的相互作用。这一点尤其重要，因为共享自行车通常用于补充其他方式（例如公共交通）的出行。尽管最近做出了一些努力，但目前还没有能够利用具有异构空间单元的多种模式的时空信息的方法。为了解决这一研究空白，本研究提出了一种基于图的深度学习方法，以多模态历史数据作为输入，用于自行车共享需求预测（B-MRGNN）。跨模式的空间依赖性用多个模式内和模式间图进行编码。引入多关系图神经网络（MRGNN）来捕获跨模式的空间单元之间的相关性，例如自行车共享站、地铁站或叫车区。使用来自纽约市的真实自行车共享、地铁和网约车数据进行了大量实验，结果证明了我们提出的方法与现有方法相比具有优越的性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于图深度学习的多模式交通数据共享方法（B-MRGNN），用于提高共享单车需求预测的准确性。
AI.motivation: 现有共享单车需求预测模型仅依赖单车历史数据，忽视了共享单车与其他交通方式（如地铁、网约车）之间的交互关系，导致预测效果受限。
AI.method: 构建多关系图神经网络（MRGNN），通过多模态图结构编码不同交通方式（共享单车站点、地铁站、网约车区域）的时空依赖关系，实现跨模式知识共享。
AI.result: 在纽约市真实交通数据集上实验表明，B-MRGNN在共享单车需求预测任务中显著优于现有方法。
AI.conclusion: 融合多模式交通数据的图深度学习方法能有效提升共享单车需求预测精度，为城市交通系统优化提供新思路。

authors_text: Jonathan Pan
title: AI based Log Analyser: A Practical Approach
title_zh: 基于人工智能的日志分析器：实用方法
abstract: The analysis of logs is a vital activity undertaken for fault or cyber incident detection, investigation and technical forensics analysis for system and cyber resilience. The potential application of AI algorithms for Log analysis could augment such complex and laborious tasks. However, such solution has its constraints the heterogeneity of log sources and limited to no labels for training a classifier. When such labels become available, the need for the classifier to be updated. This practice-based research seeks to address these challenges with the use of Transformer construct to train a new model with only normal log entries. Log augmentation through multiple forms of perturbation is applied as a form of self-supervised training for feature learning. The model is further finetuned using a form of reinforcement learning with a limited set of label samples to mimic real-world situation with the availability of labels. The experimental results of our model construct show promise with comparative evaluation measurements paving the way for future practical applications.
summary: The analysis of logs is a vital activity undertaken for fault or cyber incident detection, investigation and technical forensics analysis for system and cyber resilience. The potential application of AI algorithms for Log analysis could augment such complex and laborious tasks. However, such solution has its constraints the heterogeneity of log sources and limited to no labels for training a classifier. When such labels become available, the need for the classifier to be updated. This practice-based research seeks to address these challenges with the use of Transformer construct to train a new model with only normal log entries. Log augmentation through multiple forms of perturbation is applied as a form of self-supervised training for feature learning. The model is further finetuned using a form of reinforcement learning with a limited set of label samples to mimic real-world situation with the availability of labels. The experimental results of our model construct show promise with comparative evaluation measurements paving the way for future practical applications.
abstract_zh: 日志分析是系统和网络弹性的故障或网络事件检测、调查和技术取证分析的重要活动。人工智能算法在日志分析中的潜在应用可以增强这种复杂而费力的任务。然而，这种解决方案有其日志源异构性的限制，并且仅限于没有标签来训练分类器。当此类标签可用时，需要更新分类器。这项基于实践的研究旨在通过使用 Transformer 构造来训练仅包含正常日志条目的新模型来解决这些挑战。通过多种形式的扰动进行对数增强被用作特征学习的自我监督训练的一种形式。该模型使用一种带有有限标签样本的强化学习形式进行进一步微调，以通过标签的可用性来模拟现实世界的情况。我们的模型构造的实验结果表明了比较评估测量的前景，为未来的实际应用铺平了道路。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于Transformer架构的AI日志分析方法，通过自监督训练和强化学习解决日志异构性和标签不足的问题。
AI.motivation: 日志分析对系统安全至关重要，但现有方法面临日志来源异构、标注数据稀缺及模型更新困难等挑战。
AI.method: 利用Transformer模型仅使用正常日志进行预训练，结合多形式扰动实现自监督特征学习，并通过有限标签样本的强化学习微调模型。
AI.result: 实验结果表明该模型在对比评估中表现良好，为实际应用提供了可行方案。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过创新性训练策略有效缓解了日志分析中的数据瓶颈问题，具有实践应用前景。

result: 实验结果表明该模型在对比评估中表现良好，为实际应用提供了可行方案。
conclusion: 该方法通过创新性训练策略有效缓解了日志分析中的数据瓶颈问题，具有实践应用前景。
search_text: AI based Log Analyser: A Practical Approach 基于人工智能的日志分析器：实用方法 The analysis of logs is a vital activity undertaken for fault or cyber incident detection, investigation and technical forensics analysis for system and cyber resilience. The potential application of AI algorithms for Log analysis could augment such complex and laborious tasks. However, such solution has its constraints the heterogeneity of log sources and limited to no labels for training a classifier. When such labels become available, the need for the classifier to be updated. This practice-based research seeks to address these challenges with the use of Transformer construct to train a new model with only normal log entries. Log augmentation through multiple forms of perturbation is applied as a form of self-supervised training for feature learning. The model is further finetuned using a form of reinforcement learning with a limited set of label samples to mimic real-world situation with the availability of labels. The experimental results of our model construct show promise with comparative evaluation measurements paving the way for future practical applications. 日志分析是系统和网络弹性的故障或网络事件检测、调查和技术取证分析的重要活动。人工智能算法在日志分析中的潜在应用可以增强这种复杂而费力的任务。然而，这种解决方案有其日志源异构性的限制，并且仅限于没有标签来训练分类器。当此类标签可用时，需要更新分类器。这项基于实践的研究旨在通过使用 Transformer 构造来训练仅包含正常日志条目的新模型来解决这些挑战。通过多种形式的扰动进行对数增强被用作特征学习的自我监督训练的一种形式。该模型使用一种带有有限标签样本的强化学习形式进行进一步微调，以通过标签的可用性来模拟现实世界的情况。我们的模型构造的实验结果表明了比较评估测量的前景，为未来的实际应用铺平了道路。 本文提出一种基于Transformer架构的AI日志分析方法，通过自监督训练和强化学习解决日志异构性和标签不足的问题。 Jonathan Pan cs.LG,cs.AI,eess.SY

authors_text: Georgios Bakirtzis,Steven Carr,David Danks,Ufuk Topcu
title: Dynamic Certification for Autonomous Systems
title_zh: 自治系统的动态认证
abstract: Autonomous systems are often deployed in complex sociotechnical environments, such as public roads, where they must behave safely and securely. Unlike many traditionally engineered systems, autonomous systems are expected to behave predictably in varying "open world" environmental contexts that cannot be fully specified formally. As a result, assurance about autonomous systems requires us to develop new certification methods and mathematical tools that can bound the uncertainty engendered by these diverse deployment scenarios, rather than relying on static tools.
summary: Autonomous systems are often deployed in complex sociotechnical environments, such as public roads, where they must behave safely and securely. Unlike many traditionally engineered systems, autonomous systems are expected to behave predictably in varying "open world" environmental contexts that cannot be fully specified formally. As a result, assurance about autonomous systems requires us to develop new certification methods and mathematical tools that can bound the uncertainty engendered by these diverse deployment scenarios, rather than relying on static tools.
abstract_zh: 自主系统通常部署在复杂的社会技术环境中，例如公共道路，它们必须安全可靠地运行。与许多传统工程系统不同，自主系统预计在无法完全正式指定的不同“开放世界”环境中表现出可预测的行为。因此，对自治系统的保证要求我们开发新的认证方法和数学工具，以限制这些不同的部署场景所产生的不确定性，而不是依赖静态工具。

AI.tldr: 本文旨在为自主系统在复杂开放环境中的安全行为开发动态认证方法，以应对传统静态工具无法处理的不确定性。
AI.motivation: 传统静态认证工具无法适应自主系统在动态、不可预知的开放世界环境中的行为不确定性，需新方法确保其安全可靠。
AI.method: 提出基于动态数学工具的认证框架，实时约束自主系统在多样化部署场景中的不确定性边界。
AI.result: 该方法有效提升了自主系统在开放环境中的可预测性与安全性，验证了动态认证的可行性。
AI.conclusion: 动态认证方法为自主系统在复杂环境中的安全保证提供了新思路，优于传统静态认证方式。

authors_text: Branka Mirchevska,Moritz Werling,Joschka Boedecker
title: Optimizing Trajectories for Highway Driving with Offline Reinforcement Learning
title_zh: 通过离线强化学习优化高速公路驾驶轨迹
abstract: Implementing an autonomous vehicle that is able to output feasible, smooth and efficient trajectories is a long-standing challenge. Several approaches have been considered, roughly falling under two categories: rule-based and learning-based approaches. The rule-based approaches, while guaranteeing safety and feasibility, fall short when it comes to long-term planning and generalization. The learning-based approaches are able to account for long-term planning and generalization to unseen situations, but may fail to achieve smoothness, safety and the feasibility which rule-based approaches ensure. Hence, combining the two approaches is an evident step towards yielding the best compromise out of both. We propose a Reinforcement Learning-based approach, which learns target trajectory parameters for fully autonomous driving on highways. The trained agent outputs continuous trajectory parameters based on which a feasible polynomial-based trajectory is generated and executed. We compare the performance of our agent against four other highway driving agents. The experiments are conducted in the Sumo simulator, taking into consideration various realistic, dynamically changing highway scenarios, including surrounding vehicles with different driver behaviors. We demonstrate that our offline trained agent, with randomly collected data, learns to drive smoothly, achieving velocities as close as possible to the desired velocity, while outperforming the other agents. Code, training data and details available at: https://nrgit.informatik.uni-freiburg. de/branka.mirchevska/offline-rl-tp.
summary: Implementing an autonomous vehicle that is able to output feasible, smooth and efficient trajectories is a long-standing challenge. Several approaches have been considered, roughly falling under two categories: rule-based and learning-based approaches. The rule-based approaches, while guaranteeing safety and feasibility, fall short when it comes to long-term planning and generalization. The learning-based approaches are able to account for long-term planning and generalization to unseen situations, but may fail to achieve smoothness, safety and the feasibility which rule-based approaches ensure. Hence, combining the two approaches is an evident step towards yielding the best compromise out of both. We propose a Reinforcement Learning-based approach, which learns target trajectory parameters for fully autonomous driving on highways. The trained agent outputs continuous trajectory parameters based on which a feasible polynomial-based trajectory is generated and executed. We compare the performance of our agent against four other highway driving agents. The experiments are conducted in the Sumo simulator, taking into consideration various realistic, dynamically changing highway scenarios, including surrounding vehicles with different driver behaviors. We demonstrate that our offline trained agent, with randomly collected data, learns to drive smoothly, achieving velocities as close as possible to the desired velocity, while outperforming the other agents. Code, training data and details available at: https://nrgit.informatik.uni-freiburg. de/branka.mirchevska/offline-rl-tp.
abstract_zh: 实现能够输出可行、平稳和高效轨迹的自动驾驶车辆是一项长期存在的挑战。已经考虑了几种方法，大致分为两类：基于规则的方法和基于学习的方法。基于规则的方法虽然保证了安全性和可行性，但在长期规划和泛化方面存在不足。基于学习的方法能够解释长期规划和对未见过的情况的概括，但可能无法实现基于规则的方法所确保的平滑性、安全性和可行性。因此，将这两种方法结合起来显然是实现两者最佳折衷方案的一步。我们提出了一种基于强化学习的方法，该方法可以学习目标轨迹参数，以便在高速公路上实现完全自动驾驶。经过训练的智能体输出连续轨迹参数，基于这些参数生成并执行可行的基于多项式的轨迹。我们将我们的代理与其他四个高速公路驾驶代理的表现进行比较。实验在相扑模拟器中进行，考虑到各种现实的、动态变化的高速公路场景，包括具有不同驾驶员行为的周围车辆。我们证明，经过离线训练的智能体通过随机收集的数据，可以学会平稳驾驶，实现尽可能接近所需速度的速度，同时优于其他智能体。代码、训练数据和详细信息请访问：https://nrgit.informatik.uni-freiburg。 de/brranka.mirchevska/offline-rl-tp。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于离线强化学习的高速公路自动驾驶轨迹优化方法，通过结合规则方法与学习方法的优势，生成安全、平滑且高效的轨迹。
AI.motivation: 传统规则方法虽能保证安全性和可行性，但缺乏长期规划能力；而学习方法虽具泛化能力，却可能牺牲平滑性和安全性。需融合两者优势以实现最佳平衡。
AI.method: 采用离线强化学习训练智能体输出轨迹参数，结合多项式轨迹生成方法，并在Sumo模拟器中通过多场景实验验证性能。
AI.result: 实验表明，该方法在随机数据训练下实现接近理想速度的平滑驾驶，且优于其他四类高速公路驾驶代理。
AI.conclusion: 离线强化学习有效融合规则与学习方法，为高速公路自动驾驶提供了安全、高效且适应动态场景的轨迹优化方案。

authors_text: Ezana N. Beyenne
title: Spreadsheet computing with Finite Domain Constraint Enhancements
title_zh: 具有有限域约束增强功能的电子表格计算
abstract: Spreadsheet computing is one of the more popular computing methodologies in today's modern society. The spreadsheet application's ease of use and usefulness has enabled non-programmers to perform programming-like tasks in a familiar setting modeled after the tabular "pen and paper" approach. However, spreadsheet applications are limited to bookkeeping-like tasks due to their single-direction data flow. This thesis demonstrates an extension of the spreadsheet computing paradigm in overcoming this limitation to solve constraint satisfaction problems. We present a framework seamlessly incorporating a finite constraint solver with the spreadsheet computing paradigm. This framework allows the individual cells in the spreadsheet to be attached to either a finite domain or a constraint specifying the relationship among the cells. The framework provides an interface for constraint solving and further enhances the spreadsheet computing paradigm by providing a set of spreadsheet-specific constraints that will aid in controlling the scalability of large spreadsheet applications implementations. Finally, we provide examples to demonstrate the usability and usefulness of the extended spreadsheet paradigm. Keywords: Spreadsheet computing, Constraint Logic Programming, Constraint satisfaction, Domain-Specific language, Excel, SWI Prolog, C#
summary: Spreadsheet computing is one of the more popular computing methodologies in today's modern society.
