authors_text: Haowen Wang,Mingyuan Wang,Zhengping Che,Zhiyuan Xu,Xiuquan Qiao,Mengshi Qi,Feifei Feng,Jian Tang
title: RGB-Depth Fusion GAN for Indoor Depth Completion
title_zh: 用于室内深度补全的 RGB 深度融合 GAN
abstract: The raw depth image captured by the indoor depth sensor usually has an extensive range of missing depth values due to inherent limitations such as the inability to perceive transparent objects and limited distance range. The incomplete depth map burdens many downstream vision tasks, and a rising number of depth completion methods have been proposed to alleviate this issue. While most existing methods can generate accurate dense depth maps from sparse and uniformly sampled depth maps, they are not suitable for complementing the large contiguous regions of missing depth values, which is common and critical. In this paper, we design a novel two-branch end-to-end fusion network, which takes a pair of RGB and incomplete depth images as input to predict a dense and completed depth map. The first branch employs an encoder-decoder structure to regress the local dense depth values from the raw depth map, with the help of local guidance information extracted from the RGB image. In the other branch, we propose an RGB-depth fusion GAN to transfer the RGB image to the fine-grained textured depth map. We adopt adaptive fusion modules named W-AdaIN to propagate the features across the two branches, and we append a confidence fusion head to fuse the two outputs of the branches for the final depth map. Extensive experiments on NYU-Depth V2 and SUN RGB-D demonstrate that our proposed method clearly improves the depth completion performance, especially in a more realistic setting of indoor environments with the help of the pseudo depth map.
summary: The raw depth image captured by the indoor depth sensor usually has an extensive range of missing depth values due to inherent limitations such as the inability to perceive transparent objects and limited distance range. The incomplete depth map burdens many downstream vision tasks, and a rising number of depth completion methods have been proposed to alleviate this issue. While most existing methods can generate accurate dense depth maps from sparse and uniformly sampled depth maps, they are not suitable for complementing the large contiguous regions of missing depth values, which is common and critical. In this paper, we design a novel two-branch end-to-end fusion network, which takes a pair of RGB and incomplete depth images as input to predict a dense and completed depth map. The first branch employs an encoder-decoder structure to regress the local dense depth values from the raw depth map, with the help of local guidance information extracted from the RGB image. In the other branch, we propose an RGB-depth fusion GAN to transfer the RGB image to the fine-grained textured depth map. We adopt adaptive fusion modules named W-AdaIN to propagate the features across the two branches, and we append a confidence fusion head to fuse the two outputs of the branches for the final depth map. Extensive experiments on NYU-Depth V2 and SUN RGB-D demonstrate that our proposed method clearly improves the depth completion performance, especially in a more realistic setting of indoor environments with the help of the pseudo depth map.
abstract_zh: 由于无法感知透明物体、距离范围有限等固有限制，室内深度传感器捕获的原始深度图像通常会存在大范围的缺失深度值。不完整的深度图给许多下游视觉任务带来了负担，并且已经提出了越来越多的深度补全方法来缓解这个问题。虽然大多数现有方法可以从稀疏且均匀采样的深度图生成准确的密集深度图，但它们不适合补充缺失深度值的大连续区域，这是常见且关键的。在本文中，我们设计了一种新颖的双分支端到端融合网络，它以一对 RGB 和不完整深度图像作为输入来预测密集且完整的深度图。第一个分支采用编码器-解码器结构，借助从 RGB 图像提取的局部引导信息，从原始深度图中回归局部密集深度值。在另一个分支中，我们提出了 RGB 深度融合 GAN，将 RGB 图像传输到细粒度纹理深度图。我们采用名为 W-AdaIN 的自适应融合模块来在两个分支之间传播特征，并附加一个置信度融合头来融合分支的两个输出以获得最终的深度图。在 NYU-Depth V2 和 SUN RGB-D 上进行的大量实验表明，我们提出的方法明显提高了深度补全性能，尤其是在伪深度图的帮助下，在更真实的室内环境中。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种RGB-深度融合生成对抗网络（RGB-Depth Fusion GAN），用于解决室内深度传感器捕获的深度图像中大范围连续缺失值的补全问题。
AI.motivation: 现有深度补全方法难以处理室内场景中常见的大范围连续缺失深度值区域，而这类缺失会严重影响下游视觉任务的性能。
AI.method: 设计双分支端到端网络：1) 编码器-解码器分支通过RGB图像局部引导信息回归局部密集深度值；2) RGB-深度融合GAN分支生成细粒度纹理深度图。采用W-AdaIN自适应融合模块跨分支传播特征，并通过置信度融合头整合双分支输出。
AI.result: 在NYU-Depth V2和SUN RGB-D数据集上的实验表明，该方法在室内真实场景下的深度补全性能显著优于现有方法，尤其在处理大范围缺失区域时表现突出。
AI.conclusion: 通过RGB与深度信息的跨模态融合及自适应特征传播机制，本文方法有效提升了室内深度补全的准确性，为复杂场景下的深度估计提供了新思路。

authors_text: Shuaicheng Niu,Jiaxiang Wu,Yifan Zhang,Guanghui Xu,Haokun Li,Peilin Zhao,Junzhou Huang,Yaowei Wang,Mingkui Tan
title: Boost Test-Time Performance with Closed-Loop Inference
title_zh: 通过闭环推理提高测试时性能
abstract: Conventional deep models predict a test sample with a single forward propagation, which, however, may not be sufficient for predicting hard-classified samples. On the contrary, we human beings may need to carefully check the sample many times before making a final decision. During the recheck process, one may refine/adjust the prediction by referring to related samples. Motivated by this, we propose to predict those hard-classified test samples in a looped manner to boost the model performance. However, this idea may pose a critical challenge: how to construct looped inference, so that the original erroneous predictions on these hard test samples can be corrected with little additional effort. To address this, we propose a general Closed-Loop Inference (CLI) method. Specifically, we first devise a filtering criterion to identify those hard-classified test samples that need additional inference loops. For each hard sample, we construct an additional auxiliary learning task based on its original top-$K$ predictions to calibrate the model, and then use the calibrated model to obtain the final prediction. Promising results on ImageNet (in-distribution test samples) and ImageNet-C (out-of-distribution test samples) demonstrate the effectiveness of CLI in improving the performance of any pre-trained model.
summary: Conventional deep models predict a test sample with a single forward propagation, which, however, may not be sufficient for predicting hard-classified samples. On the contrary, we human beings may need to carefully check the sample many times before making a final decision. During the recheck process, one may refine/adjust the prediction by referring to related samples. Motivated by this, we propose to predict those hard-classified test samples in a looped manner to boost the model performance. However, this idea may pose a critical challenge: how to construct looped inference, so that the original erroneous predictions on these hard test samples can be corrected with little additional effort. To address this, we propose a general Closed-Loop Inference (CLI) method. Specifically, we first devise a filtering criterion to identify those hard-classified test samples that need additional inference loops. For each hard sample, we construct an additional auxiliary learning task based on its original top-$K$ predictions to calibrate the model, and then use the calibrated model to obtain the final prediction. Promising results on ImageNet (in-distribution test samples) and ImageNet-C (out-of-distribution test samples) demonstrate the effectiveness of CLI in improving the performance of any pre-trained model.
abstract_zh: 传统的深度模型通过单个前向传播来预测测试样本，但这可能不足以预测硬分类样本。相反，我们人类可能需要多次仔细检查样本才能做出最终决定。在复核过程中，可以参考相关样本来细化/调整预测。受此启发，我们建议以循环方式预测那些硬分类的测试样本，以提高模型性能。然而，这个想法可能会带来一个关键的挑战：如何构建循环推理，以便不需要额外的努力就可以纠正对这些硬测试样本的原始错误预测。为了解决这个问题，我们提出了一种通用的闭环推理（CLI）方法。具体来说，我们首先设计一个过滤标准来识别那些需要额外推理循环的硬分类测试样本。对于每个困难样本，我们根据其原始的top-$K$预测构建一个额外的辅助学习任务来校准模型，然后使用校准后的模型获得最终的预测。 ImageNet（分布内测试样本）和 ImageNet-C（分布外测试样本）上的良好结果证明了 CLI 在提高任何预训练模型性能方面的有效性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出闭环推理（CLI）方法，通过循环校准模型提升预训练模型在测试时对困难样本的预测性能。
AI.motivation: 传统深度模型单次前向传播难以处理难分类样本，而人类决策会通过多次检查和参考相关样本调整预测，受此启发提出闭环推理机制。
AI.method: 设计过滤标准识别困难样本，为每个样本构建基于其前K个预测的辅助任务进行校准，利用校准后模型生成最终预测。
AI.result: 在ImageNet（分布内）和ImageNet-C（分布外）数据集上验证，CLI显著提升了预训练模型的测试性能。
AI.conclusion: CLI是一种通用且高效的测试时性能增强方法，能有效纠正预训练模型对困难样本的预测错误。

authors_text: Yiran Wei,Xi Chen,Lei Zhu,Lipei Zhang,Carola-Bibiane Schönlieb,Stephen J. Price,Chao Li
title: Multi-modal learning for predicting the genotype of glioma
title_zh: 预测神经胶质瘤基因型的多模态学习
abstract: The isocitrate dehydrogenase (IDH) gene mutation is an essential biomarker for the diagnosis and prognosis of glioma. It is promising to better predict glioma genotype by integrating focal tumor image and geometric features with brain network features derived from MRI. Convolutions neural networks show reasonable performance in predicting IDH mutation, which, however, cannot learn from non-Euclidean data, e.g., geometric and network data. In this study, we propose a multi-modal learning framework using three separate encoders to extract features of focal tumor image, tumor geometrics and global brain networks. To mitigate the limited availability of diffusion MRI, we develop a self-supervised approach to generate brain networks from anatomical multi-sequence MRI. Moreover, to extract tumor-related features from the brain network, we design a hierarchical attention module for the brain network encoder. Further, we design a bi-level multi-modal contrastive loss to align the multi-modal features and tackle the domain gap at the focal tumor and global brain. Finally, we propose a weighted population graph to integrate the multi-modal features for genotype prediction. Experimental results on the testing set show that the proposed model outperforms the baseline deep learning models. The ablation experiments validate the performance of different components of the framework. The visualized interpretation corresponds to clinical knowledge with further validation. In conclusion, the proposed learning framework provides a novel approach for predicting the genotype of glioma.
summary: The isocitrate dehydrogenase (IDH) gene mutation is an essential biomarker for the diagnosis and prognosis of glioma. It is promising to better predict glioma genotype by integrating focal tumor image and geometric features with brain network features derived from MRI. Convolutions neural networks show reasonable performance in predicting IDH mutation, which, however, cannot learn from non-Euclidean data, e.g., geometric and network data. In this study, we propose a multi-modal learning framework using three separate encoders to extract features of focal tumor image, tumor geometrics and global brain networks. To mitigate the limited availability of diffusion MRI, we develop a self-supervised approach to generate brain networks from anatomical multi-sequence MRI. Moreover, to extract tumor-related features from the brain network, we design a hierarchical attention module for the brain network encoder. Further, we design a bi-level multi-modal contrastive loss to align the multi-modal features and tackle the domain gap at the focal tumor and global brain. Finally, we propose a weighted population graph to integrate the multi-modal features for genotype prediction. Experimental results on the testing set show that the proposed model outperforms the baseline deep learning models. The ablation experiments validate the performance of different components of the framework. The visualized interpretation corresponds to clinical knowledge with further validation. In conclusion, the proposed learning framework provides a novel approach for predicting the genotype of glioma.
abstract_zh: 异柠檬酸脱氢酶（IDH）基因突变是胶质瘤诊断和预后的重要生物标志物。通过将局灶性肿瘤图像和几何特征与 MRI 得出的脑网络特征相结合，有望更好地预测神经胶质瘤基因型。卷积神经网络在预测 IDH 突变方面表现出合理的性能，但是无法从非欧几里得数据（例如几何和网络数据）中学习。在这项研究中，我们提出了一个多模态学习框架，使用三个独立的编码器来提取局部肿瘤图像、肿瘤几何形状和全局大脑网络的特征。为了缓解扩散 MRI 的有限可用性，我们开发了一种自我监督方法，从解剖多序列 MRI 生成大脑网络。此外，为了从大脑网络中提取与肿瘤相关的特征，我们为大脑网络编码器设计了一个分层注意力模块。此外，我们设计了一种双层多模态对比损失来对齐多模态特征并解决局灶性肿瘤和整体大脑的域间隙。最后，我们提出了一个加权群体图来整合多模态特征以进行基因型预测。测试集上的实验结果表明，所提出的模型优于基线深度学习模型。消融实验验证了框架不同组件的性能。可视化解释符合临床知识并经过进一步验证。总之，所提出的学习框架提供了一种预测神经胶质瘤基因型的新方法。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种多模态学习框架，整合胶质瘤的局部肿瘤图像、几何特征和全脑网络特征，以预测IDH基因突变状态。
AI.motivation: 现有卷积神经网络难以处理非欧几里得几何和网络数据，且扩散MRI数据获取受限，需开发新型多模态方法提升基因型预测性能。
AI.method: 构建三编码器框架提取图像/几何/网络特征，采用自监督方法生成脑网络，设计分层注意力模块与双层对比损失对齐多模态特征，最终通过加权群体图整合信息进行预测。
AI.result: 测试集表现优于基线模型，消融实验证实各模块有效性，可视化结果符合临床认知。
AI.conclusion: 该框架为胶质瘤基因型预测提供了新颖的多模态学习解决方案，具有临床应用潜力。

authors_text: Nick Zhang,Abhishek Gupta,Zefeng Chen,Yew-Soon Ong
title: Multitask Neuroevolution for Reinforcement Learning with Long and Short Episodes
title_zh: 用于长集和短集强化学习的多任务神经进化
abstract: Studies have shown evolution strategies (ES) to be a promising approach for reinforcement learning (RL) with deep neural networks. However, the issue of high sample complexity persists in applications of ES to deep RL over long horizons. This paper is the first to address the shortcoming of today's methods via a novel neuroevolutionary multitasking (NuEMT) algorithm, designed to transfer information from a set of auxiliary tasks (of short episode length) to the target (full length) RL task at hand. The auxiliary tasks, extracted from the target, allow an agent to update and quickly evaluate policies on shorter time horizons. The evolved skills are then transferred to guide the longer and harder task towards an optimal policy. We demonstrate that the NuEMT algorithm achieves data-efficient evolutionary RL, reducing expensive agent-environment interaction data requirements. Our key algorithmic contribution in this setting is to introduce, for the first time, a multitask skills transfer mechanism based on the statistical importance sampling technique. In addition, an adaptive resource allocation strategy is utilized to assign computational resources to auxiliary tasks based on their gleaned usefulness. Experiments on a range of continuous control tasks from the OpenAI Gym confirm that our proposed algorithm is efficient compared to recent ES baselines.
summary: Studies have shown evolution strategies (ES) to be a promising approach for reinforcement learning (RL) with deep neural networks. However, the issue of high sample complexity persists in applications of ES to deep RL over long horizons. The evolved skills are then transferred to guide the longer and harder task towards an optimal policy. We demonstrate that the NuEMT algorithm achieves data-efficient evolutionary RL, reducing expensive agent-environment interaction data requirements. Our key algorithmic contribution in this setting is to introduce, for the first time, a multitask skills transfer mechanism based on the statistical importance sampling technique. In addition, an adaptive resource allocation strategy is utilized to assign computational resources to auxiliary tasks based on their gleaned usefulness. Experiments on a range of continuous control tasks from the OpenAI Gym confirm that our proposed algorithm is efficient compared to recent ES baselines.
abstract_zh: 研究表明，进化策略（ES）是深度神经网络强化学习（RL）的一种有前途的方法。然而，长期将 ES 应用于深度强化学习时，样本复杂度高的问题仍然存在。本文首次通过一种新颖的神经进化多任务（NuEMT）算法来解决当今方法的缺点，该算法旨在将信息从一组辅助任务（短集长度）传输到手头的目标（全长）强化学习任务。从目标中提取的辅助任务允许代理在较短的时间范围内更新和快速评估策略。然后，进化出的技能将被转移，以指导更长期、更艰巨的任务制定最佳政策。我们证明 NuEMT 算法实现了数据高效的进化强化学习，减少了昂贵的智能体与环境交互数据需求。我们在此设置中的关键算法贡献是首次引入基于统计重要性采样技术的多任务技能转移机制。此外，利用自适应资源分配策略根据辅助任务收集的有用性将计算资源分配给辅助任务。对 OpenAI Gym 的一系列连续控制任务进行的实验证实，与最近的 ES 基线相比，我们提出的算法是有效的。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种多任务神经进化算法NuEMT，通过从目标任务中提取辅助短周期任务来提升深度强化学习在长周期任务中的数据效率。
AI.motivation: 现有进化策略在深度强化学习长周期任务中存在样本复杂度高的问题，需通过知识迁移降低数据需求。
AI.method: 设计基于统计重要性抽样的多任务技能迁移机制，并采用自适应资源分配策略动态分配计算资源给辅助任务。
AI.result: 在OpenAI Gym连续控制任务实验中，NuEMT算法相比最新ES基线方法展现出更高的数据效率。
AI.conclusion: 通过多任务协同进化机制，NuEMT有效降低了长周期强化学习的样本需求，为进化策略研究提供了新思路。

search_text: Multitask Neuroevolution for Reinforcement Learning with Long and Short Episodes 用于长集和短集强化学习的多任务神经进化 Studies have shown evolution strategies (ES) to be a promising approach for reinforcement learning (RL) with deep neural networks. However, the issue of high sample complexity persists in applications of ES to deep RL over long horizons. This paper is the first to address the shortcoming of today's methods via a novel neuroevolutionary multitasking (NuEMT) algorithm, designed to transfer information from a set of auxiliary tasks (of short episode length) to the target (full length) RL task at hand. The auxiliary tasks, extracted from the target, allow an agent to update and quickly evaluate policies on shorter time horizons. The evolved skills are then transferred to guide the longer and harder task towards an optimal policy. We demonstrate that the NuEMT algorithm achieves data-efficient evolutionary RL, reducing expensive agent-environment interaction data requirements. Our key algorithmic contribution in this setting is to introduce, for the first time, a multitask skills transfer mechanism based on the statistical importance sampling technique. In addition, an adaptive resource allocation strategy is utilized to assign computational resources to auxiliary tasks based on their gleaned usefulness. Experiments on a range of continuous control tasks from the OpenAI Gym confirm that our proposed algorithm is efficient compared to recent ES baselines. 研究表明，进化策略（ES）是深度神经网络强化学习（RL）的一种有前途的方法。然而，长期将 ES 应用于深度强化学习时，样本复杂度高的问题仍然存在。本文首次通过一种新颖的神经进化多任务（NuEMT）算法来解决当今方法的缺点，该算法旨在将信息从一组辅助任务（短集长度）传输到手头的目标（全长）强化学习任务。从目标中提取的辅助任务允许代理在较短的时间范围内更新和快速评估策略。然后，进化出的技能将被转移，以指导更长期、更艰巨的任务制定最佳政策。我们证明 NuEMT 算法实现了数据高效的进化强化学习，减少了昂贵的智能体与环境交互数据需求。我们在此设置中的关键算法贡献是首次引入基于统计重要性采样技术的多任务技能转移机制。此外，利用自适应资源分配策略根据辅助任务收集的有用性将计算资源分配给辅助任务。对 OpenAI Gym 的一系列连续控制任务进行的实验证实，与最近的 ES 基线相比，我们提出的算法是有效的。 本文提出一种多任务神经进化算法NuEMT，通过从目标任务中提取辅助短周期任务来提升深度强化学习在长周期任务中的数据效率。 Nick Zhang,Abhishek Gupta,Zefeng Chen,Yew-Soon Ong cs.NE,cs.LG

authors_text: Mucheng Ren,Heyan Huang,Yuxiang Zhou,Qianwen Cao,Yuan Bu,Yang Gao
title: TCM-SD: A Benchmark for Probing Syndrome Differentiation via Natural Language Processing
title_zh: TCM-SD：通过自然语言处理探查辨证的基准
comment: 10 main pages + 2 reference pages, to appear at CCL2022
comments: 10 main pages + 2 reference pages, to appear at CCL2022
abstract: Traditional Chinese Medicine (TCM) is a natural, safe, and effective therapy that has spread and been applied worldwide. The unique TCM diagnosis and treatment system requires a comprehensive analysis of a patient's symptoms hidden in the clinical record written in free text. Prior studies have shown that this system can be informationized and intelligentized with the aid of artificial intelligence (AI) technology, such as natural language processing (NLP). However, existing datasets are not of sufficient quality nor quantity to support the further development of data-driven AI technology in TCM. Therefore, in this paper, we focus on the core task of the TCM diagnosis and treatment system -- syndrome differentiation (SD) -- and we introduce the first public large-scale dataset for SD, called TCM-SD. Our dataset contains 54,152 real-world clinical records covering 148 syndromes. Furthermore, we collect a large-scale unlabelled textual corpus in the field of TCM and propose a domain-specific pre-trained language model, called ZY-BERT. We conducted experiments using deep neural networks to establish a strong performance baseline, reveal various challenges in SD, and prove the potential of domain-specific pre-trained language model. Our study and analysis reveal opportunities for incorporating computer science and linguistics knowledge to explore the empirical validity of TCM theories.
summary: Traditional Chinese Medicine (TCM) is a natural, safe, and effective therapy that has spread and been applied worldwide. The unique TCM diagnosis and treatment system requires a comprehensive analysis of a patient's symptoms hidden in the clinical record written in free text. Prior studies have shown that this system can be informationized and intelligentized with the aid of artificial intelligence (AI) technology, such as natural language processing (NLP). However, existing datasets are not of sufficient quality nor quantity to support the further development of data-driven AI technology in TCM. Therefore, in this paper, we focus on the core task of the TCM diagnosis and treatment system -- syndrome differentiation (SD) -- and we introduce the first public large-scale dataset for SD, called TCM-SD. Our dataset contains 54,152 real-world clinical records covering 148 syndromes. Furthermore, we collect a large-scale unlabelled textual corpus in the field of TCM and propose a domain-specific pre-trained language model, called ZY-BERT. We conducted experiments using deep neural networks to establish a strong performance baseline, reveal various challenges in SD, and prove the potential of domain-specific pre-trained language model. Our study and analysis reveal opportunities for incorporating computer science and linguistics knowledge to explore the empirical validity of TCM theories.
abstract_zh: 中医药是一种天然、安全、有效的疗法，已在世界范围内传播和应用。独特的中医诊疗体系需要对隐藏在自由文本临床记录中的患者症状进行全面分析。此前的研究表明，借助自然语言处理（NLP）等人工智能（AI）技术，该系统可以实现信息化、智能化。然而，现有数据集的质量和数量不足以支持中医数据驱动的人工智能技术的进一步发展。因此，在本文中，我们聚焦于中医诊疗体系的核心任务——辨证论治（SD），并引入了第一个公开的大规模SD数据集，称为TCM-SD。我们的数据集包含 54,152 条真实世界临床记录，涵盖 148 种综合症。此外，我们收集了中医领域的大规模未标记文本语料库，并提出了一种特定领域的预训练语言模型，称为 ZY-BERT。我们使用深度神经网络进行了实验，以建立强大的性能基线，揭示 SD 中的各种挑战，并证明特定领域预训练语言模型的潜力。我们的研究和分析揭示了结合计算机科学和语言学知识来探索中医理论的实证有效性的机会。

AI.tldr: 本文提出TCM-SD基准数据集和ZY-BERT预训练模型，用于通过自然语言处理实现中医辨证的智能化研究。
AI.motivation: 现有中医数据集在质量与数量上难以支持AI技术发展，需构建高质量基准以推动中医诊断的智能化进程。
AI.method: 构建包含54,152份真实临床记录的TCM-SD数据集，开发领域预训练模型ZY-BERT，并基于深度神经网络建立性能基准。
AI.result: 确立了辨证任务的性能基线，揭示了数据标注不一致等挑战，验证了领域预训练模型的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 计算机科学与语言学方法可为中医理论的实证研究提供新路径，需跨学科协作推动中医智能化发展。

authors_text: K. López-de-Ipiña,Marcos Faundez-Zanuy,Jordi Solé-Casals,Fernando Zelarin,Pilar Calvo
title: Multi-class versus One-class classifier in spontaneous speech analysis oriented to Alzheimer Disease diagnosis
title_zh: 面向阿尔茨海默病诊断的自发语音分析中的多类分类器与一类分类器
comment: 10 pages, published in International Conference on NONLINEAR SPEECH PROCESSING, NOLISP 2015 jointly organized with the 25th Italian Workshop on Neural Networks, WIRN 2015, held at May 2015, Vietri sul Mare, Salerno, Italy
comments: 10 pages, published in International Conference on NONLINEAR SPEECH PROCESSING, NOLISP 2015 jointly organized with the 25th Italian Workshop on Neural Networks, WIRN 2015, held at May 2015, Vietri sul Mare, Salerno, Italy
abstract: Most of medical developments require the ability to identify samples that are anomalous with respect to a target group or control group, in the sense they could belong to a new, previously unseen class or are not class data. In this case when there are not enough data to train two-class One-class classification appear like an available solution. On the other hand non-linear approaches could give very useful information. The aim of our project is to contribute to earlier diagnosis of AD and better estimates of its severity by using automatic analysis performed through new biomarkers extracted from speech signal. The methods selected in this case are speech biomarkers oriented to Spontaneous Speech and Emotional Response Analysis. In this approach One-class classifiers and two-class classifiers are analyzed. The use of information about outlier and Fractal Dimension features improves the system performance.
summary: Most of medical developments require the ability to identify samples that are anomalous with respect to a target group or control group, in the sense they could belong to a new, previously unseen class or are not class data. In this case when there are not enough data to train two-class One-class classification appear like an available solution. On the other hand non-linear approaches could give very useful information. The aim of our project is to contribute to earlier diagnosis of AD and better estimates of its severity by using automatic analysis performed through new biomarkers extracted from speech signal. The methods selected in this case are speech biomarkers oriented to Spontaneous Speech and Emotional Response Analysis. In this approach One-class classifiers and two-class classifiers are analyzed. The use of information about outlier and Fractal Dimension features improves the system performance.
abstract_zh: 大多数医学发展都需要能够识别相对于目标群体或对照组而言异常的样本，从某种意义上说，它们可能属于一个新的、以前未见过的类，或者不是类数据。在这种情况下，当没有足够的数据来训练两类一类分类时，似乎是一个可用的解决方案。另一方面，非线性方法可以提供非常有用的信息。我们项目的目的是通过从语音信号中提取新的生物标志物进行自动分析，从而有助于早期诊断 AD 并更好地估计其严重程度。本例中选择的方法是面向自发言语和情绪反应分析的言语生物标记。在这种方法中，分析了一类分类器和二类分类器。使用有关异常值和分形维数特征的信息可以提高系统性能。

AI.tldr: 论文通过分析自发性语音信号中的生物标志物，结合单类与双类分类器，辅助阿尔茨海默病的早期诊断与严重程度评估。
AI.motivation: 医学诊断需识别异常样本，尤其在数据不足时单类分类器更适用，而分形维度等非线性特征可提供关键信息以提升诊断性能。
AI.method: 采用自发性语音及情感反应分析的语音生物标志物，比较单类/双类分类器效果，并引入异常检测与分形维度特征优化模型。
AI.result: 通过结合异常信息与分形维度特征，系统性能显著提升，验证了单类分类器在数据稀缺场景下的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 该研究为阿尔茨海默病早期诊断提供了基于语音信号的新生物标志物及分类方法，具有临床应用潜力。

ai_content.result: 通过结合异常信息与分形维度特征，系统性能显著提升，验证了单类分类器在数据稀缺场景下的有效性。

search_text: Multi-class versus One-class classifier in spontaneous speech analysis oriented to Alzheimer Disease diagnosis 面向阿尔茨海默病诊断的自发语音分析中的多类分类器与一类分类器 Most of medical developments require the ability to identify samples that are anomalous with respect to a target group or control group, in the sense they could belong to a new, previously unseen class or are not class data. In this case when there are not enough data to train two-class One-class classification appear like an available solution. On the other hand non-linear approaches could give very useful information. The aim of our project is to contribute to earlier diagnosis of AD and better estimates of its severity by using automatic analysis performed through new biomarkers extracted from speech signal. The methods selected in this case are speech biomarkers oriented to Spontaneous Speech and Emotional Response Analysis. In this approach One-class classifiers and two-class classifiers are analyzed. The use of information about outlier and Fractal Dimension features improves the system performance. 大多数医学发展都需要能够识别相对于目标群体或对照组而言异常的样本，从某种意义上说，它们可能属于一个新的、以前未见过的类，或者不是类数据。在这种情况下，当没有足够的数据来训练两类一类分类时，似乎是一个可用的解决方案。另一方面，非线性方法可以提供非常有用的信息。我们项目的目的是通过从语音信号中提取新的生物标志物进行自动分析，从而有助于早期诊断 AD 并更好地估计其严重程度。本例中选择的方法是面向自发言语和情绪反应分析的言语生物标记。在这种方法中，分析了一类分类器和二类分类器。使用有关异常值和分形维数特征的信息可以提高系统性能。 论文通过分析自发性语音信号中的生物标志物，结合单类与双类分类器，辅助阿尔茨海默病的早期诊断与严重程度评估。 K. López-de-Ipiña,Marcos Faundez-Zanuy,Jordi Solé-Casals,Fernando Zelarin,Pilar Calvo cs.SD,cs.LG,eess.AS

authors_text: Aleksandr Ermolov,Leyla Mirvakhabova,Valentin Khrulkov,Nicu Sebe,Ivan Oseledets
title: Hyperbolic Vision Transformers: Combining Improvements in Metric Learning
title_zh: 双曲视觉变压器：结合度量学习的改进
abstract: Metric learning aims to learn a highly discriminative model encouraging the embeddings of similar classes to be close in the chosen metrics and pushed apart for dissimilar ones. The common recipe is to use an encoder to extract embeddings and a distance-based loss function to match the representations -- usually, the Euclidean distance is utilized. An emerging interest in learning hyperbolic data embeddings suggests that hyperbolic geometry can be beneficial for natural data. Following this line of work, we propose a new hyperbolic-based model for metric learning. At the core of our method is a vision transformer with output embeddings mapped to hyperbolic space. These embeddings are directly optimized using modified pairwise cross-entropy loss. We evaluate the proposed model with six different formulations on four datasets achieving the new state-of-the-art performance. The source code is available at https://github.com/htdt/hyp_metric.
summary: Metric learning aims to learn a highly discriminative model encouraging the embeddings of similar classes to be close in the chosen metrics and pushed apart for dissimilar ones. The common recipe is to use an encoder to extract embeddings and a distance-based loss function to match the representations -- usually, the Euclidean distance is utilized. An emerging interest in learning hyperbolic data embeddings suggests that hyperbolic geometry can be beneficial for natural data. Following this line of work, we propose a new hyperbolic-based model for metric learning. At the core of our method is a vision transformer with output embeddings mapped to hyperbolic space. These embeddings are directly optimized using modified pairwise cross-entropy loss. We evaluate the proposed model with six different formulations on four datasets achieving the new state-of-the-art performance. The source code is available at https://github.com/htdt/hyp_metric.
abstract_zh: 度量学习的目的是学习一种高度区分的模型，鼓励相似类的嵌入在所选度量中接近，而对于不同的度量则分开。常见的方法是使用编码器来提取嵌入和基于距离的损失函数来匹配表示——通常使用欧几里德距离。对学习双曲数据嵌入的新兴兴趣表明双曲几何对自然数据有益。遵循这一工作，我们提出了一种新的基于双曲的度量学习模型。我们方法的核心是一个视觉转换器，其输出嵌入映射到双曲空间。这些嵌入是使用修改后的成对交叉熵损失直接优化的。我们在四个数据集上使用六种不同的公式来评估所提出的模型，以实现新的最先进的性能。源代码可在 https://github.com/htdt/hyp_metric 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于双曲几何的视觉Transformer模型，通过将嵌入映射到双曲空间并优化损失函数，改进度量学习任务的性能。
AI.motivation: 传统度量学习依赖欧几里得距离，但双曲几何能更好建模自然数据的层次结构，因此探索其在视觉任务中的应用潜力。
AI.method: 设计视觉Transformer架构，将输出嵌入映射至双曲空间，并采用改进的成对交叉熵损失函数直接优化双曲嵌入。
AI.result: 在四个数据集上通过六种方法验证，模型达到新的状态-of-the-art性能，代码已开源。
AI.conclusion: 双曲空间与视觉Transformer结合有效提升了度量学习效果，为相关领域研究提供了新方向。

authors_text: Jiri Mekyska,Zdenek Smekal,Zoltan Galaz,Zdenek Mzourek,Irena Rektorova,Marcos Faundez-Zanuy,Karmele Lopez-De-Ipina
title: Perceptual Features as Markers of Parkinson's Disease: The Issue of Clinical Interpretability
title_zh: 感知特征作为帕金森病的标志：临床可解释性问题
comment: 8 pages, published in International Conference on NONLINEAR SPEECH PROCESSING, NOLISP 2015 jointly organized with the 25th Italian Workshop on Neural Networks, WIRN 2015, held at May 2015, Vietri sul Mare, Salerno, Italy
comments: 8 pages, published in International Conference on NONLINEAR SPEECH PROCESSING, NOLISP 2015 jointly organized with the 25th Italian Workshop on Neural Networks, WIRN 2015, held at May 2015, Vietri sul Mare, Salerno, Italy
abstract: Up to 90% of patients with Parkinson's disease (PD) suffer from hypokinetic dysathria (HD) which is also manifested in the field of phonation. Clinical signs of HD like monoloudness, monopitch or hoarse voice are usually quantified by conventional clinical interpretable features (jitter, shimmer, harmonic-to-noise ratio, etc.). This paper provides large and robust insight into perceptual analysis of 5 Czech vowels of 84 PD patients and proves that despite the clinical inexplicability the perceptual features outperform the conventional ones, especially in terms of discrimination power (classification accuracy ACC = 92 %, sensitivity SEN = 93 %, specificity SPE = 92 %) and partial correlation with clinical scores like UPDRS (Unified Parkinson's disease rating scale), MMSE (Mini-mental state examination) or FOG (Freezing of gait questionnaire), where p < 0.0001.
summary: Up to 90% of patients with Parkinson's disease (PD) suffer from hypokinetic dysathria (HD) which is also manifested in the field of phonation. Clinical signs of HD like monoloudness, monopitch or hoarse voice are usually quantified by conventional clinical interpretable features (jitter, shimmer, harmonic-to-noise ratio, etc.). This paper provides large and robust insight into perceptual analysis of 5 Czech vowels of 84 PD patients and proves that despite the clinical inexplicability the perceptual features outperform the conventional ones, especially in terms of discrimination power (classification accuracy ACC = 92 %, sensitivity SEN = 93 %, specificity SPE = 92 %) and partial correlation with clinical scores like UPDRS (Unified Parkinson's disease rating scale), MMSE (Mini-mental state examination) or FOG (Freezing of gait questionnaire), where p < 0.0001.
abstract_zh: 高达90%的帕金森病（PD）患者患有运动障碍（HD），这也表现在发声领域。 HD 的临床症状，如单响度、单音调或嘶哑声音，通常通过传统的临床可解释特征（抖动、闪烁、谐波噪声比等）进行量化。本文对 84 名帕金森病患者的 5 个捷克元音的感知分析提供了大量而有力的见解，并证明尽管临床上无法解释，但感知特征优于传统特征，特别是在区分能力（分类准确度 ACC = 92 %，敏感性 SEN = 93 %，特异性 SPE = 92 %）以及与 UPDRS（统一帕金森病评分量表）、MMSE 等临床评分的部分相关性方面（简易精神状态检查）或 FOG（冻结步态问卷），其中 p < 0.0001。

AI.tldr: 本文探讨感知特征作为帕金森病标志物的临床可解释性问题，并验证其相较于传统临床特征的优越性。
AI.motivation: 帕金森病患者常伴随运动障碍性构音障碍，传统临床特征虽具可解释性但可能缺乏诊断效能，需验证感知特征的临床价值。
AI.method: 分析84名帕金森病患者5个捷克元音的感知特征，通过分类准确率、敏感性、特异性及与临床评分的偏相关性评估其效能。
AI.result: 感知特征分类准确率达92%，敏感性93%，特异性92%，且与UPDRS、MMSE等评分存在显著统计学关联（p<0.0001）。
AI.conclusion: 感知特征在诊断效能和临床关联性上优于传统特征，为帕金森病的客观评估提供新方向，但需进一步解决其临床可解释性问题。

authors_text: Marc R. Schlichting,Stefan Notter,Walter Fichter
title: Long Short-Term Memory for Spatial Encoding in Multi-Agent Path Planning
title_zh: 多智能体路径规划中空间编码的长短期记忆
comment: For associated source code, see https://github.com/MarcSchlichting/LSTMSpatialEncoding , For associated video of flight test, see https://schlichting.page.link/lstm_flight_test , 17 pages, 11 figures
comments: For associated source code, see https://github.com/MarcSchlichting/LSTMSpatialEncoding , For associated video of flight test, see https://schlichting.page.link/lstm_flight_test , 17 pages, 11 figures
abstract: Reinforcement learning-based path planning for multi-agent systems of varying size constitutes a research topic with increasing significance as progress in domains such as urban air mobility and autonomous aerial vehicles continues. Reinforcement learning with continuous state and action spaces is used to train a policy network that accommodates desirable path planning behaviors and can be used for time-critical applications. A Long Short-Term Memory module is proposed to encode an unspecified number of states for a varying, indefinite number of agents. The described training strategies and policy architecture lead to a guidance that scales to an infinite number of agents and unlimited physical dimensions, although training takes place at a smaller scale. The guidance is implemented on a low-cost, off-the-shelf onboard computer. The feasibility of the proposed approach is validated by presenting flight test results of up to four drones, autonomously navigating collision-free in a real-world environment.
summary: Reinforcement learning-based path planning for multi-agent systems of varying size constitutes a research topic with increasing significance as progress in domains such as urban air mobility and autonomous aerial vehicles continues. Reinforcement learning with continuous state and action spaces is used to train a policy network that accommodates desirable path planning behaviors and can be used for time-critical applications. A Long Short-Term Memory module is proposed to encode an unspecified number of states for a varying, indefinite number of agents. The described training strategies and policy architecture lead to a guidance that scales to an infinite number of agents and unlimited physical dimensions, although training takes place at a smaller scale. The guidance is implemented on a low-cost, off-the-shelf onboard computer. The feasibility of the proposed approach is validated by presenting flight test results of up to four drones, autonomously navigating collision-free in a real-world environment.
abstract_zh: 随着城市空中交通和自主飞行器等领域的不断进步，针对不同规模的多智能体系统的基于强化学习的路径规划成为一个越来越重要的研究课题。具有连续状态和动作空间的强化学习用于训练策略网络，该网络可适应所需的路径规划行为，并可用于时间关键的应用程序。提出了一种长短期记忆模块来为变化的、不确定数量的代理编码未指定数量的状态。尽管训练规模较小，但所描述的训练策略和策略架构导致了可扩展到无限数量的代理和无限的物理尺寸的指导。该指南是在低成本、现成的机载计算机上实施的。通过展示多达四架无人机的飞行测试结果，验证了所提出方法的可行性，这些无人机在现实环境中无碰撞地自主导航。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于长短期记忆网络（LSTM）的多智能体路径规划方法，用于处理不同规模的多智能体系统中的空间编码问题。
AI.motivation: 随着城市空中交通和自主飞行器的发展，多智能体系统的路径规划需求日益增加，需要一种能够适应不同数量智能体、具备实时性和可扩展性的解决方案。
AI.method: 采用强化学习方法，结合连续状态和动作空间的策略网络，并引入LSTM模块以编码不确定数量的智能体状态，实现对无限数量智能体和物理维度的扩展能力。
AI.result: 通过实际飞行测试验证了该方法的可行性，最多四架无人机在真实环境中实现了无碰撞自主导航。
AI.conclusion: 该方法为多智能体路径规划提供了可扩展、实时的解决方案，适用于资源受限的实际应用场景。

authors_text: Yuedong Chen,Qianyi Wu,Chuanxia Zheng,Tat-Jen Cham,Jianfei Cai
title: Sem2NeRF: Converting Single-View Semantic Masks to Neural Radiance Fields
title_zh: Sem2NeRF：将单视图语义掩模转换为神经辐射场
comment: ECCV2022, Code: https://github.com/donydchen/sem2nerf Project Page: https://donydchen.github.io/sem2nerf/
comments: ECCV2022, Code: https://github.com/donydchen/sem2nerf Project Page: https://donydchen.github.io/sem2nerf/
abstract: Image translation and manipulation have gain increasing attention along with the rapid development of deep generative models. Although existing approaches have brought impressive results, they mainly operated in 2D space. In light of recent advances in NeRF-based 3D-aware generative models, we introduce a new task, Semantic-to-NeRF translation, that aims to reconstruct a 3D scene modelled by NeRF, conditioned on one single-view semantic mask as input. To kick-off this novel task, we propose the Sem2NeRF framework. In particular, Sem2NeRF addresses the highly challenging task by encoding the semantic mask into the latent code that controls the 3D scene representation of a pre-trained decoder. To further improve the accuracy of the mapping, we integrate a new region-aware learning strategy into the design of both the encoder and the decoder. We verify the efficacy of the proposed Sem2NeRF and demonstrate that it outperforms several strong baselines on two benchmark datasets. Code and video are available at https://donydchen.github.io/sem2nerf/
summary: Image translation and manipulation have gain increasing attention along with the rapid development of deep generative models. Although existing approaches have brought impressive results, they mainly operated in 2D space. In light of recent advances in NeRF-based 3D-aware generative models, we introduce a new task, Semantic-to-NeRF translation, that aims to reconstruct a 3D scene modelled by NeRF, conditioned on one single-view semantic mask as input. To kick-off this novel task, we propose the Sem2NeRF framework. In particular, Sem2NeRF addresses the highly challenging task by encoding the semantic mask into the latent code that controls the 3D scene representation of a pre-trained decoder. To further improve the accuracy of the mapping, we integrate a new region-aware learning strategy into the design of both the encoder and the decoder. We verify the efficacy of the proposed Sem2NeRF and demonstrate that it outperforms several strong baselines on two benchmark datasets. Code and video are available at https://donydchen.github.io/sem2nerf/
abstract_zh: 随着深度生成模型的快速发展，图像翻译和操作受到越来越多的关注。尽管现有方法带来了令人印象深刻的结果，但它们主要在二维空间中运行。鉴于基于 NeRF 的 3D 感知生成模型的最新进展，我们引入了一项新任务，即语义到 NeRF 转换，旨在重建由 NeRF 建模的 3D 场景，以一个单视图语义掩模作为输入。为了启动这项新颖的任务，我们提出了 Sem2NeRF 框架。特别是，Sem2NeRF 通过将语义掩码编码到控制预训练解码器的 3D 场景表示的潜在代码中来解决极具挑战性的任务。为了进一步提高映射的准确性，我们将新的区域感知学习策略集成到编码器和解码器的设计中。我们验证了所提出的 Sem2NeRF 的有效性，并证明它在两个基准数据集上优于几个强大的基线。代码和视频可在 https://donydchen.github.io/sem2nerf/ 获取

AI.tldr: 本文提出Sem2NeRF框架，通过单视角语义掩码重建NeRF建模的3D场景。
AI.motivation: 现有图像翻译方法局限于2D空间，而NeRF等3D生成模型尚未充分探索语义掩码到3D场景的转换任务。
AI.method: 设计Sem2NeRF框架，将语义掩码编码为潜在码控制预训练解码器，并引入区域感知学习策略优化映射准确性。
AI.result: 在两个基准数据集上优于多个强基线，代码和视频已公开。
AI.conclusion: 提出语义到NeRF的新任务及有效框架，验证了其在3D生成任务中的潜力。

authors_text: Akira Taniguchi,Shuya Ito,Tadahiro Taniguchi
title: Hierarchical Path-planning from Speech Instructions with Spatial Concept-based Topometric Semantic Mapping
title_zh: 基于空间概念的拓扑语义映射的语音指令分层路径规划
comment: Accepted to Frontiers in Robotics and AI
comments: Accepted to Frontiers in Robotics and AI
abstract: Assisting individuals in their daily activities through autonomous mobile robots, especially for users without specialized knowledge, is crucial. Specifically, the capability of robots to navigate to destinations based on human speech instructions is essential. While robots can take different paths to the same goal, the shortest path is not always the best. A preferred approach is to accommodate waypoint specifications flexibly, planning an improved alternative path, even with detours. Additionally, robots require real-time inference capabilities. This study aimed to realize a hierarchical spatial representation using a topometric semantic map and path planning with speech instructions, including waypoints. This paper presents Spatial Concept-based Topometric Semantic Mapping for Hierarchical Path Planning (SpCoTMHP), integrating place connectivity. This approach offers a novel integrated probabilistic generative model and fast approximate inference across hierarchy levels. A formulation based on control as probabilistic inference theoretically supports the proposed path planning algorithm. We conducted experiments in home environments using the Toyota Human Support Robot on the SIGVerse simulator and in a lab-office environment with the real robot, Albert. Users issued speech commands specifying the waypoint and goal, such as "Go to the bedroom via the corridor." Navigation experiments using speech instructions with a waypoint demonstrated a performance improvement of SpCoTMHP over the baseline hierarchical path planning method with heuristic path costs (HPP-I), in terms of the weighted success rate at which the robot reaches the closest target and passes the correct waypoints, by 0.590. The computation time was significantly accelerated by 7.14 seconds with SpCoTMHP compared to baseline HPP-I in advanced tasks.
summary: Assisting individuals in their daily activities through autonomous mobile robots, especially for users without specialized knowledge, is crucial. Specifically, the capability of robots to navigate to destinations based on human speech instructions is essential. While robots can take different paths to the same goal, the shortest path is not always the best. A preferred approach is to accommodate waypoint specifications flexibly, planning an improved alternative path, even with detours. Additionally, robots require real-time inference capabilities. This study aimed to realize a hierarchical spatial representation using a topometric semantic map and path planning with speech instructions, including waypoints. This paper presents Spatial Concept-based Topometric Semantic Mapping for Hierarchical Path Planning (SpCoTMHP), integrating place connectivity. This approach offers a novel integrated probabilistic generative model and fast approximate inference across hierarchy levels. A formulation based on control as probabilistic inference theoretically supports the proposed path planning algorithm. We conducted experiments in home environments using the Toyota Human Support Robot on the SIGVerse simulator and in a lab-office environment with the real robot, Albert. Users issued speech commands specifying the waypoint and goal, such as "Go to the bedroom via the corridor." Navigation experiments using speech instructions with a waypoint demonstrated a performance improvement of SpCoTMHP over the baseline hierarchical path planning method with heuristic path costs (HPP-I), in terms of the weighted success rate at which the robot reaches the closest target and passes the correct waypoints, by 0.590. The computation time was significantly accelerated by 7.14 seconds with SpCoTMHP compared to baseline HPP-I in advanced tasks.
abstract_zh: 通过自主移动机器人协助个人进行日常活动，特别是对于没有专业知识的用户来说，至关重要。具体来说，机器人根据人类语音指令导航到目的地的能力至关重要。虽然机器人可以采取不同的路径来实现同一目标，但最短的路径并不总是最好的。首选方法是灵活适应航路点规范，规划改进的替代路径，即使绕路也是如此。此外，机器人需要实时推理能力。本研究旨在使用地形语义图和带有语音指令（包括航路点）的路径规划来实现分层空间表示。本文提出了用于分层路径规划的基于空间概念的拓扑语义映射（SpCoTMHP），集成了地点连接性。这种方法提供了一种新颖的集成概率生成模型和跨层次结构的快速近似推理。基于控制作为概率推理的公式在理论上支持所提出的路径规划算法。我们在 SIGVerse 模拟器上使用丰田人类支持机器人在家庭环境中进行了实验，并在实验室办公室环境中使用真实的机器人 Albert 进行了实验。用户发出指定路径点和目标的语音命令，例如“通过走廊去卧室”。使用带有路点的语音指令进行的导航实验表明，与具有启发式路径成本 (HPP-I) 的基线分层路径规划方法 (HPP-I) 相比，SpCoTMHP 的性能提高了，就机器人到达最近目标并通过正确路点的加权成功率而言，提高了 0.590。与高级任务中的基线 HPP-I 相比，SpCoTMHP 的计算时间显着加快了 7.14 秒。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于空间概念的拓扑语义映射（SpCoTMHP）方法，实现从语音指令中进行分层路径规划，支持包含路标点的复杂导航任务。
AI.motivation: 现有机器人导航系统难以灵活处理包含路标点的语音指令，且存在实时性不足的问题，需开发兼顾路径优化与语义理解的高效方法。
AI.method: 构建空间概念驱动的拓扑语义地图，集成场所连通性，设计概率生成模型与分层近似推理算法，将控制问题转化为概率推断，实现语音指令解析与路径规划的统一。
AI.result: 在家庭和实验室环境中，SpCoTMHP相较基线方法在加权成功率上提升0.590，复杂任务计算时间缩短7.14秒。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过语义地图与概率推理的结合，有效提升了语音指令驱动的路径规划性能，为复杂场景下的机器人导航提供了新思路。

ai_content.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于空间概念的拓扑语义映射（SpCoTMHP）方法，实现从语音指令中进行分层路径规划，支持包含路标点的复杂导航任务。
ai_content.motivation: 现有机器人导航系统难以灵活处理包含路标点的语音指令，且存在实时性不足的问题，需开发兼顾路径优化与语义理解的高效方法。
ai_content.method: 构建空间概念驱动的拓扑语义地图，集成场所连通性，设计概率生成模型与分层近似推理算法，将控制问题转化为概率推断，实现语音指令解析与路径规划的统一。
ai_content.result: 在家庭和实验室环境中，SpCoTMHP相较基线方法在加权成功率上提升0.590，复杂任务计算时间缩短7.14秒。
ai_content.conclusion: 该方法通过语义地图与概率推理的结合，有效提升了语音指令驱动的路径规划性能，为复杂场景下的机器人导航提供了新思路。

search_text: Hierarchical Path-planning from Speech Instructions with Spatial Concept-based Topometric Semantic Mapping 基于空间概念的拓扑语义映射的语音指令分层路径规划 Assisting individuals in their daily activities through autonomous mobile robots, especially for users without specialized knowledge, is crucial. Specifically, the capability of robots to navigate to destinations based on human speech instructions is essential. While robots can take different paths to the same goal, the shortest path is not always the best. A preferred approach is to accommodate waypoint specifications flexibly, planning an improved alternative path, even with detours. Additionally, robots require real-time inference capabilities. This study aimed to realize a hierarchical spatial representation using a topometric semantic map and path planning with speech instructions, including waypoints. This paper presents Spatial Concept-based Topometric Semantic Mapping for Hierarchical Path Planning (SpCoTMHP), integrating place connectivity. This approach offers a novel integrated probabilistic generative model and fast approximate inference across hierarchy levels. A formulation based on control as probabilistic inference theoretically supports the proposed path planning algorithm. We conducted experiments in home environments using the Toyota Human Support Robot on the SIGVerse simulator and in a lab-office environment with the real robot, Albert. Users issued speech commands specifying the waypoint and goal, such as "Go to the bedroom via the corridor." Navigation experiments using speech instructions with a waypoint demonstrated a performance improvement of SpCoTMHP over the baseline hierarchical path planning method with heuristic path costs (HPP-I), in terms of the weighted success rate at which the robot reaches the closest target and passes the correct waypoints, by 0.590. The computation time was significantly accelerated by 7.14 seconds with SpCoTMHP compared to baseline HPP-I in advanced tasks. 通过自主移动机器人协助个人进行日常活动，特别是对于没有专业知识的用户来说，至关重要。具体来说，机器人根据人类语音指令导航到目的地的能力至关重要。虽然机器人可以采取不同的路径来实现同一目标，但最短的路径并不总是最好的。首选方法是灵活适应航路点规范，规划改进的替代路径，即使绕路也是如此。此外，机器人需要实时推理能力。本研究旨在使用地形语义图和带有语音指令（包括航路点）的路径规划来实现分层空间表示。本文提出了用于分层路径规划的基于空间概念的拓扑语义映射（SpCoTMHP），集成了地点连接性。这种方法提供了一种新颖的集成概率生成模型和跨层次结构的快速近似推理。基于控制作为概率推理的公式在理论上支持所提出的路径规划算法。我们在 SIGVerse 模拟器上使用丰田人类支持机器人在家庭环境中进行了实验，并在实验室办公室环境中使用真实的机器人 Albert 进行了实验。用户发出指定路径点和目标的语音命令，例如“通过走廊去卧室”。使用带有路点的语音指令进行的导航实验表明，与具有启发式路径成本 (HPP-I) 的基线分层路径规划方法 (HPP-I) 相比，SpCoTMHP 的性能提高了，就机器人到达最近目标并通过正确路点的加权成功率而言，提高了 0.590。与高级任务中的基线 HPP-I 相比，SpCoTMHP 的计算时间显着加快了 7.14 秒。 本文提出了一种基于空间概念的拓扑语义映射（SpCoTMHP）方法，实现从语音指令中进行分层路径规划，支持包含路标点的复杂导航任务。 Akira Taniguchi,Shuya Ito,Tadahiro Taniguchi cs.RO,cs.AI

authors_text: Bohong Chen,Mingbao Lin,Kekai Sheng,Mengdan Zhang,Peixian Chen,Ke Li,Liujuan Cao,Rongrong Ji
title: ARM: Any-Time Super-Resolution Method
title_zh: ARM：随时超分辨率方法
abstract: This paper proposes an Any-time super-Resolution Method (ARM) to tackle the over-parameterized single image super-resolution (SISR) models. Our ARM is motivated by three observations: (1) The performance of different image patches varies with SISR networks of different sizes. (2) There is a tradeoff between computation overhead and performance of the reconstructed image. (3) Given an input image, its edge information can be an effective option to estimate its PSNR. Subsequently, we train an ARM supernet containing SISR subnets of different sizes to deal with image patches of various complexity. To that effect, we construct an Edge-to-PSNR lookup table that maps the edge score of an image patch to the PSNR performance for each subnet, together with a set of computation costs for the subnets. In the inference, the image patches are individually distributed to different subnets for a better computation-performance tradeoff. Moreover, each SISR subnet shares weights of the ARM supernet, thus no extra parameters are introduced. The setting of multiple subnets can well adapt the computational cost of SISR model to the dynamically available hardware resources, allowing the SISR task to be in service at any time. Extensive experiments on resolution datasets of different sizes with popular SISR networks as backbones verify the effectiveness and the versatility of our ARM. The source code is available at https://github.com/chenbong/ARM-Net.
summary: This paper proposes an Any-time super-Resolution Method (ARM) to tackle the over-parameterized single image super-resolution (SISR) models. Our ARM is motivated by three observations: (1) The performance of different image patches varies with SISR networks of different sizes. (2) There is a tradeoff between computation overhead and performance of the reconstructed image. (3) Given an input image, its edge information can be an effective option to estimate its PSNR. Subsequently, we train an ARM supernet containing SISR subnets of different sizes to deal with image patches of various complexity. To that effect, we construct an Edge-to-PSNR lookup table that maps the edge score of an image patch to the PSNR performance for each subnet, together with a set of computation costs for the subnets. In the inference, the image patches are individually distributed to different subnets for a better computation-performance tradeoff. Moreover, each SISR subnet shares weights of the ARM supernet, thus no extra parameters are introduced. The setting of multiple subnets can well adapt the computational cost of SISR model to the dynamically available hardware resources, allowing the SISR task to be in service at any time. Extensive experiments on resolution datasets of different sizes with popular SISR networks as backbones verify the effectiveness and the versatility of our ARM. The source code is available at https://github.com/chenbong/ARM-Net.
abstract_zh: 本文提出了一种随时超分辨率方法（ARM）来解决过度参数化的单图像超分辨率（SISR）模型。我们的 ARM 受到三个观察的启发：（1）不同图像块的性能随不同大小的 SISR 网络而变化。 (2)计算开销和重建图像的性能之间存在权衡。 (3) 给定输入图像，其边缘信息可以是估计其 PSNR 的有效选择。随后，我们训练一个包含不同大小的 SISR 子网的 ARM 超网来处理各种复杂度的图像块。为此，我们构建了一个边缘到 PSNR 查找表，将图像块的边缘得分映射到每个子网的 PSNR 性能，以及子网的一组计算成本。在推理中，图像块被单独分布到不同的子网，以获得更好的计算性能权衡。此外，每个SISR子网共享ARM超网的权重，因此没有引入额外的参数。多个子网的设置可以很好地使SISR模型的计算成本适应动态可用的硬件资源，使得SISR任务可以随时投入使用。以流行的 SISR 网络为骨干，对不同大小的分辨率数据集进行大量实验，验证了我们的 ARM 的有效性和多功能性。源代码可从 https://github.com/chenbong/ARM-Net 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种任意时间超分辨率方法（ARM），通过动态分配不同规模的子网络来处理图像块，以实现计算资源与重建性能的平衡。
AI.motivation: 现有超分辨率模型参数过多，无法适应动态变化的硬件资源；不同图像块对网络规模的需求不同，且计算成本与性能存在权衡关系。
AI.method: 构建包含多规模子网络的超网络（supernet），利用边缘信息生成PSNR查找表，根据图像块复杂度动态分配子网络，并共享权重以避免参数冗余。
AI.result: 在多种分辨率数据集上验证了ARM的有效性，实验表明其能适应不同硬件资源，且无需额外参数即可实现高效超分辨率。
AI.conclusion: ARM通过动态子网络分配和边缘驱动的性能预测，实现了计算资源与超分辨率性能的自适应平衡，具有广泛的应用价值。

authors_text: Yunseung Lee,Pilsung Kang
title: AnoViT: Unsupervised Anomaly Detection and Localization with Vision Transformer-based Encoder-Decoder
title_zh: AnoViT：使用基于视觉 Transformer 的编码器-解码器进行无监督异常检测和定位
abstract: Image anomaly detection problems aim to determine whether an image is abnormal, and to detect anomalous areas. These methods are actively used in various fields such as manufacturing, medical care, and intelligent information. Encoder-decoder structures have been widely used in the field of anomaly detection because they can easily learn normal patterns in an unsupervised learning environment and calculate a score to identify abnormalities through a reconstruction error indicating the difference between input and reconstructed images. Therefore, current image anomaly detection methods have commonly used convolutional encoder-decoders to extract normal information through the local features of images. However, they are limited in that only local features of the image can be utilized when constructing a normal representation owing to the characteristics of convolution operations using a filter of fixed size. Therefore, we propose a vision transformer-based encoder-decoder model, named AnoViT, designed to reflect normal information by additionally learning the global relationship between image patches, which is capable of both image anomaly detection and localization. The proposed approach constructs a feature map that maintains the existing location information of individual patches by using the embeddings of all patches passed through multiple self-attention layers. The proposed AnoViT model performed better than the convolution-based model on three benchmark datasets. In MVTecAD, which is a representative benchmark dataset for anomaly localization, it showed improved results on 10 out of 15 classes compared with the baseline. Furthermore, the proposed method showed good performance regardless of the class and type of the anomalous area when localization results were evaluated qualitatively.
summary: Image anomaly detection problems aim to determine whether an image is abnormal, and to detect anomalous areas. These methods are actively used in various fields such as manufacturing, medical care, and intelligent information. Encoder-decoder structures have been widely used in the field of anomaly detection because they can easily learn normal patterns in an unsupervised learning environment and calculate a score to identify abnormalities through a reconstruction error indicating the difference between input and reconstructed images. Therefore, current image anomaly detection methods have commonly used convolutional encoder-decoders to extract normal information through the local features of images. However, they are limited in that only local features of the image can be utilized when constructing a normal representation owing to the characteristics of convolution operations using a filter of fixed size. Therefore, we propose a vision transformer-based encoder-decoder model, named AnoViT, designed to reflect normal information by additionally learning the global relationship between image patches, which is capable of both image anomaly detection and localization. The proposed approach constructs a feature map that maintains the existing location information of individual patches by using the embeddings of all patches passed through multiple self-attention layers. The proposed AnoViT model performed better than the convolution-based model on three benchmark datasets. In MVTecAD, which is a representative benchmark dataset for anomaly localization, it showed improved results on 10 out of 15 classes compared with the baseline. Furthermore, the proposed method showed good performance regardless of the class and type of the anomalous area when localization results were evaluated qualitatively.
abstract_zh: 图像异常检测问题旨在确定图像是否异常，并检测异常区域。这些方法被积极应用于制造、医疗、智能信息等各个领域。编码器-解码器结构已广泛应用于异常检测领域，因为它们可以在无监督学习环境中轻松学习正常模式，并通过指示输入图像和重建图像之间差异的重建误差计算分数来识别异常。因此，当前的图像异常检测方法普遍采用卷积编解码器通过图像的局部特征提取正常信息。然而，它们的局限性在于，由于使用固定大小的滤波器的卷积运算的特性，在构造正常表示时只能利用图像的局部特征。因此，我们提出了一种基于视觉变换器的编码器-解码器模型，名为 AnoViT，旨在通过额外学习图像块之间的全局关系来反映正常信息，该模型能够进行图像异常检测和定位。所提出的方法构建了一个特征图，该特征图通过使用通过多个​​自注意力层的所有补丁的嵌入来维护各个补丁的现有位置信息。所提出的 AnoViT 模型在三个基准数据集上的表现优于基于卷积的模型。在异常定位的代表性基准数据集 MVTecAD 中，与基线相比，它在 15 个类别中的 10 个类别上显示出改进的结果。此外，在定性评估定位结果时，无论异常区域的类别和类型如何，所提出的方法都表现出良好的性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出基于视觉Transformer的编码器-解码器模型AnoViT，用于无监督图像异常检测与定位。
AI.motivation: 传统卷积编码器-解码器仅能利用局部特征构建正常表示，难以捕捉图像全局关系，限制了异常检测与定位性能。
AI.method: 设计基于视觉Transformer的编码器-解码器结构，通过多层自注意力机制学习图像块的全局关系，并保留块的位置信息生成特征图。
AI.result: 在三个基准数据集上优于卷积模型，在MVTecAD数据集15个类别中10个类别表现更优，且定位结果对异常类型和类别具有鲁棒性。
AI.conclusion: AnoViT通过全局关系建模提升了异常检测与定位能力，验证了视觉Transformer在无监督异常检测任务中的有效性。

search_text: AnoViT: Unsupervised Anomaly Detection and Localization with Vision Transformer-based Encoder-Decoder AnoViT：使用基于视觉 Transformer 的编码器-解码器进行无监督异常检测和定位 Image anomaly detection problems aim to determine whether an image is abnormal, and to detect anomalous areas. These methods are actively used in various fields such as manufacturing, medical care, and intelligent information. Encoder-decoder structures have been widely used in the field of anomaly detection because they can easily learn normal patterns in an unsupervised learning environment and calculate a score to identify abnormalities through a reconstruction error indicating the difference between input and reconstructed images. Therefore, current image anomaly detection methods have commonly used convolutional encoder-decoders to extract normal information through the local features of images. However, they are limited in that only local features of the image can be utilized when constructing a normal representation owing to the characteristics of convolution operations using a filter of fixed size. Therefore, we propose a vision transformer-based encoder-decoder model, named AnoViT, designed to reflect normal information by additionally learning the global relationship between image patches, which is capable of both image anomaly detection and localization. The proposed approach constructs a feature map that maintains the existing location information of individual patches by using the embeddings of all patches passed through multiple self-attention layers. The proposed AnoViT model performed better than the convolution-based model on three benchmark datasets. In MVTecAD, which is a representative benchmark dataset for anomaly localization, it showed improved results on 10 out of 15 classes compared with the baseline. Furthermore, the proposed method showed good performance regardless of the class and type of the anomalous area when localization results were evaluated qualitatively. 图像异常检测问题旨在确定图像是否异常，并检测异常区域。这些方法被积极应用于制造、医疗、智能信息等各个领域。编码器-解码器结构已广泛应用于异常检测领域，因为它们可以在无监督学习环境中轻松学习正常模式，并通过指示输入图像和重建图像之间差异的重建误差计算分数来识别异常。因此，当前的图像异常检测方法普遍采用卷积编解码器通过图像的局部特征提取正常信息。然而，它们的局限性在于，由于使用固定大小的滤波器的卷积运算的特性，在构造正常表示时只能利用图像的局部特征。因此，我们提出了一种基于视觉变换器的编码器-解码器模型，名为 AnoViT，旨在通过额外学习图像块之间的全局关系来反映正常信息，该模型能够进行图像异常检测和定位。所提出的方法构建了一个特征图，该特征图通过使用通过多个​​自注意力层的所有补丁的嵌入来维护各个补丁的现有位置信息。所提出的 AnoViT 模型在三个基准数据集上的表现优于基于卷积的模型。在异常定位的代表性基准数据集 MVTecAD 中，与基线相比，它在 15 个类别中的 10 个类别上显示出改进的结果。此外，在定性评估定位结果时，无论异常区域的类别和类型如何，所提出的方法都表现出良好的性能。 本文提出基于视觉Transformer的编码器-解码器模型AnoViT，用于无监督图像异常检测与定位。 Yunseung Lee,Pilsung Kang cs.CV,cs.LG

authors_text: Haoqi Wang,Zhizhong Li,Litong Feng,Wayne Zhang
title: ViM: Out-Of-Distribution with Virtual-logit Matching
title_zh: ViM：具有虚拟 logit 匹配的分布外
abstract: Most of the existing Out-Of-Distribution (OOD) detection algorithms depend on single input source: the feature, the logit, or the softmax probability. However, the immense diversity of the OOD examples makes such methods fragile. There are OOD samples that are easy to identify in the feature space while hard to distinguish in the logit space and vice versa. Motivated by this observation, we propose a novel OOD scoring method named Virtual-logit Matching (ViM), which combines the class-agnostic score from feature space and the In-Distribution (ID) class-dependent logits. Specifically, an additional logit representing the virtual OOD class is generated from the residual of the feature against the principal space, and then matched with the original logits by a constant scaling. The probability of this virtual logit after softmax is the indicator of OOD-ness. To facilitate the evaluation of large-scale OOD detection in academia, we create a new OOD dataset for ImageNet-1K, which is human-annotated and is 8.8x the size of existing datasets. We conducted extensive experiments, including CNNs and vision transformers, to demonstrate the effectiveness of the proposed ViM score. In particular, using the BiT-S model, our method gets an average AUROC 90.91% on four difficult OOD benchmarks, which is 4% ahead of the best baseline. Code and dataset are available at https://github.com/haoqiwang/vim.
summary: Most of the existing Out-Of-Distribution (OOD) detection algorithms depend on single input source: the feature, the logit, or the softmax probability. However, the immense diversity of the OOD examples makes such methods fragile. There are OOD samples that are easy to identify in the feature space while hard to distinguish in the logit space and vice versa. Motivated by this observation, we propose a novel OOD scoring method named Virtual-logit Matching (ViM), which combines the class-agnostic score from feature space and the In-Distribution (ID) class-dependent logits. Specifically, an additional logit representing the virtual OOD class is generated from the residual of the feature against the principal space, and then matched with the original logits by a constant scaling. The probability of this virtual logit after softmax is the indicator of OOD-ness. To facilitate the evaluation of large-scale OOD detection in academia, we create a new OOD dataset for ImageNet-1K, which is human-annotated and is 8.8x the size of existing datasets. We conducted extensive experiments, including CNNs and vision transformers, to demonstrate the effectiveness of the proposed ViM score. In particular, using the BiT-S model, our method gets an average AUROC 90.91% on four difficult OOD benchmarks, which is 4% ahead of the best baseline. Code and dataset are available at https://github.com/haoqiwang/vim.
abstract_zh: 大多数现有的分布外 (OOD) 检测算法依赖于单一输入源：特征、logit 或 softmax 概率。然而，OOD 示例的巨大多样性使得此类方法变得脆弱。有些 OOD 样本在特征空间中很容易识别，但在 Logit 空间中很难区分，反之亦然。受这一观察的启发，我们提出了一种名为虚拟 logit 匹配 (ViM) 的新颖的 OOD 评分方法，该方法结合了特征空间中的类不可知分数和分布内 (ID) 类相关 logits。具体来说，表示虚拟 OOD 类的附加 logit 是根据主空间的特征残差生成的，然后通过恒定缩放与原始 logit 进行匹配。 softmax 之后的虚拟 logit 的概率是 OOD-ness 的指标。为了促进学术界大规模 OOD 检测的评估，我们为 ImageNet-1K 创建了一个新的 OOD 数据集，该数据集经过人工注释，大小是现有数据集的 8.8 倍。我们进行了广泛的实验，包括 CNN 和视觉转换器，以证明所提出的 ViM 评分的有效性。特别是，使用 BiT-S 模型，我们的方法在四个困难的 OOD 基准上获得平均 AUROC 90.91%，比最佳基准领先 4%。代码和数据集可在 https://github.com/haoqiwang/vim 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种名为ViM的新型OOD检测方法，通过结合特征空间和logit空间的信息来提升检测性能，并构建了大规模ImageNet-1K OOD数据集。
AI.motivation: 现有OOD检测方法依赖单一输入源（如特征或logit），难以应对OOD样本在不同空间中的分布差异，导致检测效果不稳定。
AI.method: 生成虚拟logit：从特征残差中构造虚拟OOD类logit，通过常数缩放匹配原始logit，最终利用softmax概率判断OOD性。
AI.result: 在四个困难OOD基准上，BiT-S模型实现90.91%平均AUROC，优于最佳基线4%；构建了8.8倍于现有数据集规模的ImageNet-1K OOD数据集。
AI.conclusion: ViM方法通过融合多空间信息显著提升OOD检测鲁棒性，新数据集为大规模OOD研究提供支持。

authors_text: Tobias Czempiel,Coco Rogers,Matthias Keicher,Magdalini Paschali,Rickmer Braren,Egon Burian,Marcus Makowski,Nassir Navab,Thomas Wendler,Seong Tae Kim
title: Longitudinal Self-Supervision for COVID-19 Pathology Quantification
title_zh: COVID-19 病理量化的纵向自我监督
abstract: Quantifying COVID-19 infection over time is an important task to manage the hospitalization of patients during a global pandemic. Recently, deep learning-based approaches have been proposed to help radiologists automatically quantify COVID-19 pathologies on longitudinal CT scans. However, the learning process of deep learning methods demands extensive training data to learn the complex characteristics of infected regions over longitudinal scans. It is challenging to collect a large-scale dataset, especially for longitudinal training. In this study, we want to address this problem by proposing a new self-supervised learning method to effectively train longitudinal networks for the quantification of COVID-19 infections. For this purpose, longitudinal self-supervision schemes are explored on clinical longitudinal COVID-19 CT scans. Experimental results show that the proposed method is effective, helping the model better exploit the semantics of longitudinal data and improve two COVID-19 quantification tasks.
summary: Quantifying COVID-19 infection over time is an important task to manage the hospitalization of patients during a global pandemic. Recently, deep learning-based approaches have been proposed to help radiologists automatically quantify COVID-19 pathologies on longitudinal CT scans. However, the learning process of deep learning methods demands extensive training data to learn the complex characteristics of infected regions over longitudinal scans. It is challenging to collect a large-scale dataset, especially for longitudinal training. In this study, we want to address this problem by proposing a new self-supervised learning method to effectively train longitudinal networks for the quantification of COVID-19 infections. For this purpose, longitudinal self-supervision schemes are explored on clinical longitudinal COVID-19 CT scans. Experimental results show that the proposed method is effective, helping the model better exploit the semantics of longitudinal data and improve two COVID-19 quantification tasks.
abstract_zh: 随着时间的推移量化 COVID-19 感染是在全球大流行期间管理患者住院的一项重要任务。最近，基于深度学习的方法被提出来帮助放射科医生在纵向 CT 扫描上自动量化 COVID-19 病理。然而，深度学习方法的学习过程需要大量的训练数据来了解纵向扫描中感染区域的复杂特征。收集大规模数据集是一项挑战，尤其是纵向训练。在这项研究中，我们希望通过提出一种新的自我监督学习方法来解决这个问题，以有效地训练纵向网络来量化 COVID-19 感染。为此，我们在临床纵向 COVID-19 CT 扫描中探索了纵向自我监督方案。实验结果表明，所提出的方法是有效的，帮助模型更好地利用纵向数据的语义并改进了两项COVID-19量化任务。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种纵向自监督学习方法，用于训练量化COVID-19感染的深度学习模型。
AI.motivation: 现有深度学习方法需大量标注数据训练，但纵向CT扫描数据难以大规模收集，限制了模型性能。
AI.method: 在临床纵向CT扫描数据上设计纵向自监督学习方案，通过时间序列特征学习感染区域语义。
AI.result: 实验表明该方法能有效提升两个COVID-19病理量化任务的准确性。
AI.conclusion: 纵向自监督学习可充分利用时间维度信息，改善感染量化模型的训练效果。

In this study, we want to address this problem by proposing a new self-supervised learning method to effectively train longitudinal networks for the quantification of COVID-19 infections. For this purpose, longitudinal self-supervision schemes are explored on clinical longitudinal COVID-19 CT scans. Experimental results show that the proposed method is effective, helping the model better exploit the semantics of longitudinal data and improve two COVID-19 quantification tasks. 随着时间的推移量化 COVID-19 感染是在全球大流行期间管理患者住院的一项重要任务。最近，基于深度学习的方法被提出来帮助放射科医生在纵向 CT 扫描上自动量化 COVID-19 病理。然而，深度学习方法的学习过程需要大量的训练数据来了解纵向扫描中感染区域的复杂特征。收集大规模数据集是一项挑战，尤其是纵向训练。在这项研究中，我们希望通过提出一种新的自我监督学习方法来解决这个问题，以有效地训练纵向网络来量化 COVID-19 感染。为此，我们在临床纵向 COVID-19 CT 扫描中探索了纵向自我监督方案。实验结果表明，所提出的方法是有效的，帮助模型更好地利用纵向数据的语义并改进了两项COVID-19量化任务。 本文提出一种纵向自监督学习方法，用于训练量化COVID-19感染的深度学习模型。 Tobias Czempiel,Coco Rogers,Matthias Keicher,Magdalini Paschali,Rickmer Braren,Egon Burian,Marcus Makowski,Nassir Navab,Thomas Wendler,Seong Tae Kim eess.IV,cs.CV

authors_text: Jože M. Rožanec,Inna Novalija,Patrik Zajec,Klemen Kenda,Hooman Tavakoli,Sungho Suh,Entso Veliou,Dimitrios Papamartzivanos,Thanassis Giannetsos,Sofia Anna Menesidou,Ruben Alonso,Nino Cauli,Antonello Meloni,Diego Reforgiato Recupero,Dimosthenis Kyriazis,Georgios Sofianidis,Spyros Theodoropoulos,Blaž Fortuna,Dunja Mladenić,John Soldatos
title: Human-Centric Artificial Intelligence Architecture for Industry 5.0 Applications
title_zh: 面向工业 5.0 应用的以人为本的人工智能架构
abstract: Human-centricity is the core value behind the evolution of manufacturing towards Industry 5.0. Nevertheless, there is a lack of architecture that considers safety, trustworthiness, and human-centricity at its core. Therefore, we propose an architecture that integrates Artificial Intelligence (Active Learning, Forecasting, Explainable Artificial Intelligence), simulated reality, decision-making, and users' feedback, focusing on synergies between humans and machines. Furthermore, we align the proposed architecture with the Big Data Value Association Reference Architecture Model. Finally, we validate it on three use cases from real-world case studies.
summary: Human-centricity is the core value behind the evolution of manufacturing towards Industry 5.0. Nevertheless, there is a lack of architecture that considers safety, trustworthiness, and human-centricity at its core. Therefore, we propose an architecture that integrates Artificial Intelligence (Active Learning, Forecasting, Explainable Artificial Intelligence), simulated reality, decision-making, and users' feedback, focusing on synergies between humans and machines. Furthermore, we align the proposed architecture with the Big Data Value Association Reference Architecture Model. Finally, we validate it on three use cases from real-world case studies.
abstract_zh: 以人为本是制造业向工业5.0演进的核心价值。然而，缺乏以安全、可信和以人为本为核心的架构。因此，我们提出了一种集成人工智能（主动学习、预测、可解释人工智能）、模拟现实、决策和用户反馈的架构，重点关注人与机器之间的协同作用。此外，我们将所提出的架构与大数据价值关联参考架构模型保持一致。最后，我们在现实案例研究中的三个用例上验证了它。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种整合人工智能与用户反馈的人本架构，以满足工业5.0中安全、可信与人机协同的需求，并通过实际案例验证其有效性。
AI.motivation: 工业5.0强调人本价值，但现有架构缺乏对安全性、可信度及人机协同的系统性整合，亟需创新解决方案。
AI.method: 融合主动学习、预测、可解释AI等技术，结合模拟现实与用户反馈机制，构建符合大数据参考架构模型的集成框架。
AI.result: 通过三个实际案例验证，证明该架构能有效提升工业场景中人机协作的安全性与决策可靠性。
AI.conclusion: 提出的架构为工业5.0提供了可落地的人本AI框架，未来需进一步优化技术适配性与规模化应用能力。

authors_text: Juntae Kim,Sung Min Ban
title: Phase-Aware Spoof Speech Detection Based on Res2Net with Phase Network
title_zh: 基于 Res2Net 和 Phase 网络的相位感知欺骗语音检测
abstract: The spoof speech detection (SSD) is the essential countermeasure for automatic speaker verification systems. Although SSD with magnitude features in the frequency domain has shown promising results, the phase information also can be important to capture the artefacts of certain types of spoofing attacks. Thus, both magnitude and phase features must be considered to ensure the generalization ability to diverse types of spoofing attacks. In this paper, we investigate the failure reason of feature-level fusion of the previous works through the entropy analysis from which we found that the randomness difference between magnitude and phase features is large, which can interrupt the feature-level fusion via backend neural network; thus, we propose a phase network to reduce that difference. Our SSD system: phase network equipped Res2Net achieved significant performance improvement, specifically in the spoofing attack for which the phase information is considered to be important. Also, we demonstrate our SSD system in both known- and unknown-kind SSD scenarios for practical applications.
summary: The spoof speech detection (SSD) is the essential countermeasure for automatic speaker verification systems. Although SSD with magnitude features in the frequency domain has shown promising results, the phase information also can be important to capture the artefacts of certain types of spoofing attacks. Thus, both magnitude and phase features must be considered to ensure the generalization ability to diverse types of spoofing attacks. In this paper, we investigate the failure reason of feature-level fusion of the previous works through the entropy analysis from which we found that the randomness difference between magnitude and phase features is large, which can interrupt the feature-level fusion via backend neural network; thus, we propose a phase network to reduce that difference. Our SSD system: phase network equipped Res2Net achieved significant performance improvement, specifically in the spoofing attack for which the phase information is considered to be important. Also, we demonstrate our SSD system in both known- and unknown-kind SSD scenarios for practical applications.
abstract_zh: 欺骗语音检测（SSD）是自动说话人验证系统的基本对策。尽管在频域中具有幅度特征的 SSD 已显示出有希望的结果，但相位信息对于捕获某些类型的欺骗攻击的伪影也很重要。因此，必须考虑幅度和相位特征，以确保对不同类型的欺骗攻击的泛化能力。本文通过熵分析研究了前人工作中特征级融合失败的原因，发现幅度和相位特征之间的随机性差异较大，可以通过后端神经网络中断特征级融合；因此，我们提出了一个相位网络来减少这种差异。我们的 SSD 系统：配备 Res2Net 的相位网络取得了显着的性能提升，特别是在相位信息被认为很重要的欺骗攻击中。此外，我们还在已知和未知类型的 SSD 场景中展示了我们的 SSD 系统，以供实际应用。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种结合Res2Net与相位网络的欺骗语音检测方法，通过利用相位信息提升检测性能。
AI.motivation: 现有方法仅依赖幅度特征存在局限，而相位信息对某些欺骗攻击的检测至关重要，但幅度与相位特征的随机性差异导致特征级融合效果不佳。
AI.method: 通过熵分析发现幅度与相位特征随机性差异问题，设计相位网络减少差异，并基于Res2Net构建融合相位信息的检测系统。
AI.result: 在相位信息关键的欺骗攻击场景中性能显著提升，且系统在已知和未知类型欺骗检测中均表现有效。
AI.conclusion: 相位信息对提升欺骗语音检测泛化能力具有重要意义，所提方法在实际应用中具有良好适应性。

Also, we demonstrate our SSD system in both known- and unknown-kind SSD scenarios for practical applications. 欺骗语音检测（SSD）是自动说话人验证系统的基本对策。尽管在频域中具有幅度特征的 SSD 已显示出有希望的结果，但相位信息对于捕获某些类型的欺骗攻击的伪影也很重要。因此，必须考虑幅度和相位特征，以确保对不同类型的欺骗攻击的泛化能力。本文通过熵分析研究了前人工作中特征级融合失败的原因，发现幅度和相位特征之间的随机性差异较大，可以通过后端神经网络中断特征级融合；因此，我们提出了一个相位网络来减少这种差异。我们的 SSD 系统：配备 Res2Net 的相位网络取得了显着的性能提升，特别是在相位信息被认为很重要的欺骗攻击中。此外，我们还在已知和未知类型的 SSD 场景中展示了我们的 SSD 系统，以供实际应用。 本文提出一种结合Res2Net与相位网络的欺骗语音检测方法，通过利用相位信息提升检测性能。 Juntae Kim,Sung Min Ban cs.SD,cs.AI,eess.AS

authors_text: Rui Yang,Hailong Ma,Jie Wu,Yansong Tang,Xuefeng Xiao,Min Zheng,Xiu Li
title: ScalableViT: Rethinking the Context-oriented Generalization of Vision Transformer
title_zh: ScalableViT：重新思考 Vision Transformer 的面向上下文的泛化
abstract: The vanilla self-attention mechanism inherently relies on pre-defined and steadfast computational dimensions. Such inflexibility restricts it from possessing context-oriented generalization that can bring more contextual cues and global representations. To mitigate this issue, we propose a Scalable Self-Attention (SSA) mechanism that leverages two scaling factors to release dimensions of query, key, and value matrices while unbinding them with the input. This scalability fetches context-oriented generalization and enhances object sensitivity, which pushes the whole network into a more effective trade-off state between accuracy and cost. Furthermore, we propose an Interactive Window-based Self-Attention (IWSA), which establishes interaction between non-overlapping regions by re-merging independent value tokens and aggregating spatial information from adjacent windows. By stacking the SSA and IWSA alternately, the Scalable Vision Transformer (ScalableViT) achieves state-of-the-art performance in general-purpose vision tasks. For example, ScalableViT-S outperforms Twins-SVT-S by 1.4% and Swin-T by 1.8% on ImageNet-1K classification.
summary: The vanilla self-attention mechanism inherently relies on pre-defined and steadfast computational dimensions. Such inflexibility restricts it from possessing context-oriented generalization that can bring more contextual cues and global representations. To mitigate this issue, we propose a Scalable Self-Attention (SSA) mechanism that leverages two scaling factors to release dimensions of query, key, and value matrices while unbinding them with the input. This scalability fetches context-oriented generalization and enhances object sensitivity, which pushes the whole network into a more effective trade-off state between accuracy and cost. Furthermore, we propose an Interactive Window-based Self-Attention (IWSA), which establishes interaction between non-overlapping regions by re-merging independent value tokens and aggregating spatial information from adjacent windows. By stacking the SSA and IWSA alternately, the Scalable Vision Transformer (ScalableViT) achieves state-of-the-art performance in general-purpose vision tasks. For example, ScalableViT-S outperforms Twins-SVT-S by 1.4% and Swin-T by 1.8% on ImageNet-1K classification.
abstract_zh: 普通的自注意力机制本质上依赖于预定义和稳定的计算维度。这种不灵活性限制了它具有面向上下文的泛化能力，而泛化能力可以带来更多的上下文线索和全局表征。为了缓解这个问题，我们提出了一种可扩展自注意力（SSA）机制，该机制利用两个缩放因子来释放查询、键和值矩阵的维度，同时解除它们与输入的绑定。这种可扩展性获取了面向上下文的泛化并增强了对象敏感性，从而将整个网络推向了准确性和成本之间更有效的权衡状态。此外，我们提出了一种基于交互式窗口的自注意力（IWSA），它通过重新合并独立的值标记并聚合来自相邻窗口的空间信息来建立非重叠区域之间的交互。通过交替堆叠 SSA 和 IWSA，可扩展视觉转换器 (ScalableViT) 在通用视觉任务中实现了最先进的性能。例如，在 ImageNet-1K 分类上，ScalableViT-S 的性能优于 Twins-SVT-S 1.4%，优于 Swin-T 1.8%。

AI.tldr: 提出ScalableViT模型，通过改进自注意力机制提升视觉任务性能
AI.motivation: 传统自注意力机制计算维度固定，限制了上下文信息利用和模型泛化能力
AI.method: 设计可扩展自注意力(SSA)机制与交互窗口自注意力(IWSA)，通过动态调整矩阵维度和窗口间信息交互提升表征能力
AI.result: 在ImageNet-1K分类中，ScalableViT-S较Twins-SVT-S提升1.4%，较Swin-T提升1.8%
AI.conclusion: ScalableViT通过双机制协同实现精度与计算成本的优化平衡，达到视觉任务SOTA性能

search_text: ScalableViT: Rethinking the Context-oriented Generalization of Vision Transformer ScalableViT：重新思考 Vision Transformer 的面向上下文的泛化 The vanilla self-attention mechanism inherently relies on pre-defined and steadfast computational dimensions. Such inflexibility restricts it from possessing context-oriented generalization that can bring more contextual cues and global representations. To mitigate this issue, we propose a Scalable Self-Attention (SSA) mechanism that leverages two scaling factors to release dimensions of query, key, and value matrices while unbinding them with the input. This scalability fetches context-oriented generalization and enhances object sensitivity, which pushes the whole network into a more effective trade-off state between accuracy and cost. Furthermore, we propose an Interactive Window-based Self-Attention (IWSA), which establishes interaction between non-overlapping regions by re-merging independent value tokens and aggregating spatial information from adjacent windows. By stacking the SSA and IWSA alternately, the Scalable Vision Transformer (ScalableViT) achieves state-of-the-art performance in general-purpose vision tasks. For example, ScalableViT-S outperforms Twins-SVT-S by 1.4% and Swin-T by 1.8% on ImageNet-1K classification. 普通的自注意力机制本质上依赖于预定义和稳定的计算维度。这种不灵活性限制了它具有面向上下文的泛化能力，而泛化能力可以带来更多的上下文线索和全局表征。为了缓解这个问题，我们提出了一种可扩展自注意力（SSA）机制，该机制利用两个缩放因子来释放查询、键和值矩阵的维度，同时解除它们与输入的绑定。这种可扩展性获取了面向上下文的泛化并增强了对象敏感性，从而将整个网络推向了准确性和成本之间更有效的权衡状态。此外，我们提出了一种基于交互式窗口的自注意力（IWSA），它通过重新合并独立的值标记并聚合来自相邻窗口的空间信息来建立非重叠区域之间的交互。通过交替堆叠 SSA 和 IWSA，可扩展视觉转换器 (ScalableViT) 在通用视觉任务中实现了最先进的性能。例如，在 ImageNet-1K 分类上，ScalableViT-S 的性能优于 Twins-SVT-S 1.4%，优于 Swin-T 1.8%。 提出ScalableViT模型，通过改进自注意力机制提升视觉任务性能 Rui Yang,Hailong Ma,Jie Wu,Yansong Tang,Xuefeng Xiao,Min Zheng,Xiu Li cs.CV,cs.AI

authors_text: Junbum Cha,Kyungjae Lee,Sungrae Park,Sanghyuk Chun
title: Domain Generalization by Mutual-Information Regularization with Pre-trained Models
title_zh: 通过预训练模型的互信息正则化进行领域泛化
abstract: Domain generalization (DG) aims to learn a generalized model to an unseen target domain using only limited source domains. Previous attempts to DG fail to learn domain-invariant representations only from the source domains due to the significant domain shifts between training and test domains. Instead, we re-formulate the DG objective using mutual information with the oracle model, a model generalized to any possible domain. We derive a tractable variational lower bound via approximating the oracle model by a pre-trained model, called Mutual Information Regularization with Oracle (MIRO). Our extensive experiments show that MIRO significantly improves the out-of-distribution performance. Furthermore, our scaling experiments show that the larger the scale of the pre-trained model, the greater the performance improvement of MIRO. Source code is available at https://github.com/kakaobrain/miro.
summary: Domain generalization (DG) aims to learn a generalized model to an unseen target domain using only limited source domains. Previous attempts to DG fail to learn domain-invariant representations only from the source domains due to the significant domain shifts between training and test domains. Instead, we re-formulate the DG objective using mutual information with the oracle model, a model generalized to any possible domain. We derive a tractable variational lower bound via approximating the oracle model by a pre-trained model, called Mutual Information Regularization with Oracle (MIRO). Our extensive experiments show that MIRO significantly improves the out-of-distribution performance. Furthermore, our scaling experiments show that the larger the scale of the pre-trained model, the greater the performance improvement of MIRO. Source code is available at https://github.com/kakaobrain/miro.
abstract_zh: 域泛化（DG）旨在仅使用有限的源域学习未知目标域的泛化模型。由于训练域和测试域之间存在显着的域转移，之前的 DG 尝试无法仅从源域学习域不变表示。相反，我们使用预言机模型的互信息重新制定 DG 目标，预言机模型是一种推广到任何可能领域的模型。我们通过预先训练的模型（称为 Oracle 互信息正则化 (MIRO)）来逼近 Oracle 模型，从而得出易于处理的变分下界。我们大量的实验表明，MIRO 显着提高了分布外性能。此外，我们的扩展实验表明，预训练模型的规模越大，MIRO 的性能提升就越大。源代码可在 https://github.com/kakaobrain/miro 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于预训练模型的互信息正则化方法（MIRO），用于解决领域泛化问题，以提升模型在未见目标领域的性能。
AI.motivation: 传统领域泛化方法因训练与测试领域间的显著差异而难以学习领域不变表示，需利用预训练模型辅助提升模型的泛化能力。
AI.method: 通过引入互信息正则化目标，结合预训练模型近似理想领域泛化模型（Oracle），推导出可计算的变分下界作为优化目标，称为MIRO方法。
AI.result: 实验表明MIRO显著提升了分布外性能，且预训练模型规模越大，性能提升越明显。
AI.conclusion: MIRO方法通过互信息正则化有效增强了领域泛化能力，预训练模型的规模对性能有正向影响。
