authors_text: Md Moniruzzaman Emon,Tareque Rahman Ornob,Moqsadur Rahman
title: Classifications of Skull Fractures using CT Scan Images via CNN with Lazy Learning Approach
title_zh: 通过 CNN 和惰性学习方法使用 CT 扫描图像对颅骨骨折进行分类
abstract: Classification of skull fracture is a challenging task for both radiologists and researchers. Skull fractures result in broken pieces of bone, which can cut into the brain and cause bleeding and other injury types. So it is vital to detect and classify the fracture very early. In real world, often fractures occur at multiple sites. This makes it harder to detect the fracture type where many fracture types might summarize a skull fracture. Unfortunately, manual detection of skull fracture and the classification process is time-consuming, threatening a patient's life. Because of the emergence of deep learning, this process could be automated. Convolutional Neural Networks (CNNs) are the most widely used deep learning models for image categorization because they deliver high accuracy and outstanding outcomes compared to other models. We propose a new model called SkullNetV1 comprising a novel CNN by taking advantage of CNN for feature extraction and lazy learning approach which acts as a classifier for classification of skull fractures from brain CT images to classify five fracture types. Our suggested model achieved a subset accuracy of 88%, an F1 score of 93%, the Area Under the Curve (AUC) of 0.89 to 0.98, a Hamming score of 92% and a Hamming loss of 0.04 for this seven-class multi-labeled classification.
summary: Classification of skull fracture is a challenging task for both radiologists and researchers. Skull fractures result in broken pieces of bone, which can cut into the brain and cause bleeding and other injury types. So it is vital to detect and classify the fracture very early. In real world, often fractures occur at multiple sites. This makes it harder to detect the fracture type where many fracture types might summarize a skull fracture. Unfortunately, manual detection of skull fracture and the classification process is time-consuming, threatening a patient's life. Because of the emergence of deep learning, this process could be automated. Convolutional Neural Networks (CNNs) are the most widely used deep learning models for image categorization because they deliver high accuracy and outstanding outcomes compared to other models. We propose a new model called SkullNetV1 comprising a novel CNN by taking advantage of CNN for feature extraction and lazy learning approach which acts as a classifier for classification of skull fractures from brain CT images to classify five fracture types. Our suggested model achieved a subset accuracy of 88%, an F1 score of 93%, the Area Under the Curve (AUC) of 0.89 to 0.98, a Hamming score of 92% and a Hamming loss of 0.04 for this seven-class multi-labeled classification.
abstract_zh: 颅骨骨折的分类对于放射科医生和研究人员来说都是一项具有挑战性的任务。颅骨骨折会导致骨头碎片，从而切入大脑并导致出血和其他类型的伤害。因此，尽早发现骨折并对其进行分类至关重要。在现实世界中，骨折通常发生在多个部位。这使得检测骨折类型变得更加困难，许多骨折类型可能概括为颅骨骨折。不幸的是，手动检测颅骨骨折和分类过程非常耗时，会威胁患者的生命。由于深度学习的出现，这个过程可以自动化。卷积神经网络 (CNN) 是图像分类中使用最广泛的深度学习模型，因为与其他模型相比，它们具有高精度和出色的结果。我们提出了一种名为 SkullNetV1 的新模型，它由一个新颖的 CNN 组成，利用 CNN 进行特征提取和惰性学习方法，作为脑部 CT 图像中颅骨骨折分类的分类器，对五种骨折类型进行分类。对于这个七类多标签分类，我们建议的模型实现了 88% 的子集准确率、93% 的 F1 分数、0.89 至 0.98 的曲线下面积 (AUC)、92% 的汉明分数和 0.04 的汉明损失。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种结合卷积神经网络（CNN）与懒惰学习方法的新型模型SkullNetV1，用于对脑部CT图像中的颅骨骨折进行分类。
AI.motivation: 手动检测和分类颅骨骨折耗时且可能危及患者生命，而深度学习技术能有效提升自动化检测效率和准确性。
AI.method: 设计包含CNN特征提取模块和懒惰学习分类器的SkullNetV1模型，基于脑部CT图像对五种骨折类型进行多标签分类。
AI.result: 模型在七类多标签分类任务中取得子集准确率88%、F1分数93%、AUC 0.89-0.98、Hamming分数92%及Hamming损失0.04的优异性能。
AI.conclusion: 该模型验证了CNN与懒惰学习结合在颅骨骨折分类中的有效性，为医学影像自动化诊断提供了高精度解决方案。

Skull fractures result in broken pieces of bone, which can cut into the brain and cause bleeding and other injury types. So it is vital to detect and classify the fracture very early. Unfortunately, manual detection of skull fracture and the classification process is time-consuming, threatening a patient's life. authors_text: Xian Fang,Jinshao Zhu,Xiuli Shao,Hongpeng Wang
title: GroupTransNet: Group Transformer Network for RGB-D Salient Object Detection
title_zh: GroupTransNet：用于 RGB-D 显着目标检测的组 Transformer 网络
abstract: Salient object detection on RGB-D images is an active topic in computer vision. Although the existing methods have achieved appreciable performance, there are still some challenges. The locality of convolutional neural network requires that the model has a sufficiently deep global receptive field, which always leads to the loss of local details. To address the challenge, we propose a novel Group Transformer Network (GroupTransNet) for RGB-D salient object detection. This method is good at learning the long-range dependencies of cross layer features to promote more perfect feature expression. At the beginning, the features of the slightly higher classes of the middle three levels and the latter three levels are soft grouped to absorb the advantages of the high-level features. The input features are repeatedly purified and enhanced by the attention mechanism to purify the cross modal features of color modal and depth modal. The features of the intermediate process are first fused by the features of different layers, and then processed by several transformers in multiple groups, which not only makes the size of the features of each scale unified and interrelated, but also achieves the effect of sharing the weight of the features within the group. The output features in different groups complete the clustering staggered by two owing to the level difference, and combine with the low-level features. Extensive experiments demonstrate that GroupTransNet outperforms the comparison models and achieves the new state-of-the-art performance.
summary: Salient object detection on RGB-D images is an active topic in computer vision. Although the existing methods have achieved appreciable performance, there are still some challenges. The locality of convolutional neural network requires that the model has a sufficiently deep global receptive field, which always leads to the loss of local details. To address the challenge, we propose a novel Group Transformer Network (GroupTransNet) for RGB-D salient object detection. This method is good at learning the long-range dependencies of cross layer features to promote more perfect feature expression. At the beginning, the features of the slightly higher classes of the middle three levels and the latter three levels are soft grouped to absorb the advantages of the high-level features. The input features are repeatedly purified and enhanced by the attention mechanism to purify the cross modal features of color modal and depth modal. The features of the intermediate process are first fused by the features of different layers, and then processed by several transformers in multiple groups, which not only makes the size of the features of each scale unified and interrelated, but also achieves the effect of sharing the weight of the features within the group. The output features in different groups complete the clustering staggered by two owing to the level difference, and combine with the low-level features. Extensive experiments demonstrate that GroupTransNet outperforms the comparison models and achieves the new state-of-the-art performance.
abstract_zh: RGB-D 图像上的显着目标检测是计算机视觉领域的一个活跃主题。尽管现有方法取得了可观的性能，但仍然存在一些挑战。卷积神经网络的局部性要求模型具有足够深的全局感受野，这往往会导致局部细节的丢失。为了应对这一挑战，我们提出了一种新颖的 Group Transformer Network (GroupTransNet)，用于 RGB-D 显着对象检测。该方法擅长学习跨层特征的长程依赖关系，促进更完美的特征表达。一开始，对中间三层和后三层稍高类别的特征进行软分组，以吸收高层特征的优点。通过注意力机制对输入特征进行反复纯化和增强，以纯化颜色模态和深度模态的跨模态特征。中间过程的特征首先由不同层的特征进行融合，然后由多个组中的多个Transformer进行处理，这不仅使每个尺度的特征的大小统一且相互关联，而且达到了共享组内特征权重的效果。不同组的输出特征由于层次差异而交错两点完成聚类，并与低层次特征结合。大量实验表明，GroupTransNet 的性能优于比较模型，并实现了新的最先进性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种名为GroupTransNet的组变换网络，用于RGB-D图像的显著性物体检测，以解决现有方法在局部细节保留和全局特征表达方面的不足。
AI.motivation: 现有方法因卷积神经网络的局部性限制，需依赖深层全局感受野，导致局部细节丢失。为克服此问题，需学习跨层特征的长距离依赖关系以提升特征表达。
AI.method: 通过软分组整合中高层和后三层特征，利用注意力机制净化跨模态特征，融合不同层级特征后采用多组变换器处理，统一各尺度特征并实现组内权重共享，最终结合低层特征输出。
AI.result: 在大量实验中，GroupTransNet优于对比模型，达到RGB-D显著性物体检测的新状态-of-the-art性能。
AI.conclusion: GroupTransNet通过跨层特征分组与变换器机制有效解决了局部细节保留与全局特征表达的矛盾，为RGB-D显著性检测提供了新方法。

authors_text: Chenxi Qiu,Tao Yue,Xuemei Hu
title: Adaptive and Cascaded Compressive Sensing
title_zh: 自适应和级联压缩感知
abstract: Scene-dependent adaptive compressive sensing (CS) has been a long pursuing goal which has huge potential in significantly improving the performance of CS. However, without accessing to the ground truth image, how to design the scene-dependent adaptive strategy is still an open-problem and the improvement in sampling efficiency is still quite limited. In this paper, a restricted isometry property (RIP) condition based error clamping is proposed, which could directly predict the reconstruction error, i.e. the difference between the currently-stage reconstructed image and the ground truth image, and adaptively allocate samples to different regions at the successive sampling stage. Furthermore, we propose a cascaded feature fusion reconstruction network that could efficiently utilize the information derived from different adaptive sampling stages. The effectiveness of the proposed adaptive and cascaded CS method is demonstrated with extensive quantitative and qualitative results, compared with the state-of-the-art CS algorithms.
summary: Scene-dependent adaptive compressive sensing (CS) has been a long pursuing goal which has huge potential in significantly improving the performance of CS. However, without accessing to the ground truth image, how to design the scene-dependent adaptive strategy is still an open-problem and the improvement in sampling efficiency is still quite limited. In this paper, a restricted isometry property (RIP) condition based error clamping is proposed, which could directly predict the reconstruction error, i.e. the difference between the currently-stage reconstructed image and the ground truth image, and adaptively allocate samples to different regions at the successive sampling stage. Furthermore, we propose a cascaded feature fusion reconstruction network that could efficiently utilize the information derived from different adaptive sampling stages. The effectiveness of the proposed adaptive and cascaded CS method is demonstrated with extensive quantitative and qualitative results, compared with the state-of-the-art CS algorithms.
abstract_zh: 场景相关的自适应压缩感知（CS）一直是一个长期追求的目标，它在显着提高 CS 性能方面具有巨大潜力。然而，在不访问地面真实图像的情况下，如何设计依赖于场景的自适应策略仍然是一个悬而未决的问题，采样效率的提高仍然相当有限。本文提出了一种基于受限等距属性（RIP）条件的误差钳制，它可以直接预测重建误差，即当前阶段重建图像与地面真实图像之间的差异，并在后续采样阶段自适应地将样本分配到不同区域。此外，我们提出了一种级联特征融合重建网络，可以有效地利用从不同自适应采样阶段获得的信息。与最先进的 CS 算法相比，所提出的自适应级联 CS 方法的有效性通过广泛的定量和定性结果得到了证明。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种自适应与级联压缩感知方法，通过动态分配采样区域和融合多阶段特征提升图像重建性能。
AI.motivation: 传统压缩感知在不同场景下的采样效率提升有限，且缺乏无需真实图像即可设计场景自适应策略的有效方法。
AI.method: 基于限制等距性质（RIP）的误差钳制机制预测重建误差并动态分配采样区域，结合级联特征融合网络利用多阶段采样信息。
AI.result: 通过大量定量与定性实验验证，该方法在重建质量与采样效率上优于现有最先进压缩感知算法。
AI.conclusion: 自适应采样策略与级联网络的结合显著提升了压缩感知性能，为场景相关优化提供了新思路。

authors_text: Lei Huang,Yi Zhou,Tian Wang,Jie Luo,Xianglong Liu
title: Delving into the Estimation Shift of Batch Normalization in a Network
title_zh: 深入研究网络中批量归一化的估计偏移
comment: Accepted to CVPR 2022. The Code is available at: https://github.com/huangleiBuaa/XBNBlock
comments: Accepted to CVPR 2022. The Code is available at: https://github.com/huangleiBuaa/XBNBlock
abstract: Batch normalization (BN) is a milestone technique in deep learning. It normalizes the activation using mini-batch statistics during training but the estimated population statistics during inference. This paper focuses on investigating the estimation of population statistics. We define the estimation shift magnitude of BN to quantitatively measure the difference between its estimated population statistics and expected ones. Our primary observation is that the estimation shift can be accumulated due to the stack of BN in a network, which has detriment effects for the test performance. We further find a batch-free normalization (BFN) can block such an accumulation of estimation shift. These observations motivate our design of XBNBlock that replace one BN with BFN in the bottleneck block of residual-style networks. Experiments on the ImageNet and COCO benchmarks show that XBNBlock consistently improves the performance of different architectures, including ResNet and ResNeXt, by a significant margin and seems to be more robust to distribution shift.
summary: Batch normalization (BN) is a milestone technique in deep learning. It normalizes the activation using mini-batch statistics during training but the estimated population statistics during inference. This paper focuses on investigating the estimation of population statistics. We define the estimation shift magnitude of BN to quantitatively measure the difference between its estimated population statistics and expected ones. Our primary observation is that the estimation shift can be accumulated due to the stack of BN in a network, which has detriment effects for the test performance. We further find a batch-free normalization (BFN) can block such an accumulation of estimation shift. These observations motivate our design of XBNBlock that replace one BN with BFN in the bottleneck block of residual-style networks. Experiments on the ImageNet and COCO benchmarks show that XBNBlock consistently improves the performance of different architectures, including ResNet and ResNeXt, by a significant margin and seems to be more robust to distribution shift.
abstract_zh: 批量归一化（BN）是深度学习中的一个里程碑技术。它在训练期间使用小批量统计数据来标准化激活，但在推理期间使用估计的总体统计数据。本文重点研究人口统计的估计。我们定义 BN 的估计偏移幅度来定量衡量其估计人口统计数据与预期人口统计数据之间的差异。我们的主要观察结果是，由于网络中 BN 的堆栈，估计偏移会累积，这会对测试性能产生不利影响。我们进一步发现无批次归一化（BFN）可以阻止这种估计偏移的累积。这些观察结果激发了我们设计 XBNBlock，在残差式网络的瓶颈块中用 BFN 替换一个 BN。 ImageNet 和 COCO 基准测试表明，XBNBlock 持续显着提高了不同架构（包括 ResNet 和 ResNeXt）的性能，并且似乎对分布偏移更加稳健。

AI.tldr: 本文研究批量归一化（BN）在推理阶段的人口统计估计偏移问题，并提出XBNBlock以减少估计偏移的累积。
AI.motivation: BN在推理时使用估计的人口统计，但其与真实分布存在偏差（估计偏移），且多层BN的累积效应会损害测试性能。
AI.method: 设计XBNBlock，用批处理无关归一化（BFN）替代残差网络瓶颈块中的BN，以阻断估计偏移的累积。
AI.result: 在ImageNet和COCO数据集上，XBNBlock显著提升ResNet和ResNeXt等模型性能，并增强对分布偏移的鲁棒性。
AI.conclusion: XBNBlock通过消除BN估计偏移的累积，有效提升了模型性能与分布偏移适应能力。

ai_content.tldr: 本文研究批量归一化（BN）在推理阶段的人口统计估计偏移问题，并提出XBNBlock以减少估计偏移的累积。
ai_content.motivation: BN在推理时使用估计的人口统计，但其与真实分布存在偏差（估计偏移），且多层BN的累积效应会损害测试性能。
ai_content.method: 设计XBNBlock，用批处理无关归一化（BFN）替代残差网络瓶颈块中的BN，以阻断估计偏移的累积。

ai_content.conclusion: XBNBlock通过消除BN估计偏移的累积，有效提升了模型性能与分布偏移适应能力。

search_text: Delving into the Estimation Shift of Batch Normalization in a Network 深入研究网络中批量归一化的估计偏移 Batch normalization (BN) is a milestone technique in deep learning. It normalizes the activation using mini-batch statistics during training but the estimated population statistics during inference. This paper focuses on investigating the estimation of population statistics. We define the estimation shift magnitude of BN to quantitatively measure the difference between its estimated population statistics and expected ones. Our primary observation is that the estimation shift can be accumulated due to the stack of BN in a network, which has detriment effects for the test performance. We further find a batch-free normalization (BFN) can block such an accumulation of estimation shift. These observations motivate our design of XBNBlock that replace one BN with BFN in the bottleneck block of residual-style networks. Experiments on the ImageNet and COCO benchmarks show that XBNBlock consistently improves the performance of different architectures, including ResNet and ResNeXt, by a significant margin and seems to be more robust to distribution shift. 批量归一化（BN）是深度学习中的一个里程碑技术。它在训练期间使用小批量统计数据来标准化激活，但在推理期间使用估计的总体统计数据。本文重点研究人口统计的估计。我们定义 BN 的估计偏移幅度来定量衡量其估计人口统计数据与预期人口统计数据之间的差异。我们的主要观察结果是，由于网络中 BN 的堆栈，估计偏移会累积，这会对测试性能产生不利影响。我们进一步发现无批次归一化（BFN）可以阻止这种估计偏移的累积。这些观察结果激发了我们设计 XBNBlock，在残差式网络的瓶颈块中用 BFN 替换一个 BN。 ImageNet 和 COCO 基准测试表明，XBNBlock 持续显着提高了不同架构（包括 ResNet 和 ResNeXt）的性能，并且似乎对分布偏移更加稳健。 本文研究批量归一化（BN）在推理阶段的人口统计估计偏移问题，并提出XBNBlock以减少估计偏移的累积。 Lei Huang,Yi Zhou,Tian Wang,Jie Luo,Xianglong Liu cs.CV,cs.AI,cs.LG

authors_text: Zongjiang Tu,Chen Jiang,Yu Guan,Shanshan Wang,Jijun Liu,Qiegen Liu,Dong Liang
title: K-space and Image Domain Collaborative Energy based Model for Parallel MRI Reconstruction
title_zh: 用于并行 MRI 重建的 K 空间和图像域协作能量模型
comment: 25 pages,11 figures. arXiv admin note: text overlap with arXiv:2109.03237
comments: 25 pages,11 figures. arXiv admin note: text overlap with arXiv:2109.03237
abstract: Decreasing magnetic resonance (MR) image acquisition times can potentially make MR examinations more accessible. Prior arts including the deep learning models have been devoted to solving the problem of long MRI imaging time. Recently, deep generative models have exhibited great potentials in algorithm robustness and usage flexibility. Nevertheless, none of existing schemes can be learned or employed to the k-space measurement directly. Furthermore, how do the deep generative models work well in hybrid domain is also worth being investigated. In this work, by taking advantage of the deep energy-based models, we propose a k-space and image domain collaborative generative model to comprehensively estimate the MR data from under-sampled measurement. Experimental comparisons with the state-of-the-arts demonstrated that the proposed hybrid method has less error in reconstruction accuracy and is more stable under different acceleration factors
summary: Decreasing magnetic resonance (MR) image acquisition times can potentially make MR examinations more accessible. Prior arts including the deep learning models have been devoted to solving the problem of long MRI imaging time. Recently, deep generative models have exhibited great potentials in algorithm robustness and usage flexibility. Nevertheless, none of existing schemes can be learned or employed to the k-space measurement directly. Furthermore, how do the deep generative models work well in hybrid domain is also worth being investigated. In this work, by taking advantage of the deep energy-based models, we propose a k-space and image domain collaborative generative model to comprehensively estimate the MR data from under-sampled measurement. Experimental comparisons with the state-of-the-arts demonstrated that the proposed hybrid method has less error in reconstruction accuracy and is more stable under different acceleration factors
abstract_zh: 减少磁共振 (MR) 图像采集时间可能会使 MR 检查更容易进行。包括深度学习模型在内的现有技术一直致力于解决MRI成像时间长的问题。最近，深度生成模型在算法鲁棒性和使用灵活性方面表现出了巨大的潜力。然而，现有的方案都不能直接学习或用于k空间测量。此外，深度生成模型如何在混合领域发挥良好作用也值得研究。在这项工作中，通过利用基于深度能量的模型，我们提出了一种k空间和图像域协作生成模型来综合估计欠采样测量的MR数据。与现有技术的实验比较表明，所提出的混合方法在重建精度上误差较小，并且在不同加速因子下更加稳定

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种结合k空间和图像域的协作能量模型，用于加速磁共振成像（MRI）的重建。
AI.motivation: 现有方法无法直接学习k空间测量数据，且在混合域中的深度生成模型应用不足，限制了MRI重建的准确性与稳定性。
AI.method: 基于深度能量模型，构建k空间与图像域协作的生成模型，联合估计欠采样MRI数据。
AI.result: 实验表明，该方法在重建精度和不同加速因子下的稳定性优于现有最先进的方法。
AI.conclusion: 混合域协作模型能有效提升MRI重建质量，为加速MRI检查提供新思路。

authors_text: Sam Ganzfried
title: Fictitious Play with Maximin Initialization
title_zh: 使用 Maximin 初始化进行虚拟游戏
abstract: Fictitious play has recently emerged as the most accurate scalable algorithm for approximating Nash equilibrium strategies in multiplayer games. We show that the degree of equilibrium approximation error of fictitious play can be significantly reduced by carefully selecting the initial strategies. We present several new procedures for strategy initialization and compare them to the classic approach, which initializes all pure strategies to have equal probability. The best-performing approach, called maximin, solves a nonconvex quadratic program to compute initial strategies and results in a nearly 75% reduction in approximation error compared to the classic approach when 5 initializations are used.
summary: Fictitious play has recently emerged as the most accurate scalable algorithm for approximating Nash equilibrium strategies in multiplayer games. We show that the degree of equilibrium approximation error of fictitious play can be significantly reduced by carefully selecting the initial strategies. We present several new procedures for strategy initialization and compare them to the classic approach, which initializes all pure strategies to have equal probability. The best-performing approach, called maximin, solves a nonconvex quadratic program to compute initial strategies and results in a nearly 75% reduction in approximation error compared to the classic approach when 5 initializations are used.
abstract_zh: 虚拟游戏最近已成为多人游戏中近似纳什均衡策略的最准确的可扩展算法。我们表明，通过仔细选择初始策略，可以显着降低虚拟游戏的均衡近似误差程度。我们提出了几种新的策略初始化过程，并将它们与经典方法进行比较，经典方法将所有纯策略初始化为具有相等的概率。性能最佳的方法称为 maximin，它通过求解非凸二次规划来计算初始策略，与使用 5 次初始化的经典方法相比，近似误差减少了近 75%。

AI.tldr: 本文研究如何通过改进初始策略选择来提升Fictitious Play算法在多玩家博弈中近似纳什均衡的准确性。
AI.motivation: 经典Fictitious Play算法使用等概率初始化纯策略，但存在较大的均衡近似误差，需寻找更优初始化方法以提高精度。
AI.method: 提出多种策略初始化方法，其中maximin方法通过求解非凸二次规划计算初始策略，并与经典方法进行对比实验。
AI.result: maximin方法在5次初始化时使近似误差降低近75%，显著优于经典等概率初始化方法。
AI.conclusion: maximin初始化能有效减少Fictitious Play的近似误差，为多玩家博弈算法优化提供新思路。

authors_text: Zhaotao Wu,Jia Wei,Jiabing Wang,Rui Li
title: Slice Imputation: Intermediate Slice Interpolation for Anisotropic 3D Medical Image Segmentation
title_zh: 切片插补：用于各向异性 3D 医学图像分割的中间切片插值
abstract: We introduce a novel frame-interpolation-based method for slice imputation to improve segmentation accuracy for anisotropic 3D medical images, in which the number of slices and their corresponding segmentation labels can be increased between two consecutive slices in anisotropic 3D medical volumes. Unlike previous inter-slice imputation methods, which only focus on the smoothness in the axial direction, this study aims to improve the smoothness of the interpolated 3D medical volumes in all three directions: axial, sagittal, and coronal. The proposed multitask inter-slice imputation method, in particular, incorporates a smoothness loss function to evaluate the smoothness of the interpolated 3D medical volumes in the through-plane direction (sagittal and coronal). It not only improves the resolution of the interpolated 3D medical volumes in the through-plane direction but also transforms them into isotropic representations, which leads to better segmentation performances. Experiments on whole tumor segmentation in the brain, liver tumor segmentation, and prostate segmentation indicate that our method outperforms the competing slice imputation methods on both computed tomography and magnetic resonance images volumes in most cases.
summary: We introduce a novel frame-interpolation-based method for slice imputation to improve segmentation accuracy for anisotropic 3D medical images, in which the number of slices and their corresponding segmentation labels can be increased between two consecutive slices in anisotropic 3D medical volumes. Unlike previous inter-slice imputation methods, which only focus on the smoothness in the axial direction, this study aims to improve the smoothness of the interpolated 3D medical volumes in all three directions: axial, sagittal, and coronal. The proposed multitask inter-slice imputation method, in particular, incorporates a smoothness loss function to evaluate the smoothness of the interpolated 3D medical volumes in the through-plane direction (sagittal and coronal). It not only improves the resolution of the interpolated 3D medical volumes in the through-plane direction but also transforms them into isotropic representations, which leads to better segmentation performances. Experiments on whole tumor segmentation in the brain, liver tumor segmentation, and prostate segmentation indicate that our method outperforms the competing slice imputation methods on both computed tomography and magnetic resonance images volumes in most cases.
abstract_zh: 我们引入了一种新颖的基于帧插值的切片插补方法，以提高各向异性 3D 医学图像的分割精度，其中切片数量及其相应的分割标签可以在各向异性 3D 医学体积中的两个连续切片之间增加。与之前仅关注轴向平滑度的层间插补方法不同，本研究旨在提高插值 3D 医疗体积在所有三个方向（轴向、矢状和冠状）上的平滑度。所提出的多任务层间插补方法特别结合了平滑度损失函数来评估插值 3D 医学体积在平面方向（矢状和冠状）上的平滑度。它不仅提高了插值 3D 医学体积在平面方向上的分辨率，还将其转换为各向同性表示，从而获得更好的分割性能。对大脑中的整个肿瘤分割、肝脏肿瘤分割和前列腺分割的实验表明，在大多数情况下，我们的方法在计算机断层扫描和磁共振图像体积上都优于竞争的切片插补方法。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于帧插值的切片插值方法，通过增加各向异性3D医学图像的切片数量和分割标签，提升分割准确性。
AI.motivation: 传统切片插值方法仅关注轴向平滑性，忽视矢状和冠状方向的平滑性，导致分割效果受限。
AI.method: 多任务切片插值方法结合平滑损失函数，同时优化三维方向平滑性，并将各向异性数据转换为各向同性表示。
AI.result: 在脑肿瘤、肝肿瘤和前列腺分割任务中，该方法在CT和MRI数据上均优于现有切片插值方法。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过全面优化三维平滑性，有效提升医学图像分割性能，具有临床应用潜力。

ai_content.tldr: 本文提出一种基于帧插值的切片插值方法，通过增加各向异性3D医学图像的切片数量和分割标签，提升分割准确性。
ai_content.motivation: 传统切片插值方法仅关注轴向平滑性，忽视矢状和冠状方向的平滑性，导致分割效果受限。

search_text: Slice Imputation: Intermediate Slice Interpolation for Anisotropic 3D Medical Image Segmentation 切片插补：用于各向异性 3D 医学图像分割的中间切片插值 We introduce a novel frame-interpolation-based method for slice imputation to improve segmentation accuracy for anisotropic 3D medical images, in which the number of slices and their corresponding segmentation labels can be increased between two consecutive slices in anisotropic 3D medical volumes. Unlike previous inter-slice imputation methods, which only focus on the smoothness in the axial direction, this study aims to improve the smoothness of the interpolated 3D medical volumes in all three directions: axial, sagittal, and coronal. The proposed multitask inter-slice imputation method, in particular, incorporates a smoothness loss function to evaluate the smoothness of the interpolated 3D medical volumes in the through-plane direction (sagittal and coronal). It not only improves the resolution of the interpolated 3D medical volumes in the through-plane direction but also transforms them into isotropic representations, which leads to better segmentation performances. Experiments on whole tumor segmentation in the brain, liver tumor segmentation, and prostate segmentation indicate that our method outperforms the competing slice imputation methods on both computed tomography and magnetic resonance images volumes in most cases. 我们引入了一种新颖的基于帧插值的切片插补方法，以提高各向异性 3D 医学图像的分割精度，其中切片数量及其相应的分割标签可以在各向异性 3D 医学体积中的两个连续切片之间增加。与之前仅关注轴向平滑度的层间插补方法不同，本研究旨在提高插值 3D 医疗体积在所有三个方向（轴向、矢状和冠状）上的平滑度。所提出的多任务层间插补方法特别结合了平滑度损失函数来评估插值 3D 医学体积在平面方向（矢状和冠状）上的平滑度。它不仅提高了插值 3D 医学体积在平面方向上的分辨率，还将其转换为各向同性表示，从而获得更好的分割性能。对大脑中的整个肿瘤分割、肝脏肿瘤分割和前列腺分割的实验表明，在大多数情况下，我们的方法在计算机断层扫描和磁共振图像体积上都优于竞争的切片插补方法。 本文提出一种基于帧插值的切片插值方法，通过增加各向异性3D医学图像的切片数量和分割标签，提升分割准确性。 Zhaotao Wu,Jia Wei,Jiabing Wang,Rui Li eess.IV,cs.CV,cs.LG

authors_text: Gabriel da Silva Lima,Diego Rolim Porto,Adilson Jose de Oliveira,Wallace Moreira Bessa
title: Intelligent control of a single-link flexible manipulator using sliding modes and artificial neural networks
title_zh: 利用滑模和人工神经网络的单连杆柔性机械臂的智能控制
abstract: This letter presents a new intelligent control scheme for the accurate trajectory tracking of flexible link manipulators. The proposed approach is mainly based on a sliding mode controller for underactuated systems with an embedded artificial neural network to deal with modeling inaccuracies. The adopted neural network only needs a single input and one hidden layer, which drastically reduces the computational complexity of the control law and allows its implementation in low-power microcontrollers. Online learning, rather than supervised offline training, is chosen to allow the weights of the neural network to be adjusted in real time during the tracking. Therefore, the resulting controller is able to cope with the underactuating issues and to adapt itself by learning from experience, which grants the capacity to deal with plant dynamics properly. The boundedness and convergence properties of the tracking error are proved by evoking Barbalat's lemma in a Lyapunov-like stability analysis. Experimental results obtained with a small single-link flexible manipulator show the efficacy of the proposed control scheme, even in the presence of a high level of uncertainty and noisy signals.
summary: This letter presents a new intelligent control scheme for the accurate trajectory tracking of flexible link manipulators. The proposed approach is mainly based on a sliding mode controller for underactuated systems with an embedded artificial neural network to deal with modeling inaccuracies. The adopted neural network only needs a single input and one hidden layer, which drastically reduces the computational complexity of the control law and allows its implementation in low-power microcontrollers. Online learning, rather than supervised offline training, is chosen to allow the weights of the neural network to be adjusted in real time during the tracking. Therefore, the resulting controller is able to cope with the underactuating issues and to adapt itself by learning from experience, which grants the capacity to deal with plant dynamics properly. The boundedness and convergence properties of the tracking error are proved by evoking Barbalat's lemma in a Lyapunov-like stability analysis. Experimental results obtained with a small single-link flexible manipulator show the efficacy of the proposed control scheme, even in the presence of a high level of uncertainty and noisy signals.
abstract_zh: 这封信提出了一种新的智能控制方案，用于柔性连杆机械臂的精确轨迹跟踪。所提出的方法主要基于欠驱动系统的滑模控制器，并具有嵌入式人工神经网络来处理建模不准确的问题。所采用的神经网络只需要一个输入和一个隐藏层，这大大降低了控制律的计算复杂性，并允许其在低功耗微控制器中实现。选择在线学习，而不是有监督的离线训练，是为了允许在跟踪过程中实时调整神经网络的权重。因此，由此产生的控制器能够应对欠驱动问题，并通过从经验中学习来适应自身，从而具有正确处理对象动态的能力。通过类李雅普诺夫稳定性分析中的 Barbalat 引理证明了跟踪误差的有界性和收敛性。使用小型单连杆柔性机械臂获得的实验结果表明了所提出的控制方案的有效性，即使存在高度不确定性和噪声信号。

AI.tldr: 设计一种结合滑模控制与神经网络的智能控制方案，用于单连杆柔性机械臂的精确轨迹跟踪。
AI.motivation: 解决柔性机械臂在建模不准确、欠驱动及外部干扰下的轨迹跟踪难题，提升控制精度与鲁棒性。
AI.method: 采用滑模控制器结合单输入单隐层神经网络，通过在线学习实时调整参数，降低计算复杂度并适配低功耗硬件。
AI.result: 实验验证了该方法在高噪声和不确定性环境下仍能实现稳定跟踪，误差收敛性得到理论证明。
AI.conclusion: 提出的控制方案有效解决了欠驱动系统动态适应问题，兼具低计算开销与强鲁棒性，适用于实际工程场景。

authors_text: Xiayu Liang,Ying Gao,Shanrong Xu
title: ASE: Anomaly Scoring Based Ensemble Learning for Imbalanced Datasets
title_zh: ASE：基于异常评分的不平衡数据集集成学习
abstract: Nowadays, many classification algorithms have been applied to various industries to help them work out their problems met in real-life scenarios. However, in many binary classification tasks, samples in the minority class only make up a small part of all instances, which leads to the datasets we get usually suffer from high imbalance ratio. Existing models sometimes treat minority classes as noise or ignore them as outliers encountering data skewing. In order to solve this problem, we propose a bagging ensemble learning framework $ASE$ (Anomaly Scoring Based Ensemble Learning). This framework has a scoring system based on anomaly detection algorithms which can guide the resampling strategy by divided samples in the majority class into subspaces. Then specific number of instances will be under-sampled from each subspace to construct subsets by combining with the minority class. And we calculate the weights of base classifiers trained by the subsets according to the classification result of the anomaly detection model and the statistics of the subspaces. Experiments have been conducted which show that our ensemble learning model can dramatically improve the performance of base classifiers and is more efficient than other existing methods under a wide range of imbalance ratio, data scale and data dimension. $ASE$ can be combined with various classifiers and every part of our framework has been proved to be reasonable and necessary.
summary: Nowadays, many classification algorithms have been applied to various industries to help them work out their problems met in real-life scenarios. However, in many binary classification tasks, samples in the minority class only make up a small part of all instances, which leads to the datasets we get usually suffer from high imbalance ratio. Existing models sometimes treat minority classes as noise or ignore them as outliers encountering data skewing. In order to solve this problem, we propose a bagging ensemble learning framework $ASE$ (Anomaly Scoring Based Ensemble Learning). This framework has a scoring system based on anomaly detection algorithms which can guide the resampling strategy by divided samples in the majority class into subspaces. Then specific number of instances will be under-sampled from each subspace to construct subsets by combining with the minority class. And we calculate the weights of base classifiers trained by the subsets according to the classification result of the anomaly detection model and the statistics of the subspaces. Experiments have been conducted which show that our ensemble learning model can dramatically improve the performance of base classifiers and is more efficient than other existing methods under a wide range of imbalance ratio, data scale and data dimension. $ASE$ can be combined with various classifiers and every part of our framework has been proved to be reasonable and necessary.
abstract_zh: 如今，许多分类算法已应用于各个行业，帮助他们解决现实生活中遇到的问题。然而，在许多二分类任务中，少数类中的样本仅占所有实例的一小部分，这导致我们得到的数据集通常存在较高的不平衡率。现有模型有时将少数类别视为噪音，或将其视为遇到数据倾斜的异常值而忽略。为了解决这个问题，我们提出了一个bagging集成学习框架$ASE$（Anomaly Scoring Based Ensemble Learning）。该框架具有基于异常检测算法的评分系统，可以通过将多数类中的样本划分为子空间来指导重采样策略。然后从每个子空间中对特定数量的实例进行欠采样，以与少数类相结合来构造子集。并根据异常检测模型的分类结果和子空间的统计数据计算子集训练的基分类器的权重。实验表明，我们的集成学习模型可以显着提高基分类器的性能，并且在大范围的不平衡率、数据规模和数据维数下比其他现有方法更有效。 $ASE$可以与各种分类器结合，我们框架的每个部分都被证明是合理和必要的。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于异常评分的集成学习框架ASE，用于解决不平衡数据集中的分类问题。
AI.motivation: 现有模型在处理不平衡数据集时往往忽略少数类样本，导致分类性能下降，需设计新的方法提升少数类识别能力。
AI.method: 通过异常检测算法对多数类样本进行子空间划分，结合少数类构建子集，并根据异常检测结果和子空间统计信息计算基分类器权重。
AI.result: 实验表明ASE在多种不平衡比例、数据规模和维度下均显著提升基分类器性能，且框架各部分均合理有效。
AI.conclusion: ASE通过异常评分引导的重采样策略有效解决了不平衡数据分类问题，验证了方法的合理性和广泛适用性。

Then specific number of instances will be under-sampled from each subspace to construct subsets by combining with the minority class. And we calculate the weights of base classifiers trained by the subsets according to the classification result of the anomaly detection model and the statistics of the subspaces. Experiments have been conducted which show that our ensemble learning model can dramatically improve the performance of base classifiers and is more efficient than other existing methods under a wide range of imbalance ratio, data scale and data dimension. $ASE$ can be combined with various classifiers and every part of our framework has been proved to be reasonable and necessary. 如今，许多分类算法已应用于各个行业，帮助他们解决现实生活中遇到的问题。然而，在许多二分类任务中，少数类中的样本仅占所有实例的一小部分，这导致我们得到的数据集通常存在较高的不平衡率。现有模型有时将少数类别视为噪音，或将其视为遇到数据倾斜的异常值而忽略。为了解决这个问题，我们提出了一个bagging集成学习框架$ASE$（Anomaly Scoring Based Ensemble Learning）。该框架具有基于异常检测算法的评分系统，可以通过将多数类中的样本划分为子空间来指导重采样策略。然后从每个子空间中对特定数量的实例进行欠采样，以与少数类相结合来构造子集。并根据异常检测模型的分类结果和子空间的统计数据计算子集训练的基分类器的权重。实验表明，我们的集成学习模型可以显着提高基分类器的性能，并且在大范围的不平衡率、数据规模和数据维数下比其他现有方法更有效。 $ASE$可以与各种分类器结合，我们框架的每个部分都被证明是合理和必要的。 本文提出了一种基于异常评分的集成学习框架ASE，用于解决不平衡数据集中的分类问题。 Xiayu Liang,Ying Gao,Shanrong Xu cs.LG,cs.AI

authors_text: Cheng Zhang,Jian Shi,Xuan Deng,Zizhao Wu
title: Upsampling Autoencoder for Self-Supervised Point Cloud Learning
title_zh: 用于自监督点云学习的上采样自动编码器
abstract: In computer-aided design (CAD) community, the point cloud data is pervasively applied in reverse engineering, where the point cloud analysis plays an important role. While a large number of supervised learning methods have been proposed to handle the unordered point clouds and demonstrated their remarkable success, their performance and applicability are limited to the costly data annotation. In this work, we propose a novel self-supervised pretraining model for point cloud learning without human annotations, which relies solely on upsampling operation to perform feature learning of point cloud in an effective manner. The key premise of our approach is that upsampling operation encourages the network to capture both high-level semantic information and low-level geometric information of the point cloud, thus the downstream tasks such as classification and segmentation will benefit from the pre-trained model. Specifically, our method first conducts the random subsampling from the input point cloud at a low proportion e.g., 12.5%. Then, we feed them into an encoder-decoder architecture, where an encoder is devised to operate only on the subsampled points, along with a upsampling decoder is adopted to reconstruct the original point cloud based on the learned features. Finally, we design a novel joint loss function which enforces the upsampled points to be similar with the original point cloud and uniformly distributed on the underlying shape surface. By adopting the pre-trained encoder weights as initialisation of models for downstream tasks, we find that our UAE outperforms previous state-of-the-art methods in shape classification, part segmentation and point cloud upsampling tasks. Code will be made publicly available upon acceptance.
summary: In computer-aided design (CAD) community, the point cloud data is pervasively applied in reverse engineering, where the point cloud analysis plays an important role. While a large number of supervised learning methods have been proposed to handle the unordered point clouds and demonstrated their remarkable success, their performance and applicability are limited to the costly data annotation. In this work, we propose a novel self-supervised pretraining model for point cloud learning without human annotations, which relies solely on upsampling operation to perform feature learning of point cloud in an effective manner. The key premise of our approach is that upsampling operation encourages the network to capture both high-level semantic information and low-level geometric information of the point cloud, thus the downstream tasks such as classification and segmentation will benefit from the pre-trained model. Specifically, our method first conducts the random subsampling from the input point cloud at a low proportion e.g., 12.5%. Then, we feed them into an encoder-decoder architecture, where an encoder is devised to operate only on the subsampled points, along with a upsampling decoder is adopted to reconstruct the original point cloud based on the learned features. Finally, we design a novel joint loss function which enforces the upsampled points to be similar with the original point cloud and uniformly distributed on the underlying shape surface. By adopting the pre-trained encoder weights as initialisation of models for downstream tasks, we find that our UAE outperforms previous state-of-the-art methods in shape classification, part segmentation and point cloud upsampling tasks. Code will be made publicly available upon acceptance.
abstract_zh: 在计算机辅助设计（CAD）领域，点云数据普遍应用于逆向工程，其中点云分析发挥着重要作用。虽然已经提出了大量的监督学习方法来处理无序点云并证明了它们的显着成功，但它们的性能和适用性仅限于昂贵的数据注释。在这项工作中，我们提出了一种无需人工注释的新型点云学习自监督预训练模型，该模型仅依靠上采样操作来有效地执行点云特征学习。我们方法的关键前提是上采样操作鼓励网络捕获点云的高级语义信息和低级几何信息，因此分类和分割等下游任务将受益于预训练模型。具体来说，我们的方法首先以低比例（例如 12.5%）对输入点云进行随机子采样。然后，我们将它们输入编码器-解码器架构，其中编码器被设计为仅对子采样点进行操作，同时采用上采样解码器来根据学习到的特征重建原始点云。最后，我们设计了一种新颖的联合损失函数，它强制上采样点与原始点云相似并均匀分布在底层形状表面上。通过采用预先训练的编码器权重作为下游任务模型的初始化，我们发现我们的 UAE 在形状分类、零件分割和点云上采样任务方面优于以前最先进的方法。代码将在接受后公开发布。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种无需人工标注的自监督预训练模型，通过上采样操作有效学习点云特征，用于形状分类、部件分割和点云上采样任务。
AI.motivation: 监督学习方法依赖昂贵的人工标注数据，而现有自监督方法在点云特征学习上效果有限。本文旨在通过上采样操作同时捕捉点云的高层语义信息和低层几何信息，提升下游任务性能。
AI.method: 方法包括：1) 对输入点云进行低比例随机下采样（如12.5%）；2) 使用编码器-解码器架构，编码器处理下采样点，解码器通过上采样重建原始点云；3) 设计联合损失函数，强制上采样点与原始点云相似并均匀分布于形状表面。
AI.result: 在形状分类、部件分割和点云上采样任务中，本文提出的UAE模型优于现有最先进的方法。
AI.conclusion: 基于上采样的自监督预训练能有效提升点云学习性能，验证了该方法在捕捉多尺度特征方面的有效性。

authors_text: Zicheng Liu,Siyuan Li,Ge Wang,Cheng Tan,Lirong Wu,Stan Z. Li
title: Harnessing Hard Mixed Samples with Decoupled Regularizer
title_zh: 使用解耦正则化器利用硬混合样本
comment: NeurIPS'2023 Camera Ready. The source code is available at https://github.com/Westlake-AI/openmixup
comments: NeurIPS'2023 Camera Ready. The source code is available at https://github.com/Westlake-AI/openmixup
abstract: Mixup is an efficient data augmentation approach that improves the generalization of neural networks by smoothing the decision boundary with mixed data. Recently, dynamic mixup methods have improved previous static policies effectively (e.g., linear interpolation) by maximizing target-related salient regions in mixed samples, but excessive additional time costs are not acceptable. These additional computational overheads mainly come from optimizing the mixed samples according to the mixed labels. However, we found that the extra optimizing step may be redundant because label-mismatched mixed samples are informative hard mixed samples for deep models to localize discriminative features. In this paper, we thus are not trying to propose a more complicated dynamic mixup policy but rather an efficient mixup objective function with a decoupled regularizer named Decoupled Mixup (DM). The primary effect is that DM can adaptively utilize those hard mixed samples to mine discriminative features without losing the original smoothness of mixup. As a result, DM enables static mixup methods to achieve comparable or even exceed the performance of dynamic methods without any extra computation. This also leads to an interesting objective design problem for mixup training that we need to focus on both smoothing the decision boundaries and identifying discriminative features. Extensive experiments on supervised and semi-supervised learning benchmarks across seven datasets validate the effectiveness of DM as a plug-and-play module. Source code and models are available at https://github.com/Westlake-AI/openmixup
summary: Mixup is an efficient data augmentation approach that improves the generalization of neural networks by smoothing the decision boundary with mixed data. Recently, dynamic mixup methods have improved previous static policies effectively (e.g., linear interpolation) by maximizing target-related salient regions in mixed samples, but excessive additional time costs are not acceptable. These additional computational overheads mainly come from optimizing the mixed samples according to the mixed labels. However, we found that the extra optimizing step may be redundant because label-mismatched mixed samples are informative hard mixed samples for deep models to localize discriminative features. In this paper, we thus are not trying to propose a more complicated dynamic mixup policy but rather an efficient mixup objective function with a decoupled regularizer named Decoupled Mixup (DM). The primary effect is that DM can adaptively utilize those hard mixed samples to mine discriminative features without losing the original smoothness of mixup. As a result, DM enables static mixup methods to achieve comparable or even exceed the performance of dynamic methods without any extra computation. This also leads to an interesting objective design problem for mixup training that we need to focus on both smoothing the decision boundaries and identifying discriminative features. Extensive experiments on supervised and semi-supervised learning benchmarks across seven datasets validate the effectiveness of DM as a plug-and-play module. Source code and models are available at https://github.com/Westlake-AI/openmixup
abstract_zh: Mixup 是一种有效的数据增强方法，它通过使用混合数据平滑决策边界来提高神经网络的泛化能力。最近，动态混合方法通过最大化混合样本中与目标相关的显着区域，有效地改进了先前的静态策略（例如线性插值），但过多的额外时间成本是不可接受的。这些额外的计算开销主要来自根据混合标签优化混合样本。然而，我们发现额外的优化步骤可能是多余的，因为标签不匹配的混合样本是深度模型本地化判别特征的信息丰富的硬混合样本。因此，在本文中，我们并不是试图提出更复杂的动态混合策略，而是提出一种高效的混合目标函数，该函数具有名为解耦混合（DM）的解耦正则化器。主要效果是DM可以自适应地利用这些硬混合样本来挖掘判别特征，而不会失去混合的原始平滑性。因此，DM 使静态混合方法能够达到与动态方法相当甚至超过动态方法的性能，而无需任何额外的计算。这也导致了混合训练的一个有趣的客观设计问题，我们需要关注平滑决策边界和识别判别特征。对七个数据集的监督和半监督学习基准进行的广泛实验验证了 DM 作为即插即用模块的有效性。源代码和模型可在 https://github.com/Westlake-AI/openmixup 获取

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种名为Decoupled Mixup（DM）的高效混合样本正则化方法，通过利用难混合样本挖掘判别特征，无需额外计算即可提升模型性能。
AI.motivation: 动态混合方法虽能提升性能，但因需优化混合标签导致计算开销过大。作者发现标签不匹配的难混合样本本身即可帮助模型定位判别特征，无需额外优化步骤。
AI.method: 设计解耦正则化器DM，通过分离混合样本的平滑目标与特征判别目标，在静态混合策略中自适应利用难样本挖掘特征。
AI.result: 在7个数据集的监督与半监督任务中，DM作为插件模块显著提升模型性能，达到甚至超越动态方法效果。
AI.conclusion: DM通过解耦目标设计，在保持混合平滑性的同时高效利用难样本，为混合训练提供了计算友好的新视角。

This also leads to an interesting objective design problem for mixup training that we need to focus on both smoothing the decision boundaries and identifying discriminative features. Extensive experiments on supervised and semi-supervised learning benchmarks across seven datasets validate the effectiveness of DM as a plug-and-play module. Source code and models are available at https://github.com/Westlake-AI/openmixup Mixup 是一种有效的数据增强方法，它通过使用混合数据平滑决策边界来提高神经网络的泛化能力。最近，动态混合方法通过最大化混合样本中与目标相关的显着区域，有效地改进了先前的静态策略（例如线性插值），但过多的额外时间成本是不可接受的。这些额外的计算开销主要来自根据混合标签优化混合样本。然而，我们发现额外的优化步骤可能是多余的，因为标签不匹配的混合样本是深度模型本地化判别特征的信息丰富的硬混合样本。因此，在本文中，我们并不是试图提出更复杂的动态混合策略，而是提出一种高效的混合目标函数，该函数具有名为解耦混合（DM）的解耦正则化器。主要效果是DM可以自适应地利用这些硬混合样本来挖掘判别特征，而不会失去混合的原始平滑性。因此，DM 使静态混合方法能够达到与动态方法相当甚至超过动态方法的性能，而无需任何额外的计算。这也导致了混合训练的一个有趣的客观设计问题，我们需要关注平滑决策边界和识别判别特征。对七个数据集的监督和半监督学习基准进行的广泛实验验证了 DM 作为即插即用模块的有效性。源代码和模型可在 https://github.com/Westlake-AI/openmixup 获取 本文提出一种名为Decoupled Mixup（DM）的高效混合样本正则化方法，通过利用难混合样本挖掘判别特征，无需额外计算即可提升模型性能。 Zicheng Liu,Siyuan Li,Ge Wang,Cheng Tan,Lirong Wu,Stan Z. Li cs.LG,cs.AI,cs.CV

authors_text: Qiangqiang Dai,Rong-Hua Li,Hongchao Qin,Meihao Liao,Guoren Wang
title: Scaling Up Maximal k-plex Enumeration
title_zh: 扩大最大 k-plex 枚举
abstract: Finding all maximal $k$-plexes on networks is a fundamental research problem in graph analysis due to many important applications, such as community detection, biological graph analysis, and so on. A $k$-plex is a subgraph in which every vertex is adjacent to all but at most $k$ vertices within the subgraph. In this paper, we study the problem of enumerating all large maximal $k$-plexes of a graph and develop several new and efficient techniques to solve the problem. Specifically, we first propose several novel upper-bounding techniques to prune unnecessary computations during the enumeration procedure. We show that the proposed upper bounds can be computed in linear time. Then, we develop a new branch-and-bound algorithm with a carefully-designed pivot re-selection strategy to enumerate all $k$-plexes, which outputs all $k$-plexes in $O(n^2γ_k^n)$ time theoretically, where $n$ is the number of vertices of the graph and $γ_k$ is strictly smaller than 2. In addition, a parallel version of the proposed algorithm is further developed to scale up to process large real-world graphs. Finally, extensive experimental results show that the proposed sequential algorithm can achieve up to $2\times$ to $100\times$ speedup over the state-of-the-art sequential algorithms on most benchmark graphs. The results also demonstrate the high scalability of the proposed parallel algorithm. For example, on a large real-world graph with more than 200 million edges, our parallel algorithm can finish the computation within two minutes, while the state-of-the-art parallel algorithm cannot terminate within 24 hours.
summary: Finding all maximal $k$-plexes on networks is a fundamental research problem in graph analysis due to many important applications, such as community detection, biological graph analysis, and so on. A $k$-plex is a subgraph in which every vertex is adjacent to all but at most $k$ vertices within the subgraph. In this paper, we study the problem of enumerating all large maximal $k$-plexes of a graph and develop several new and efficient techniques to solve the problem. Specifically, we first propose several novel upper-bounding techniques to prune unnecessary computations during the enumeration procedure. We show that the proposed upper bounds can be computed in linear time. Then, we develop a new branch-and-bound algorithm with a carefully-designed pivot re-selection strategy to enumerate all $k$-plexes, which outputs all $k$-plexes in $O(n^2γ_k^n)$ time theoretically, where $n$ is the number of vertices of the graph and $γ_k$ is strictly smaller than 2. In addition, a parallel version of the proposed algorithm is further developed to scale up to process large real-world graphs. Finally, extensive experimental results show that the proposed sequential algorithm can achieve up to $2\times$ to $100\times$ speedup over the state-of-the-art sequential algorithms on most benchmark graphs. The results also demonstrate the high scalability of the proposed parallel algorithm. For example, on a large real-world graph with more than 200 million edges, our parallel algorithm can finish the computation within two minutes, while the state-of-the-art parallel algorithm cannot terminate within 24 hours.
abstract_zh: 由于许多重要的应用，例如社区检测、生物图分析等，找到网络上所有最大 $k$-plex 是图分析中的一个基本研究问题。 $k$-plex 是一个子图，其中每个顶点都与子图中最多 $k$ 个顶点相邻。在本文中，我们研究了枚举图的所有大型最大 $k$-plex 的问题，并开发了几种新的有效技术来解决该问题。具体来说，我们首先提出了几种新颖的上限技术来修剪枚举过程中不必要的计算。我们证明所提出的上限可以在线性时间内计算。然后，我们开发了一种新的分支定界算法，采用精心设计的枢轴重选策略来枚举所有 $k$-plex，理论上该算法在 $O(n^2γ_k^n)$ 时间内输出所有 $k$-plex，其中 $n$ 是图的顶点数，$γ_k$ 严格小于 2。此外，还进一步开发了所提出算法的并行版本，以扩展到处理大型现实世界图。最后，大量的实验结果表明，与大多数基准图上最先进的顺序算法相比，所提出的顺序算法可以实现高达 $2\times$ 到 $100\times$ 的加速。结果还证明了所提出的并行算法的高可扩展性。例如，在具有超过 2 亿条边的大型现实世界图上，我们的并行算法可以在两分钟内完成计算，而最先进的并行算法无法在 24 小时内终止。

AI.tldr: 本文提出高效算法枚举大规模网络中的所有最大k-plex子图。
AI.motivation: k-plex作为网络社区检测等任务的关键结构，现有算法在处理大规模图时效率不足，需更优解决方案。
AI.method: 提出线性时间上界剪枝技术、分支限界算法与动态pivot重选策略，并开发并行版本以提升计算效率。
AI.result: 顺序算法在基准图上较现有方法提速2-100倍，平行算法可在2分钟内处理2亿边的超大规模图，而现有平行算法24小时无法完成。
AI.conclusion: 新方法通过理论优化与并行设计显著提升了k-plex枚举的效率与可扩展性，为大规模网络分析提供有效工具。

authors_text: Sai Zhang,Yuwei Hu,Yuchuan Wu,Jiaman Wu,Yongbin Li,Jian Sun,Caixia Yuan,Xiaojie Wang
title: A Slot Is Not Built in One Utterance: Spoken Language Dialogs with Sub-Slots
title_zh: 槽位并非内置于一个话语中：带有子槽位的口语对话
abstract: A slot value might be provided segment by segment over multiple-turn interactions in a dialog, especially for some important information such as phone numbers and names. It is a common phenomenon in daily life, but little attention has been paid to it in previous work. To fill the gap, this paper defines a new task named Sub-Slot based Task-Oriented Dialog (SSTOD) and builds a Chinese dialog dataset SSD for boosting research on SSTOD. The dataset includes a total of 40K dialogs and 500K utterances from four different domains: Chinese names, phone numbers, ID numbers and license plate numbers. The data is well annotated with sub-slot values, slot values, dialog states and actions. We find some new linguistic phenomena and interactive manners in SSTOD which raise critical challenges of building dialog agents for the task. We test three state-of-the-art dialog models on SSTOD and find they cannot handle the task well on any of the four domains. We also investigate an improved model by involving slot knowledge in a plug-in manner. More work should be done to meet the new challenges raised from SSTOD which widely exists in real-life applications. The dataset and code are publicly available via https://github.com/shunjiu/SSTOD.
summary: A slot value might be provided segment by segment over multiple-turn interactions in a dialog, especially for some important information such as phone numbers and names. It is a common phenomenon in daily life, but little attention has been paid to it in previous work. To fill the gap, this paper defines a new task named Sub-Slot based Task-Oriented Dialog (SSTOD) and builds a Chinese dialog dataset SSD for boosting research on SSTOD. The dataset includes a total of 40K dialogs and 500K utterances from four different domains: Chinese names, phone numbers, ID numbers and license plate numbers. The data is well annotated with sub-slot values, slot values, dialog states and actions. We find some new linguistic phenomena and interactive manners in SSTOD which raise critical challenges of building dialog agents for the task. We test three state-of-the-art dialog models on SSTOD and find they cannot handle the task well on any of the four domains. We also investigate an improved model by involving slot knowledge in a plug-in manner. More work should be done to meet the new challenges raised from SSTOD which widely exists in real-life applications. The dataset and code are publicly available via https://github.com/shunjiu/SSTOD.
abstract_zh: 槽值可以通过对话中的多轮交互逐段提供，特别是对于一些重要信息，例如电话号码和姓名。这是日常生活中常见的现象，但在以往的工作中却很少受到关注。为了填补这一空白，本文定义了一种名为基于子时隙的面向任务的对话（SSTOD）的新任务，并构建了中文对话数据集SSD以促进SSTOD的研究。该数据集总共包含来自四个不同领域的 40K 对话和 500K 话语：中文姓名、电话号码、身份证号码和车牌号码。数据通过子槽值、槽值、对话框状态和操作进行了很好的注释。我们在 SSTOD 中发现了一些新的语言现象和交互方式，这对构建该任务的对话代理提出了严峻的挑战。我们在 SSTOD 上测试了三种最先进的对话模型，发现它们无法在四个域中的任何一个域上很好地处理任务。我们还通过以插件方式涉及插槽知识来研究改进的模型。需要做更多的工作来应对广泛存在于实际应用中的 SSTOD 带来的新挑战。数据集和代码可通过 https://github.com/shunjiu/SSTOD 公开获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种新的基于子槽的任务导向对话任务（SSTOD），并构建了一个包含40K对话的中文数据集SSD，用于解决多轮对话中槽位值分段提供的挑战。
AI.motivation: 现有研究未充分关注多轮对话中重要信息（如电话号码、姓名）分段提供的情况，导致对话系统难以处理此类复杂场景。
AI.method: 定义SSTOD任务，构建包含子槽标注的SSD数据集，并通过实验测试三种先进对话模型，进一步提出结合槽位知识的改进模型。
AI.result: 现有模型在四个领域均表现不佳，而引入槽位知识的改进模型效果有所提升，但SSTOD的挑战仍需进一步研究。
AI.conclusion: SSTOD在实际应用中广泛存在，需更多研究以应对多轮对话中子槽填充的复杂性。

authors_text: Zewang Zhang,Yibin Zheng,Xinhui Li,Li Lu
title: WeSinger: Data-augmented Singing Voice Synthesis with Auxiliary Losses
title_zh: WeSinger：具有辅助损失的数据增强歌声合成
abstract: In this paper, we develop a new multi-singer Chinese neural singing voice synthesis (SVS) system named WeSinger. To improve the accuracy and naturalness of synthesized singing voice, we design several specifical modules and techniques: 1) A deep bi-directional LSTM-based duration model with multi-scale rhythm loss and post-processing step; 2) A Transformer-alike acoustic model with progressive pitch-weighted decoder loss; 3) a 24 kHz pitch-aware LPCNet neural vocoder to produce high-quality singing waveforms; 4) A novel data augmentation method with multi-singer pre-training for stronger robustness and naturalness. To our knowledge, WeSinger is the first SVS system to adopt 24 kHz LPCNet and multi-singer pre-training simultaneously. Both quantitative and qualitative evaluation results demonstrate the effectiveness of WeSinger in terms of accuracy and naturalness, and WeSinger achieves state-of-the-art performance on the recent public Chinese singing corpus Opencpop\footnote{https://wenet.org.cn/opencpop/}. Some synthesized singing samples are available online\footnote{https://zzw922cn.github.io/wesinger/}.
summary: In this paper, we develop a new multi-singer Chinese neural singing voice synthesis (SVS) system named WeSinger. To improve the accuracy and naturalness of synthesized singing voice, we design several specifical modules and techniques: 1) A deep bi-directional LSTM-based duration model with multi-scale rhythm loss and post-processing step; 2) A Transformer-alike acoustic model with progressive pitch-weighted decoder loss; 3) a 24 kHz pitch-aware LPCNet neural vocoder to produce high-quality singing waveforms; 4) A novel data augmentation method with multi-singer pre-training for stronger robustness and naturalness. To our knowledge, WeSinger is the first SVS system to adopt 24 kHz LPCNet and multi-singer pre-training simultaneously. Both quantitative and qualitative evaluation results demonstrate the effectiveness of WeSinger in terms of accuracy and naturalness, and WeSinger achieves state-of-the-art performance on the recent public Chinese singing corpus Opencpop\footnote{https://wenet.org.cn/opencpop/}. Some synthesized singing samples are available online\footnote{https://zzw922cn.github.io/wesinger/}.
abstract_zh: 在本文中，我们开发了一种新的多歌手中文神经歌声合成（SVS）系统，名为WeSinger。为了提高合成歌声的准确性和自然度，我们设计了几个具体的模块和技术：1）基于深度双向LSTM的持续时间模型，具有多尺度节奏损失和后处理步骤； 2）类似 Transformer 的声学模型，具有渐进式音高加权解码器损失； 3) 24 kHz 音高感知 LPCNet 神经声码器，用于产生高质量的歌唱波形； 4）一种新颖的数据增强方法，具有多歌手预训练，具有更强的鲁棒性和自然性。据我们所知，WeSinger 是第一个同时采用 24 kHz LPCNet 和多歌手预训练的 SVS 系统。定量和定性评估结果都证明了WeSinger在准确性和自然度方面的有效性，并且在最近公开的华语歌唱语料库Opencpop\footnote{https://wenet.org.cn/opencpop/}上取得了state-of-the-art的表现。一些合成的歌唱样本可以在线获取\footnote{https://zzw922cn.github.io/wesinger/}。

AI.tldr: 本文提出WeSinger系统，通过数据增强和辅助损失技术提升多歌手中文歌声合成的准确性与自然度。
AI.motivation: 现有歌声合成系统在准确性和自然度上存在不足，需通过模块优化与数据增强方法改进。
AI.method: 1) 基于双向LSTM的持续时间模型与多尺度节奏损失；2) Transformer声学模型与渐进式音高加权解码器损失；3) 24kHz音高感知LPCNet声码器；4) 多歌手预训练的数据增强方法。
AI.result: 在Opencpop数据集上达到SOTA性能，定性和定量评估均显示合成效果优异，提供在线歌声示例。
AI.conclusion: WeSinger通过创新模块与多歌手预训练结合，有效提升歌声合成质量，为实际应用提供可行方案。

To improve the accuracy and naturalness of synthesized singing voice, we design several specifical modules and techniques: 1) A deep bi-directional LSTM-based duration model with multi-scale rhythm loss and post-processing step; 2) A Transformer-alike acoustic model with progressive pitch-weighted decoder loss; 3) a 24 kHz pitch-aware LPCNet neural vocoder to produce high-quality singing waveforms; 4) A novel data augmentation method with multi-singer pre-training for stronger robustness and naturalness. To our knowledge, WeSinger is the first SVS system to adopt 24 kHz LPCNet and multi-singer pre-training simultaneously. Both quantitative and qualitative evaluation results demonstrate the effectiveness of WeSinger in terms of accuracy and naturalness, and WeSinger achieves state-of-the-art performance on the recent public Chinese singing corpus Opencpop\footnote{https://wenet.org.cn/opencpop/}. authors_text: Wei Zhao,Shiqi Zhang,Bing Zhou,Bei Wang
title: STCGAT: A Spatio-temporal Causal Graph Attention Network for traffic flow prediction in Intelligent Transportation Systems
title_zh: STCGAT：用于智能交通系统中交通流预测的时空因果图注意网络
abstract: Air pollution and carbon emissions caused by modern transportation are closely related to global climate change. With the help of next-generation information technology such as Internet of Things (IoT) and Artificial Intelligence (AI), accurate traffic flow prediction can effectively solve problems such as traffic congestion and mitigate environmental pollution and climate change. It further promotes the development of Intelligent Transportation Systems (ITS) and smart cities. However, the strong spatial and temporal correlation of traffic data makes the task of accurate traffic forecasting a significant challenge. Existing methods are usually based on graph neural networks using predefined spatial adjacency graphs of traffic networks to model spatial dependencies, ignoring the dynamic correlation of relationships between road nodes. In addition, they usually use independent Spatio-temporal components to capture Spatio-temporal dependencies and do not effectively model global Spatio-temporal dependencies. This paper proposes a new Spatio-temporal Causal Graph Attention Network (STCGAT) for traffic prediction to address the above challenges. In STCGAT, we use a node embedding approach that can adaptively generate spatial adjacency subgraphs at each time step without a priori geographic knowledge and fine-grained modeling of the topology of dynamically generated graphs for different time steps. Meanwhile, we propose an efficient causal temporal correlation component that contains node adaptive learning, graph convolution, and local and global causal temporal convolution modules to learn local and global Spatio-temporal dependencies jointly. Extensive experiments on four real, large traffic datasets show that our model consistently outperforms all baseline models.
summary: Air pollution and carbon emissions caused by modern transportation are closely related to global climate change. With the help of next-generation information technology such as Internet of Things (IoT) and Artificial Intelligence (AI), accurate traffic flow prediction can effectively solve problems such as traffic congestion and mitigate environmental pollution and climate change. It further promotes the development of Intelligent Transportation Systems (ITS) and smart cities. However, the strong spatial and temporal correlation of traffic data makes the task of accurate traffic forecasting a significant challenge. Existing methods are usually based on graph neural networks using predefined spatial adjacency graphs of traffic networks to model spatial dependencies, ignoring the dynamic correlation of relationships between road nodes. In addition, they usually use independent Spatio-temporal components to capture Spatio-temporal dependencies and do not effectively model global Spatio-temporal dependencies. This paper proposes a new Spatio-temporal Causal Graph Attention Network (STCGAT) for traffic prediction to address the above challenges. In STCGAT, we use a node embedding approach that can adaptively generate spatial adjacency subgraphs at each time step without a priori geographic knowledge and fine-grained modeling of the topology of dynamically generated graphs for different time steps. Meanwhile, we propose an efficient causal temporal correlation component that contains node adaptive learning, graph convolution, and local and global causal temporal convolution modules to learn local and global Spatio-temporal dependencies jointly. Extensive experiments on four real, large traffic datasets show that our model consistently outperforms all baseline models.
abstract_zh: 现代交通造成的空气污染和碳排放与全球气候变化密切相关。借助物联网、人工智能等新一代信息技术，准确的交通流量预测可以有效解决交通拥堵等问题，缓解环境污染和气候变化。进一步推动智能交通系统（ITS）和智慧城市的发展。然而，交通数据强烈的时空相关性使得准确的交通预测成为一项重大挑战。现有方法通常基于图神经网络，使用交通网络的预定义空间邻接图来建模空间依赖关系，忽略道路节点之间关系的动态相关性。此外，他们通常使用独立的时空组件来捕获时空依赖性，并且不能有效地对全局时空依赖性进行建模。本文提出了一种新的时空因果图注意网络（STCGAT）用于流量预测，以解决上述挑战。在 STCGAT 中，我们使用节点嵌入方法，可以在每个时间步自适应地生成空间邻接子图，而无需先验地理知识和对不同时间步动态生成图的拓扑进行细粒度建模。同时，我们提出了一种高效的因果时间相关组件，其中包含节点自适应学习、图卷积以及局部和全局因果时间卷积模块，以共同学习局部和全局时空依赖性。对四个真实的大型流量数据集的广泛实验表明，我们的模型始终优于所有基线模型。

AI.tldr: 本文提出STCGAT模型，通过时空因果图注意力网络解决交通流量预测中的动态空间关系和全局时空依赖建模问题。
AI.motivation: 现有方法依赖预定义空间图且独立处理时空依赖，无法有效捕捉动态节点关系和全局时空关联，影响预测准确性。
AI.method: 采用自适应生成空间邻接子图的节点嵌入方法，结合包含节点自适应学习、图卷积及局部/全局因果时间卷积的因果时序模块。
AI.result: 在四个真实大规模交通数据集上，STCGAT模型性能持续优于所有基线方法。
AI.conclusion: STCGAT通过动态图建模和联合时空依赖学习，有效提升了交通预测精度，为智能交通系统提供新解决方案。

authors_text: Ding Wang,Shantanu Prabhat,Nithya Sambasivan
title: Whose AI Dream? In search of the aspiration in data annotation
title_zh: 谁的人工智能梦？寻找数据标注的愿望
abstract: This paper present the practice of data annotation from the perspective of the annotators. Data is fundamental to ML models. This paper investigates the work practices concerning data annotation as performed in the industry, in India. Previous investigations have largely focused on annotator subjectivity, bias and efficiency. We present a wider perspective of the data annotation, following a grounded approach, we conducted three sets of interviews with 25 annotators, 10 industry experts and 12 ML practitioners. Our results show that the work of annotators is dictated by the interests, priorities and values of others above their station. More than technical, we contend that data annotation is a systematic exercise of power through organizational structure and practice. We propose a set of implications for how we can cultivate and encourage better practice to balance the tension between the need for high quality data at low cost and the annotator aspiration for well being, career perspective, and active participation in building the AI dream.
summary: This paper present the practice of data annotation from the perspective of the annotators. Data is fundamental to ML models. This paper investigates the work practices concerning data annotation as performed in the industry, in India. Previous investigations have largely focused on annotator subjectivity, bias and efficiency. We present a wider perspective of the data annotation, following a grounded approach, we conducted three sets of interviews with 25 annotators, 10 industry experts and 12 ML practitioners. Our results show that the work of annotators is dictated by the interests, priorities and values of others above their station. More than technical, we contend that data annotation is a systematic exercise of power through organizational structure and practice. We propose a set of implications for how we can cultivate and encourage better practice to balance the tension between the need for high quality data at low cost and the annotator aspiration for well being, career perspective, and active participation in building the AI dream.
abstract_zh: 本文从标注者的角度介绍了数据标注的实践。数据是机器学习模型的基础。本文调查了印度行业中有关数据注释的工作实践。之前的调查主要集中在注释者的主观性、偏见和效率上。我们提出了更广泛的数据标注视角，采用扎根的方法，对 25 名标注者、10 名行业专家和 12 名机器学习从业者进行了三组采访。我们的结果表明，注释者的工作是由高于其地位的其他人的利益、优先事项和价值观决定的。除了技术之外，我们认为数据注释是通过组织结构和实践系统地行使权力。我们提出了一系列关于如何培养和鼓励更好的实践的建议，以平衡对低成本高质量数据的需求与注释者对福祉、职业前景和积极参与构建人工智能梦想的渴望之间的紧张关系。

AI.tldr: 本文从数据标注者视角出发，探讨数据标注工作实践及其背后的权力结构与社会影响。
AI.motivation: 现有研究多关注标注者的主观性与效率，本文旨在揭示数据标注工作中隐藏的权力关系及标注者的深层诉求。
AI.method: 采用扎根理论方法，通过三轮访谈（25名标注者、10位行业专家及12名机器学习从业者）收集数据，进行质性分析。
AI.result: 研究发现数据标注工作受组织权力结构支配，标注者愿望常被忽视，存在数据质量需求与标注者职业发展诉求的冲突。
AI.conclusion: 结论建议通过制度优化与参与式设计，平衡数据质量需求与标注者福祉，推动更公平的AI发展实践。

search_text: Whose AI Dream? In search of the aspiration in data annotation 谁的人工智能梦？寻找数据标注的愿望 This paper present the practice of data annotation from the perspective of the annotators. Data is fundamental to ML models. This paper investigates the work practices concerning data annotation as performed in the industry, in India. Previous investigations have largely focused on annotator subjectivity, bias and efficiency. We present a wider perspective of the data annotation, following a grounded approach, we conducted three sets of interviews with 25 annotators, 10 industry experts and 12 ML practitioners. Our results show that the work of annotators is dictated by the interests, priorities and values of others above their station. More than technical, we contend that data annotation is a systematic exercise of power through organizational structure and practice. We propose a set of implications for how we can cultivate and encourage better practice to balance the tension between the need for high quality data at low cost and the annotator aspiration for well being, career perspective, and active participation in building the AI dream. 本文从标注者的角度介绍了数据标注的实践。数据是机器学习模型的基础。本文调查了印度行业中有关数据注释的工作实践。之前的调查主要集中在注释者的主观性、偏见和效率上。我们提出了更广泛的数据标注视角，采用扎根的方法，对 25 名标注者、10 名行业专家和 12 名机器学习从业者进行了三组采访。我们的结果表明，注释者的工作是由高于其地位的其他人的利益、优先事项和价值观决定的。除了技术之外，我们认为数据注释是通过组织结构和实践系统地行使权力。我们提出了一系列关于如何培养和鼓励更好的实践的建议，以平衡对低成本高质量数据的需求与注释者对福祉、职业前景和积极参与构建人工智能梦想的渴望之间的紧张关系。 本文从数据标注者视角出发，探讨数据标注工作实践及其背后的权力结构与社会影响。 Ding Wang,Shantanu Prabhat,Nithya Sambasivan cs.HC,cs.CY

authors_text: Xiaoxing Wang,Jiale Lin,Junchi Yan,Juanping Zhao,Xiaokang Yang
title: EAutoDet: Efficient Architecture Search for Object Detection
title_zh: EAutoDet：用于对象检测的高效架构搜索
abstract: Training CNN for detection is time-consuming due to the large dataset and complex network modules, making it hard to search architectures on detection datasets directly, which usually requires vast search costs (usually tens and even hundreds of GPU-days). In contrast, this paper introduces an efficient framework, named EAutoDet, that can discover practical backbone and FPN architectures for object detection in 1.4 GPU-days. Specifically, we construct a supernet for both backbone and FPN modules and adopt the differentiable method. To reduce the GPU memory requirement and computational cost, we propose a kernel reusing technique by sharing the weights of candidate operations on one edge and consolidating them into one convolution. A dynamic channel refinement strategy is also introduced to search channel numbers. Extensive experiments show significant efficacy and efficiency of our method. In particular, the discovered architectures surpass state-of-the-art object detection NAS methods and achieve 40.1 mAP with 120 FPS and 49.2 mAP with 41.3 FPS on COCO test-dev set. We also transfer the discovered architectures to rotation detection task, which achieve 77.05 mAP$_{\text{50}}$ on DOTA-v1.0 test set with 21.1M parameters.
summary: Training CNN for detection is time-consuming due to the large dataset and complex network modules, making it hard to search architectures on detection datasets directly, which usually requires vast search costs (usually tens and even hundreds of GPU-days). In contrast, this paper introduces an efficient framework, named EAutoDet, that can discover practical backbone and FPN architectures for object detection in 1.4 GPU-days. Specifically, we construct a supernet for both backbone and FPN modules and adopt the differentiable method. To reduce the GPU memory requirement and computational cost, we propose a kernel reusing technique by sharing the weights of candidate operations on one edge and consolidating them into one convolution. A dynamic channel refinement strategy is also introduced to search channel numbers. Extensive experiments show significant efficacy and efficiency of our method. In particular, the discovered architectures surpass state-of-the-art object detection NAS methods and achieve 40.1 mAP with 120 FPS and 49.2 mAP with 41.3 FPS on COCO test-dev set. We also transfer the discovered architectures to rotation detection task, which achieve 77.05 mAP$_{\text{50}}$ on DOTA-v1.0 test set with 21.1M parameters.
abstract_zh: 由于数据集庞大且网络模块复杂，训练 CNN 进行检测非常耗时，因此很难直接在检测数据集上搜索架构，这通常需要巨大的搜索成本（通常需要数十甚至数百个 GPU 天）。相比之下，本文介绍了一种名为 EAutoDet 的高效框架，它可以在 1.4 GPU 天的时间内发现用于对象检测的实用主干和 FPN 架构。具体来说，我们为主干模块和 FPN 模块构建了一个超网，并采用可微分方法。为了减少 GPU 内存需求和计算成本，我们提出了一种内核重用技术，通过共享一条边上候选操作的权重并将它们合并到一个卷积中。还引入了动态频道细化策略来搜索频道号码。大量的实验表明我们的方法具有显着的功效和效率。特别是，所发现的架构超越了最先进的对象检测 NAS 方法，并在 COCO 测试开发集上实现了 40.1 mAP（120 FPS）和 49.2 mAP（41.3 FPS）。我们还将发现的架构转移到旋转检测任务，在具有 2110 万个参数的 DOTA-v1.0 测试集上实现了 77.05 mAP$_{\text{50}}$。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为EAutoDet的高效架构搜索框架，用于快速发现适用于目标检测的骨干网络和FPN架构。
AI.motivation: 传统卷积神经网络在目标检测任务中训练耗时且计算成本高昂，直接在检测数据集上进行架构搜索效率低下。
AI.method: 构建包含骨干网络和FPN模块的超网络，采用可微分搜索方法，并通过权重共享的内核复用技术和动态通道优化策略降低计算成本。
AI.result: 在COCO数据集上以1.4 GPU天完成搜索，达到40.1 mAP（120 FPS）和49.2 mAP（41.3 FPS），在DOTA数据集上旋转检测任务达到77.05 mAP50。
AI.conclusion: EAutoDet显著提升了检测架构搜索的效率，且在多个数据集上优于现有NAS方法，具有实际应用价值。

authors_text: Yue Wang,Yawen Li,Ang Li
title: Academic Resource Text Level Multi-label Classification based on Attention
title_zh: 基于Attention的学术资源文本级多标签分类
abstract: Hierarchical multi-label academic text classification (HMTC) is to assign academic texts into a hierarchically structured labeling system. We propose an attention-based hierarchical multi-label classification algorithm of academic texts (AHMCA) by integrating features such as text, keywords, and hierarchical structure, the academic documents are classified into the most relevant categories. We utilize word2vec and BiLSTM to obtain embedding and latent vector representations of text, keywords, and hierarchies. We use hierarchical attention mechanism to capture the associations between keywords, label hierarchies, and text word vectors to generate hierarchical-specific document embedding vectors to replace the original text embeddings in HMCN-F. The experimental results on the academic text dataset demonstrate the effectiveness of the AHMCA algorithm.
summary: Hierarchical multi-label academic text classification (HMTC) is to assign academic texts into a hierarchically structured labeling system. We propose an attention-based hierarchical multi-label classification algorithm of academic texts (AHMCA) by integrating features such as text, keywords, and hierarchical structure, the academic documents are classified into the most relevant categories. We utilize word2vec and BiLSTM to obtain embedding and latent vector representations of text, keywords, and hierarchies. We use hierarchical attention mechanism to capture the associations between keywords, label hierarchies, and text word vectors to generate hierarchical-specific document embedding vectors to replace the original text embeddings in HMCN-F. The experimental results on the academic text dataset demonstrate the effectiveness of the AHMCA algorithm.
abstract_zh: 分层多标签学术文本分类（HMTC）是将学术文本分配到分层结构的标签系统中。我们提出了一种基于注意力的学术文本分层多标签分类算法（AHMCA），通过整合文本、关键词和层次结构等特征，将学术文档分类到最相关的类别。我们利用 word2vec 和 BiLSTM 来获得文本、关键字和层次结构的嵌入和潜在向量表示。我们使用层次注意力机制来捕获关键字、标签层次结构和文本词向量之间的关联，以生成特定层次的文档嵌入向量来替换 HMCN-F 中的原始文本嵌入。在学术文本数据集上的实验结果证明了AHMCA算法的有效性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出基于注意力机制的层次化多标签学术文本分类算法AHMCA，通过整合文本、关键词和层次结构特征对学术文档进行分类。
AI.motivation: 现有方法未能有效结合文本内容、关键词及层次结构信息，导致学术文本分类准确率不足。
AI.method: 采用word2vec和BiLSTM获取文本嵌入向量，利用层次化注意力机制关联关键词、标签层次与文本向量，生成层次特定的文档嵌入表示。
AI.result: 在学术文本数据集上的实验验证了AHMCA算法的有效性，分类性能优于现有方法。
AI.conclusion: 融合多源特征与层次化注意力机制能显著提升学术文本的层次化多标签分类效果。

authors_text: Zhiyuan Liang,Tiancai Wang,Xiangyu Zhang,Jian Sun,Jianbing Shen
title: Tree Energy Loss: Towards Sparsely Annotated Semantic Segmentation
title_zh: 树能量损失：走向稀疏注释的语义分割
abstract: Sparsely annotated semantic segmentation (SASS) aims to train a segmentation network with coarse-grained (i.e., point-, scribble-, and block-wise) supervisions, where only a small proportion of pixels are labeled in each image. In this paper, we propose a novel tree energy loss for SASS by providing semantic guidance for unlabeled pixels. The tree energy loss represents images as minimum spanning trees to model both low-level and high-level pair-wise affinities. By sequentially applying these affinities to the network prediction, soft pseudo labels for unlabeled pixels are generated in a coarse-to-fine manner, achieving dynamic online self-training. The tree energy loss is effective and easy to be incorporated into existing frameworks by combining it with a traditional segmentation loss. Compared with previous SASS methods, our method requires no multistage training strategies, alternating optimization procedures, additional supervised data, or time-consuming post-processing while outperforming them in all SASS settings. Code is available at https://github.com/megvii-research/TreeEnergyLoss.
summary: Sparsely annotated semantic segmentation (SASS) aims to train a segmentation network with coarse-grained (i.e., point-, scribble-, and block-wise) supervisions, where only a small proportion of pixels are labeled in each image. In this paper, we propose a novel tree energy loss for SASS by providing semantic guidance for unlabeled pixels. The tree energy loss represents images as minimum spanning trees to model both low-level and high-level pair-wise affinities. By sequentially applying these affinities to the network prediction, soft pseudo labels for unlabeled pixels are generated in a coarse-to-fine manner, achieving dynamic online self-training. The tree energy loss is effective and easy to be incorporated into existing frameworks by combining it with a traditional segmentation loss. Compared with previous SASS methods, our method requires no multistage training strategies, alternating optimization procedures, additional supervised data, or time-consuming post-processing while outperforming them in all SASS settings. Code is available at https://github.com/megvii-research/TreeEnergyLoss.
abstract_zh: 稀疏注释语义分割（SASS）旨在训练具有粗粒度（即点式、涂鸦式和块式）监督的分割网络，其中每个图像中仅标记一小部分像素。在本文中，我们通过为未标记像素提供语义指导，提出了一种新颖的 SASS 树能量损失。树能量损失将图像表示为最小生成树，以对低级和高级成对亲和力进行建模。通过将这些亲和力顺序应用到网络预测中，以从粗到细的方式生成未标记像素的软伪标签，实现动态在线自训练。通过将树能量损失与传统的分割损失相结合，树能量损失是有效的并且易于合并到现有框架中。与以前的 SASS 方法相比，我们的方法不需要多阶段训练策略、交替优化程序、额外的监督数据或耗时的后处理，同时在所有 SASS 设置中都优于它们。代码可在 https://github.com/megvii-research/TreeEnergyLoss 获取。

AI.result: 在多种稀疏标注设置下优于现有方法，无需多阶段训练或额外数据。
AI.conclusion: 树能量损失函数有效简化了训练流程，为稀疏标注语义分割提供了新思路。

authors_text: Yu Feng,Yuhai Tu
title: The activity-weight duality in feed forward neural networks: The geometric determinants of generalization
title_zh: 前馈神经网络中的活动权重二元性：泛化的几何决定因素
abstract: One of the fundamental problems in machine learning is generalization. In neural network models with a large number of weights (parameters), many solutions can be found to fit the training data equally well. The key question is which solution can describe testing data not in the training set. Here, we report the discovery of an exact duality (equivalence) between changes in activities in a given layer of neurons and changes in weights that connect to the next layer of neurons in a densely connected layer in any feed forward neural network. The activity-weight (A-W) duality allows us to map variations in inputs (data) to variations of the corresponding dual weights. By using this mapping, we show that the generalization loss can be decomposed into a sum of contributions from different eigen-directions of the Hessian matrix of the loss function at the solution in weight space. The contribution from a given eigen-direction is the product of two geometric factors (determinants): the sharpness of the loss landscape and the standard deviation of the dual weights, which is found to scale with the weight norm of the solution. Our results provide an unified framework, which we used to reveal how different regularization schemes (weight decay, stochastic gradient descent with different batch sizes and learning rates, dropout), training data size, and labeling noise affect generalization performance by controlling either one or both of these two geometric determinants for generalization. These insights can be used to guide development of algorithms for finding more generalizable solutions in overparametrized neural networks.
summary: One of the fundamental problems in machine learning is generalization. In neural network models with a large number of weights (parameters), many solutions can be found to fit the training data equally well. The key question is which solution can describe testing data not in the training set. Here, we report the discovery of an exact duality (equivalence) between changes in activities in a given layer of neurons and changes in weights that connect to the next layer of neurons in a densely connected layer in any feed forward neural network. The activity-weight (A-W) duality allows us to map variations in inputs (data) to variations of the corresponding dual weights. By using this mapping, we show that the generalization loss can be decomposed into a sum of contributions from different eigen-directions of the Hessian matrix of the loss function at the solution in weight space. The contribution from a given eigen-direction is the product of two geometric factors (determinants): the sharpness of the loss landscape and the standard deviation of the dual weights, which is found to scale with the weight norm of the solution. Our results provide an unified framework, which we used to reveal how different regularization schemes (weight decay, stochastic gradient descent with different batch sizes and learning rates, dropout), training data size, and labeling noise affect generalization performance by controlling either one or both of these two geometric determinants for generalization. These insights can be used to guide development of algorithms for finding more generalizable solutions in overparametrized neural networks.
abstract_zh: 机器学习的基本问题之一是泛化。在具有大量权重（参数）的神经网络模型中，可以找到许多同样适合训练数据的解决方案。关键问题是哪个解决方案可以描述不在训练集中的测试数据。在这里，我们报告了在任何前馈神经网络中给定层神经元的活动变化与连接到密集连接层中的下一层神经元的权重变化之间存在精确的二元性（等价性）的发现。活动权重（A-W）二元性使我们能够将输入（数据）的变化映射到相应对偶权重的变化。通过使用这种映射，我们表明泛化损失可以分解为权重空间解处损失函数的 Hessian 矩阵的不同特征方向的贡献之和。给定特征方向的贡献是两个几何因素（决定因素）的乘积：损失景观的锐度和对偶权重的标准差，发现其与解的权重范数成比例。我们的结果提供了一个统一的框架，我们用它来揭示不同的正则化方案（权重衰减、不同批量大小和学习率的随机梯度下降、dropout）、训练数据大小和标签噪声如何通过控制这两个泛化几何决定因素中的一个或两个来影响泛化性能。这些见解可用于指导算法的开发，以在过参数化神经网络中找到更通用的解决方案。

AI.tldr: 该论文发现前馈神经网络中活动-权重（A-W）对偶性，并揭示其对泛化能力的几何决定因素。
AI.motivation: 在参数众多的神经网络中，如何选择能更好泛化的解是核心问题，传统方法难以解释泛化性能的差异。
AI.method: 通过建立神经元层活动变化与连接权重变化的对偶性，将输入变化映射到对偶权重，并利用损失函数Hessian矩阵的特征方向分解泛化损失。
AI.result: 泛化损失可分解为损失景观锐度与对偶权重标准差的乘积，后者与解的权重范数相关，揭示了正则化方法、数据规模等因素影响泛化的机制。
AI.conclusion: 该框架为通过控制几何决定因素提升过参数化网络泛化性能提供了理论指导。
