authors_text: Yang Jiang,Zhe Xue,Ang Li
title: Research Scholar Interest Mining Method based on Load Centrality
title_zh: 基于负载中心性的研究学者兴趣挖掘方法
comment: There are some probiems in our algorithm and we want to withdraw this paper
comments: There are some probiems in our algorithm and we want to withdraw this paper
abstract: In the era of big data, it is possible to carry out cooperative research on the research results of researchers through papers, patents and other data, so as to study the role of researchers, and produce results in the analysis of results. For the important problems found in the research and application of reality, this paper also proposes a research scholar interest mining algorithm based on load centrality (LCBIM), which can accurately solve the problem according to the researcher's research papers and patent data. Graphs of creative algorithms in various fields of the study aggregated ideas, generated topic graphs by aggregating neighborhoods, used the generated topic information to construct with similar or similar topic spaces, and utilize keywords to construct one or more topics. The regional structure of each topic can be used to closely calculate the weight of the centrality research model of the node, which can analyze the field in the complete coverage principle. The scientific research cooperation based on the load rate center proposed in this paper can effectively extract the interests of scientific research scholars from papers and corpus.
summary: In the era of big data, it is possible to carry out cooperative research on the research results of researchers through papers, patents and other data, so as to study the role of researchers, and produce results in the analysis of results. For the important problems found in the research and application of reality, this paper also proposes a research scholar interest mining algorithm based on load centrality (LCBIM), which can accurately solve the problem according to the researcher's research papers and patent data. Graphs of creative algorithms in various fields of the study aggregated ideas, generated topic graphs by aggregating neighborhoods, used the generated topic information to construct with similar or similar topic spaces, and utilize keywords to construct one or more topics. The regional structure of each topic can be used to closely calculate the weight of the centrality research model of the node, which can analyze the field in the complete coverage principle. The scientific research cooperation based on the load rate center proposed in this paper can effectively extract the interests of scientific research scholars from papers and corpus.
abstract_zh: 大数据时代，可以通过论文、专利等数据对研究人员的研究成果进行合作研究，从而研究研究人员的作用，并在结果分析中产生结果。针对现实研究和应用中发现的重要问题，本文还提出了一种基于负载中心性的研究学者兴趣挖掘算法（LCBIM），可以根据研究人员的研究论文和专利数据准确解决问题。研究各个领域的创造性算法图聚合思想，通过聚合邻域生成主题图，利用生成的主题信息构建相似或相似的主题空间，并利用关键词构建一个或多个主题。可以利用每个主题的区域结构来紧密计算节点的中心性研究模型的权重，从而可以在完全覆盖的原则下分析领域。本文提出的基于负载率中心的科研合作可以有效地从论文和语料库中提取科研学者的兴趣。

AI.tldr: 本文提出基于负载中心性的研究学者兴趣挖掘方法（LCBIM），通过分析学者的论文和专利数据，精准提取其研究兴趣。
AI.motivation: 现有方法难以准确挖掘学者多维度研究兴趣，需结合大数据分析与图模型技术提升兴趣识别精度。
AI.method: 构建跨领域创意算法图，通过邻域聚合生成主题图，利用关键词构建主题空间，并基于节点中心性权重计算分析研究领域覆盖。
AI.result: LCBIM算法能有效从论文和语料库中提取学者兴趣，实现研究领域的完整覆盖分析。
AI.conclusion: 该方法为科研合作提供了新的兴趣挖掘视角，可提升学术资源匹配与协作效率。

ai_content.motivation: 现有方法难以准确挖掘学者多维度研究兴趣，需结合大数据分析与图模型技术提升兴趣识别精度。

search_text: Research Scholar Interest Mining Method based on Load Centrality 基于负载中心性的研究学者兴趣挖掘方法 In the era of big data, it is possible to carry out cooperative research on the research results of researchers through papers, patents and other data, so as to study the role of researchers, and produce results in the analysis of results. For the important problems found in the research and application of reality, this paper also proposes a research scholar interest mining algorithm based on load centrality (LCBIM), which can accurately solve the problem according to the researcher's research papers and patent data. Graphs of creative algorithms in various fields of the study aggregated ideas, generated topic graphs by aggregating neighborhoods, used the generated topic information to construct with similar or similar topic spaces, and utilize keywords to construct one or more topics. The regional structure of each topic can be used to closely calculate the weight of the centrality research model of the node, which can analyze the field in the complete coverage principle. The scientific research cooperation based on the load rate center proposed in this paper can effectively extract the interests of scientific research scholars from papers and corpus. 大数据时代，可以通过论文、专利等数据对研究人员的研究成果进行合作研究，从而研究研究人员的作用，并在结果分析中产生结果。针对现实研究和应用中发现的重要问题，本文还提出了一种基于负载中心性的研究学者兴趣挖掘算法（LCBIM），可以根据研究人员的研究论文和专利数据准确解决问题。研究各个领域的创造性算法图聚合思想，通过聚合邻域生成主题图，利用生成的主题信息构建相似或相似的主题空间，并利用关键词构建一个或多个主题。可以利用每个主题的区域结构来紧密计算节点的中心性研究模型的权重，从而可以在完全覆盖的原则下分析领域。本文提出的基于负载率中心的科研合作可以有效地从论文和语料库中提取科研学者的兴趣。 本文提出基于负载中心性的研究学者兴趣挖掘方法（LCBIM），通过分析学者的论文和专利数据，精准提取其研究兴趣。 Yang Jiang,Zhe Xue,Ang Li cs.DL,cs.AI

authors_text: Aneesh Rangnekar,Christopher Kanan,Matthew Hoffman
title: Semantic Segmentation with Active Semi-Supervised Learning
title_zh: 主动半监督学习的语义分割
comment: To appear in the Winter Conference on Applications of Computer Vision (WACV-2023)
comments: To appear in the Winter Conference on Applications of Computer Vision (WACV-2023)
abstract: Using deep learning, we now have the ability to create exceptionally good semantic segmentation systems; however, collecting the prerequisite pixel-wise annotations for training images remains expensive and time-consuming. Therefore, it would be ideal to minimize the number of human annotations needed when creating a new dataset. Here, we address this problem by proposing a novel algorithm that combines active learning and semi-supervised learning. Active learning is an approach for identifying the best unlabeled samples to annotate. While there has been work on active learning for segmentation, most methods require annotating all pixel objects in each image, rather than only the most informative regions. We argue that this is inefficient. Instead, our active learning approach aims to minimize the number of annotations per-image. Our method is enriched with semi-supervised learning, where we use pseudo labels generated with a teacher-student framework to identify image regions that help disambiguate confused classes. We also integrate mechanisms that enable better performance on imbalanced label distributions, which have not been studied previously for active learning in semantic segmentation. In experiments on the CamVid and CityScapes datasets, our method obtains over 95% of the network's performance on the full-training set using less than 17% of the training data, whereas the previous state of the art required 40% of the training data.
summary: Using deep learning, we now have the ability to create exceptionally good semantic segmentation systems; however, collecting the prerequisite pixel-wise annotations for training images remains expensive and time-consuming. Therefore, it would be ideal to minimize the number of human annotations needed when creating a new dataset. Here, we address this problem by proposing a novel algorithm that combines active learning and semi-supervised learning. Active learning is an approach for identifying the best unlabeled samples to annotate. While there has been work on active learning for segmentation, most methods require annotating all pixel objects in each image, rather than only the most informative regions. We argue that this is inefficient. Instead, our active learning approach aims to minimize the number of annotations per-image. Our method is enriched with semi-supervised learning, where we use pseudo labels generated with a teacher-student framework to identify image regions that help disambiguate confused classes. We also integrate mechanisms that enable better performance on imbalanced label distributions, which have not been studied previously for active learning in semantic segmentation. In experiments on the CamVid and CityScapes datasets, our method obtains over 95% of the network's performance on the full-training set using less than 17% of the training data, whereas the previous state of the art required 40% of the training data.
abstract_zh: 使用深度学习，我们现在有能力创建非常好的语义分割系统；然而，收集训练图像所需的像素级注释仍然昂贵且耗时。因此，在创建新数据集时，最好尽量减少所需的人工注释数量。在这里，我们通过提出一种结合主动学习和半监督学习的新颖算法来解决这个问题。主动学习是一种识别最佳未标记样本进行注释的方法。虽然已经有关于分割的主动学习的工作，但大多数方法需要注释每个图像中的所有像素对象，而不仅仅是信息最丰富的区域。我们认为这是低效的。相反，我们的主动学习方法旨在最大限度地减少每张图像的注释数量。我们的方法通过半监督学习得到了丰富，我们使用师生框架生成的伪标签来识别有助于消除混淆类别的图像区域。我们还集成了能够在不平衡标签分布上实现更好性能的机制，这些机制之前尚未在语义分割的主动学习中进行过研究。在 CamVid 和 CityScapes 数据集的实验中，我们的方法使用不到 17% 的训练数据在完整训练集上获得了超过 95% 的网络性能，而之前的最佳技术需要 40% 的训练数据。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种结合主动学习与半监督学习的新算法，旨在减少语义分割任务中所需的人工标注数据量。
AI.motivation: 像素级标注成本高昂且耗时，现有方法通常要求标注整张图像所有对象，效率低下。
AI.method: 通过主动学习选择最具信息量的图像区域进行标注，并利用教师-学生框架生成伪标签的半监督学习，同时引入处理类别不平衡的机制。
AI.result: 在CamVid和CityScapes数据集上，使用不足17%的训练数据即可达到全数据集95%以上的模型性能，优于此前需40%数据的最先进方法。
AI.conclusion: 该方法显著降低了标注需求，同时通过伪标签与不平衡处理机制提升了分割效果，为高效语义分割提供了新思路。

authors_text: JiaXu Wan,Hong Zhang,Jin Zhang,Yuan Ding,Yifan Yang,Yan Li,Xuliang Li
title: DSRRTracker: Dynamic Search Region Refinement for Attention-based Siamese Multi-Object Tracking
title_zh: DSRRTracker：基于注意力的连体多目标跟踪的动态搜索区域细化
comment: The paper contained some errors in the legends and visualisations, such as incorrectly using the visualisations of the next generation model we studied. We have rewritten our paper on its next-generation model based on that paper. Since we do not want readers to misunderstand the next-generation paper due to the errors in this preprint paper, we have decided to withdraw this preprint paper
comments: The paper contained some errors in the legends and visualisations, such as incorrectly using the visualisations of the next generation model we studied. We have rewritten our paper on its next-generation model based on that paper. Since we do not want readers to misunderstand the next-generation paper due to the errors in this preprint paper, we have decided to withdraw this preprint paper
abstract: Many multi-object tracking (MOT) methods follow the framework of "tracking by detection", which associates the target objects-of-interest based on the detection results. However, due to the separate models for detection and association, the tracking results are not optimal.Moreover, the speed is limited by some cumbersome association methods to achieve high tracking performance. In this work, we propose an end-to-end MOT method, with a Gaussian filter-inspired dynamic search region refinement module to dynamically filter and refine the search region by considering both the template information from the past frames and the detection results from the current frame with little computational burden, and a lightweight attention-based tracking head to achieve the effective fine-grained instance association. Extensive experiments and ablation study on MOT17 and MOT20 datasets demonstrate that our method can achieve the state-of-the-art performance with reasonable speed.
summary: Many multi-object tracking (MOT) methods follow the framework of "tracking by detection", which associates the target objects-of-interest based on the detection results. However, due to the separate models for detection and association, the tracking results are not optimal.Moreover, the speed is limited by some cumbersome association methods to achieve high tracking performance. In this work, we propose an end-to-end MOT method, with a Gaussian filter-inspired dynamic search region refinement module to dynamically filter and refine the search region by considering both the template information from the past frames and the detection results from the current frame with little computational burden, and a lightweight attention-based tracking head to achieve the effective fine-grained instance association. Extensive experiments and ablation study on MOT17 and MOT20 datasets demonstrate that our method can achieve the state-of-the-art performance with reasonable speed.
abstract_zh: 许多多目标跟踪（MOT）方法遵循“通过检测进行跟踪”的框架，根据检测结果关联感兴趣的目标对象。然而，由于检测和关联的模型是分开的，跟踪结果并不是最优的。而且，一些繁琐的关联方法限制了速度以实现较高的跟踪性能。在这项工作中，我们提出了一种端到端的MOT方法，采用高斯滤波器启发的动态搜索区域细化模块，通过考虑过去帧的模板信息和当前帧的检测结果来动态过滤和细化搜索区域，计算负担很小，以及轻量级的基于注意力的跟踪头，以实现有效的细粒度实例关联。对 MOT17 和 MOT20 数据集的大量实验和消融研究表明，我们的方法可以以合理的速度实现最先进的性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种端到端的多目标跟踪方法DSRRTracker，通过动态搜索区域优化和轻量级注意力机制提升跟踪性能。
AI.motivation: 现有基于检测的多目标跟踪方法因检测与关联模块分离，导致跟踪结果次优且速度受限，需改进模型效率与准确性。
AI.method: 设计受高斯滤波启发的动态搜索区域优化模块，结合历史模板信息与当前检测结果精简搜索区域；采用轻量级注意力机制实现细粒度实例关联。
AI.result: 在MOT17和MOT20数据集上实验表明，该方法在保持合理速度的同时达到最先进的跟踪性能。
AI.conclusion: DSRRTracker通过动态区域优化与注意力机制有效平衡了跟踪精度与速度，为多目标跟踪提供了新思路。

However, due to the separate models for detection and association, the tracking results are not optimal.Moreover, the speed is limited by some cumbersome association methods to achieve high tracking performance. In this work, we propose an end-to-end MOT method, with a Gaussian filter-inspired dynamic search region refinement module to dynamically filter and refine the search region by considering both the template information from the past frames and the detection results from the current frame with little computational burden, and a lightweight attention-based tracking head to achieve the effective fine-grained instance association. Extensive experiments and ablation study on MOT17 and MOT20 datasets demonstrate that our method can achieve the state-of-the-art performance with reasonable speed. 许多多目标跟踪（MOT）方法遵循“通过检测进行跟踪”的框架，根据检测结果关联感兴趣的目标对象。然而，由于检测和关联的模型是分开的，跟踪结果并不是最优的。而且，一些繁琐的关联方法限制了速度以实现较高的跟踪性能。在这项工作中，我们提出了一种端到端的MOT方法，采用高斯滤波器启发的动态搜索区域细化模块，通过考虑过去帧的模板信息和当前帧的检测结果来动态过滤和细化搜索区域，计算负担很小，以及轻量级的基于注意力的跟踪头，以实现有效的细粒度实例关联。对 MOT17 和 MOT20 数据集的大量实验和消融研究表明，我们的方法可以以合理的速度实现最先进的性能。 本文提出了一种端到端的多目标跟踪方法DSRRTracker，通过动态搜索区域优化和轻量级注意力机制提升跟踪性能。 JiaXu Wan,Hong Zhang,Jin Zhang,Yuan Ding,Yifan Yang,Yan Li,Xuliang Li cs.CV

authors_text: Di Liu,Yunhe Gao,Qilong Zhangli,Ligong Han,Xiaoxiao He,Zhaoyang Xia,Song Wen,Qi Chang,Zhennan Yan,Mu Zhou,Dimitris Metaxas
title: TransFusion: Multi-view Divergent Fusion for Medical Image Segmentation with Transformers
title_zh: TransFusion：使用 Transformers 进行医学图像分割的多视图发散融合
abstract: Combining information from multi-view images is crucial to improve the performance and robustness of automated methods for disease diagnosis. However, due to the non-alignment characteristics of multi-view images, building correlation and data fusion across views largely remain an open problem. In this study, we present TransFusion, a Transformer-based architecture to merge divergent multi-view imaging information using convolutional layers and powerful attention mechanisms. In particular, the Divergent Fusion Attention (DiFA) module is proposed for rich cross-view context modeling and semantic dependency mining, addressing the critical issue of capturing long-range correlations between unaligned data from different image views. We further propose the Multi-Scale Attention (MSA) to collect global correspondence of multi-scale feature representations. We evaluate TransFusion on the Multi-Disease, Multi-View \& Multi-Center Right Ventricular Segmentation in Cardiac MRI (M\&Ms-2) challenge cohort. TransFusion demonstrates leading performance against the state-of-the-art methods and opens up new perspectives for multi-view imaging integration towards robust medical image segmentation.
summary: Combining information from multi-view images is crucial to improve the performance and robustness of automated methods for disease diagnosis. However, due to the non-alignment characteristics of multi-view images, building correlation and data fusion across views largely remain an open problem. In this study, we present TransFusion, a Transformer-based architecture to merge divergent multi-view imaging information using convolutional layers and powerful attention mechanisms. In particular, the Divergent Fusion Attention (DiFA) module is proposed for rich cross-view context modeling and semantic dependency mining, addressing the critical issue of capturing long-range correlations between unaligned data from different image views. We further propose the Multi-Scale Attention (MSA) to collect global correspondence of multi-scale feature representations. We evaluate TransFusion on the Multi-Disease, Multi-View \& Multi-Center Right Ventricular Segmentation in Cardiac MRI (M\&Ms-2) challenge cohort. TransFusion demonstrates leading performance against the state-of-the-art methods and opens up new perspectives for multi-view imaging integration towards robust medical image segmentation.
abstract_zh: 组合多视图图像的信息对于提高疾病诊断自动化方法的性能和稳健性至关重要。然而，由于多视图图像的非对齐特性，跨视图建立关联和数据融合在很大程度上仍然是一个悬而未决的问题。在这项研究中，我们提出了 TransFusion，一种基于 Transformer 的架构，使用卷积层和强大的注意力机制来合并不同的多视图成像信息。特别是，提出了发散融合注意力（DiFA）模块，用于丰富的跨视图上下文建模和语义依赖挖掘，解决了捕获来自不同图像视图的未对齐数据之间的远程相关性的关键问题。我们进一步提出多尺度注意力（MSA）来收集多尺度特征表示的全局对应关系。我们评估了 TransFusion 在心脏 MRI (M\&Ms-2) 挑战队列中的多疾病、多视图和多中心右心室分割。 TransFusion 展示了与最先进方法相比的领先性能，并为多视图成像集成实现稳健的医学图像分割开辟了新的视角。

AI.tldr: 本文提出TransFusion架构，利用Transformer结合卷积层和注意力机制，解决多视角医学图像分割中的非对齐数据融合问题。
AI.motivation: 多视角图像信息融合对提升疾病诊断自动化方法的性能和鲁棒性至关重要，但现有方法难以处理视角间非对齐数据的长距离相关性建模问题。
AI.method: 设计Divergent Fusion Attention (DiFA)模块建模跨视角上下文关系，结合Multi-Scale Attention (MSA)模块提取多尺度特征全局对应关系，通过Transformer架构实现多视角信息融合。
AI.result: 在M&Ms-2心脏MRI右心室分割数据集上，TransFusion优于现有最先进方法，验证了其在多疾病、多视角和多中心数据下的有效性。
AI.conclusion: TransFusion为多视角医学图像分割提供了新的融合框架，通过注意力机制有效解决了非对齐数据的跨视角语义依赖建模难题。
